Name: VitalAire
Description:
As a global leader in home healthcare present around the world, VitalAire empowers all those living with chronic disease at their home.
We empower our patients for a better life, through personalized home support, every day, wherever you are.
At Healthcare Professionals side, we facilitate your practice by sharing our knowledge of each person living with a chronic disease and their follow-up data.
Alongside Prescribers, we are committed to actively drive the transformation of the Healthcare systems by firmly establishing the home as an integral part of the care pathway.

Name: Consumer Direct Care Network
Description:
Founded in 1990, Consumer Direct Care Network (CDCN) assists people who self-direct their in-home personal care. Self-direction empowers people to manage their own services and supports, so they have more choice and control over how their care is delivered. 

CDCN provides quality care and support to families and people of all ages, including older adults, children, and individuals with physical, intellectual, or developmental disabilities and veterans, so they can remain safe, healthy, and independent in their homes and communities. 

• Our Mission is to provide care and support for people in their homes and communities. 
• Our Vision is to help people live the life they want. 
• Our Values are Respect, Integrity, Service, and Excellence.

At CDCN, you will be a valued member of a team that prioritizes collaboration and compassion in the community. We support individual growth and helping people build their careers in the home-care industry.

CDCN has embraced a hybrid workplace structure. We employ 1,400+ administrative personnel. We work with Medicaid programs across the United States and are responsible for paying more than 138,000 caregivers who provide supports for more than 104,000 care recipients.

We are proud of the longevity and loyalty of our employees. Their commitment to doing great work is what makes us a leader in the home-care industry.

Name: Caregiver
Description:
Caregiver is a leading provider of services to adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD). We support our valued clients with the design, delivery, and management of personalized treatment plans to help them lead their best lives.

Our mission is to enable people with intellectual and developmental disabilities to lead their unique lives with dignity, independence, and inclusion.

Name: Visiting Angels
Description:
America's Choice in Home Care and Caregiver's Choice in Employment. Visiting Angels in-home care helps make it possible for seniors and adults with special needs to continue to live at home; while maintaining the independence of their daily routines and familiar surroundings. We provide non-medical home care customized to the needs of each client.
 
Our caregivers are the lifeblood of our business, providing compassionate and dependable assistance with the activities of everyday living to seniors, the disabled, and those recovering from surgery. Our services include light housekeeping, meal preparation, errands and shopping, and personal hygiene assistance.
 
Above all, Visiting Angels services help families spend mutually-rewarding and meaningful time with their loved ones and help provide comfort and peace of mind to those who face the challenge of long-distance caregiving.

Name: Valeo Health ME
Description:
Valeo Health ME | Integrated Healthcare Solutions

Valeo Health is a UAE-based healthtech company transforming how health is delivered in KSA and UAE. We provide science-backed solutions in longevity, weight management, diagnostics, and chronic care—all accessible through one seamless app.

For Businesses: We partner with organizations to create healthier, more productive workforces through our Human Optimization & Behavior Change Program. With advanced diagnostics, in-office health checks, data-driven insights, and personalized coaching, we reduce costs while enhancing employee wellbeing and performance.

For Insurers: We support insurers and TPAs with integrated telehealth (virtual consultations, triage, pharmacy delivery), chronic care support (ongoing monitoring and lifestyle coaching), and claims intelligence (data insights to reduce costs and improve underwriting). The result: healthier members, fewer ER visits, and controlled long-term claims.

For Individuals: Valeo brings healthcare home. From at-home diagnostics and supplements to doctor consultations, physiotherapy, and IV therapy, our platform makes proactive health simple and accessible. Users can track progress, receive tailored advice via Valeo AI, and manage their full health journey in one place.
Valeo’s model combines technology + human care to deliver measurable health outcomes—whether for individuals, corporations, or insurers.

Name: Home Instead UK
Description:
Here at Home Instead, our mission is to expand the world's capacity to care. Across the globe we care for thousands of older adults, helping them live well at home for longer. 

In the UK, we’re reaching more older people than ever with an expansive network of 240 independently owned and operated franchise offices who play a key role in their local community.

What we do

Our quality, award-winning home care services support wellbeing and allow older people to live independently at home in familiar surroundings. From personal care, companionship and home help to specialist dementia, end of life and Parkinson’s care, our CAREGivers can support a wide range of needs. 

Join our network

Owning a Home Instead franchise offers a truly rewarding opportunity in a growing market. We’re with you every step of the way guiding each franchisee throughout their journey, enabling them to grow a successful home care business that really does make a difference. 

Find out about our care services: www.homeinstead.co.uk 
Find out about our franchise opportunity: www.homeinstead.co.uk/franchise/

Name: ORKYN'
Description:
Depuis 40 ans, nous avons l’ambition d’améliorer la qualité de vie des patients à domicile. 
Nous les écoutons et les comprenons pour leur proposer le meilleur accompagnement, adapté à leurs besoins et leur permettant ainsi de vivre mieux.
Chaque jour, nos équipes travaillent en synergie avec les professionnels de santé, afin de donner à chaque patient les clés pour agir sur sa santé.  

C’est notre façon, à nous, de réinventer la santé du quotidien. 

Orkyn', une activité Air Liquide Healthcare.

Name: vittal - socorro medico privado
Description:
VITTAL is the leading healthcare extrahospital company with 25 years of uninterrupted operation and more than 10 million services performed.

More than 2000 people across the country are part of this organization that is present throughout the metropolitan area of Buenos Aires and other major towns in the country such as Cordoba, Rosario, Mar del Plata, Ushuaia, Bariloche, Tucumán, Alta Gracia, Carlos Paz, Chivilcoy, La Plata, La Rioja, Olavarría, Oncativo, Río Grande, Salta and Villa María.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: BASTIDE LE CONFORT MEDICAL
Description:
La société a été créée à Nîmes par Guy Bastide, Pharmacien de formation. Il est l'un des tout premiers en France à avoir développé cette activité au travers d'une structure spécifique, la SARL Etablissements Bastide dès 1977.

Au fil des années, la société a connu une forte croissance sur toute la France en procédant au rachat de
sociétés exerçant la même activité. La société a été introduite en bourse en 1997 afin d’accompagner
sa croissance.

Bastide Groupe est un Prestataire de Santé à Domicile (PSAD) qui dispose d’une offre globale (conseil, vente et location) de produits et de services destinés aux soins, au maintien et à l’hospitalisation à domicile des personnes âgées, malades ou handicapées.

Name: Nurse Next Door
Description:
Nurse Next Door Home Care Services is one of the fastest growing home care providers that is dedicated to delivering flexible, affordable and quality care options to seniors. Offering a full spectrum of home care services ranging from weekly companionship to around-the-clock care from a registered nurse. 

Nurse Next Door gives families peace of mind and helps seniors celebrate aging. Founded in 2001, Nurse Next Door operates across North America, Australia, England and is focused on becoming a globally admired brand.

Interested in owning a business with heart? Explore more at: www.nursenextdoorfranchise.com

Name: 24 Hour Home Care
Description: 24 Hour Home Care is an innovative and trusted in-home care company committed to making a positive impact in people's lives every day. Since 2008, we have delivered high-quality and personalized caregiving services to individuals of all ages and abilities. Today, we provide caregiving services to more than 16,000 clients and employs more than 16,000 caregivers across California. Our commitment to excellence has designated us as one of FORTUNE's Best Workplaces since 2018, and we continue to strive for excellence in all that we do.

Name: Hilo by Aktiia
Description:
Aktiia, now trading under Hilo, was established in 2018 to transform how blood pressure is measured and therefore managed.   

Hilo is transforming blood pressure monitoring with cuffless, AI-powered technology that delivers continuous, accessible insights for individuals and healthcare professionals. Our foundation model is trained on billions of optical signals and hundreds of millions of readings from over 120,000 users—one of the largest datasets in the field. Backed by a multidisciplinary team with deep expertise in biomedical signal processing, Hilo has contributed to over 120 peer-reviewed publications and holds more than 35 patents. Headquartered in Switzerland, we’re expanding globally to redefine how blood pressure is measured and managed.

Name: ISA Saúde
Description:
The future of healthcare is at home.
Our purpose is to make the home the best hospital in Brazil.

ISA is a nationwide healthtech redefining home-based care. By combining technology with a network of highly qualified professionals, we deliver hospital-level care at home with clinical excellence and compassion.

Name: Senior Helpers
Description:
At Senior Helpers our goal is to help seniors remain in their homes despite age-related illnesses and mobility challenges.  We are a premier provider of in-home senior assistance and operate through more than 320 franchised and company-owned locations across 43 states, Canada and Australia. Since 2002 we have cared for tens of thousands of seniors. 

Senior Helpers is proud to lead the industry in providing specialized training for our team members, such as Senior Gems that certifies our caregivers in Alzheimer's and Dementia care, and the industry’s first formal Parkinson's Care training program.  

Our team members believe that their work is meaningful. Senior Helpers is the first and only national in-home care provider to be certified as a Great Place to Work, and to be recognized by Fortune Magazine as a best place to work. That's Senior Care, Only Better.

There are many rewarding roles available with Senior Helpers, ranging from corporate careers at our national headquarters to managerial, administrative and care giving roles in local offices.   In national surveys, 95% of our team members confirm that working with Senior Helpers has special meaning.  We truly are a #GreatPlace2Work.  

If you’re considering working for a company where your work matters, consider Senior Helpers.

Name: AllesHealth
Description:
From Sick Care to Preventive Care. 
AllesHealth enables Clinical research required to enable Preventive Care.

AllesHealth provides cutting edge Clinic and Patient Management solutions, available as a white-label solution for clinics in DACH region. Its comprehensiveness makes it the most advanced EHR platform, seamlessly integrated with patient engagement tools. Compliant with FHIR-HL7 standards, AllesHealth ensures smooth data exchange with other Hospital Management systems and is also targeting to be compatible with OpenEHR standards.

AllesHealth provides core functionalities for clinicians and patient interactions, ensuring smooth data flow, TeleHealth Consultation, one-click referrals, AI audio-to-text capabilities, chronic conditions management, dosage adherence tools, labs and pharmacies integrations, and many more. 

We are pioneering the 'Partner for Good' approach, built on an ecosystem principle, inviting diverse digital solution providers (Dermatology, Ophthalmology, Diabetes, etc.) to integrate seamlessly into AllesHealth. This integration benefits both clinicians and patients alike. The solution comprises two main components to deliver a unified healthcare experience:
- Clinician Portal (Clinic Mgt Platform)
- Digital Companion (Patient App)

Name: HarmonyCares
Description:
Founded in 1993, HarmonyCares provides comprehensive medical care in the home, including in-home physician visits for older adults and individuals with complex health needs. We believe patients deserve high-quality care without the burden of leaving home.

By meeting patients where they are, our care model delivers greater convenience, improved outcomes, and a better overall care experience.

HarmonyCares delivers a comprehensive, home-based care model that includes primary care, wraparound physician support, lab and radiology services, palliative care, and health assessments.

We proudly serve patients and care partners in Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Michigan, New Jersey, New York, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Texas, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin - and will expand to Tennessee in early 2026.

Name: Copper Digital
Description:
Copper Digital is revolutionizing the home healthcare landscape with Copper AI.

We are an automation platform designed specifically for Home Health agencies to eliminate the OASIS documentation bottleneck. Unlike basic dictation tools that only record audio, our Copper AI functions as a digital workforce that solves capacity limits and mitigates compliance risks without disrupting your existing EMR systems.

Powered by our proprietary Smart Extraction engine, we deliver measurable results by reading referral PDFs and patient history to pre-populate 60% of OASIS fields before the visit begins. This empowers your care teams to review data instead of starting from scratch, which allows them to focus on what matters most, which is patient care.

With over 15 years of digital transformation expertise, our implementation programs and ongoing support have helped agencies achieve specific outcomes.

Clinician capacity increased from 4.8 to 6.5 visits per day
Reduction of survey deficiencies to zero through deterministic rules
Additional revenue generation of $340,000 per year for partner agencies

Our specialized services include:
OASIS documentation automation
Smart extraction for referrals and history
EMR integration with WellSky, KanTime, and Axxess
Staff retention and burnout reduction
HIPAA-compliant data processing

Esteemed healthcare providers, including Mount Sinai, Johns Hopkins University, Texas Health Resources, Medical City Dallas, Good Neighbour Pharmacy, AmerisourceBergen Corp, Waveny LifeCare Network, Walkingspree, and more, trust Copper Digital to modernize their operations and enhance patient outcomes.

Ready to transform your agency’s efficiency and profitability?

Name: SOS Oxygene
Description:
Reconnue comme spécialiste de l'oxygénothérapie, l'assistance respiratoire et la nutrition artificielle, SOS Oxygène a naturellement construit sa notoriété dans le monde de la Santé grâce à une écoute attentive des patients et une rigueur quotidienne.
SOS Oxygène assure une présence et un accompagnement de proximité. Disponibles 24h/24 et 7J/7, nos équipes attachent un soin tout particulier à offrir la réactivité attendue.

Name: CCS
Description:
CCS is a leading provider of collaborative care programs and home-delivered medical supplies for those with chronic conditions, specifically diabetes. With CCS as their partner, patients are more likely to get on therapy and stay on therapy – reducing costs and improving outcomes.

Our mission is to redefine at-home patient care for people living with chronic conditions by providing not only medical supplies, but also education, monitoring, and coaching. Patients are at the heart of what we do. Our core values-- Compassion, Certainty, and Advancement-- inform how we collaborate and engage with one another, directly correlating to the service we provide. 

If you seek a purposeful career that sparks change in the healthcare and patient community, join our growing team.

Name: MABA BABY
Description:
Maba Baby is a Dubai-based boutique family care service driven by a passion for accessible and holistic care for mums and babies.

"𝘍𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘵𝘳𝘪𝘣𝘦 𝘢𝘵 𝘔𝘢𝘣𝘢 𝘉𝘢𝘣𝘺"

Name: Elivie
Description:
ELIVIE est un acteur majeur de la prestation de santé à domicile présent sur l’ensemble du territoire français.

Nous accompagnons chaque année plus de 360 000 patients, en installant chez eux et sur prescription médicale, tout le matériel nécessaire à leur traitement.
Garants du parcours de soins à domicile, nous apportons à nos patients des solutions pour simplifier et sécuriser leur prise en charge, en coordination avec leur entourage et les professionnels de santé.

Nous intervenons principalement en assistance respiratoire, perfusion, nutrition, insulinothérapie ainsi que pour le traitement des plaies et leur cicatrisation.

• 57 agences dans toute la France • 1 540 collaborateurs • Interventions 24h/24 et 7j/7

Name: VON Canada
Description:
VON Canada has been leading care at home for over 125 years. Today, we are a highly-trusted non-profit organization that works with our clients, employees, volunteers and partners to provide innovative clinical, personal and social support to people who want the comfort and peace of mind of living in their own homes and communities. 

Our 6,300 employees and 6,500 volunteers deliver a wide range of vital health and wellness services, helping people remain healthy and at home for as long as possible.  

As valued and responsive health system partners at the heart of home and community care, we are distinguished by our commitment to client care and  by our strong community roots and local engagement.

Name: IMAD - institution genevoise de maintien à domicile
Description:
imad - institution genevoise de maintien à domicile fournit des prestations de soins, d'aide, d'accompagnement et de répit favorisant le maintien à domicile des personnes, tout  préservant leur autonomie.
Durant l'année, plus de 2'200 collaborateurs œuvrent ainsi au maintien à domicile de qualité de près de 16'500 clients de tout âge sur le canton de Genève.
24h sur 24 au 022 420 20 00
www.imad-ge.ch
info@imad-ge.ch

Name: Caremeez
Description:
CareMeez is a next-generation telehealth platform by Visiwell Solutions Pvt. Ltd., designed to make healthcare affordable, accessible, and instant for everyone—no matter where they are.

We connect users with qualified doctors and health experts across India through real-time, per-minute consultations via our mobile and web apps. Our vision is to bridge the healthcare gap in tier 2/3 cities and rural areas, while also empowering medical professionals with flexible working opportunities and enhanced digital presence.

CareMeez goes beyond mental health to offer access to a full range of specialists including General Medicine, Pediatrics, Gynecology, Dermatology, Orthopedics, and more—making it a comprehensive, holistic, and tech-driven health ecosystem.

 What We Offer:

Instant online consultations with certified doctors

Affordable per-minute pricing model

Access to mental, physical, and preventive care experts

A platform for doctors to earn, grow, and reach new audiences

 Our Mission:
To revolutionize healthcare delivery by making it digitally inclusive, socially aware, and economically empowering—for patients and doctors alike.

 Join Us:
Whether you're a healthcare professional, a partner, or someone seeking care—CareMeez welcomes you to be a part of the healthtech revolution.

 Learn more at [www.caremeez.com]
 Contact: Health@caremeez.com

Name: Asten Santé
Description:
Pionnier et acteur référent de la prestation de santé à domicile en France, Asten Santé propose une large gamme de services et de prestations médico-techniques au domicile du patient dans plusieurs domaines d’intervention : Apnée du Sommeil, Insuffisance respiratoire chronique, Perfusion, Nutrition, Insulinothérapie...

Depuis 50 ans, nos équipes pluridisciplinaires d'experts s’engagent auprès des professionnels de santé pour assurer une prise en charge globale et personnalisée des patients et garantir l’observance du traitement. 

Dans le cadre de prescriptions médicales, nous installons le matériel nécessaire aux soins et accompagnons 90 000 patients dans leur prise en charge à domicile. 

Nos 900 collaborateurs construisent une véritable relation de proximité avec les patients, leur entourage et les professionnels de santé. 

Nos experts assurent une présence et un accompagnement de proximité 24h/24 et 7J/7 sur tout le territoire français.

Name: Buurtzorg Nederland
Description: Buurtzorg is een thuiszorgorganisatie die met kleine teams, bestaande uit (wijk)verpleegkundigen en wijkziekenverzorgenden, zorg levert in de thuissituatie. Het gaat hierbij om verpleging en persoonlijke verzorging. Onze medewerkers kijken samen met u wat er aan zorg nodig is en zoeken samen met u en uw omgeving naar oplossingen.

Name: Sunrise
Description:
Sleep is one of healthcare’s biggest blind spots. Access is slow, confusing and uneven, and millions of people who need help never get it. Sunrise exists to change that.

Born from pioneering research on mandibular jaw movement, we built a chin-based sleep test that reinvented how sleep disorders can be diagnosed from home. That breakthrough has evolved into a full sleep-health platform: advanced diagnostic and treatment technology paired with clinical care delivered directly to patients’ homes through Dreem Health in all 50 U.S. states.

Across the U.S. and Europe, our 100+ clinicians, engineers and operators share one mission: make high-quality sleep care accessible to everyone. Backed by more than $50M, we’re taking on one of healthcare’s biggest challenges: the 1+ billion people worldwide who still can’t get the sleep care they need.

Name: Orkyn' (Ex LVL Medical)
Description:
La présence LinkedIn de LVL Medical est désormais inactive. Nous vous invitons à nous rejoindre sur la page LinkedIn d'Okyn' pour toutes nos dernières actualités.

LVL Medical's LinkedIn presence is now inactive. We invite you to connect with us on the Okyn' LinkedIn page for all future updates.

Name: LVL MEDICAL
Description:
Créée en 1989, LVL Médical est un des pionniers de la prestation de santé à domicile. 
Avec plus de 700 collaborateurs dans 40 agences et près de 70 000 patients pris en charge partout en France, LVL Médical se positionne comme un acteur de référence sur son marché. 
Engagés aux côtés des médecins et de leurs équipes, les experts LVL Médical veillent au bien être des patients qui nous sont confiés, en leur permettant de suivre leur traitement à leur domicile, dans quatre domaines d’expertise : l’Assistance Respiratoire, la Perfusion, la Nutrition et l’Insulinothérapie par pompe.

Nécessitant une prescription médicale, les prestations de LVL Médical sont prises en charge par l’assurance maladie et sans avance de frais pour le patient. L’assistance médicale à domicile présente de nombreux
avantages économiques, psychologiques et sanitaires et apparaît comme un complément ou une alternative incontournable à l'hospitalisation traditionnelle.

Le patient est au coeur de cette nouvelle approche du système de soins, qui conduit à une prise en compte croissante de sa qualité de vie.

Depuis août 2012, LVL Médical fait partie du groupe Air Liquide, leader mondial des gaz, technologies et services pour l’industrie et la santé.

Name: Cairns Health
Description: Cairns Health is creating a fundamentally better healthcare experience for people with chronic health conditions and those that care for them. We make healthcare more accessible by simplifying complex care plans, connecting care teams and meeting patients where they live. Through our conversational AI, patients use their voice to interact with our digital care companion, who proactively gives medication reminders, symptom checks, behavioral nudges and even engages in friendly conversation to ease loneliness. Cairns uses radar to put the patient in context and passively monitors their activities, including: heart rate, breathing rate and sleep stages, all without a wearable. The result is informed and timely intervention that drives improved clinical outcomes, reduced care delivery costs and a more satisfactory healthcare experience for all.

Name: Curelo
Description:
Curis Healthtech Private Limited, founded by Dr. Arpit Jayswal and Co-founder Parth Jaiswal, is on a mission to revolutionize healthcare through Curelo, our online aggregator platform. Curelo simplifies lab test bookings from local labs, ensuring timely sample collection at your doorstep, enhancing convenience for users.

Our partnership with Indian cricketer Shreyas Iyer, as ambassador and investor, has significantly contributed to Curelo's success. This collaboration reflects our commitment to accessible healthcare solutions. Strategic investments from IIM Ahmedabad, Tarun Katial (Zee5 co-founder), Dr. Chandra Verma, and Mr. Chetan Bhutta have further strengthened our innovative approach.

Curelo's introduction of a No-Cost EMI option on all lab tests, a first in India, aims to ease financial burdens for patients. Dr. Arpit Jayswal, our CEO with over a decade of healthcare experience, ensures high standards in accuracy and timeliness. Free home sample collection and standardized, time-bound services enhance Curelo's high-tech diagnostics.

Our commitment to accessible and affordable healthcare has earned accolades, including Dr. Jayswal's "Most Dynamic Entrepreneur of the Year - 2022" award and Curelo's "Health Tech Startup of the Year" recognition. Our mission is to offer millions a one-stop solution for accessible lab sample collections, making healthcare accurate and convenient.

Join us as we redefine healthcare with Curelo - Your Partner in Accessible and Efficient Healthcare Solutions.

Name: Sidra Healthcare
Description:
Sidra offer a wide range of domiciliary care service for people in need of special home care. Our care packages are tailored to meet all types of individual needs.

At SIDRA Health Care we always ensure our clients get maximum attention on an individual basis. Your loved ones get all necessary care and support needed on reliable schedules and always punctual. Our well-trained care givers are dedicated to the service and professional in their approach. They will make sure that your loved ones are well, safe and happy.

Name: Glow Beauty on Demand
Description: Licensed beauticians visit customers' homes for hair, nails, waxing, facials, massages, personal training etc. online booking with transparent pricing and profiles.

Name: Elder
Description:
We are a leading introductory live-in care agency, helping older people get the care they need, in the place, they feel happiest – their own homes.

At Elder, we believe life isn’t about how long you’re here for, it’s about how well it’s lived. It’s about getting the support you need without giving up your dignity. It’s about protecting your independence and making sure you’re able to choose the little things as you age – like what you have for dinner or watch on telly, right through to the big stuff, like where you call home.

The problem: 97% of people say they don't want to end up in a care home and yet the vast majority of people receiving full-time care end up shoe-horned into a solution they never wanted. Often alone and lonely, surrounded by people they don't know.

The solution: We're the alternative to residential care homes. We want your loved ones to be able to stay where they'll be happy, in their own home. They can stay where their memories are, sit in their garden, eat food they actually like, and are even able to keep their pets. All while their needs are being cared for by a vetted, experienced live-in carer, perfectly matched to their needs and personality. 

Elder is one of the fastest growing companies in Europe, and we have no intention of slowing down. We’re building the alternative to the care home across the UK & Europe and aim to reshape how society looks after its elderly. 

We are hiring! Get in touch if you would like to work with us!

Name: Familiehulp
Description: Familiehulp is dé partner voor zorg, ondersteuning en huishoudelijke hulp voor iedereen in Vlaanderen en Brussel.

Name: FirstLight Home Care
Description:
Our mission is to help people have their best day -- every day. 

Every caregiving situation is different. It may be a family member who has to take care of someone full-time due to illness or dementia. Or, it may be a friend who is having difficulties that often come with aging. Our caregivers are more than ready and capable of handling these unique situations. Your loved one deserves more than having someone who simply keeps them company. They deserve a caregiver who is passionate about creating meaningful relationships and motivated to do more.

Our caregivers will take on all of the tasks that must be done – cooking, laundry, cleaning, help with bathing and mobility. But we do more than that. We listen more intently, care more passionately and laugh more heartily. We provide comfort, companionship and compassion for any adult who needs the services of a caregiver. 

We know how important your loved ones are. We understand you want someone who genuinely cares. Someone who will treat them as the treasure they are. That’s why at FirstLight, we do more.

Name: PurposeCare
Description:
At PurposeCare, we believe care works best when it’s seamless, supportive, and rooted in the community.

For employees, that means steady hours, career growth opportunities, and a team that values your commitment. We know care isn’t just a job—it’s a calling.

For families and referral partners, it means trusted support across the full spectrum of care. From skilled home health to daily home care, our coordinated model helps patients recover safely, avoid unnecessary hospital visits, and live confidently at home.

With strong community ties, skilled clinicians, and trusted caregivers, we deliver more than care at home—we deliver peace of mind.

Name: NHC
Description:
NOTRE ENGAGEMENT, SATISFAIRE CHAQUE JOUR

Avec 25 ans d’expérience dans la prestation de santé à domicile et la fierté d’avoir pris en charge quelque 100 000 patients durant toutes ces années, nous avons développé une relation de confiance avec les équipes médicales sur nos métiers que sont la Nutrition Artificielle, Entérale, Parentérale, Perfusion, le traitement du diabète et du Parkinson.

Réparties sur tout l’hexagone, nos équipes comptent de diététiciens et d'infirmiers qui prennent le relais de l’hôpital au domicile ou en établissement de soins pour les patients à qui une solution de nutrition entérale est prescrite.

D’autre part, un réseau d’infirmiers, dédiés au diabète et au Parkinson qui recherche en permanence le bien-être de nos patients en leur apportant des solutions innovantes dans le domaine des pompes à insuline et du traitement Parkinson par pompe.
Toujours en quête d’excellence dans l’accompagnement de nos patients, et notamment des plus jeunes d’entre eux, nous nous fixons des engagements qui fédèrent notre action au quotidien :
- Proximité 
- Réactivité 
- Adaptation 
- Ethique 

Ces engagements, partagés quotidiennement par l’ensemble des salariés NHC, nous permettent de répondre au mieux  aux attentes des patients, de leurs familles et de l’équipe hospitalière en matière de qualité de service.

Name: Lar e Saúde Assistência Domiciliar
Description:
A Lar e Saúde, inaugurada em fevereiro de 2002, em Curitiba/PR, é referência nacional em Home Care. Atuamos em todo o Brasil, proporcionando aos nossos pacientes e seus familiares a tranquilidade e segurança de uma assistência domiciliar completa e de alta qualidade.

Inicialmente, nossas atividades estavam voltadas ao paciente pediátrico, mas, com uma demanda crescente por cuidados de saúde em casa, desenvolvemos um portfólio de serviços amplo e especializado que atende desde tratamentos pontuais até cuidados contínuos para condições crônicas.

Para oferecer uma cobertura completa, contamos com 07 unidades operacionais estrategicamente localizadas em Curitiba/PR (matriz), São Paulo/SP, Rio de Janeiro/RJ, Brasília/DF Cuiabá/MT, São Luís/MA e Mossoró/RN, que dão suporte aos  atendimentos realizados em todo o território nacional.

Nossa equipe multidisciplinar é composta por:

Enfermeiros
Técnicos de Enfermagem
Fisioterapeutas
Fonoaudiólogos
Médicos
Nutricionistas
Psicólogos
Terapeutas Ocupacionais

Dessa forma, possibilitamos que pacientes e familiares enfrentem os desafios de saúde com menos deslocamentos, mais acolhimento e cuidado contínuo — porque entendemos que estar em casa é parte importante do processo de recuperação e bem-estar.

Name: Asdia
Description:
Le patient au cœur de nos préoccupations

ASDIA a vu le jour à Strasbourg en 2002 dans les locaux du Centre Européen d’Étude du Diabète (CEED), une structure de recherche visant au développement de thérapies innovantes, qui pourront demain soulager voire guérir le diabète. Cette proximité a profondément conditionné notre approche métier, vouée à l’accompagnement du patient dans son quotidien, tout en ayant un regard porté sur son avenir. 

Fort de cet engagement permanent au service de l’éducation et du suivi des patients pour garantir l’efficacité de leurs traitements, nous avons progressivement élargi nos prestations à domicile afin d’offrir une prise en charge plus globale aux patients diabétiques. Plus largement, nous nous vouons aujourd’hui à l’accompagnement des patients chroniques, valorisant ainsi le haut niveau d’expertise de nos équipes et leur formation en éducation thérapeutique.

Nous affirmons aujourd’hui être « Plus qu’un prestataire », c’est-à-dire un réel partenaire aussi bien des patients que de leurs équipes soignantes. 

Chez ASDIA, chaque personne compte, car la qualité de notre prestation dépend des compétences et de l’investissement de chaque fonction. Nous sommes fiers de notre modèle, plaçant l’humain au cœur de notre dispositif et partageons des valeurs fortes, que nous déployons aujourd’hui sur l’ensemble du territoire.

Esta idea nació en Uruguay y hoy somos líderes en Latinoamérica y el mundo.  Formamos parte del Grupo Falck, empresa danesa líder mundial en prevención de enfermedades y accidentes; y líderes en asistencia en situaciones de emergencia.

Bloomlife is an award winning women’s health company solving the most significant yet underserved global challenges today in maternal health. We are redefining the way prenatal care is delivered by combining connected devices with cloud based data analytics to improve access to care, empower women, and provide clinicians with information to more effectively screen and manage pregnancy complications.  Our goal is to become the leading provider of remote care for expectant women globally. 

Bloomlife’s approach to managing high risk pregnancies allows obstetricians to more easily screen maternal and fetal risk, educate the patient, and quickly access high risk specialists regardless of a patient’s geography.  Our solution represents a marked shift from the way high risk pregnancies have been historically assessed using frequent in person appointments, paper logs, and long referral times.

Description:
At the forefront of home healthcare, Checkable is developing the first FDA-approved at-home strep throat test. Paired with a proprietary digital telemedicine platform to instantly connect consumers with healthcare professionals, you can skip the doctor's office and start treatment fast, right from the comforts of your home.
 
CEO and founder Patty Post grew tired of the constant drives and long wait times at the doctor's office to get her kids tested for strep every time they had a sore throat, only for many of the results to come back negative. After seeing how easy the test was to administer, Patty knew there was a more convenient way to bring this test home.
 
Along with the at-home strep test, Checkable offers an array of wellness supplements and a multitude of resources, including podcasts and blogs, to help keep consumers in the know about different aspects of their health from top to bottom. And with more home tests coming soon, Checkable puts treatment options at your fingertips, so you can focus on getting better.

Name: Another Way Recovery Services - AWRS
Description:
AWRS was created and built by a Veteran and Recovering Alcoholic.
We are available 24/7 and we are working diligently on In-Network commercial insurance coverage and winning new contracts rapidly.

Another Way Recovery Services Inc. (AWRS), and the medical entities with which AWRS is professionally associated, is an At-Home Detox and Recovery Services provider for the treatment of Substance Use Disorder (SUD) and Co-Occurring Mental Health Conditions authorized to operate in TN, GA, and NC. We are here to treat patients suffering from addiction in the comfort and reality of the patient’s home. We are strong advocates of what is often referred to as the Patient-Centered Medical Home Model, which has inspired us to create an At-Home approach to treating addiction.

We think institutionalization and decades-old treatment modalities & programming have proven ineffective. Relapse rates from SUD treatment institutions are now at 70%+ within 180 days post-discharge from a traditional treatment operation’s care. Nearly 100% of our medical, clinical, and administrative FTEs have decades of work-experience in traditional SUD treatment operations, and we have become disheartened by the lives further damaged or ended by repeated relapses. Combined, our medical and clinical professionals have over 100 years of experience treating the Disease of Addiction.

Vitalis Care est votre prestataire de santé à domicile .
Spécialisé en perfusion, stomatherapie, urologie et cicatrisation.
Depuis 2013, elle a accompagné de nombreux patients.

Notre équipe pluridisciplinaire intervient dès l’émission de la prescription afin
d’apporter son expertise, de mettre en place le traitement dans les meilleures conditions possibles, et d’accompagner le patient ainsi que l’équipe soignante dans le strict respect d’une démarche qualité rigoureuse.

Nos missions principales :
- La coordination avec les équipes chargées des soins par une infirmière coordinatrice joignable 24h/24. 
- Le conseil du patient avec des informations claires et adaptées sur le matériel sélectionné 
- La prise en charge du dossier administratif du patient et des relations avec Les organismes d'assurance maladie (notamment dans le cadre du tiers payant) 
- La formation technique du patient (et le cas échéant de son entourage) et de l'équipe soignante à L'utilisation du matériel 
- La livraison à domicile, la sélection et la mise en service de dispositifs médicaux adaptés par un personnel compétent
- Le suivi du bon déroulement du traitement par un contrôle hebdomadaire de l'observance et de La bonne utilisation du matériel 
- Le retour d'information aux prescripteurs du bon déroulement ou des difficultés observées 

 Nos priorités :
- Un partenariat fort avec l'équipe soignante 
- Un service maximal pour le bien être du patient 

Nos ressources :
- Direction commerciale
- Infirmières coordinatrices
- Diététiciennes 
- Pharmaciens
- Logistique et technique

Pour en savoir plus, rendez-vous sur www.vitaliscare.fr

Name: Amada Senior Care Northshore
Description:
Jennifer Novy, owner of Amada Senior Care NorthShore, has dedicated her professional and personal life to caring for seniors. A life-long Chicagoan, she uses her extensive senior care experience to help her neighbors in Lake Forest, Libertyville, Lincolnwood, Winnetka, Skokie, Deerfield, Highland Park, Northbrook, Glenview, Park Ridge, Wilmette, Glencoe and Evanston, Elmhurst, Downers Grove, Hinsdale and Western Springs live independently in their own homes and maintain a high quality of life.

Jenny says, “I have a master’s in gerontology as well as a master’s in therapeutic recreation, and I’ve been working with seniors across Illinois for the past 25 years. I feel very fortunate that older adults have always been a part of my life: I even knew my great-grandparents and my great-aunts. Most importantly, both of my grandparents on my mother’s side and on my father’s side played a huge role in my life. In fact, my grandma and grandpa lived just down the street and I was fortunate to help care for them when they were coming to the ends of their lives.

“More recently, we lost my father-in-law and my mother-in-law, both to cancer. They were so young, and we were not ready. But we were able to bring hospice caregivers into their home, and they made such a difference in the care both Mom and Dad received. They worked with us to provide comfort, and they made Mom and Dad’s lives better. They made our lives better, too.”

Now, Jenny and her team at Amada NorthShore work hard to provide the same level of compassion in-home care services for other seniors and their families. As Jenny says, “I really have a passion for working with seniors, and I want to make a difference in your life — for you and your loved ones.”

At Amada NorthShore, we know that the best home health and senior care is always a family endeavor. That’s why we go out of our way to treat each one of our adults and senior clients and their loved ones like a member of our own family.

Name: Ergo2.0 asbl
Description:
L'ASBL ERGO2.0  développe un réseau d’ergothérapeutes de quartier (de première ligne) où la prévention, la promotion de la santé et la reconstruction du lien social (voisin/voisine) a été mis au centre de nos actions. Réparti dans toute la Wallonie et Bruxelles (bientôt en Flandre), le réseau compte actuellement une soixantaine d'ergothérapeutes indépendants.

L’objectif de l’ASBL est avant tout de : 

1.	Fédérer un réseau d’ergothérapeutes de 1ère ligne (ergothérapeutes de quartier)
2.	Harmoniser et soutenir la co-construction d’actions individuelles et collectives autour de la prévention, la promotion de la santé et le renforcement du lien social
3.	Visibiliser le réseau pour chercher de financement permettant de rendre les actions accessibles

De cette manière, nous permettons aux ergothérapeutes de renforcer leurs actions tant individuelles que collectives, d’améliorer la qualité de leur travail et de faciliter les contacts avec le réseau. 
Actions de dépistage de la fragilité et d’accompagnement préventif individuel et collectif

Les ergothérapeutes de quartier proposent  une approche intégrée (holistique) pour un accompagnement transversal de la personne, et de ses aidants, dans le lieu de vie de son choix.

Les nouveaux outils technologiques d’information connectée  et les méthodes d’évaluation proposées par ces outils, permettent aujourd’hui la sécurité, le suivi et l’accompagnement personnalisés au domicile et en déplacement.

La personne  peut ainsi identifier la fragilité en temps utile et anticiper la perte d’autonomie (prévention) dans une relation humaine et positive, pour un réel projet de vie choisi par la personne.

Name: Digital Home Healthcare
Description:
At *Digital Home Healthcare* , we believe true healing doesn’t begin in hospitals, it begins at home.
In the warmth of familiar walls. In the quiet presence of loved ones. In dignity, comfort, and love.

Our journey began with pain, watching someone we loved suffer in silence, without the care they deserved. That moment changed everything.

It gave birth to a mission rooted in compassion: to bring professional, heartfelt healthcare to the place where people feel safest, their home.

We stand beside:

The elderly, seeking not just care but companionship.

Patients recovering from surgery, needing gentle, steady hands.

Individuals battling stroke, diabetes, dementia, or hypertension.

And those silently carrying the weight of anxiety, stress, and depression.


We don’t just treat illnesses.
We listen.
We hold hands.
We bring comfort, presence, and hope.

Our dedicated team of trained nurses and counselors delivers a full circle of care, from wound dressing and medication to emotional healing and elder support. 
Every act, every visit, is grounded in empathy, respect, and humanity.

With digital tools that simplify access and a team that never sees any client as “just a patient,” we are creating a future in Rwanda where no one suffers alone.
Where every home can be a place of healing.
Where care meets heart.

 *Digital Home Healthcare* ,  bringing love, dignity, and healing where it matters mostly.

Name: Reverence Care
Description: Reverence is an AI-powered operations platform taking over back-office tasks to drive standardization and improve efficiency for home care agencies. Reverence's scheduling and real-time care communications solutions remove several key pain points for organizations staffing home-based care models. We provide both "out of hours" and daytime support services, eliminating the need for on-call fire drills, driving consistency and best-practice workflows, and enabling more cost-effective growth for organizations building their client base.

Name: All About Home Care Limited
Description:
Rated ‘Outstanding’ by the Care Quality Commission, All About Home Care is a high quality, independent, community-based home care company serving the Tunbridge Wells, Tonbridge and Sevenoaks areas.

We help clients live independently in the comfort of their own homes, with support designed around their needs and wellbeing, our involvement ensuring the family can be confident that their loved ones are safe.

This can include assistance with daily activities such as personal care, medication, meals and domestic tasks, as well as companionship and accompanying clients to appointments or on trips. We help our clients keep active, physically and mentally, and socially engaged.

We also specialise in supporting people living with more complex needs, such as with dementia, with neurological conditions or towards the end of their lives.

Care can be to ease a return home from hospital or to provide a family carer with a break for an hour or two.

Clients are supported by small teams of familiar, carefully selected carers so they can get to know each other as individuals. Carers visit at times agreed to suit you, and for at least one hour, so no one is rushed and there is time for those little extras that make all the difference.

Carers receive dementia care training designed by the Alzheimer’s Society and social care qualifications through our training partner Hospice in the Weald.

We strongly believe that everyone should have the opportunity to enjoy later life while living independently at home.

With personalized services designed to meet unique needs, we work closely with clients and their families to craft tailored plans that support independence, skill development, and meaningful connections. Our dedication extends beyond services—it's about fostering an inclusive, supportive community that recognizes and values each person’s dignity and purpose.

 Join us in our mission to support independence, build community, and make a difference. Learn more at www.OurTownStudios.org.

Name: ARDEAT
Description:
Qui ne s'est jamais brûlé? Un four, le soleil, un produit de nettoyage et même parfois un accident sont à l'origine de nombreuses brûlures. Malheureusement, ces traumatismes peuvent perdurer et devenir de réels handicaps. En tant qu'infirmière spécialisée dans le domaine, je prends à coeur de prévenir les accidents de brûlure et le cas échéant de vous accompagner humainement dans cette épreuve de vie.
En effet, se brûler ne se traduit pas uniquement par une atteinte cutanée. La brûlure peut également avoir des répercussions bien plus vastes sur le devenir et l'équilibre psychique de l'individu lésé ainsi que son environnement.
Cette structure s'adresse aux professionnels de la santé, aux entreprises souhaitant offrir à leurs collaborateurs un cadre de travail sécuritaire ainsi qu'aux écoles, aux assurances et services publics soucieux de leurs devoirs de prévention mais aussi aux personnes touchées par la brûlure et leurs proches aidants.

Description:
Resolve360 is a digital healthcare platform that offers online physiotherapy services for 250+ different conditions, including orthopaedic, neurological, paediatric, post-surgical, and pain management conditions.

2.	Annulation de rendez-vous en ligne : Les patients peuvent annuler leur rendez-vous en ligne s'ils ne peuvent pas se présenter à leur consultation.

3.	Agenda en ligne : Les professionnels de santé peuvent gérer leur agenda en ligne et accéder à leur planning depuis n'importe quel appareil connecté.

4.	Gestion de patientèle : Les professionnels de santé peuvent facilement gérer leur patientèle depuis leur compte Docteur360.

5.	Téléconsultation : Docteur360 propose également des consultations en ligne pour les professionnels de santé qui le souhaitent, afin de permettre une prise en charge à distance.

6.	Paiement en ligne : Docteur360 permet aux patients de régler leur consultation en ligne, ce qui facilite le processus de paiement et réduit le temps d'attente en salle d'attente.

Docteur360 est donc une plateforme en ligne pratique et sécurisée pour la prise de rendez-vous médicaux, qui offre une large gamme de services pour les patients et les professionnels de santé.

Des conseillères sociales et des spécialistes de la prévention tabac complètent les équipes de soin. Sur mandat du Service de santé publique, la LPV contribue à la lutte contre la tuberculose.

La Ligue pulmonaire vaudois veille à protéger les données de ses patients. Retrouvez notre déclaration de protection des données en ligne sur lpvd.ch/declaration-de-protection-des-donnees

Name: Griswold Home Care (New Castle County)
Description:
Griswold Home Care offers a wide variety of services to accommodate the unique needs of clients. For over 35 years in New Castle County, Griswold has been assisting the elderly, adults with disabilities, and those recovering from injuries and illnesses remain comfortable at home by providing them the helping hand they need. Griswold Home Care provides the following services to New Castle County residents: companion care, hospice care support, personal care, homemaking care, live-in/overnight care, and respite care.

Griswold Home Care was founded 40 years ago by Dr. Jean Griswold at her dining room table in suburban Philadelphia after an elderly woman in her community passed away because she had no support system for care. She was deeply saddened by what she felt was an easily preventable tragedy and was driven to act. A true visionary, Dr. Griswold established one of the most successful non-medical home care organizations in the country despite her own MS diagnosis. Today, Jean's legacy lives on in the compassion, integrity, and experience at each of our 170 locations nationwide.

Name: Altriane • Mutualité Française Aveyron
Description:
Altriane • Mutualité Française Aveyron est une entreprise mutualiste dont l’objectif est d’agir au plus près des personnes pour améliorer leur santé et leur bien-être.

Défendre le droit à la santé pour tous
Le conseil d’administration de la Mutualité Française Aveyron est composé de membres bénévoles élus au sein des mutuelles ayant des effectifs dans le département regroupant 200 000 personnes protégées. Convaincus que la santé ne peut être soumise aux seules lois du marché, ils défendent les principes de solidarité et d’accès aux soins pour tous les aveyronnais, quels que soient leur moyens. 

Leurs valeurs : solidarité, équité, démocratie et responsabilité en invitant chacun à devenir acteur de sa santé et non plus seulement consommateur de soins.

Créer, développer et gérer des Prestations d’Accompagnement, de Services et de Soins
C’est le cœur de métier de Altriane. Elle développe des Prestations d’Accompagnement, de Services et de Soins (PASS Santé Mutualistes) destinées à favoriser un état de bonne santé chez toutes les personnes.

Près de 800 collaborateurs travaillent au quotidien :

pour prodiguer des soins infirmiers et de l’Hospitalisation à Domicile,
pour faciliter la vie quotidienne au domicile des familles, des personnes âgées ou handicapées,
pour accueillir dans des résidences médicalisées, les aînés qui ne peuvent plus vivre chez eux, en leur offrant un cadre de vie comparable à leur ancienne demeure,
pour proposer en optique, audition et dentaire des services et des soins d’une grande qualité à des prix modérés.

Name: Qatar Care
Description:
Our history traces its roots back to March 02, 2007, we proudly stand in our 18th year of dedicated service to the Qatari community. Qatar Care has embarked on an extensive journey, a testament to years of unwavering commitment, hard work, and the collective effort of all parties involved. As Qatar's foremost and largest provider of nursing and medical home care, we have consistently set high standards for top-quality personnel services.

Our extensive experience in Qatar's healthcare industry has enabled us to refine our ability to meet all client needs while adhering to the highest industry standards, Qatar law, and the Ministry of Public Health policies.

Qatar Care has demonstrated a strong commitment to excellence and accreditation in the field of home healthcare. 

In 2014, they became the first non-Canadian and GCC-based company to achieve Diamond Level Accreditation from Accreditation Canada International (ACI), the highest level of recognition in their industry. This dedication to quality care continued with subsequent Diamond Level accreditation in 2017 and Gold Level Accreditation in October 2020, emphasizing their patient-centric approach. 

In May 2023, Qatar Care received a Plaque of Recognition from ACI for a decade of unwavering commitment to quality care and patient safety. 

Furthermore, the organization has established global partnerships and certifications, including membership with Planetree International, actively pursuing certification, and participation in the DAISY Award Foundation to promote nursing care excellence worldwide. 

Qatar Care also holds ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certifications, underscoring their commitment to high-quality care and occupational health and safety standards for both clients and staff.

Qatar Care has built a substantial competitive advantage and established a trusted brand name that generated genuine goodwill and earned recognition for our commitment to excellence.

Name: Médecin à domicile
Description:
Médecin à domicile was founded for one basic reason. To provide the highest quality of healthcare to anyone in need, without the common restrictions of waiting in long queues, traveling or paying astronomical bill. It’s our duty to bring innovation in healthcare in Mauritius so that Medical care is easily reachable to the public at the comfort of their home, hotel or office. We give everyone in the Mauritius instant access to medicine, anywhere, anytime, for a minimal of cost. We firmly believe that you shouldn't be denied the best quality of care because of financial hardships, geographical limitations or simply due to time restrictions. Médecin à domicile is revolutionizing healthcare, and our aim is to change the world for a better living! 

Please note that we are not an ambulance service. We are doctor home visit on call as per schedule. But we try our best to reach to patient as per need. We provide remote assistance via phone whenever we can. Doctors are available during the day around the island for scheduled appointment usually same day (mostly in hours). A night the schedule calls depends on the availability of Doctor or case. 

We provide health plans, company doctor, preventive care consultation, pre employment medical and multilingual doctor for corporates and hotels as well. Our fee is low and our service quality is high. 

We keep innovating and are among the first ones to adopt e-health. With our app ‘Medecin.mu’ available for free on App Store and Google Playstore, we are changing the way we deal in healthcare. Now everyone can save their medical records on the phone and have it on-the-go. Patient can regularly update their vitals which helps them or the doctor to control their conditions in a more efficient way. 

Today we are Mauritius No1 Home healthcare service due to our dedicated team of experienced professionals who always work and treat people as their own.
Mail info@medecin.mu or visit our website www.medecin.mu

Description:
A subsidiary of Alliance Healthcare Group, Jaga-Me is a Mobile Medical and Home Care provider.

Many people prefer to be at home within familiar surroundings during the healing process. By making healthcare as accessible as possible, Jaga-Me aims to empower both patients and doctors/nurses/caregivers in the field to bring healthcare into homes. 

Together with every team member in the Jaga-Me family, our purpose has continually been to ensure that every health journey is personal, safe, and dignified for our patients.

We make real impact, to real people, using innovations and technology, and have been profiled for doing so by the Straits Times* and CNA**. Jaga-Me is supported by NTUC Income, Singtel, raiSE and SPRING Singapore.

Name: Tender Home Health
Description:
Tender Home Health aims to listen and provide clients with truly individualized care through it's thoughtful approach of increased freedom, continued empathy, lasting communication, and trusted support.

Increased Freedom
Our caregivers assist clients with daily activities, so they can devote their time engaging in more meaningful experiences.

Continued Empathy
All staff aims to fully feel and understand a client's situation in order to provide personalized and compassionate care. We go above and beyond to make clients feel heard and understood.

Lasting Communication
We provide continuous communication through obtaining consistent feedback from caregivers and staff, providing care updates to family and clients, and ensuring all responses are timely.

Trusted Support
From scheduling to visits, we only provide staff who are dedicated to learning how to best support our clients. Through a rigorous hiring process, we look to hire individuals we can trust.

Tender Home Health encourages our patients to free the path of restrictions they encounter on a daily basis. By providing our patients with the hands on support they need, patients are free to remember and focus on the significant endeavors in life – creating and engaging in meaningful experiences with family and friends. Some people who utilize home care services may feel that their independence is taken away, but Tender Home Health has the exact opposite philosophy. Our goal is to assist our patients and their families with less important activities so that our patients can have the freedom and independence to focus on the activities they love. Thus, our goal is not to have our patients feel helpless and dependent, but rather, to help reinvigorate their zest for life.

Name: Association de Coordination Sanitaire et Sociale de l'Oise
Description:
L'ACSSO est une structure de soins coordonnés et gradués à domicile entrant dans le cadre de l'alternative à l'hospitalisation et à toute forme de placement en établissement de santé.
Elle contribue à une prise en charge sanitaire, médico-sociale et sociale globale de la personne. Dans cet esprit, elle coordonne l'offre de soins de proximité.
Elle entend proposer un service de qualité aux personnes. Pour cela, l'association organise des évaluations internes et se soumet à des audits qualités externes.
Toute action est centrée sur les besoins réels des personnes accueillies. Ce principe concerne les activités , qu'elles soient thérapeutique, d'accompagnement et de soins.
Depuis plusieurs années, des enquêtes, audits et expertises ont été réalisées. Elles ont abouti à une reconstruction de l’association qui se décrit selon le projet ci-dessous en ce qui concerne la partie des soins.

Name: WashPod
Description:
The WashPod range offers 8 models of temporary, modular disabled wetroom that will help keep people in their own home without any need for adaptations if they're disabled or elderly. They can be installed in as little as a few hours with minimal disruption and can be rented or bought. They can even be funded by the Disabled Facilities Grant using our unique DFG Turnaround Service.

Designed by architects with a specialism for inclusive design and modular experts, there are now 8 models to suit most needs and spaces.

OTs and Case Managers LOVE the WashPod as they give people back their dignity at a vulnerable time.  

With short lead times and an aesthetic, robust construction, they can be carried through the property to inaccessible spaces and easily connected to the property's own waste and water systems. 

Both internal and external options give a less able person dignity until more suitable arrangements can be made, without significant disruption and stress to the family home. They keep people out of hospital or get them home from hospital quickly.

Name: Canary Care
Description:
We all want to maintain our independence, no matter what age we are. Asking for help can be a challenge and offering it can be just as difficult. The Canary Care system helps families make decisions about supporting their loved ones from home. It takes away the guesswork, reassuring everyone when things are fine, and flagging where a little extra help wouldn’t go amiss.

Canary allows you to see at a glance from your mobile, computer or tablet if everything is as it should be and will alert you if anything out of the ordinary occurs. Discreet sensors are placed around the home to privately monitor vulnerable people in their homes, keeping people independent for longer.

Canary can provide you with round the clock reassurance and peace of mind whilst allowing your relative to stay in the home they love. No cameras or microphones are used, ensuring complete privacy.

Name: Bevita Cuidadores - BH Savassi
Description:
Acredita-se que 70% das pessoas com necessidades de auxílio vivem em casa. E na maioria das vezes os cuidados necessários são oferecidos por familiares ou amigos. Ou seja, alguém terá que dedicar-se várias horas por dia e vários dias na semana para cuidar de um familiar. Pesquisas também mostram, que a idade média dos cuidadores é de 62 anos, sendo a maioria cônjuges. Portanto, muitas vezes são pessoas que também estão em uma faixa etária em que a necessidade de cuidados médicos é grande. Devido a esta necessidade foi fundada a Bevita Gestão e Assesoria em Saúde, que tem como objeto, prestar toda a assistência necessária. Sempre visando o bem-estar do assistido e de sua família, prestando serviços de alta qualidade. Estando sempre 24 horas a disposição da família, prestando todo o apoio necessário. Contamos com equipe multidisciplinar, onde incluem, Cuidadores de Pessoas, Fisioterapeutas, Fonoaudiólogos e Nutricionistas.
Trabalhamos com ética e sigilo, assim mantendo toda a privacidade do cliente assistido e de sua familía.

Num país de dimensões continentais como o Brasil o tratamento do autismo não é adequado ou mesmo disponível, trazendo atrasos decisivos no tratamento, com consequências danosas para o desenvolvimento saudável da criança. A falta de tratamento qualificado é um grave problema social, pois a necessidade de acompanhamento permanente traz sérias dificuldades para as famílias afetadas, comprometendo até mesmo sua saúde financeira. 

A TELA nasceu de uma necessidade urgente: levar atendimento de qualidade para os portadores de TEA e suas famílias em locais onde ele não existe. 

Investir no tratamento precoce do autismo é investir no desenvolvimento saudável da criança, favorecendo sua autonomia e, assim, no desenvolvimento social do núcleo familiar.

Name: GoodDays
Description:
Een leven kan niet zonder zorgzaamheid. Wanneer het je overkomt weet niemand, maar er is een dag dat het je niet meer alleen lukt en de eigen gezondheid tijd vraagt van het leven van de ander. En dat is soms best ingewikkeld. Als het op zorg aankomt kent zelfs de liefde voor familie of vrienden soms haar grenzen. Simpelweg omdat de kennis ontbreekt of omdat het fysiek te zwaar wordt voor diegene die de "mantel" van de zorg draagt. 

Wij vinden dat iedereen recht heeft op een zo'n zelfstandig mogelijk leven in de geborgenheid van het eigen huis. En zoveel als mogelijk aangesloten blijft op het 'normale' leven. Wij bieden -samen met alle betrokken - betekenisvolle ondersteuning en tijd. 

Samen zorgen we voor mantel zorghulp die aansluit op de individuele behoeften van onze cliënten, met aandacht, kennis en toewijding. Of het nu gaat om lichte verzorging, huishoudelijke taken of gewoon gezelschap, onze toegewijde mantelzorgers zijn er om de juiste ondersteuning te bieden.

Ons doel? Met elkaar zorgen voor een good day.
Dat klinkt zo vanzelfsprekend, maar het is elke dag weer bijzonder.
Wij zijn GoodDays.

At the center of hospice and palliative care is the belief that each of us has the right to die pain-free and with dignity, and that our families will receive the necessary support to allow us to do so. Hospice focuses on caring, not curing, and, in most cases, care is provided in the patient's home. Hospice services are available to patients of any age, religion, race, or illness.

Affinity Care Hospice was founded upon the concept of providing the best care by the best staff. We do not take your care lightly, and promise to keep you and your family informed and comfortable. Each member of our staff is wholeheartedly committed to the Affinity Care Hospice Pledge.

Name: FirstLight Home Care of Metro Atlanta
Description:
We are a premium service provider of caring and trusted caregivers, that deliver loving and compassionate care in the comfort of your home. Our trained caregivers offer personal care and companion care services in the home or residence for seniors or any adult who could use a helping hand. We are a leader for in-home caregiving services for seniors in the Atlanta area.

I started this business with the mission to better the quality of life for my parents’ and grandparents’ generations.  Growing up, I was blessed to have been surrounded by a loving family, older relatives and friends who have inspired me to live my life to the fullest with a sense of a strong purpose. Today, my husband and I find myself as part of the “sandwiched” generation, where our responsibilities span caregiving for not only our children but also our parents who are in the golden years of their lives.  We have been quite fortunate to have relatively independent parents, however; millions of people are faced with the daunting task of providing caregiving for their older parents or family members as their primary responsibility.  We completely understand that while we may all want to do the right thing for our loved ones, many a times it is just not practical to be able to devote the time, energy and effort they truly deserve. Our senior generation were strong, productive and independent members of our society during their heydays, however they have come to a point in their lives where they have to rely upon us, as their family members and friends, for basic daily living activities or even just companionship. This experience can become rather frustrating for them (and us). But the best we can do is ensure that they are cared for with love, dignity and respect.  Giving love and care for our seniors has been my constant ethos and this life motto has transcended into our company’s Culture of Care. Above everything else, we have built an amazing team of “caregivers with a heart”.

Name: aabo
Description:

aabo is a leading provider of next-generation digital health solutions that leverage cutting-edge technology, digital medical devices, and AI capabilities to transform the way healthcare is delivered. Our mission is to make healthcare accessible, accurate, and affordable by empowering physicians to perform medical exams in real time, remotely, enabling accurate diagnosis and personalized care for patients.

aabo is JITO incubated  registered healthtech startup company. aabo is derived from a Jain terminology – AArroggaa BOhilaabhaam which means “Good Health for All". 

Key Features & Benefits:
Digital Medical Devices: We have developed a range of advanced digital medical devices that seamlessly integrate with our tech platform. Equipped with advanced sensors & connectivity features, aabo devices are designed to capture and transmit precise medical data, including vital signs, imaging, and other relevant information, ensuring a comprehensive assessment of patients' health conditions. 

aaboHealthY - Tech Platform with AI Capability: 
Our robust technology platform serves as the backbone of our digital health solutions. Powered by AI algorithms, it enables secure data transmission, real-time communication, provides intelligent insights & assists physicians in making accurate diagnoses. 

Accessibility, Accuracy, and Affordability:
aabo is committed to making healthcare accessible, accurate & affordable. By eliminating the need for patients to travel long distances for consultations, we reduce the burden on healthcare infrastructure & improve patient outcomes. Remote examinations & consultations also contribute to increased efficiency, allowing physicians to serve a larger patient population.

Conclusion:
We are dedicated to making healthcare accessible to all, ensuring that patients receive the right treatment at the right time. Join us in our mission to transform healthcare and improve outcomes.
