Name: Docokids
Description:
Docokids is an innovative digital health platform revolutionizing access to reliable pediatric information and guidance. Designed to address critical gaps in pediatric care, Docokids provides parents and caregivers with immediate, accurate, and trustworthy support 24/7 through a user-friendly WhatsApp-based service.

Leveraging custom software, real pediatricians, and cutting-edge AI integration, Docokids bridges the gap between families and quality pediatric care. Since its launch in 2022, the platform has answered over 350,000 pediatric inquiries, establishing itself as the first pediatrician-focused chat service in Latin America.

With a strong commitment to inclusivity, expert pediatric care, and AI-driven insights, Docokids is transforming how families and caregivers manage children’s well-being, empowering them with timely, efficient, and reliable health support.

Name: Home Helpers Franchise
Description:
For nearly 30 years, Home Helpers Home Care has been the leader in home care franchising. Recognized FIVE YEARS IN A ROW as the #1 Senior Care Franchise and “Best of the Best” by Entrepreneur magazine, Home Helpers continues to grow as our independent owners continue to prosper. Our success is due to our unique system, world-class training and support, and the talent and energy of the most motivated owners in the industry. Our more than 28 years of outpacing the industry is proof we deliver both to clients and franchise owners.

Home Helpers Caregivers are like family when family can’t be there. But unlike models that limit your growth opportunities to companion care, our owners have the strength of four distinct revenue centers. In addition to respite care and transitional care, you also have access to recurring business through long-term personal care.

Each Home Helpers franchise includes DirectLink, our proprietary medical alert solutions suite, which offers round-the-clock peace of mind to clients and their families through 24-hour technology and monitoring services for even greater revenue opportunity.

Owning your own Home Helpers office is a unique opportunity to get in on one of the fastest-growing sectors of the economy while serving your community and bringing peace of mind to families in it.

Name: Apricot
Description: Apricot is the fastest way to complete accurate, compliant OASIS Start of Care documentation (and all HH visit types soon), leveraging generative AI technology to do the heavy lifting so your team of home health nurses can focus on patient care.

Name: Angels Of Medical Care
Description: Angels of Medical Care provides your care your way, with expertise and attention to detail. Our personalized support enables our clients to remain independent and enjoy a comfortable, fulfilled, and most importantly, happy home life. The cornerstone of our service is our commitment to listening to and understanding your individual needs. We think about care differently. Details matter, and our starting point are to fully appreciate each person as an individual with strengths, preferences, and aspirations putting them at the center of the process.

Name: Al Ataa & Al Rahma Health Home Care Center
Description: Al Ataa & Al Rahma Health Home Care Center is a management consulting company based out of Al Ain, Al Takhteet St., +971, Al Ain, United Arab Emirates.

Name: Keep Able
Description:
KeepAble is an online collaborative hub with practical content and free resources curated by our team of dedicated professionals to support CHSP care providers in delivering wellness and reablement initatives.

These insights and ideas aim to assist providers to work with and empower, older people to improve their independence and live happier healthier lives.

Redefine what’s possible with KeepAble, to add more good days and make every opportunity matter.

Name: Eonmed
Description: EONMED is revolutionizing the healthtech space by collaborating consumer app technology with the precision of clinical practices to deliver universally beneficial healthcare outcomes. The collaboration of Mission & Values of Angstrom Biotech and robust technological advancement of EONMED makes the dream of healthier and cognizant India come true.

Name: Health is Wealth Concierge Medicine
Description:
Health is Wealth Concierge Medicine (HIW) was founded in 2022 on the idea that patient experience, convenience, and direct access to their provider leads to better health outcome. We believe that our patients social circumstances, lifestyle, and desired engagement with providers plays an equal part in their well being as there biology. 

Primary Care, Mental Health and Self Care, Goal Based Nutritional Plans, Personal Training, Aging Parent Guidance, Adolescent Care, 2 week Specialist Referral Program, Corporate Medicine, and Executive health all at a location of your choice.

If you have thought about these questions before or would like to learn more, message us or check out our website.

Can you text, call, or email your doctor with intermediate party? 
Does your commute to and from appointments take up time from your family or passion? 
Are you looking for an added benefit for your Executive Team/Employees?
How much is your company paying for an Executive physical and with whom are you instructed to follow with after?
Is accountability a barrier in achieving your nutritional, exercise, or self care goals?
Do you feel you have multiple doctors, but no one knows the whole you?
How long does it take you to get in with a given specialist and are you satisfied with that?
Is your mental energy used thinking about care for your adolescent children or aging parents but you don't have the knowledge to know you made the right decision?

We look forward to teaming with you to provide more personalized care!

Name: CICADOM
Description:
Le retour à domicile suite à une hospitalisation ou une intervention chirurgicale peut être une source de stress remplie d'inconnu. 

Chez CICADOM, prestataire de santé à domicile, nous plaçons la santé et le bien-être de nos patients au cœur de notre mission.

Fort de nos équipes pluridisciplaires (infirmiers, diététiciennes, orthopédiste…), nous nous sommes établis comme spécialistes des soins à domicile. 
Nous offrons des services personnalisés et de haute qualité dans quatre domaines clés :

Plaies et cicatrisation : suivi et traitement expert pour favoriser une guérison optimale.
Perfusion : prise en charge sécurisée et adaptée, directement à domicile.
Alimentation artificielle : accompagnement complet pour garantir des apports nutritionnels essentiels.
Maintien à domicile : mise en place de matériel adapté au besoin pour créer l'environnement le plus serein possible.

Nous collaborons étroitement avec les professionnels de santé – médecins, infirmiers libéraux, et équipes hospitalières – pour assurer un suivi global et coordonné. 
Notre objectif est de faciliter le quotidien des patients tout en maintenant des standards d'excellence médicale.

Nos engagements :
Expertise et innovation : des solutions modernes pour répondre aux besoins complexes.
Proximité et humanité : un accompagnement bienveillant, axé sur l'écoute et le respect.
Réactivité et efficacité : une organisation optimisée pour intervenir rapidement et efficacement.

Rejoignez nous dans notre mission d’améliorer la vie des patients, une maison à la fois.

 Zone d’intervention : Rhône-Alpes, Paris, Strasbourg, Rennes, St Nazaire et Martinique. 
 Contactez-nous pour plus d’informations ou pour discuter de vos besoins en soins à domicile.

Name: Emagina
Description:
Emagina œuvre pour apporter aux soignants une solution complète, visant à mieux accompagner les patientes durant la grossesse à travers un dispositif médical connecté. Un cheminement vertueux, tant pour les patientes que leurs équipes médicales.

Le dispositif médical Emagina a été développé avec des sages-femmes, des obstétriciens et des kinésithérapeutes spécialisés dans le périnée.

L’accouchement, bien que naturel, est également un exploit sportif ! Il est donc important de se préparer physiquement et psychologiquement à cette expérience émouvante.

Notre objectif est de diminuer les risques de déchirures de grades 2 et plus lors de l’accouchement, grâce à une éducation du périnée durant les 4 derniers mois de grossesse.

Name: Grupo Huzzo Hospital Domiciliar
Description:
Somos um Hospital Domiciliar especialista em cuidar, personalizamos nosso atendimento humanizado para pessoas que buscam qualidade e segurança em seu lar, com isso trazemos conforto e bem-estar as pessoas e famílias que se encontram com necessidades de cuidados a sua saúde.

Levamos nosso Hospital para sua casa, com uma infraestrutura e profissionais das mais diversas especializações em saúde.

Promovemos as melhores condições de vida para nossos pacientes, garantindo independência para a realização de atividades de seu cotidiano, assim como um convívio próximo e afetivo com sua família.

Nossa equipe também leva uma personalização na entrega de medicamentos e insumos, temos profissionais exclusivos para a entrega em sua casa.

Name: Midwest Association for Medical Equipment Services
Description:
Serving the industry for 40 years as one of the most respected DME/HME Associations in the nation, MAMES continues to grow in strength and voice. We invite you to join us in supporting and advocating for our industry. Serving members since 1982 in Iowa, Kansas, Minnesota, Missouri, Nebraska, North Dakota, South Dakota & Wisconsin
Education ~ Advocacy ~ Collaboration

Name: Inaya Homecare Maroc
Description:
Inaya vous propose des soins à domicile sur mesure et adaptés pour vous et vos proches.
Notre équipe d’aide-soignants qualifiés et formés veille sur vous au quotidien en vous assurant attention et sécurité.

Name: Sylvian Care Farnham
Description: Sylvian Care is more than just a home care provider. It's a family own business of compassionate and professional care professionals who are dedicated to enhancing the lives of individuals in need. Our care services include: Live-In- Care, Personal Care, Specialised Dementia Care, Physical Disabilities Care, Night Care, Medication Management, Respite Care, 24-H Care, End-of-Life Care, Reablement, we offer a range of care services all personalised to our client needs. With Sylvian Care, you can enjoy the comfort and familiarity of your own home, while receiving the highest quality of care and support. We are covering Fleet, Farnborough, Farnham and surrounding areas.

Name: Carela AG
Description:
Carela ist ein solidarisches Spitex-Netzwerk mit Fokus auf die Angehörigenpflege. Wir unterstützen pflegende Angehörige und ihre Familien fachlich, finanziell und emotional. 

Das heisst: 
> Wir begleiten pflegende Angehörige individuell in der Pflegesituation (Pflegetipps, Hilfestellungen etc.) und beraten bezüglich Sozialversicherungen.
> Wir entlöhnen pflegende Angehörige mit einem fairen Stundenlohn (inkl. Sozialversicherungen) und übernehmen die Koordination mit der Krankenkasse. 
> Wir kümmern uns um alle pflegenden Angehörigen ganz individuell und persönlich, haben ein offenes Ohr für alle Fragen und Sorgen - und suchen mit ihnen die beste Lösung für die Pflege ihrer Liebsten. 

Unster Motto: Sie kümmern sich um die Pflege, wir uns um den Rest.

Pflegebedürftige können länger in ihrer gewohnten häuslichen Umgebung leben.

Institutionen im Gesundheitswesen werden entlastet.

Name: Americare
Description:
When it comes to your health, there’s no place like home – and Americare brings first-class healthcare to you. As a premier home healthcare provider with over 40 years of experience, we offer a comprehensive range of services and support to ensure that our patients receive the highest quality of care in the comfort of their own homes.

We offer a robust menu of services – including skilled care, home health aides, therapy, and pharmaceutical services –  yet we maintain a warm, personal approach that allows us to discern and fulfill the unique needs of every individual in our care.

Our passion is helping our patients live, heal, and age where they feel most comfortable, surrounded by family and friends – and everything we do is geared toward helping you stay healthy at home. With our comprehensive range of services, vast experience, and culturally diverse team, we provide an all-embracing home healthcare solution.

Name: Senior Helpers Canada
Description:
At Senior Helpers our goal is to help seniors remain in their homes despite age-related illnesses and mobility challenges. 
We are a premier provider of in-home senior assistance and operate throughout Ontario. 

Senior Helpers is proud to lead the industry in providing specialized training for our team members, such as Senior Gems that certifies our caregivers in Alzheimer's and Dementia care, and the industry’s first formal Parkinson's Care training program.

Name: Cocoon System
Description:
Our mission is to evaluate  dwellings and equip them with innovative and practical solutions that not only ensure comfort and ease for the occupants but also provide peace of mind to their loved ones.
By integrating state-of-the-art technology with lean, effective educational processes, we empower individuals to thrive in their familiar environments, regardless of age or mobility challenges.
Join us at Cocoon System as we redefine living spaces into safe havens, promoting an independent, dignified, and joyful lifestyle for everyone calling a place 'home'.

Name: SEPRODOM Réunion
Description:
Notre histoire a débuté en 2003 à l’île de la Réunion. Bien que développée en métropole, l’attente des professionnels de santé et des patients était importante à la Réunion quant à la possibilité de poursuivre son traitement à domicile.

Cette adaptation aux besoins a permis à Seprodom de s’imposer comme un prestataire de santé à domicile de référence dans les départements et territoires d’Outre-Mer. C’est naturellement que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Seprodom dans Les Antilles, et à Mayotte.

En 2014, le groupe Seprodom rejoint Air Liquide. L’objectif est de permettre à l’entreprise de continuer à renforcer ses services en s’appuyant sur la force et l’expérience d’un groupe international tout en conservant son identité et ses valeurs.

Name: Cuida.Life
Description:
A healthtech da saúde-sob-demanda em qualquer lugar. Desenvolvemos a plataforma de interoperabilidade para gestão da saúde do funcionário ou paciente onde estiver. 

Integramos em um só lugar todos os beneficios de saúde e os dispositivos de monitoramento remoto para uma gestão unificada e produtiva.

Name: Homes for Independent Living of Wisconsin LLC
Description:
For over 40 years, Homes for Independent Living (HIL) has been providing exceptional support to adults with disabilities within the community.  The diversity of our expertise, compassionate staff, and exemplary facilities makes HIL an impeccable organization.  Our goal is to enhance people’s lives!  

HIL is an 100% employee-owned human services organization that operates more than 100 residential programs located in more than 14 Wisconsin counties.  We are a leader in providing the best in residential and community-based services for individuals with a wide array of disabilities.  

HIL is a MyPath company.  Dwell in the possibilities.

Name: Bloom Healthcare LLC
Description:
Bloom Healthcare is a leading provider of in-home healthcare services, offering a comprehensive range of medical care to patients in the comfort of their own homes. Our team of experienced and compassionate healthcare professionals is dedicated to providing high-quality care that is tailored to each patient's individual needs.

Our Services:

Primary Care: We provide a full range of primary care services, including:
Checkups and physicals
Treatment of acute and chronic illnesses
Immunizations
Health screenings
Disease management
Medication management
Specialty Care: We also offer a variety of specialty care services, including:
Wound care
Rehabilitation services
Palliative care
Mental health care
Nutrition counseling
Telehealth: We offer telehealth appointments for patients who need to see a doctor but cannot come to the office.
Benefits of In-Home Healthcare:

Convenience: No need to travel to a doctor's office.
Comfort: Receive care in the comfort of your own home.
Personalized care: Our care plans are tailored to each patient's individual needs.
Improved outcomes: Studies have shown that patients who receive in-home healthcare often have better outcomes than those who receive care in a traditional setting.
Why Choose Bloom Healthcare?

Experienced and compassionate healthcare professionals: Our team is committed to providing high-quality care that is compassionate and patient-centered.
Comprehensive care: We offer a wide range of services to meet the needs of our patients.
Convenient scheduling: We offer flexible scheduling options to fit your busy lifestyle.
Contact Us Today

To learn more about Bloom Healthcare and our services, please visit our website or call us at [phone number]. We are also available for consultations via telehealth.

We look forward to helping you achieve your health goals.

Name: So Cal Premium Healthcare
Description:
At So Cal Premium Healthcare, we are committed to delivering compassionate and comprehensive hospice and palliative care services throughout Los Angeles, Orange County, and Ventura County. As a licensed Medicare provider, we specialize in providing exceptional care tailored to meet the unique needs of patients facing serious or terminal illnesses.

Our experienced team of healthcare professionals offers personalized care plans that prioritize comfort, dignity, and quality of life — ensuring patients and their families feel supported every step of the way.

Our Services Include:
 24/7 On-Call Support – Providing immediate assistance for urgent medical concerns.
 Pain & Symptom Management – Enhancing comfort through personalized care strategies.
 Emotional & Spiritual Support – Caring for patients and their loved ones with compassion.
 Expert Wound Care Services – Featuring physician-led wound care specialists for optimal healing.
 Continuous Care – Offering up to 30 hours of bedside support during critical moments.

Our partnerships with skilled nursing facilities, assisted living centers, and board and care homes enable seamless transitions of care, ensuring patients receive the support they need in the comfort of their residence.

We are dedicated to fostering meaningful connections within the healthcare community, building strategic partnerships that expand access to quality hospice care for those in need.

At So Cal Premium Healthcare, we believe that every moment matters.

Name: Platinum Homecare Ltd
Description:
Platinum Home Care is a professional home care provider based in Ireland. 

Their mission is to provide personalized, compassionate care to seniors and individuals with disabilities, allowing them to live safely and independently in the comfort of their own homes.

With a team of highly trained caregivers, Platinum Home Care offers a wide range of services, including personal care, companionship, medication management, meal preparation, and more. Their focus on individualized care and attention to detail sets them apart in the industry, ensuring that each client receives the highest level of support possible.

If you're looking for quality home care services in Ireland, be sure to check out Platinum Home Care.

#healthcare #homecare #homehealthcare

Name: Assistance Home Care
Description:
Assistance Home Care is your trusted partner for in-home care, specializing in Alzheimer's and Movement Disorder care in the Greater St. Louis and Chicago Areas. 

We are proud to have served over 5,000 families since opening our doors in 2011. In 2025, we are excited to welcome new clients and offer our dedicated services to those in need of in-home care. If you're looking for compassionate care for an aging parent or a loved one, our team is ready to assist.

Our Senior Home Care Services are designed to ensure the safety and well-being of your loved ones in the comfort of their own homes. With neighborhood locations in St. Louis, MO, St. Charles MO and Chicago, IL, Assistance Home Care is committed to delivering the best in in-home care services. 

At Assistance Home Care, we take pride in offering a range of specialized services that cater to the unique needs of our clients and their loved ones. Our main specialty is on providing top-notch care for those dealing with Alzheimer's and dementia. We understand the challenges that can come with dementia, and our team is specially trained to offer the support and assistance required for our clients and their families. Whether it's helping with daily tasks, offering a friendly presence, or engaging in meaningful activities of body and mind, we're committed to ensuring a positive and supportive experience.

We recognize that families often face the challenge of balancing caregiving responsibilities with their own busy lives and are here to support family caregivers with the respite they deserve! 

Assistance Home Care is often able to start providing in-home care in as little as 24 hours of a family's call. We have a variety of care schedules available to meet your loved one's needs, from hourly visits, to daily care, up to 24/7 care services. 

Connect with our award-winning Team today to learn more about how Assistance Home Care helps seniors and older adults age-in-place and remain at home safely under our care.

Name: Eumedical
Description:
Eumedical is a global digital healthcare company delivering innovative solutions that empower patients and organizations worldwide. Backed by our dedicated medical operations team, we provide teleconsultations in more than 10 languages, local prescriptions in over 80 countries, international medical escort services, and in-person house calls across Spain.

Based in Spain with global operations since 2022, we have successfully handled over 90,000 cases worldwide, issued more than 70,000 local prescriptions, achieved a 93% resolution rate, and maintain an outstanding 4.9/5 quality rating.

Eumedical es una empresa global de salud digital que ofrece soluciones innovadoras que empoderan a pacientes y organizaciones de todo el mundo. Con el respaldo de nuestro equipo médico especializado, ofrecemos teleconsultas en más de 10 idiomas, recetas locales en más de 80 países, servicios de acompañamiento médico internacional y visitas a domicilio en toda España.

Con sede en España y operaciones globales desde 2022, hemos gestionado con éxito más de 90 000 casos en todo el mundo, emitido más de 70 000 recetas locales, alcanzado una tasa de resolución del 93 % y mantenido una excelente calificación de calidad de 4,9/5.

Name: GenPhysio
Description:
GenPhysio | Trusted Care. Delivered Where It Matters.

GenPhysio is a national leader in mobile allied health, bringing high-quality, in-home care to communities across South East Queensland, Greater Melbourne, and beyond.

Founded in 2015, we exist to make healthcare accessible, efficient, and person-centred — supporting people of all ages, from children to older Australians. What began as a small physiotherapy service has grown into a multi-disciplinary team delivering thousands of visits every month.

We deliver care where it’s needed most: in homes, aged care facilities, schools, gyms, and hydrotherapy pools.

Our services include:

Physiotherapy

Occupational Therapy

Speech Pathology

Exercise Physiology

Podiatry

Dietetics

We’re proud of the strong, lasting relationships we’ve built with our clients and referrers. Every visit is an opportunity to create meaningful health outcomes and improve quality of life.

 Our BHAG: Deliver 1 million life-changing allied health services to communities across Australia by 2035.

Name: Homecare Gurus Ltd
Description:
We are a family-owned Health & Social Care company serving High Wycombe and its surrounding areas. Since our establishment in 2020, our services have expanded beyond Domiciliary Care to encompass vital staffing solutions for residential and nursing homes nationwide. Over the years, our team has grown significantly, now comprising over 100 dedicated staff members, including Nurses and Healthcare Assistants.

We are committed and dedicated in:

1.  Providing person-centred care: We prioritize the individual needs of our clients, ensuring dignity and respect in every aspect of our services.

2.  Effective staff recruitment, training, and supervision: We maintain high standards by carefully selecting, training, and supervising our staff. This ensures appropriate staffing levels to deliver safe and effective care consistently.

3.  Leveraging technology for a seamless service: We embrace technological advancements to streamline our operations and enhance the quality of care we provide. By integrating technology into our processes, we strive to offer a seamless and efficient service experience for our clients.

Name: Llesiant Delta Wellbeing
Description:
We support independent living through proactive and preventative wellbeing services 24/7, 365 days a year.

Our aim is to improve your independence by providing help or support whenever you need it.

We are a Local Authority Trading Company wholly owned by Carmarthenshire County Council.  We were set up in June 2018 and involved the transfer of the Council’s Careline service, which had been in operation for over 30 years.

We are a centre of excellence for Technology Enabled Care.  Our focus is on ensuring that our customers receive the very best advice on how the latest technology be it in the home or when out and about can improve their independence. By constantly ensuring that we offer the most up to date technology, and by working with industry partners and groups, we can ensure a wide range of equipment, enabling us to develop bespoke solutions for our customers that can support and maintain independence for a wide range of needs.

Name: Guardian Angel Homecare Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to Guardian Angel Homecare!

Founded in 2012 with a mission to help people lead better lives through compassionate care, we have been delivering exceptional service and companionship, in line with international standards, to those under our care.

Guardian Angel holds the distinction of being the first Home healthcare organization in South India to receive Quality Accreditation from Quality and Accreditation Institute (QAI), New Delhi. We are also the first Home Healthcare Organization from South Asia and Africa to be selected for the prestigious Stanford Seed Transformation Program, offered by Stanford University Graduate School of Business.

Thanks to the professionalism and dedication of our specially trained staff, we have set a benchmark in home healthcare in India. Guardian Angel provides a comprehensive range of in-home care services, including compassionate care provided by highly trained caregivers and professional services such as skilled nursing, physiotherapy, speech therapy, and doctor consultations. Our services offer a hospital-like experience in the comfort of your own home. Our dedicated support staff is always available to coordinate all aspects of your care and address any concerns or requirements promptly and efficiently.

You can avail of our services from Kochi & Thiruvalla.  Connect with us to know more

Name: Achievement Behavior Services
Description: Are you passionate about helping children and families diagnosed with Autism?  Are you looking for an agency that you can grow within your career? Achievement Behavior Services is a leading provider of in-home ABA services, and actively seeks a Board Certified Behavior Analyst (BCBA) dually Licensed as a Behavior Analyst (LBA) or Limited Permit.

Name: Oasis Health Partners
Description:
We love helping people!

We understand there is no place like home. Oasis Health Partners is a home health agency that works closely with healthcare providers to deliver personalized, expert care to patients in their own home. 

Our goal is to minimize the burden of illness through compassionate highly skilled care provided efficiently and hassle free.

Name: Access Personal Support, Ltd
Description: Access Personal Support Ltd. is committed to providing the highest quality of care possible while recognizing each client's unique needs and level of independence. Access works collaboratively with Long Term Care Homes, Retirement Facilities, and  Home Healthcare Agencies to provide  support with  staffing challenges related to employee illness, job vacancy, training and or/vacation.  Access strives to work in unison with these organizations to ensure that clients received the highest caliber of care on a consistent basis.

Name: Adomo Health
Description:
Adomo Health delivers high-quality diagnostic and therapeutic services directly to your patients' homes.

We specialize in providing high-touch, mobile diagnostic and urgent care services that reflect the same level of excellence as the patients' home practice. Whether it’s a blood draw, ultrasound, X-Ray, or a comprehensive housecall, our experienced clinical team can act as an extension of any medical practice and offer the highest quality of care to patients.

What We Offer:

- 24/7 on-demand urgent care and diagnostics at home, office, hotel (or anywhere else!)
- Mobile services including blood work, imaging, and full-service clinical visits
- White-glove coordination: we handle scheduling, follow-ups, lab logistics, and everything in between
- A seamless, elevated experience for both patients and practice teams

At Adomo Health, we believe healthcare should be convenient, comfortable, and most importantly, patient-centric. We allow practices to extend their reach, all while reducing reliance on high-risk emergency rooms and urgent cares.

With Adomo Health patients receive prompt, high-quality care—wherever they are.

Name: Homelove Pet Health
Description: Homelove brings pet care and vet care into the comfort of home. Pet owners who need help at home with routine pet care can book visits with us. We also partner with local veterinary practices to offer convenient, at-home services and improve access to care.

Name: Entera Healthcare LTD
Description:
Entera Healthcare is the region's leading provider of comprehensive health care services.

With an award-winning program, nationally recognized physicians, world class technology and a sincere commitment to the community, we are delivering advanced health care programs and services, distinguished by the skill and compassion of our physicians, nurses and caregivers.

We believe in providing services of the highest quality and in achieving superior levels of patient satisfaction through the combined efforts of our outstanding team.

Name: Posture Partnership
Description: Specialising in 24 hour postural care and seating for people with complex physical disabilities. Offering expertise, support and training in postural care and seating for individuals, families, support teams and other professionals to improve comfort, function and protect body shape.

Name: OMNES S.R.L.
Description: Empresa de internación domiciliaria, brinda servicios prestacionales a pacientes que no pueden acceder a atención ambulatoria. Servicios de enfermería, atención médica, kinesiología, nutrición, fonoaudiología, terapia ocupacional, alimentación enteral, asistencia respiratoria, entre otros.

Name: ISIS PARKINSON & IMMUNO
Description:
Le pôle neurologie (ISIS PARKINSON / ISIS IMMUNO) est dédié à la prise en charge des patients atteints de pathologies neurologiques chroniques, traitées par pompe externe. Notre expertise se concentre sur :

- La maladie de Parkinson
- La Polyradiculonévrite Inflammatoire Démyélinisante Chronique (PIDC)

En nous consacrant spécifiquement à ces pathologies, nous faisons le choix d’être au plus proche des patients, avec un accompagnement adapté et fondé sur une connaissance approfondie des traitements et des spécificités de chaque parcours.

Name: Visiting Angels Northern Ireland
Description:
At Visiting Angels Northern Ireland, we’re redefining what quality home care means. We believe great care starts with great carers, that’s why we put our care professionals at the heart of everything we do. When carers feel valued, supported, and empowered, the people they care for receive the best possible service.
From companionship and personal care to specialist dementia and respite support, our care is tailored around each individual, built on respect, dignity, and genuine human connection. Families trust us because we go beyond care tasks, we build relationships, bring reassurance, and help people live happily and safely in their own homes.
We’re proud to be part of the award-winning Visiting Angels network, one of the most trusted and fastest-growing home care providers, bringing world-class care standards with a truly local, personal touch.

At Visiting Angels Northern Ireland, we’re building more than a care service, we’re creating a movement that celebrates carers, uplifts communities, and transforms the way home care feels.
If you’re looking for care that treats your loved one like family or a career that lets you make a real difference every single day you’ll find it here with us.

Name: Caring Senior Service - Arlington
Description:
Caring Senior Service of Arlington is dedicated to providing seniors with the highest quality of in-home care, ensuring safety, independence, and dignity in their own homes. Led by Negar Haghkar, a compassionate and experienced professional, our team is committed to delivering personalized support through our signature GreatCare method, designed to meet the unique needs of each client.

Negar brings a blend of expertise and empathy to her role as owner, drawing on a background as a successful real estate broker and a deep dedication to enhancing the lives of seniors. Her vision is to create a warm, respectful, and reliable caregiving environment, focusing on fostering trusted relationships with clients and caregivers alike.

We carefully select caregivers who demonstrate a true passion for senior care, and we equip them with ongoing training to ensure they are at the forefront of best practices. Name: Home Care Nurse Consultant
Description:

The objective for Melissa is to simplify and strategize home care businesses to have the operational capacity to meet the ever changing compliance requirements for Home Care and NDIS businesses.

Areas of Expertise:
•	Home Care, Private and NDIS models of care
•	Clinical oversight and advice
•	Clinical File Reviews
•	Care Planning and Management (including training)
•	Clinical Governance
•	Corporate Governance
•	Continuous Improvement Plans
•	Internal Audit and becoming Audit ready – Home Care and NDIS
•	Education module development
•	Competency development
•	Policy, Procedures and Forms – Assessment and creation
•	Complaint and Incident Investigation
•	Response to Commission requests

Contact Melissa at melissa@homecarenurseconsultant.com.au to discuss engagement opportunities.

Name: Visiting Angels Littleton, CO
Description:
At Visiting Angels, we understand you want top quality senior home care services for your loved one. You are searching for a qualified, professional elder care provider who will treat your family member with compassion, respect, and dignity. We can help you find the senior home care provider that meets all your needs. Our caregivers are professionals with the training and skills you have been searching for. 

When you trust Visiting Angels to provide care services for your family, it is with the understanding that your loved one's needs will be met. The expertise of our caregivers makes it possible for us to provide a wide range of in home care services. Our offices provides care to meet both temporary and long-term care needs, and we are available to provide hourly care, overnight care, and 24 hour care.

Visiting Angels' elder care services incorporate what are commonly known as activities of daily living. Our service coordinators are trained to create a personalized care plan for your loved one. Visiting Angels provides families with respite care, friendly companionship, personal care, hygiene assistance, meal planning and preparation, light housekeeping, laundry assistance, medication reminders, and assistance running errands. With your personalized care plan, you can customize our services to meet all your elder care needs.

No matter the type of elder care we provide, you can count on our commitment to you remaining the same. We will provide top quality care that enables your loved one to maintain their independence and dignity. Our professional, compassionate caregivers will work closely with your loved one so they can continue to live at home and enjoy the lifestyle that makes them content. 

Assisted living facilities and nursing homes aren't the only options for elder care services. With Visiting Angels as your elder care services provider, your loved one can continue living at home. Give your loved one the gift of quality care in familiar surroundings!

Name: Wilson Care Group
Description:
Wilson Care Group is one of Hawaii's largest long-term care providers, encompassing multiple entities dedicated to exceptional healthcare services. This includes Wilson Homecare, a licensed home health and homecare agency, and Wilson Senior Living Kailua, a state-licensed Expanded Type II adult residential care home.

In early 2020, amidst growing concerns over global PPE shortages, founder Shelley Wilson took swift action to secure protective equipment for Wilson Care Group's 500 nurses, caregivers, and clients. Recognizing the community's broader needs, she launched Be Well Hawaii to provide medical-grade PPE to hospitals, first responders, government agencies, and other essential organizations.

To further support families, businesses, and local operations, Alohamask.com, a division of Be Well Hawaii, was created to ensure that face masks, gloves, thermometers, and sanitizers remain accessible to everyone.

Wilson Care Group remains committed to serving Hawaii with care, innovation, and community spirit.

Name: Thuisteam Twente
Description:
Thuisteam Twente is een kleinschalig georganiseerde zorgorganisatie. De stichting is werkzaam in Almelo en de gemeenten rond Almelo. Thuisteam Twente levert maatschappelijke ondersteuning en praktische hulp op het snijvlak van Wlz, WMO, Beschermd Wonen, Jeugdwet en Forensische zorg. Dit bieden we aan mensen die het moeilijk vinden regie te voeren over hun dagelijks leven. Soms is deze ondersteuning tijdelijk en helpen medewerkers van de stichting  iemand weer op weg. Soms is deze ondersteuning voor langere tijd of moeten in overleg met de cliënt en diens omgeving onderdelen van het dagelijks leven zelfs blijvend worden overgenomen. Thuisteam Twente denkt niet in doelgroepen maar  bekijkt samen met de cliënt en diens omgeving wat er aan hulp nodig is en hoe dit het best kan worden georganiseerd.

Als het nodig is, biedt Thuisteam Twente naast ondersteuning en praktische maatschappelijke hulp ook basisverzorging en huishoudelijke hulp. Daarnaast biedt Thuisteam Twente haar  cliënten in een netwerkorganisatie in samenwerking met een aantal samenwerkingspartners mogelijkheden voor arbeidsmatige dagactiviteit of ontspanning.

Thuisteam Twente werkt in een extramurale setting. Een deel van de  cliëntengroep heeft echter in meer of mindere mate een beschermde woonomgeving nodig. Het zorgaanbod is hier op afgestemd. In een extramurale setting biedt de stichting veiligheid en structuur middels een Avondronde (surveillancedienst), 24/7 bereikbaarheidsdienst en korte lijnen tussen cliënt, mantelzorgers, zorgverleners en ondersteunende medewerkers. Uiteraard werkt Thuisteam Twente hierbij als het nodig is samen met andere thuiszorgorganisaties (verpleging), behandelaren en andere instanties.


www.thuisteamtwente.nl

Name: MiiHealth
Description:
MiiHealth is a digital health innovator dedicated to empowering aging in place through advanced technology. As a Microsoft Partner Service, Samsung Health Partner Service, AARP AgeTech Collaborative Portfolio Company, and Mayo Clinic ASU MedTech Accelerator Portfolio Company, our team is composed of top computer engineers and scientists from institutions like Cambridge, Stanford, MIT, and Tel Aviv.

We have developed Monica, a conversational AI companion and medical assistant designed to support both the physical and emotional well-being of older adults. Monica engages users in natural, meaningful, and empathetic dialogues, offering personalized health advice and emotional support.

MiiHealth’s solutions integrate cutting-edge AI with non-intrusive sensing technologies, ensuring privacy and dignity without the need for cameras or video recording. Our approach not only monitors and manages chronic conditions but also enhances overall quality of life by fostering social connections and combating loneliness.

MiiHealth is revolutionizing digital health, making it more accessible, affordable, and responsive to the needs of our aging population.

Name: Your Mate Community Services
Description:
Your Mate Community Services (YMCS) is a Melbourne-based disability support provider committed to delivering high-quality, person-centred care. We work alongside people with disabilities to promote independence, build capacity, and ensure genuine community inclusion.

Our mission is to support individuals to live life on their own terms, empowered, respected, and connected. We recognise that every person’s journey is unique, and we tailor our supports to honour their goals, preferences, and lived experiences. Our approach is holistic, culturally sensitive, and grounded in dignity, choice, and compassion.

We offer a wide range of NDIS-funded supports, including:

-Community participation: Building social connections and accessing meaningful activities in the community
-In-home support: Assistance with daily living tasks such as cooking, cleaning, and personal care
-Supported Independent Living (SIL): 24/7 support in shared or individual living arrangements
-Respite and Short-Term Accommodation (STA): Temporary care to support participants and give carers a break
-Transport assistance: Helping participants get to appointments, activities, or social outings
-Support coordination: Helping participants understand and implement their NDIS plan
-Skills development: Supporting participants to build life skills such as cooking, budgeting, communication, and decision-making

Whether you need a little help or a lot, Your Mate Community Services is here to walk beside you, supporting one mate at a time, with a mate you can truly count on.

Name: Indicatie Zusters
Description: Als wijkverpleegkundige weten wij als geen ander wat voor een druk er momenteel op de zorg staat. Om de werkdruk te verlichten ondersteunen wij uw organisatie graag in de administratieve lasten. Mist u indicerend verpleegkundige in uw bedrijf? Bijvoorbeeld door langdurig ziekte, zwangerschapsverlof of is er momenteel simpelweg te veel druk? Thuiszorg Zusters kan in deze tijd de indicaties voor uw bedrijf blijven uitschrijven, monitoren en evalueren. Hierdoor kunnen uw medewerkers zich bezighouden met het leveren van de zorg. Thuiszorg Zusters vindt het belangrijk om onafhankelijkheid te bieden in het stellen van een indicatie, wij geven een op de persoon gepersonaliseerd indicatiebesluit af. De indicatie voldoet aan de landelijk gestelde normen.

Name: MidwifeX
Description:
Pregnancy is a powerful and life-changing experience—but it isn’t always straightforward. In today’s overstretched NHS, getting regular time with your named midwife can be tough. That’s where MidwifeX steps in.

Our goal? Less stress. More confidence. A smoother, safer pregnancy journey—no matter who you are or where you come from.

Temos como visão ser referência nacional em atenção domiciliar, reconhecida pela inovação nos cuidados e pelo impacto positivo na qualidade de vida das famílias atendidas.

E vivemos nossos valores todos os dias:
 Humanização no atendimento
 Respeito à dignidade e às emoções
 Trabalho em equipe com ética e profissionalismo
 Inovação contínua
 Dedicação, foco e fé no propósito de cuidar

Atuamos com uma equipe multiprofissional completa: médicos, enfermeiros, técnicos, fisioterapeutas, fonoaudiólogos, nutricionistas e cuidadores, garantindo atendimento integral para diferentes níveis de complexidade:

Name: Comfort Keepers - Pittsburgh, PA
Description:
Tom Donohue and his wife, Mary, a Registered Nurse, founded the first Pittsburgh Comfort Keepers office 13 years ago. Tom became interested in home senior care while his elderly father suffered from dementia. They provided in-home senior care for him and realized the need for trusting and compassionate home care. It has been their mission to provide a caring and professional elder care services to seniors in need both physically and mentally. Through their offices’ thorough screening and interview process they have surrounded themselves with a caring and dedicated staff. Clients have responded with their comments of praise and encouragement for the home health care services they and their family have received.

Each year since the founding of the Pittsburgh office, the Donohues have experienced substantial growth. As the need for additional caregivers grew, Tom and Mary obtained a second territory in 2007 covering Upper St. Clair, Peters Township, North Strabane, McMurray, Finleyville and other areas of northern Washington and southern Allegheny Counties. All administrative operations continued in the main office in the South Park / Pleasant Hills area. In 2008, Mary assumed management of a new territory with a satellite office based in Monroeville.

This office too has experienced a large demand for elder care services in the Penn Hills, Plum, Murrysville, North Huntingdon and other municipalities in eastern Allegheny and western Westmoreland Counties.

Description:
Overgenomen door Jouw Metgezel.

Metgezel helpt mensen in complexe (zorg)situaties op alle levensterreinen om de situatie zo overzichtelijk en weinig complex als mogelijk te maken. Want soms heeft de reguliere ondersteuning te weinig antwoorden. Als cliënt en gezin houd je zelf de regie. 

We focussen ons voor nu op 5 doelgroepen:
- Mensen met zeer ernstig verstandelijke meervoudige beperkingen en hun naasten, 
- Mensen met autisme en hun naasten,
- Mensen met grote problemen als gevolg van niet- aangeboren hersenletsel en hun naasten, 
- Mensen met licht verstandelijk beperkingen en ernstige gedragsproblematiek en hun naasten, 
- Naasten van mensen met beperkingen en complexe problematiek en met een eigen behoefte aan gco. 

Binnen de organisatie is er veel aandacht voor het signaleren, leren en doorontwikkelen zodat we steeds eerder in staat zijn om cliënten en gezinnen in een complexe (zorg)situatie te helpen. 

Door kennis en ervaring te delen wordt de deskundigheid van alle betrokken partijen bevorderd. Samen zorgen we dat complexe situaties niet nog complexer worden, ook als dat niet zo vanzelfsprekend is.

Name: HOP!
Description:
HOP! is an AI-powered education and quality improvement platform built specifically for post-acute care providers.

We solve a fundamental problem in post-acute care: the disconnect between quality data and frontline staff education. When your satisfaction scores drop or a survey finding lands, the challenge isn't identifying the problem—it's getting the right training to the right people, fast.

HOP connects your compliance and quality metrics directly to targeted, role-specific education through three integrated modules:

HOP Orientation — Competency-based onboarding that gets clinicians field-ready faster while maintaining compliance documentation.

HOP Huddles — AI-generated microlearning content tailored to your organization's actual quality data, patient population, and operational reality.

HOP+A3 — Lean quality improvement methodology that turns survey findings and incident trends into structured action plans.

We work with post-acute care providers who are serious about improving their quality performance and patient outcomes—not just checking training boxes.
Founded by a physician with 10+ years of healthcare quality leadership, including preventing over $1M in CMS readmission penalties for hospital systems.

Name: Sensore
Description:
The cost of treating pressure ulcers in the UK alone exceeds £2.6 billion annually, representing around 4% of total NHS spend. Every year, over 700,000 people suffer from pressure ulcers. 

The Sensore platform brings a new standard of intelligent pressure monitoring to the care sector - combining breakthrough materials science with human-centred design to help carers act earlier, prevent harm, and protect dignity.

Across the UK’s care ecosystem - the issue of pressure ulcers persists as one of the most preventable yet costly healthcare failures.

The physical pain, infection risk, and loss of dignity are profound - but so too are the financial consequences.  For care providers, this is more than a clinical issue - it’s a reputational and regulatory challenge. 

Patients deserve better. Families expect better. The Care Quality Commission demands better - and technology now makes ‘better’ achievable.

Sensore's continuous pressure mapping brings predictive, data-driven prevention into everyday care. Smart fabric sensing delivers real-time high-resolution pressure data across the seated interface.

AI risk models identify harmful load patterns early, personalised to each individual user. Smart alerts guide optimal repositioning, relieving workload and improving care quality.

Clinical dashboards provide visibility, governance evidence and therefore assurance for managers, commissioners, and regulators.

We’re working with leading care providers and preparing for medical device certification as we scale towards launch.

Name: SANTÉ SERVICE BAYONNE ET RÉGION
Description:
Fondée en 1968, Santé Service Bayonne et Région est un service de soins
coordonnés à domicile, intervenant au Pays basque et en Sud Landes. Ses missions : l’hospitalisation et les soins infirmiers à domicile (HAD/SSIAD).

ÉQUIPE PLURIDISCIPLINAIRE
Cette association loi 1901 veille à toujours placer le patient au coeur d’une prise en charge globale. Celle-ci est assurée par une équipe pluridisciplinaire : infirmières, aides-soignantes, kinésithérapeutes, psychologues, diététicienne, ergothérapeute, assistants sociaux, médecins coordonnateurs) avec la collaboration du médecin traitant. Un service de garde infirmiers est assuré 24h/24 et 7j/7. Si nécessaire, du matériel médical peut être mis à disposition du malade.

MISSIONS
- Prise en charge des personnes âgées / handicapées.
- Pédiatrie : depuis 2017, SSBR propose une prise en charge pédiatrique à domicile en partenariat avec le service Pédiatrie générale et Néonatalogie du CHCB.
- Chimiothérapie : depuis 2020, grâce à un partenariat avec le CHCB, les
patients peuvent être traités par chimiothérapie à domicile, avec la même
efficacité et la même sécurité qu'à l'hôpital.
- Alzheimer : depuis 2010, son Équipe Spécialisée Alzheimer a pour but
d’accompagner et réhabiliter les personnes atteintes par cette maladie (ou
apparentée).
- Prise en charge de la douleur / soins palliatifs.
- Lutte contre les infections associées aux soins.
- Gestion des risques (infectieux, médicamenteux, douloureux, cutanés).
- Droits et informations du patient.
- Amélioration de la qualité et de la sécurité des oins (simulation en santé).
- Sans oublier : antibiothérapie par voie veineuse, pansements complexes
(dont thérapie par pression négative), nursing lourd…

EN CHIFFRES
# 500 patients soignés à domicile :
125 places en HAD
400 places en SSIAD :
- 365 places en SSIAD personnes âgées
- 15 places en SSIAD personnes handicapées
- 20 places en SSIAD Alzheimer (ESA)
# 250 salariés

Name: Post Surgery Care of Atlanta, LLC
Description:
Post Surgery Care of Atlanta, LLC is a patient-centered recovery and readiness organization designed to bridge science, human behavior, and real-world outcomes. We believe healing does not occur in isolation-it is shaped by mindset, behavior, environment, and the systems that support individuals before and after surgery. Our work exists to close the gap between clinical treatment and sustainable recovery.
By integrating evidence-based strategies  with compassionate, individualized care, we support patients across the full continuum of the surgical experience. Our approach prioritizes self-efficacy, emotional regulation, behavioral readiness, and functional recovery-key factors often overlooked in traditional models of care. We focus on strengthening the psychological and behavioral foundations that directly influence physical healing, compliance, and long-term well-being.
A core objective of our work is to reduce the risk of transitioning from acute pain to chronic pain by addressing contributing behavioral, emotional, and psychosocial factors early. Through intentional assessment, education, and guided support, we empower individuals to actively participate in their recovery rather than passively endure it. Healing is not simply something that happens to a patient-it is a process they are equipped to lead. 
Guided by The Ultimate Psychological Framework, Post Surgery Care of Atlanta,  translates data, insight, and human experience into actionable recovery strategies. We serve individuals navigating pre- and post-surgical transitions, complex recoveries, and return to work readiness with clarity and purpose.

Name: A.I.R. Partenaire Santé
Description:
A.I.R. Partenaire Santé est une association loi 1901 fondée à Caen en 1976 par des médecins conseils et des pneumologues du CHU de Caen. Spécialisée dans l’assistance médicale à domicile, l’association accompagne les patients dans leur retour à domicile nécessitant un appareillage médical spécifique.

Comptant aujourd’hui près d’une centaine de salariés, A.I.R. Partenaire Santé réinvestit l’intégralité de ses bénéfices dans l’action médicale, l’amélioration de la prise en charge des patients et le financement de travaux de recherche scientifique.

A.I.R. Partenaire Santé bénéficie de plus de 50 ans d'expérience et intervient dans des domaines tels que l’insuffisance respiratoire, l’insulinothérapie par pompe, la perfusion à domicile, la nutrition entérale et le matériel de maintien à domicile. À ce jour, plus de 35 000 patients ont été accompagnés par ses équipes sur l’ensemble du territoire 

Afin de renforcer sa présence en Haute-Normandie, A.I.R. Partenaire Santé a ouvert en 2022 une antenne logistique à Bourg-Achard. Engagée dans une démarche d’amélioration continue, l’association est certifiée ISO 9001 et ISO 13485, et labellisée R&S Responsabilité et Santé pour son engagement en matière de responsabilité sociétale, fondé sur la norme ISO 26000

Name: Last Visit First
Description:
Last Visit First is a podcast that flips the script in home health and hospice care—starting with the final visit and tracing back to the decisions that shape it.

Hosted by seasoned industry leader, Tom Maxwell, each episode features in-depth conversations with executives, clinicians, technologists, and policymakers. Together, they unpack what dignified, efficient, and human-centered care truly looks like—from regulatory shifts and staffing challenges to tech innovation and leadership culture.

Whether you're a home health operator, hospice nurse, founder, or just passionate about compassionate end-of-life care, Last Visit First delivers thought-provoking stories and actionable insights to move the industry forward—one episode at a time.

Name: Dialyse Service Nederland
Description:
Dialyse Service Nederland (DSN) is opgericht vanuit het ideaal de Juiste Zorg op de Juiste Plek te kunnen bieden aan patiënten met een chronische nierziekte. De partners binnen DSN hebben de afgelopen jaren ruimschoots ervaring opgedaan in de dialysezorg thuis of in een dialysehub. Vanuit een samenwerking met andere partijen in de dialysemarkt willen wij een betrouwbare partner zijn en garanderen wij de zorg betaalbaar te houden. Dit doen wij bij voorkeur dichtbij de patiënt thuis of in een dialysehub in de omgeving van de patiënt.

“Bundeling van krachten van zorgaanbieders is een voorwaarde om expertise, kwaliteit, de logistiek en de betaalbaarheid van thuisdialyse te blijven garanderen.” (Bron: Advies Taskforce Thuisdialyse)

Uitgangspunt is altijd de keuzevrijheid van de patiënt en vraagt meer flexibilisering van de geboden zorg. Behandeling in de 1e lijn dichtbij de patiënt vraagt veel organisatie en capaciteit. Deze capaciteit is binnen de huidige gezondheidszorg een steeds groter wordende uitdaging.

Omdat DSN zijn krachten bundelt kunnen wij zorg en aanbod garanderen en zoeken wij met onze partners naar mogelijkheden om de zorg betaalbaar te houden.

Description:
TPG DisableAids is the first choice for all the leading disability aid and mobility equipment brands for those living in Herefordshire, Gloucestershire, Worcestershire, Shropshire and Wales.

We were established in 1985 by Tony and Pam Gibbs. After three decades of exceptional trading growth, there is still a strong family influence in our business. Alastair Gibbs and Amanda Harrold  (son and daughter)  are now at the helm in partnership with Tony and Pam.

We supply aids and equipment to both private customers and organisations such as the NHS and numerous County Councils.

What really sets us apart is the quality of the advice we can offer on how our disability aids and mobility equipment can best  improve your day-to-day lives, so you can carry on being as safe and independent in your own home for as long as possible.

The company motto captures the our core belief that we can use our culture to enable people to live more fulfilling lives. The motto of “Let our family help your family” captures our family orientated culture, we always believe in the first instance we should assist rather than sell. We always offer comprehensive advice on situations where we can, something many other companies fail to match. Some of our most frequent advice is kept on our Advice page, this includes many common queries relating to stairlifts, hoists, beds, chairs, wheelchairs and more.

We also believe in offering excellent after service, whether you purchased from TPG or elsewhere we’re always happy to see how we can help you, through maintenance & servicing, repairs and installations. Recently we’ve been recognised for our persistent work towards excellence by the Stannah Certificate of Excellence, being one of the few in the UK to be awarded the prestigious award. The award recognises TPG for it’s commitment towards quality engineering in installations, servicing and repairs of their product range.

Name: Peace Aging Care Experts, LLC
Description:
Peace Aging Care Experts, LLC
Professional, Compassionate Medical Care Management for the elderly and disabled.

We assist Elder Law Attorneys by providing consultation services with regard to appropriate Plans of Care for their clients and wards.

Geriatric Care Management is a profession whose aim is to assist elderly people with coordinating with their lives as they age in order to preserve their dignity and independence to the fullest extent possible. 

Peace Aging Care Experts is a private agency under the direction of Trish Colucci, a Registered Nurse and Certified Case Manager, with over 20 years of experience helping clients work out the tangles life presents.

Trish initially meets with an elderly client and/or their loved ones in the home environment to assess the status of the client.  She reviews all medical issues to assure that appropriate medical attention is being carried out, and  then develops a Plan of Care which addresses the client’s individualized needs along with a specific plan of how best to meet them. 

A plan of care may include: coordination of home care, installation of medical equipment, referrals to physicians or elder law attorneys, attendance at key medical appointments, updates to family and continued contact to ensure that any changes in the client’s status are addressed on an ongoing basis.

Description:
Welcome to Home Matters Caregiving, the highest-rated and most-reviewed in-home senior care provider in the Houston area. Our commitment is to offer compassionate, personalized care, allowing seniors to age gracefully and comfortably in their own homes.

Name: Granny NANNIES
Description:
Granny NANNIES is an American franchise Brand system specializing in assisting families with home care services for seniors. Headquartered in Longwood, Florida, the company through its network of independently owned and operated franchises help nearly 5,000 families across 9 states. Granny NANNIES is an alternative to nursing homes, referring private duty home care aides for a wide range of conditions that may affect daily life.

Granny NANNIES only refers Certified Nursing Assistants (CNAs) and Home Health Aides (HHAs) to provide care for loved ones whose family is located in distant states, those who desire special personal care for their loved ones and those who are no longer able to care for themselves. Granny NANNIES matches clients with private duty caregivers to provide care services in the home, hospital, assisted living facility or nursing home.

Professional caregivers are available 24 hours a day, seven days a week, or as needed. Granny NANNIES works in conjunction with Medicare and does not compete with Hospice services. Most private insurance and workers compensation are accepted.

Granny NANNIES was founded in 1990 when Rob and Kirsten Hodgson needed senior home care for Rob’s aging grandmother, Esther Dowding, 87 at the time. Rob initially planned to hire a caregiver for Esther, but due to a lack of service, it fell through.

They could not find competent, caring and affordable assistance that would allow Rob’s grandmother to stay in her Winter Park, Florida home. To avoid placing Esther in an assisted living facility, Rob and Kirsten moved from New Hampshire to take care of her.

Based on their own personal experience and to fill the void of senior home healthcare services in Central Florida, Rob and Kirsten started Granny NANNIES of North America. In doing so, they discovered that their focus should be on more than just home nursing care, as there was a lack of services available for others struggling with daily tasks.

Name: OncoPower

OncoPower is a HIPAA-compliant and social media-style interactive care space that provides access to Registered Dietitians, Behavioral Therapists, wellness and meditation resources, a video library to better understand how to manage symptoms and various treatment options, and clinical tools such as pill reminder services and medical records storage. With OncoPower Premium, patients can connect with Oncologists directly 1:1 through it's Ask-A-Doc tool for less than a specialist copay. The provider-facing portal has treatment decision making tools, a comprehensive drug look-up that aggregates clinical trial and real-world data, and peer networking. OncoPower has enterprise-level clinical tools for reimbursed RPM and ePRO patient management that have been validated. For enterprise option, please reach out to us at info@wittyhealth.com.

Consultez un médecin sénégalais certifié et vérifié en moins de 10 minutes, depuis votre smartphone, où que vous soyez sur le territoire national.

 Ordonnances Numériques avec QR Code
Recevez une ordonnance électronique sécurisée, authentifiée par QR code, utilisable directement en pharmacie. Fini les ordonnances perdues ou illisibles.

Payez facilement via Wave, Orange Money, Free Money - une solution adaptée aux habitudes de paiement locales et accessible à tous.

 Sécurité & Conformité
Hébergement sécurisé des données médicales, respect absolu de la confidentialité et du secret médical, conformité totale avec les standards de santé sénégalais.

Name: Voyager Home Health Care
Description:
Voyager Home Health Care was founded in 2015 by two brothers who are both nurses and veterans. Voyager stands out in the home health care field by emphasizing community and personal connections, allowing our families that we service to have direct access to us at all times, have their feedback addressed and valued, and be updated and communicated with frequently. Our caregivers and clients are not just numbers to us, they are what makes this company great. That is why we offer pay rates higher than industry standard, as we believe our caregivers deserve the best for the exceptional care and comfort they provide to their loved ones.

Voyager services In-Home Support Services (IHSS), the Parent CNA program, CNA and Homemaker care, and PASA. We also have 4 CNA schools throughout the state of Colorado in which we offer a unique CNA Certification course that allows students to complete most coursework from the comfort of their own homes. We offer these courses at a lower than average rate - and for free to our PCNA caregivers employed with us! 

If you are interested in learning more about a program we offer, or becoming employed with us, please reach out to 719-400-2222 at any time!

Description:
Swily est la solution complète qui simplifie la vie des infirmiers libéraux.  

Nous aidons les IDEL à gagner du temps en automatisant l’administratif et en optimisant l’organisation des tournées, afin qu’ils puissent se consacrer pleinement à leurs patients.

– Tout-en-un, conçu par des infirmiers : gestion des tournées géolocalisées, facturation SESAM-Vitale mobile, dossier patient numérique partagé, messagerie sécurisée d’équipe… Swily réunit tout ce dont un IDEL a besoin au quotidien sur une seule app intuitive.

– Gain de temps et sérénité : en moyenne, chaque utilisateur économise 6 heures par semaine sur la paperasse grâce à Swily. Moins de stress, plus de soins !
– Innovation : commande vocale des constantes, scan intelligent des ordonnances (IA), rappels automatiques – Swily intègre des technologies de pointe pour vous simplifier la vie.
– Confiance & sécurité : données de santé hébergées en France (HDS) et conformes RGPD, assistance réactive. Plus de 1 000 infirmiers nous font déjà confiance pour digitaliser leur cabinet en toute sécurité.

Notre mission : libérer les soignants des tâches chronophages pour améliorer la qualité des soins.
  Concentrez-vous sur vos patients, Swily s’occupe du reste.

 Essai gratuit sur web et mobile (iOS/Android). Rejoignez la communauté Swily !

Name: YGEIA Group
Description:
YGEIA Group, Inc. was founded to deliver personalized, precision-based care for chronic disease management at home. Our platform empowered patients with actionable insights and supported care teams with tools to reduce hospital readmissions, streamline clinical workflows, and improve health outcomes. We focused on bringing these solutions to rural, aging, and underserved communities, those most often overlooked in the digital health landscape.

As clinical care continues its digital transformation, our mission was to ensure that vulnerable populations were not left behind. Unfortunately, with the recent passing of legislation to defund Medicare and Medicaid, the very systems we were built to support have been severely impacted. In a policy and funding environment that no longer supports innovation for these communities, we have made the difficult decision to dissolve the company.

We remain proud of our work and deeply grateful to the patients, providers, and partners who believed in our vision.

Name: Esperta Health
Description:
Esperta Health believes everyone should have access to expert wound care – anywhere. We have built the industry’s only complete in-home wound management program driven by concentrated expertise, wound healing guidelines, and innovative technology to deliver real-time evidence-based treatment plans, thereby standardizing wound care while improving healing outcomes and significantly reducing costs.

Esperta Health provides comprehensive wound care to a designated member population. Our specialists use evidence-based protocols to care for members in-person at home, in a healthcare facility, or through remote wound care support. 

We manage health plan populations of all sizes that seek better outcomes in a value-based care model.

Name: SEEK
Description:
SEEK is a Nonprofit 501 organization founded in 2000 by a group of parents of children with special needs. Informed by their own experiences about various providers, SEEK was established with a singular purpose of providing compassionate and effective treatment services driven by and connected with our core values of accountability, dignity, supportive teamwork, and clinical excellence.

We develop and implement treatment plans guided by Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) principles and practices, to produce learning environments with documented effectiveness and results. We are comprised of dedicated, passionate, and experienced professionals who work closely with parents and communities to develop learning programs that are unique to each individual.

In more than 20 years, SEEK has grown from a small team of passionate clinicians to an internationally recognized organization. We are proud to have a team of professionals who have set new ethical and clinical standards and serve as a model for service providers. Our peers have recognized us for disseminating behavior analysis (SABA, 2013) and access to behavior-analytic services (BACB, 2016). Regardless of which stage in our journey, SEEK remains steadfast in our values and care, as they reflect in our decision and actions.

 Experts in Care Home Pharmacy

 Reliable, Scalable, and Technologically Advanced

 365-Day Service with Same-Day Delivery
We offer year-round delivery, including same-day delivery for acute and palliative care, using our own dedicated drivers—so your residents get what they need, when they need it.

 Out-of-Hours Support You Can Rely On
Our out-of-hours service ensures you’re never without pharmacy support, even in emergencies.

We empower your team with free training and ongoing support, helping to improve medication administration and build confidence in your staff.

Our experienced team is always happy to help—whether you're looking to upgrade your pharmacy provision or need a reliable partner to scale with your care home group.

 Get in touch today:
carehometeam@dispensingcentre.co.uk

Let us help you provide the best possible care—because we're more than just a pharmacy.

Description:
نبذة عن شركتنا:
نحن [شركة الإسناد الأبيض للخدمات الطبية]، شركة رعاية صحية منزلية مرخصة من وزارة الصحة السعودية، نقدم خدمات صحية متكاملة، لضمان راحتكم وجودة حياتكم من داخل منزلكم. نؤمن بأن الرعاية الصحية يجب أن تكون متاحة وسهلة، ولهذا نوفر مجموعة واسعة من الخدمات الطبية والتمريضية عالية الجودة من خلال فريق متخصص من الأطباء والممرضين والمعالجين المؤهلين.

خدماتنا:
 رعاية كبار السن: متابعة الحالة الصحية، المساعدة في الأنشطة اليومية، إدارة الأدوية، وخدمات التمريض المتخصصة لضمان راحتهم وسلامتهم.

 رعاية الأمهات أثناء الحمل وبعد الولادة: متابعة صحية للأم والجنين خلال الحمل، دعم ما بعد الولادة، المساعدة في الرضاعة الطبيعية، والعناية بالأمهات لضمان تعافيهن بسلاسة.

 رعاية الأطفال وحديثي الولادة: العناية بالأطفال الخدج، متابعة النمو والتغذية، التطعيمات، وفحوصات صحة الطفل في المنزل.

 التحاليل الطبية المنزلية: إجراء الفحوصات المخبرية بأحدث الأجهزة دون الحاجة للذهاب إلى المستشفى، مع توفير نتائج دقيقة وسريعة.

 العلاج الطبيعي وإعادة التأهيل: جلسات علاج طبيعي متخصصة للحالات العصبية والعضلية، التأهيل بعد الإصابات والعمليات الجراحية، وتحسين جودة الحركة والوظائف الجسدية.

Description:
Founded 30 years ago on the belief that many institutionalized children could benefit greatly from highly skilled in-home nursing, we’ve been at the forefront of a nationwide movement here at Continuum Pediatric Nursing that recognizes that for many young patients, the nurturing support of family and familiar surroundings is critical to their long-term emotional and physical well being.

Our vision, matched by technological advances over the last two decades, now allows an increasing number of children who survive birth defects, or who have severe illnesses, to move beyond indefinite confinement in a facility and into physician-directed nursing care in their own home surrounded by their own families.

We’re proud to have set the standard for pediatric home care in the Washington DC/Baltimore MD Metropolitan areas – including the Northern Virginia and Maryland suburbs. And we are excited that our offices in the Pittsburgh PA, Chicago IL, Charleston SC, Charlotte/Asheville NC, Galloway NJ and Norfolk/VA Beach VA areas have continued our tradition of innovative care.

We are JCAHO Accredited, Medicare/Medicaid Certified, and endorsed by countless families, discharge planners, case managers, and virtually every major insurance company in the communities we serve.

Description:

Wir bieten frei wählbare Dienstleistungen, flexible Terminvereinbarungen sowie die freie Auswahl unserer Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Zu unseren Leistungen gehören unter anderem:
	•	Abklärung und Beratung
	•	Grund- und Behandlungspflege (Körperpflege, Mobilisation, Medikamentenmanagement, Wundversorgung, Injektionen)
	•	Hauswirtschaftliche Unterstützung (Reinigung, Einkäufe, Haushaltshilfe)
	•	Betreuung und Begleitung (soziale Betreuung, Gespräche, Aktivitäten, Spaziergänge)
	•	Psychosoziale Spitex (emotionale Unterstützung, Förderung des Wohlbefindens, Stabilisierung im Alltag)
	•	Akute Übergangspflege nach Spitalaufenthalten oder medizinischen Eingriffen
	•	Angehörigenpflege

Unsere langjährige Erfahrung in verschiedenen Pflegeberufen hat uns dazu inspiriert, eine eigene Spitex-Organisation zu gründen. Mit bestem Gewissen setzen wir unsere fachliche Kompetenz vollständig für unsere Patientinnen und Patienten ein.

Jeder Mensch ist für uns wie ein Familienmitglied – wir nehmen uns viel Zeit, um eine bestmögliche, individuelle und menschliche Betreuung zu gewährleisten.

Name: Zest for Life
Description:
Zest for Life aide les entreprises à mieux accompagner les défis de santé de leurs salariés, afin de minimiser l’impact sur la qualité de vie des personnes concernées et sur la productivité des lieux de travail.

Pourquoi ?
Parce que c’est une question majeure, souvent sans réponse. 1 salarié sur 4 est touché par la maladie ou le handicap et 70% d’entre eux estiment que leur condition de santé a un impact sur leur vie professionnelle. Mal gérées, ces situations ont de fortes répercussions humaines, culturelles, financières et organisationnelles, sur l’environnement de travail et la productivité.

Comment ?
En proposant des programmes d’accompagnement sur mesure, pour les salariés touchés par la maladie chronique ou le handicap, les managers et les aidants. Ces programmes sont le fruit d’une expérience de plus de 10 ans en milieu hospitalier des techniques reconnues de l’ETP (Education Thérapeutique du Patient).

Objectifs ?
Apporter un soutien concret et efficace aux personnes concernées - mieux vivre au quotidien, faciliter le retour au travail, éviter les arrêts, améliorer la communication …
Développer des environnements de travail inclusifs, favorables à la bienveillance et la performance.
Sensibiliser toute l’entreprise à ces questions taboues : la direction, les managers et les équipes.

Résultats ? 
96% de satisfaction
+50% de retour au travail
-35% d’arrêts maladies
-27% de dépressions.

 Contactez-nous en message privé !

Name: Antadir
Description:
La Fédération ANTADIR, Association Nationale pour les Traitements À Domicile, les Innovations et la Recherche, a été créée en 1981, à la demande de la Caisse Nationale d’Assurance Maladie et du Ministère de la Santé. L’ANTADIR fédère, dans un cadre statutaire associatif, des structures Prestataires de Santé A Domicile dénommées Services d'Assistance au Retour à Domicile (SARD), présentes en métropole et en outre-mer. 

Les SARD permettent le retour et le maintien à domicile de toute personne malade nécessitant un dispositif médical d'aide à la vie. Dans le cadre d’une prise en charge globale, les prestations assurées par les SARD concernent l’assistance respiratoire, la perfusion, la nutrition entérale, l’insulinothérapie par pompe externe, le maintien à domicile, l'éducation thérapeutique, la réhabilitation respiratoire ainsi que d'autres traitements, comme le traitement des plaies complexes.

La Fédération ANTADIR a également pour rôle de :

 Promouvoir la recherche technique, clinique et fondamentale
 Réaliser des évaluations techniques et cliniques de dispositifs médicaux ainsi que des études médico-techniques, économiques et sociales sur des thématiques spécifiques

Nous vous offrirons : 

    • Un gain de temps : 
Avec Mes Médocs du jour, vous pouvez commander vos médicaments en ligne, à tout moment et de n'importe où. Il vous suffit d'ajouter votre ordonnance sur votre compte.

    • Une livraison à domicile : 
Nous comprenons l'importance de la commodité. Recevez vos doses mensuelles de médicaments directement à votre porte, éliminant ainsi le besoin de déplacements fréquents à la pharmacie. La santé devrait être accessible et sans tracas, et c'est exactement ce que nous vous offrons.

    • Une préparation des doses personnalisées : 
Nos pharmacies partenaires sont équipées pour préparer avec précision vos doses mensuelles, garantissant la juste quantité à chaque prise. Adieu les préoccupations liées à la prise de médicaments - nous facilitons la gestion quotidienne de votre traitement.

Chez Mes Médocs du Jour, nous croyons en la création d'une expérience de soins centrée sur le patient. Notre mission est d'améliorer la qualité de vie en éliminant les tracas liés à la gestion des médicaments, tout en favorisant une meilleure observance du traitement. Nous sommes déterminés à faire de votre santé une priorité, vous permettant de vous concentrer sur ce qui compte le plus - votre bien-être.

Name: Conciencia Médica Salud
Description:
En 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗖𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗮 𝗠𝗲́𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮 sabemos que 𝒆𝒍 𝒉𝒐𝒈𝒂𝒓 es el destino preferente para la mayoría de pacientes.

Todo paciente (familia/hogar) debe ser tratado en conjunto para poder afrontar su enfermedad de forma global. Por eso proponemos una 𝗔𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗶ó𝗻 𝗠é𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗹, donde los principales objetivos son: 𝙲𝚊𝚕𝚒𝚍𝚊𝚍, 𝙴𝚏𝚒𝚌𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚒𝚊 𝚢 𝙰𝚝𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚒ó 𝚗 𝙿𝚎𝚛𝚜𝚘𝚗𝚊𝚕𝚒𝚣𝚊𝚍𝚊.

Nuestro sistema de Internación Domiciliaria integral le brinda a todos aquellos pacientes adultos y/o pediátricos con patología aguda o crónica (una vez estabilizada la situación clínica y/o quirúrgica que motive su ingreso a un medio asistencial, y que requieren cuidados médicos en forma prolongada) la oportunidad de cursar su enfermedad y/o convalecencia en su entorno familiar, recuperando rápidamente algunos aspectos de la vida normal.

𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗖𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗮 𝗠𝗲́𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮 le brinda al 𝗘𝗻𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗻𝗼 𝗙𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗿 los conocimientos y la contención necesaria para optimizar el manejo de los pacientes en su hogar, con el fin de posibilitar la recuperación del ser querido y de asegurar el mejor de los acompañamientos durante el transcurso de su enfermedad.


En todo momento ponemos a 𝑻ú 𝒅𝒊𝒔𝒑𝒐𝒔𝒊𝒄𝒊ó𝒏 la calidad de los profesionales, su experiencia, y el respaldo de una infraestructura acorde a las demandas de la medicina actual para darte siempre las respuestas requeridas.

En nuestro Sitio Web puedes acceder a información de todo tipo sobre salud en general, Apóyanos en nuestras redes sociales para no perderte ningún artículo informativo:
https://concienciamedicasa.wixsite.com/concienciamedica
