As part of the Life Care Home Health Family, we combine the strength of a statewide network with the warmth of local, personalized service. Our team of skilled nurses, therapists, social workers, and certified caregivers partner with physicians, families, and patients to create holistic Plans of Care that prioritize independence, safety, and quality of life.

 Recognized for Excellence

• Serving Florida since 2010 – 15 years of trusted care
• Licensed, bonded, and insured
• CHAP Accredited – Standards of Excellence in Home Health
• ACHC Accredited – Rigorous national quality standards
• Medicare Certified & AHCA Licensed – Trusted, regulated, and insured
• Proud Member – Home Care Association of Florida & National Association for Home Care & Hospice

 Our Promise: Integrity. Compassion. Accountability. Respect. Excellence.

With offices across Broward, Palm Beach, Martin, Miami-Dade, and beyond — we’re proud to be we’re proud to be Florida’s trusted choice for home care and home health.

Name: Regen Therapy
Description:
At Regen Therapy, we are passionate about facilitating client goals, wellness, and quality of life through the delivery of holistic, client centred, and evidence-based care. We believe that the best therapy is built on a foundation of a strong relationship and personalised service, and to this end, our goal is for each individual that starts off as a client, to end as friends. 

This strong value for genuine relationships (and friendships) is also evident and reinforced throughout the team and culture that makes Regen Therapy unique. 

Our team provides a range of home care therapy services including: 
-	Physiotherapy
-	Occupational Therapy
-	Podiatry 

We can provide services to individuals under a variety of different models including:
-	Home care package (HCP)
-	National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS)
-	Commonwealth Home Support Programme (CHSP)
-	Short-Term Restorative Care (STRC) Programme
-	Transitional Care Package (TCP)

Additional services: 
-	Residential aged care (physiotherapy & podiatry) with understanding into ANACC (reablement)
-	Manual handling training 
-	Vietnamese speaking therapist available to support the local Vietnamese community in South Australia.

Name: Star Infinity Care
Description:
Star Infinity care provides compassionate, professional care in the comfort and safety of your own home. 

Star Infinity Care offers an individual tailored package for individuals and families in your local area. Our care assessment will ensure the care and support plans are person centred around the needs of the service user. Our care teams will always ensure the best possible care services for you or your loved ones.

We provide fully trained care staff to help give the best support to our clients in the comfort of their own homes. All our carers undergo a rigorous selection process and are chosen only if they demonstrate what we believe to be the highest moral standards and the ability to care for people in professional and non-intrusive way.

Star Infinity Care’s aim is to exceed your expectations by listening to you, tailoring our service to suit your needs and employing conscientious staff that believe in our insistence on excellence. All our staff are recruited according to the strict guidelines laid down by the Care Quality Commission and the NHS National Framework Agreement. Name: Home Instead | Elkhart, IN
Description:
At Home Instead Elkhart, we believe aging is not just about living longer — it’s about living better.

We provide personalized, relationship-based home care that helps older adults remain safe, comfortable, and connected in the place they call home. From companionship and personal care to specialized support for Alzheimer’s and other dementias, our Care Professionals deliver the kind of compassionate care we’d want for our own families.

What makes us different?

1. Local roots, national strength: Each Home Instead office is independently owned and operated, backed by the resources of an international network.

2. Care Pros you can trust: Trained, screened, and supported team members who bring skill and heart to every home.

3. Community commitment: Actively partnering with families, healthcare providers, and organizations to make aging in Northern Indiana safer and more supported.

Together, we’re helping to create a world where every older adult has the opportunity to age with dignity, purpose, and joy.

 Serving families across Northern Indiana.

Name: SEHHA Home Medical Services
Description:
Why Choose Home Physiotherapy?

SAVE TIME:

Patients save 40 minutes on average per appointment, by eliminating travel and wait time.

THE RIGHT MATCH:
We schedule a physiotherapist experienced with your specific condition.

BETTER OUTCOMES:
At home physiotherapy can enhance treatment since you are in a much more relaxed state. It has also been shown that the elimination of distractions leads to more focused treatment. Moreover, you are in a safe environment as you know your home better than any one.

AFFORDABLE PRICING:
Pay the same for an at home appointment as a trip to the physiotherapist office.

ABOUT:
Treatment from the comfort of your own home. Whether you’re recovering from an injury, or learning how to prevent future or recurring injuries — to reach your maximum potential and to guide you every step of the way
Sehha home medical services provides in home health care services that are available to paediatric and adult patients ranging from new born to the elderly. Our physical therapist is specifically trained in adult and paediatric care. Skilled medical services include but are not limited to doctor home visits, senior care, diabetes management, wound care, post hospital discharge care as well as comprehensive physiotherapy.We can assist with the activities of daily living as well as provide certain procedures or treatments at home to help full fill daily care needs. We also provide a unique creative program for children with additional need from 2-18 years.

1. Infant stimulation program (2months to 2 years)
2. Physiotherapy
3. Occupational therapy
4. Speech therapy
5. Play therapy, special education, sensory integration and vocational training

Established to provide comfort and peace of mind, our home care program ensures that your family member is looked after with the highest level of care, we take the time to under stand your specific needs and tailor the care around them, which includes appointing the most appropriate therapist for your case.

Description:
UMIA es una plataforma web y móvil que nace para combatir la fragmentación del sistema de salud en América Latina, empezando por Venezuela. Conectamos a pacientes, médicos independientes y centros de salud a través de una experiencia tecnológica, accesible y centrada en el usuario.

Para pacientes:

- Agenda consultas médicas en consultorio, por videollamada o a domicilio
- Centraliza tu historial y documentos médicos en un solo lugar
- Comunícate directamente con tu médico y gestiona tus pagos dentro de la app

Para médicos y centros de salud:

- App web para documentación médica personalizable
- Plataforma SaaS para la gestión integral de servicios, horarios y pacientes
- Inteligencia artificial que autocompleta historias clínicas, informes y recetas
- Dashboard para optimizar la operación de centros médicos de atención primaria

Tras una etapa piloto de tres meses en Venezuela con usuarios reales, UMIA inició la integración de sus primeros centros de salud privados, mientras continúa fortaleciendo su comunidad de médicos independientes.

Nuestro objetivo es claro: construir un ecosistema de salud que simplifique procesos, reduzca barreras y permita a millones de personas acceder a una atención médica más humana, eficiente y conectada.

Name: Association inter URPS francilienne - AIUF
Description:
L'AIUF représente 6 Unions Régionales des Professionnels de Santé (URPS) : infirmiers, kinés, orthophonistes, orthoptistes, podologues et sages femmes.

8 ans après la mise en place des URPS par la loi HPST du 21 juillet 2009, nous avons décidé de créer l’AIUF avec l’objectif de promouvoir une interprofessionnalité ambitieuse, innovante et respectueuse de chaque identité métier.
S’unir pour défendre ce sujet nous permet d’avoir une représentation plus large dans les instances de démocratie sanitaire et donc d’influer sur les réflexions et décisions quant à la politique de santé.
Etre au cœur des décisions, des projets de santé participe à la valorisation de l’activité libérale, met en exergue le rôle primordial du professionnel de santé de ville dans le virage ambulatoire, dans sa capacité à travailler collectivement pour le bien des patients, et à être force de proposition dans les nouveaux modes d’exercice et dans la mise en place d’outil innovant.
L’AIUF c’est aussi aider nos professionnels ou futurs professionnels à trouver les informations et les conseils pour s’installer seul ou à plusieurs et ce lors des permanences d’aide à l’installation locales qui ont lieu dans chaque département.
L'AIUF est un projet novateur qui s'inscrit dans les objectifs présentés par l'ARS dans son plan régional de santé 2018-2022, nous souhaitons que l'implication de nos représentants participe activement à l'amélioration continue de la santé et à la valorisation de nos métiers.

Our team is diverse, passionate, respectful and compassionate. We’re Support Workers, Occupational Therapists, Exercise Physiologists, Speech Pathologists and Admin staff, working together and dedicated to providing specialised care to meet your needs.

We come to you, plus we have a Community Hub in Woodford. This is where our allied health team is based, plus we provide a wide range of capacity-building and community participation activities. We’re excited about how the Hub has expanded the opportunities for participation and access to people in our community.

We’re here to provide you with individual support for life.

Gestão de Casos Complexos: Atendimento especializado e personalizado para condições crônicas, doenças raras e outras situações de saúde complexas.

Rota Logística Inovadora: Utilizamos tecnologia para otimizar a logística de deslocamento das equipes, garantindo que os profissionais cheguem rapidamente aos locais de atendimento, seja em clínicas, hospitais ou na casa do paciente. 

Tecnologia no Monitoramento: Implementação de ferramentas de telemedicina e dispositivos de monitoramento remoto para acompanhar os pacientes de maneira contínua e eficiente, proporcionando um cuidado de saúde mais próximo e rápido.

Name: Nutrisystem
Description:
Nutrisystem is a commercial weight-loss diet that involves following a meal plan made up of the company’s prepackaged and portioned meals and snacks, including frozen and shelf-stable options delivered to you, complemented with some vegetables and other grocery additions you shop for yourself. By outsourcing meal-management chores, you won’t have to think about portion control, meal prep or meal timing, but you may tire of heat-and-eat meals and smallish portions.

Nutrisystem says you can expect to lose up to 1 to 2 pounds per week. The program claims women can lose up to 13 pounds and 7 inches overall in your first month on the Personal Plans, and men can lose up to 18 pounds and 8 inches overall in the first month, which isn’t surprising since the program makes for guaranteed calorie restriction, the tried-and-true weight-loss tactic.

Name: ASSOCIATION DE SOLIDARITÉ AUX VICTIMES DES GUERRES. « ASVG »
Description:
L’est de la RDC est secoué des scènes de tragédie dû aux conflits à répétition qui mine cette région et qui débouche sur une guerre qui entraine des incursions des groupes armés étrangères sur le territoire national. Le militaire congolais qui combattent les milices armés et groupe armés étrangers sont souvent victime de guerre atroce, les blessés des guerres pris en charge par les gouvernements dans un premier temps sont abandonnés à leurs triste sort sans aucune assistance médicale et sociale. Après la guerre de M23 un soldat interne dans un hôpital de référence de Goma pour être amputer une jambe fracturée par une balle s’est vue chassé de l’hôpital car il n’avait aucune structure pour prendre en charge le cout de l’opération chirurgicale. Il a commencé une vie d’errance à la quête de quoi se nourrir et de soins médicaux jusqu’à ce qu’il soit décédé.sa veuve à vue ses enfants être chassé de l’école et devenue des enfants de la Rue
Un citoyen congolais Didier MUKUNA ayant observé cette situation et
Etant lui-même enfant d’un ex militaire dans l’ex province du Katanga il a partagé l’initiative d’aider cette famille et à partir de là il y a eu naissance d’une Association de solidarité aux victimes de guerre principalement dans la province du nord Kivu

En vue de venir au secours aux soldats blessés sur le champ de bataille dans l’Est de la République Démocratique du Congo ; observant la précarité avec laquelle bon nombre de soldats vient après les tragédies des champs de bataille ; ayant compris que ces militaires ont loyalement servi sous le drapeau de la RDC et qu’ils ont des obligations envers leurs femmes et enfants ; après avoir constaté la négligence avec laquelle le gouvernement s’occupe desdits militaires, nous avons pris l’initiative de créer une structure d’aide à ces vaillant soldats devenus handicapés à la suite des batailles livrées pour défendre la souveraineté nationale et protéger la population congolaise. Start up innovativa a vocazione sociale in ambito socio-sanitario, con tecnologia all'avanguardia e un network di professionisti a disposizione.

Medica GB opera nel rispetto della Missione 6 del PNRR, diffondendo Servizi di TeleMonitoraggio (dei parametri fisiologici di Pazienti sia post operatori che con patologie croniche) sia tra i Pazienti Privati (con coinvolgimento dei MMG) che negli Ospedali/RSA/Case di Cura/Cliniche (con Anestesisti/Medici di riferimento) offrendo:
- una Piattaforma di TeleMonitoraggio (certificata classe IIA)
- kit diagnostici per la misurazione dei parametri fisiologici (direttamente collegati con la Piattaforma tramite uno smart phone dedicato e certificato medicale)
- Personale Infermieristico e OSS (formato sul TeleMonitoraggio)
- Centrali Operative (per la gestione dei fuori soglia) 

Con vantaggi su:
- ottimizzazione degli Operatori Sanitari sui casi più critici e che necessitano di cure
- riduzione degli accessi dei Pazienti a Ambulatori/Pronto Soccorsi
- miglioramento delle terapie
- filtro da parte della Centrale Operativa che interviene immediatamente sui Pazienti con parametri fuori soglia/ non rispetto dell’aderenza terapeutica

Medica GB apporta innovazione nel settore socio-sanitario:
- supportando Ospedali e Cliniche Private nelle attività pre, durante e post operatorie
- collaborando nello sviluppo di RSA aperte
- dando assistenza a famiglie private
- contribuendo al welfare aziendale
- attivando percorsi di Sport e Salute (prevenzione e screening)
- fornendo assistenza sanitaria agli ospiti di strutture alberghiere
- sviluppando strumenti meritevoli di brevetti

Services also include CDPAP:
a Medicaid program that supports chronically ill or physically disabled individuals (the Consumer) who require assistance with daily activities or skilled nursing services.
Services can range from personal care aid to home health and nursing care.
CDPAS lets you (the Consumer) take charge of your care. You pick your caregivers and decide how they help you. It gives you control, comfort, and trust. The client makes choices that suit their needs. It's about your well-being and preferences. Consumers are free to choose their caregivers and take full responsibility for hiring, training, supervising, and, if necessary,
terminating the employment of those providing the services.

Michigan Community VNA is a Home Health Care, Hospice and Wellness agency servicing  10 counties – Clinton, Eaton, Ingham, Jackson, Livingston, Macomb, Oakland, Shiawassee, Washtenaw and Wayne!

Michigan Community VNA (MC VNA) is proud to carry on the legacy of Alice Bowen who established VNA in the Metro Detroit area in 1898—becoming the first home care organization to serve Macomb, Oakland and Wayne counties and one of the oldest Visiting Nurse Associations in the nation.

- Home Health Care

- Corporate Health / Wellness and Immunization Services
- Community Immunizations

MC VNA is Medicare and Medicaid certified and accredited by The Joint Commission.

We are proud to say we were voted Crain's Coolest Places To Work 2016, Best And Brightest Places to Work 2016 along with Best And Brightest Places To Work In The Nation 2016!

Name: Fleet Healthcare
Description:
Fleet Healthcare was founded with the purpose of revolutionising the mobile healthcare industry, by delivering the highest quality of care possible to individuals at a location that suits them best.

Our team of qualified healthcare professionals across Physiotherapy, Exercise Physiology, Massage Therapy, Occupational Therapy, Podiatry, Chiropractic and Dietetics can assist in enhancing your quality of life.

Our Physiotherapists are specialised in treating all conditions & injuries relative to the field of Physiotherapy. This includes, but is not exclusive to: musculoskeletal, sports, orthopaedic, post-op, paediatric, respiratory, and neurological Physiotherapy.

Our Exercise Physiologists specialise in clinical exercise interventions for people with a broad range of health issues. Those people may be at risk of developing, or have existing, medical conditions and injuries.

Our Massage Therapists specialise in remedial massage; the practice of kneading or manipulating a person’s muscles and other soft-tissue in order to improve their wellbeing or health.

Our Occupational Therapists enable people to participate in activities they find meaningful which can involve home assessments and modifications to suit their lifestyle.

Our Chiropractors offer treatment for conditions affecting your muscles and bones. They use therapies, such as chiropractic manipulation and massage, to treat and prevent musculoskeletal problems.

Our Podiatrists deal with the prevention, diagnosis, treatment and rehabilitation of medical and surgical conditions of the feet and lower limbs. The conditions podiatrists treat include those resulting from bone and joint disorders such as arthritis and soft-tissue and muscular pathologies, as well as neurological and circulatory disease.

Our Dietitians treat a range of health conditions. They understand how nutrition affects the body and will provide expert nutrition and dietary advice.

Healthcare to you. Anytime, Anywhere.

Our Misson
[ 모두의 오늘과 내일에 건강을 더하는 것 ]
휴레이포지티브는 대한민국에서 디지털헬스케어라는 개념이 생소할 때부터
그 출발을 알린 중요한 역할을 했습니다.
모든 사람들이 건강에 관한 걱정과 불안에서 벗어나 편안한 일상을 누리고, 
높은 삶의 질과 행복을 경험하도록 돕는 것.

휴레이포지티브가 세상을 위해 기여하고 싶은 가치이자 존재 이입니다.

Our Vision
[ Everyone, One Huray ]
미션을 달성하기 위한 우리의 비전은 Everyone, One Huray 입니다.
그래서 머지 않은 미래에, 건강한 일상을 꿈꾸는 모든 사람이적어도 한 번( One Time ) 은 
휴레이포지티브를 만나고,헬스케어 분야를 통합한 최초의 회사이자 ( The First One ), 
일무이한 최고의 회사 ( The Only One ) 로 기억할 것입니다.
휴레이어가 같은 꿈으로 하나되어 나아갈 것입니다 ( One Team ).

 홈페이지 : https://www.huray.net/
 채용 사이트 : https://huray.career.greetinghr.com/
 채용 문의: career@huray.net


 휴레이포지티브의 인재상 

휴레이포지티브는 건강한 사람을 존중합니다.

헬스케어 솔루션을 제공하는 휴레이포지티브는 
건강한 마음을 가지고 건강한 관계를 만들며 건강한 목표를 추구하는 사람을 존중합니다.

 건강한 마음 | 회복탄력성, 자기인식, 긍정

마음이 건강하다는 것은 회복할 수 있는 능력이 있으며 균형잡힌 상태를 말합니다. 
나의 현재 모습, 강점과 개발점을 잘 알고 있으며 개선이 필요한 부분은 변화를 가져오기 위해
노력합니다. 

또한 이런 사람은 오늘과 내일의 우리 모습을 긍정적으로 바라보며 어떤 어려움이 오더라도
다시 일어나고 극복하는 단단한 마음을 가지고 있습니다.

건강한 관계 | 관대함, 친절함, 솔직함

건강한 관계를 만들어가는 휴레이어는 상대방과 나의 의견이 다를 때 그것을 틀린 것이 아니라 다르다는 사실을 기억합니다.

그래서 주변 사람들의 생각과 마음을 존중하며 상호신뢰를 만들어갑니다. 이는 상대방을 위해
내 것을 무조건 내려놓는 것이 아닙니다.

서로의 욕구와 감정을 매너있게 표현하면서 갈등을 조정하여 우리의 목표를 위해 함께 건강하게 협업하는 것입니다.

 건강한 목표 | 정렬, 실행, 회고

건강한 목표를 추구하는 사람은 긍정적이고 현실적인 이상주의자입니다. 
우리 조직의 이상을 구체적으로 그리며, 
이를 달성하기 위해 내가 무엇을 해야하는지 잘 아는 사람입니다. 
이 사람은 이 것에 그치지 않고 목표를 이루기 위해 꾸준히 실천하며 탁월한 결과를 
이끌어냅니다.

또한 이런 사람은 원하는 것을 얻는데에 그치지 않고 결과를 점검하고 돌아보며 더 나은 다음을 만들어갑니다.

---

이런 휴레이어들이 함께 모여 일하는 모습을 우리는 Work way(해요마요)라고 부릅니다.

꿈을 꿔요 (dream High)

Name: ELAK HEALTH
Description:
ELAK is the solution to the current healthcare crisis of the imbalance between demand and supply. 

Demand being the longer living patients, the patient’s health care expectations and the increased prevalence of chronic and acute diseases. Supply is the shortage of primary care physicians and practitioners because they are overburdened, stressed and impacted. 

ELAK corrects this imbalance on the patient’s journey through the healthcare system. Our solution provides access to patients within 24 to 48 hours including after hours from 5 to 9 p.m. and on weekends. 

Additionally, we follow up with patients once-a-week at the minimum or as needed. And once it’s time for the doctor’s visit, ELAK goes with the patient to the doctor to support the doctor, maximize efficiency and close any knowledge or communication gaps. 

There’s also administrative support through the healthcare system, answers to healthcare questions and access to comprehensive medicine information. 

The goal is to prevent hospitalizations, reduce emergency room and urgent care visits all while we maximize physicians and practitioners’ access and efficiency and allow them to focus on the diagnosis by providing a valuable resource, value-added patient benefits and a strong partner in the healthcare spectrum with options for referral income.

Name: ALAIR&AVD
Description:

Nos équipes pluridisciplinaires sont spécialisées, qualifiées et régulièrement formées dans leur domaine d’activité. Elles assurent un accompagnement global adapté à chaque patient et travaillent en étroite collaboration avec les services prescripteurs et tous les professionnels de santé intervenant dans l'installation et le suivi du patient à domicile.

Pionnier dans l'assistance respiratoire depuis plus de 40 ans, ALAIR&AVD est reconnu pour son expertise et sa qualité de service, alliant la recherche permanente d'une fiabilité technique et d'une dimension humaine.

Fidèle à ses origines associatives, ALAIR&AVD a préservé sa vocation non lucrative et son engagement social et solidaire. Dans cette logique, l’entreprise est labellisé R&S (Responsabilité & Santé) depuis 2017 pour sa démarche en Responsabilité Sociétale des Entreprises. Ce label est une déclinaison de la norme internationale ISO 26000, adaptée au secteur de la santé à domicile en lien avec le label LUCIE, le label de référence en France. Par cette labellisation R&S by LUCIE, ALAIR&AVD garantit des prestations avec un haut niveau de responsabilité, en prenant en compte l'ensemble des impacts sociaux, économiques et environnementaux, conformément aux principes du développement durable, et en développant des relations de qualité avec ses partenaires et parties prenantes.

Name: Myodev
Description:
ACL, knee replacement, shoulder, hip...

After surgery or joint trauma, arthrogenic muscle inhibition (AMI) affects most patients.

The brain "disconnects" the muscle to protect the joint. Result: patients can't activate, physios keep saying "squeeze harder", and rehab stalls. 

I've been there. ACL tear, months of rehab, and that frustrating feeling of not being able to "switch on" my muscle.

I built Myodev to give physios the missing tool: real-time EMG visual feedback. 

The patient sees their muscle fire on screen. The inhibition breaks. The physio gets objective data: activation curves, asymmetries, progress tracked session after session.

No more "I feel like it's better". Now it's "I can see it's improving". 

→ Dry electrode EMG sensor, set up in 30 seconds
→ Gamified exercises 
→ PDF reports with measurable indicators

 Physio or rehab center? Try it: francois.ottavi@myodev.com

#EMG

Name: Via-Domicile
Description:
Via-Domicile.fr est une plateforme de mise en relation humaine, qui vous permet d’être rapidement en relation et facilement avec les professionnels du domaine du maintien à domicile qui seront capables de prendre en charge votre patient, qui aura pour projet de rentrer à la maison 

À la sortie d’une hospitalisation ou au décours d’une consultation de médecine libérale, l’état d’un patient peut nécessiter, une prise en charge au domicile, des aides, doivent être débloquées, ou une auxiliaire de vie, ou une douche à l’italienne doivent être installée !

Via-Domicile.fr propose, aux professionnels d’établissements de santé et aux médecins libéraux, l’orientation la plus adaptée pour leurs patients sur la base d’une recherche multicritères (pathologie, ressources requises, lieu de résidence, caprices, ou désirs …) avec une mise en relation, directe, “je vous passe Pascal” prends exactement, 8 secondes.

 Et aux familles : Via-Domicile.fr permet à toute personne (établissements de santé, usagers et représentants légaux, CCAS, Mairies, etc .. ) de rechercher LE professionnel du domaine du maintien à domicile qui sera capable de prendre en charge votre proche.

 Prise de contact, en ligne humain.
 Suivi, prise de rendez-vous, encore suivi. 
 3000 partenaires et auxiliaires de vie, dans toute la France. 
 Une seule et unique personne du contact a chaque étape de votre maintien et vie au domicile.

 Afin que le "Maintien a Domicile" de votre patient, ou proche, se passe comme sur des roulettes.

Name: Dynahealth
Description:
Het verplaatsen van de zorg naar de thuissituatie is een toenemende complexiteit binnen de zorgketen. Dynahealth stelt uw cliënt centraal om de zorg in de thuissituatie zo comfortabel mogelijk te maken. Dankzij onze ervaring met complexe processen, ons excellente opleidingsprogramma en diverse succesvolle doorontwikkelingen, is Dynahealth een toegevoegde waarde voor zowel uw cliënt als voor de zorgketen.

Dynahealth verzorgt innovatieve, toekomstbestendige zorgoplossingen voor comfortabele thuiszorg. Onze toevoegde waarde is het bezorgen van gepersonaliseerde, integrale zorg in de thuissituatie en het ontzorgen van cliënten, zorgverleners en (mantel)verzorgers.

Dynahealth beschikt over gespecialiseerde technici in het preventief en correctief onderhoud, schoonmaken, repareren en hergebruiken van medische hulpmiddelen. Deze dienstverlening wordt vanuit een van onze 10 locaties door de gehele Benelux verleend.

Dynahealth heeft een Experience Center waar de koeriers een gedegen opleidingsprogramma volgen. Alleen de hoogst gekwalificeerde koeriers mogen medische hulpmiddelen bezorgen, instaleren, monteren of repareren bij cliënten thuis.

Dynahealth richt zich op het bezorgen, installeren en assembleren van medische hulpmiddelen bij de cliënten thuis. Dit kan op elk gewenst moment, 7 dagen per week en zo nodig nog dezelfde dag.

Als uw cliënten tevreden zijn, hebben wij ons doel bereikt. We meten continu de klanttevredenheid via enquêtes na iedere bezorging. We meten de ervaring met onze dienstverlening, onze communicatie en onze mensen. U ontvangt uitgebreide rapportages. Op die manier zijn we én transparant én in staat onze dienstverlening bij te sturen en nog verder te optimaliseren.

Name: Orbit Telehealth
Description:
Orbit is a leader in digital health care programs for people with musculoskeletal pain. Our programs are based on the team's extensive background in orthopedic physical therapy, clinical research, exercise physiology, program design, and behavior change.

Our online experience allows individuals to easily login from wherever they are and receive guidance and support from the program and our Certified Telespine Coaches. The founder, Dr. Barnes, recognized that patients with low back pain didn’t have the tools and resources to be engaged in their care the 99% of the time they were not in the clinic, nor did most patients need office visits, MRI’s, injections or surgeries to recover.

Name: Dovida Amsterdam
Description:
Dovida is thuiszorg, maar dan anders. Bij ons ligt de nadruk op persoonlijke aandacht en betekenisvolle ondersteuning, zowel praktisch als emotioneel. Met aandacht én tijd voor senioren die zo lang mogelijk thuis willen blijven wonen. Zorg kan beter, dat bewijst Dovida elke dag door ondersteuning af te stemmen op de behoeften van senioren en in te spelen op de ontwikkelingen in de langdurige zorg. Bij Dovida gaat welzijn voor zorg en staat het verhogen van de kwaliteit van leven voorop.

Dovida biedt Metgezelschap/Individuele begeleiding, ondersteuning In en Om huis en Persoonlijke verzorging. De klant bepaalt zelf wanneer en welke diensten worden afgenomen en hoe lang deze ondersteuning nodig is. Wij zijn inzetbaar met een zorgindicatie in zorg in natura of PGB via een Wlz of Wmo indicatie. Daarnaast zijn we ook op particuliere basis inzetbaar of vanuit mantelzorgondersteuning uit het aanvullende pakket van geselecteerde zorgverzekeraars.

De medewerkers van Dovida, onze caregivers, bouwen met hun klanten een relatie op die net zo persoonlijk kan zijn als met familieleden of vrienden. Tegelijkertijd leveren caregivers ondersteuning die voldoen aan professionele eisen. Onze caregivers zijn namelijk geselecteerd en getraind om de dienstverlening ook in complexe situaties te bieden zoals specifieke zorg bij senioren met dementie. De caregivers van Dovida worden tevens ondersteund door een professioneel supportteam en de kwaliteit in het geheel van de dienstverlening wordt doorlopend getoetst. We voeren jaarlijkse een klant- en medewerkerstevredenheidsonderzoek uit onder onze klanten, mantelzorgers en caregivers. Zo waarderen klanten en mantelzorgers ons met een 8.8 en beveelt 98% onze organisatie aan bij anderen.

De caregivers ondersteunen dagelijks vanuit onze kernwaarden: zelfstandigheid, keuzevrijheid en versterking.

Mijn leven, mijn manier.

Name: Bridgewater Home Care Franchise
Description:
Bridgewater Home Care was established following our own personal experiences of care. It was a difficult time for the family, experiencing the numerous challenges of finding a high quality, trustworthy and credible home care provider for our loved one. It proved more difficult than it should be. Like you, we don’t think that this process should have been difficult, let alone stressful and unsettling so we decided that it was up to us to provide a solution.

It was from this moment that Bridgewater Home Care was established, with quality, reliability, and trust at the forefront of everything we do to this day. We soon realised how much clients valued the honest and trustworthy approach we adopted and how our clients deserved so much more than just a traditional home care service. Our clients became a part of our extended Bridgewater Family. From this foundation we aim to exceed expectations within the home care industry and allow families to expect more from care.

Over 10 years later we franchised our Bridgewater Model. We offer a refreshing opportunity that you won’t have seen time and time again when searching for your next business venture. We have spent years developing and perfecting what is now a very reputable and established brand with mark-leading operating practices; we know who we are and why we do what we do and are now welcoming motivated and passionate individuals to share our success.

Name: Aura Care Solutions
Description:
Founded in 2025 | A Legacy of 50+ Years in Healthcare | Registered with the Care Quality Commission (CQC) | Based in the United Kingdom

Aura Care Solutions, established in 2025 and based in the United Kingdom, is a trusted and innovative healthcare agency with a rich legacy of over 50 years of family experience in the healthcare sector. The agency is fully registered with the Care Quality Commission (CQC), ensuring that all services provided meet the highest standards of care and regulatory compliance.

Specializing in a range of services such as home healthcare, elderly care, rehabilitation support, chronic illness management, and personal care, Aura Care Solutions is committed to delivering personalized, compassionate care that is tailored to the unique needs of each client. Whether assisting individuals at home, providing respite care, or supporting those with complex medical conditions, the agency strives to create a safe, supportive environment for all.

The CQC registration affirms Aura Care Solutions' commitment to maintaining the highest levels of quality and safety. The agency regularly undergoes thorough inspections and assessments to ensure that its practices are in line with CQC standards for care, professionalism, and effectiveness. This certification gives clients and their families peace of mind, knowing they are receiving care that is both trustworthy and regulated.

At Aura Care Solutions, the goal is to offer a holistic, person-centred approach that addresses the physical, emotional, and social needs of each individual. With a team of highly trained, compassionate healthcare professionals, the agency aims to empower clients to live comfortably and independently, supported by the highest standards of care and attention.

By combining decades of experience with cutting-edge healthcare practices, and backed by CQC registration, Aura Care Solutions is setting a new benchmark for quality care in the UK.

Helping Hands werkt sinds 1997 aan maatwerk, betrokkenheid en korte lijnen in de zorg. We werken bij cliënten en gezinnen thuis, en bij kinderen op school/opvang, aan het vergroten van de zelfredzaamheid of opbouwen van nieuwe patronen. In 2003 heeft Helping Hands de Jonge Ondernemersprijs van het Noorden gewonnen, vanwege de unieke en praktische formule waarop wij zorg organiseren. 

Doelgroep
We bieden hulpverlening aan kinderen, (jong)volwassenen en gezinnen die een helpende hand kunnen gebruiken in het dagelijks leven. Dit kan praktisch zijn of mentaal ondersteunend. Vaak is er een diagnose of een verstandelijke of lichamelijke beperking vastgesteld, maar dit is geen voorwaarde voor onze hulpverlening. We bekijken per situatie welke medewerker het best kan aansluiten bij de situatie. 

Regio
Helping Hands biedt zorg in Noord-Nederland, dat wil zeggen: in de Groningen, Friesland en Drenthe. Ondanks een groot werkgebied blijven wij een kleinschalige organisatie. Wij hebben twee kantoren – in Joure en in Roden – waar wij werken met korte lijnen.

PGB/ZIN
Onze zorg kan worden ingezet vanuit verschillende indicaties. Uw kunt de zorg inzetten vanuit een indicatie die uw gemeente afgeeft (WMO of jeugdwet). Helping Hands is in 17 noordelijke gemeentes gecontracteerd voor begeleiding en/of huishoudelijke hulp. Dat betekent dat u in deze gemeentes kunt kiezen voor zorg in natura (ZIN) of een persoonsgebonden budget (PGB). Met een PGB heeft u meer flexibiliteit over de inzet van de zorg, maar ook meer verantwoordelijkheden in de administratie.

Meer informatie vindt u op www.helpinghands.nl of neem contact op met:
Locatie Friesland - 0513485656 
Locatie Drenthe/Groningen - 0505530945

Who We Are

We’re a team of real people with families just like yours, so we get it. We understand how hard it can be to navigate caring for a loved one or worrying about your own aging. That’s why we do what we do.

We exist to ease the struggles of caregiving and recovery, and to provide you and your family with a safe, healthy, and happy lifestyle, no matter the circumstances. We want to make sure you or your loved ones can remain at home and maintain independence for as long as possible. Aging or illness shouldn’t keep you from enjoying life and our knowledgeable and reliable team is always there to make your day-to-day possible. We’re committed to providing care of the highest standard and treat our patients with the utmost dignity. You don’t have to do this alone. We are always here for you.

We are a licensed home health agency, not a nurse registry. We are Medicare-certified and CHAP-accredited.

What We Believe

Our patients are an extension of our family and we want to care for you and your loved ones the same way we’d hope to be cared for ourselves. Health, safety, comfort, and companionship are our top priorities. Our staff is educated and passionate about quality care and we are committed to doing the right thing, no matter what.

Whether your needs are simple or more complex, non-medical or skilled care, we’re here to make your life easier. You and your family deserve a trusted resource that you can rely on in times of need and we are here to be that resource for you.

Name: Recovery Matters
Description:
Recovery Matters is a private, neuroscience-informed recovery support platform designed for the most vulnerable phase of the recovery journey: after treatment ends.

When clinical care concludes, many individuals are sober—but not yet stable. Nervous systems remain dysregulated. Identity is fragile. Accountability fades too quickly. Recovery Matters exists to bridge that gap by providing structured, long-term recovery support that continues well beyond discharge.

Our programs are delivered privately and remotely, allowing clients to receive expert-guided support from anywhere while maintaining discretion, continuity, and measurable progress.

Programs at a Glance:

• 30-Day At-Home Withdrawal & Stabilization Support
• RESET — 12-Week Identity & Behavioral Repatterning
• Neuro Reset — 12-Week Brain & Nervous-System Restoration
• 6–12 Month Concierge Recovery Continuum

Each pathway offers a distinct balance of stabilization, neuroregulation, identity reconstruction, and accountability—designed to reduce relapse risk and support durable recovery.

Recovery Matters does not replace medical or clinical treatment. We specialize in long-term recovery infrastructure, coordinating with licensed providers when medical care is required while focusing on nervous-system regulation, behavioral integrity, recovery capital, and real-world functioning over time.

Recovery isn’t an event.
It’s a system.

Name: Bluebird Care Kensington & Chelsea
Description:
We deliver the highest standard of home and live-in care to the residents of the Royal Borough of Kensington and Chelsea. Working collaboratively with our customers and their families and advocates ensures we get to the heart of their requirements so we can create their ideal care plan. 

Our care assistants are trained above and beyond industry standards to ensure complete competence and mastery of their role. From dementia care to complex care and from companionship to post-op re-enablement, our team members approach each customer with the highest level of professionalism, compassion and kindness. 

Our outstanding team strives to maintain and improve quality of life, ensuring the dignity and comfort of our customers so they can remain at home for as long as they wish.

For 12 years, we've served our customers in Kensington, Chelsea, Holland Park, Notting Hill, Ladbroke Grove, Sloane Square, South Kensington Earl's Court and Brompton. Whether it's an hour visit or full time live-in care, your Kensington & Chelsea Bluebirds will be by your side. 

Home is where the heart is. Let's keep it there. 

If you are looking for your next role, have a heart for care and live in or near to the Royal Borough of Kensington & Chelsea, enquire with us today. We offer exceptional training and mentoring with a focus on developing your strengths so you can carve a fantastic career in care.
recruitmentkc@bluebirdcare.co.uk

Name: CareOasis
Description: Helping family caregivers get paid.

Name: Saudom Saúde Domiciliária
Description:
A Saudom Saúde Domiciliária nasceu do desejo de oferecer uma assistência de maior qualidade e segurança fora do ambiente hospitalar.

A nossa missão é proporcionar uma melhor experiência aos utentes que requerem cuidados de saúde ao domicílio, oferecendo assistência e cuidados especializados com apoio de uma equipa multidisciplinar capacitada para o atendimento.

Da atenção personalizada ao cuidado humanizado, a gestão eficiente faz-se com recurso à tecnologia. Estes são os elementos-chave para a criação de um modelo inovador, que possibilita a otimização dos recursos de saúde, diminuição dos custos de hospitalização, e, ao mesmo tempo, mantém a excelência na qualidade dos serviços prestados.

A Saudom Saúde Domiciliária chega a Portugal após longos anos de atuação dos seus fundadores no mercado de saúde brasileiro, assumindo uma forte liderança, por mais de 20 anos, estando na linha da frente no que diz respeito aos diferentes ramos no setor da saúde.

A experiência e o dinamismo destes executivos permitiram que vários casos de sucesso fossem construídos ao longo dos anos, e é com essa mesma motivação que a Saudom Saúde Domiciliária nasce no coração de Portugal.

Preocupamo-nos com os valores humanos na atenção e no bem-estar, conforto e nos cuidados, assim como na promoção da qualidade de vida do utente e dos seus familiares.

A nossa visão é tornarmo-nos referência nos cuidados domiciliários em Portugal com o compromisso de satisfazer as necessidades dos nossos clientes de forma acessível, tecnológica e inovadora.

Name: Home Care Plus
Description: We specialize in delivering high-quality patient care, elder care, infant care, nursing services, palliative care, and physiotherapy across Mumbai. Name: Integrity Homecare
Description: Integrity Homecare Agency (IHA) provides compassionate, personalized in-home care services across the GTA, helping individuals maintain independence and quality of life. From daily living assistance to specialized care, we lead with integrity to deliver support you can trust.

Name: Heavenly Care Home Care
Description: The Heavenly difference truly exists because of our caregivers, nurses, and office staff who go above and beyond the call of duty. Our mission is to MAKE A POSITIVE DIFFERENCE. Description: Family Hope Healthcare is a person-centered organization dedicated to improving the quality of life for individuals of all backgrounds and abilities. We provide a wide range of services—including residential care, day programs, behavioral health support, and case management—tailored to meet the unique needs of each person we serve. Our mission is to support individuals in achieving greater independence, reaching their personal goals, and becoming active, valued members of their communities. Whether facing physical, emotional, behavioral, or developmental challenges, Family Hope Healthcare is here to walk alongside each person with dignity, respect, and hope.

Name: Sense Of Peace Home Care formally known as Peace Of Mind Home Care
Description:
After many years of serving the community using the name A Peace of Mind Home Care, we have decided to change our name to something that relates more to how we want our clients to feel when they rely upon us, and the continued expansion in our service offerings. Therefore, we are excited to move forward with our new name, Sense of Peace Home Care.

Sense Of Peace Home Care, LLC, locally here in Reading, PA is dedicated to providing the highest level of care to your loved one. We provide in home care services throughout Berks County.

All of the caregivers hired are not only trained by us, but they also have the same compassion we do for our clients. We, as a team, ensure every client feels appreciated, cared for and most importantly, part of our family.

Name: comePounder
Description:
comePounder is a pioneering start-up revolutionizing the healthcare industry with its cutting-edge approach and commitment to deliver faster, more affordable, and accessible medical assistance right at your doorstep. Leveraging the transformative power of artificial intelligence, comePounder is set to redefine the way healthcare is delivered and experienced.

Imagine having an intelligent medical assistant at home, available to provide personalized informational support in your preferred language. With comePounder, this vision becomes a reality. Our AI-driven platform empowers users to ask questions, receive detailed information on doctor's prescriptions and radiological and pathological reports, and effortlessly schedule reminders for medications or medical tests.

And comePounder goes beyond just informational support. We bring the entire medical ecosystem under one comprehensive window. Whether you need to book caregivers, acquire medical equipment, or select from a diverse range of patient meal options, all available within your city, comePounder has you covered. Our platform connects you with a wide array of providers, ensuring you have access to the best choices tailored to your needs.

Our extensive database includes detailed information on hospitals, blood banks, diagnostic and rehabilitation centers, all just a click away. This wealth of information puts the power of choice directly in your hands, while the competitive landscape we foster ensures you benefit from the best prices and services.

At comePounder, we are your partner in navigating the complexities of modern healthcare. Join us in our mission to make healthcare more accessible, affordable, and personalized. Experience the future of healthcare with comePounder – where innovation meets care

Name: Home Healthcare Registry LLC- USA
Description: Home Health Care Registry is a company in Contra Costa County that has been offering home health care services to clients in the Bay Area since 1997.

Name: Preferred Care at Home of Boca, Delray and NPB
Description: When you choose a home care service, one consideration stands above all else - the quality of the personnel who will be at your love one's side. You also want people you can trust without question. We will work diligently to send the very best caregivers working in the field today. If you are not happy, neither are we!

Name: Braining
Description:
Braining, a versatile platform, harnesses the power of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Virtual Reality (VR) to address the needs of stroke patients and enhance their recovery journey. In light of the limited resources available to stroke survivors, our focus is on utilizing cutting-edge technology to accelerate the rehabilitation of stroke patients.

By integrating AI, we aim to revolutionize the treatment plans for stroke patients. Our initial trials are centred on stroke survivors, inspired by the significant advancements seen through continuous occupational therapy. 

Our deployment of VR technologies within a personalized metaverse offers a unique and engaging approach to providing stroke survivors with a diverse range of stimuli. This approach not only expedites the recovery process but also enhances its overall effectiveness, offering a potent resource in the journey to recover from a stroke.

Name: Aidexpress Home Care Services
Description:
Aidexpress is reimagining the future of home care with technology, compassion, and a deep respect for those who give and receive care.

Since 2014, we’ve helped families across Québec and Ontario quickly and safely access a wide range of in-home services, from daily support and companionship to nursing care and specialized health services.

But we’re not just improving the care experience for clients, we’re also building a better, more human way to work for caregivers, support workers, and healthcare professionals.

By joining the Aidexpress network, you gain access to a wide variety of service requests based on your profile and availability. While we can’t guarantee a fixed number of hours, we offer:

- The freedom to choose your schedule and location
- A user-friendly platform to manage your shifts in just a few clicks
- 24/7 real human support, always there when you need it
- A respectful and professional environment that puts people first

Whether you're looking for flexibility, supplemental income, or a meaningful way to contribute, Aidexpress gives you the tools and support to succeed on your own terms.

 You care for others. We care for you.

Aidexpress! Putting people at the heart of home care.

Name: Aithera Home Care
Description: Althera Home Care is a next generation home healthcare platform dedicated to transforming how in-home care is delivered across Southern Europe, beginning in Spain. We acquire and modernize legacy providers, integrating AI-powered software, smart medical hardware (such as remote monitoring and wearable devices) and advanced telehealth protocols. Our mission is to elevate the quality, efficiency and scalability of home healthcare- empowering patients to age at home with dignity, while creating a new standard for operational excellence in a traditionally undeserved sector.

Our mission is simple: to make caregiving a compassionate, supported experience—for both clients and their families. We help loved ones become caregivers through qualifying state programs, offering guidance, training, and ongoing support every step of the way.

Whether assisting seniors, individuals with disabilities, or those recovering from illness, we tailor every care plan to the unique needs of each client. Our approach ensures comfort and familiarity while upholding professional standards and compassionate service.

Name: OutsideClinic
Description:
At OutsideClinic, we believe everyone deserves access to high-quality eye and hearing care - wherever they are. As the UK's leading provider of home eye and hearing tests, we bring expert care directly to people's homes, making life easier for those who may struggle to visit a high-street optician or audiologist. 

We're always looking for passionate optometrists, audiologists, and clinicians who want to make a real different. At OutsideClinic, you'll have the time, technology, and support to provide life-changing care - without the constraints of a traditional clinic. 

Enjoy flexibility, autonomy, and a better work-life balance, all while delivering exceptional service to those who need it most. 

If you're ready for a career that's more rewarding, more flexible, and more impactful, we'd love to hear from you.

As a pioneering tech platform , Zeel is the first-of-its-kind company that connects clients, patients, employees, and organizations with trusted healthcare providers NATIONWIDE.

Flip Health is set out to flip the healthcare delivery system in India by providing super customizable employee health solutions to corporates and organizations.
Flip Health is an app-based Virtual Care Platform with a broad focus on Employee Health Benefits, 360° Wellness and Overall Health Management - our biggest USP is providing continuous care and all-round wellness through personalized health care journeys. Finally, an end-to-end healthcare solution that works as hard as your team does! 
Our offerings include:
- Chronic Condition Management
- Women+ Health Management
- Mental Wellness & Sleep Management 
and many more!

Name: Vesta Healthcare
Description:
Vesta Healthcare is an industry-leading technology and clinical services organization, dedicated to connecting caregiver insights to the rest of the care team. Vesta Healthcare proactively identifies the need for additional support in the home and provides 24/7 telehealth support for caregivers and care recipients, with a focus on high-need, frail senior populations. Vesta partners with home care, health plans and providers to create value-based population health programs that emphasize clinical quality, improved health outcomes and personalized engagement. Vesta Healthcare is headquartered in New York, NY. To learn more visit www.vestahealthcare.com.    

NOTE: We encourage any interested person to explore employment opportunities with Vesta Healthcare.  Please bear in mind that all legitimate communications regarding such opportunities must come directly from the vestahealthcare.com domain. If it does not, then it may be a fraudulent communication. Unfortunately, recruitment scams in which online fraudsters pretend to represent employers are on the rise. Such “scammers” may invite unsuspecting applicants to bogus interviews, provide false employment applications or send fake offer letters, all with the ultimate goal of enticing victims to divulge sensitive personal information or pay money. We have no responsibility for any communication that does not come from the vestahealthcare.com domain and we strongly advise that you not provide information or access in response to any potentially false communication.

Name: Belle
Description:
Belle delivers home-based, foot-forward chronic care management services that generate incredible business and human value for medically complex and hard to reach populations. Belle is the largest provider of its kind, serving ACO and health plan clients nationwide with a focus on Medicare Advantage populations. The company’s solution includes medical pedicures, dynamic whole-health assessments, assisted telehealth visits with Belle’s virtual clinical team, creation and maintenance of care plans and referrals to care. 

Belle’s innovative model for chronic care management reduces total cost of care, improves quality, delights and retains members and drives broader healthcare engagement with guaranteed clinical and financial outcomes. On average, Belle generates program ROIs ranging from 2x-4x. Learn more at bellecares.com.

Name: Pontosense
Description:
Pontosense is redefining safety and caregiving through privacy-first, contactless sensing, transforming everyday spaces into intelligent, protective environments. 

Our patented AI and mmWave radar technology detects presence, behaviour, and well-being with unmatched accuracy, without wearables, cameras, or intrusion.

We partner with global leaders in AgeTech and AutoTech to enable solutions that are trusted, production-ready, and built for scale, delivering real-time insights that keep people safe and independent. 

In homes and care settings, our solutions enable aging in place by detecting falls, monitoring daily activity, and giving families and providers 24/7 peace of mind. In vehicles, our child presence detection system is the world’s only Euro NCAP-compliant, production-ready solution—proven, trusted, and built for scale.

With 600+ patents and a platform ready for high-volume deployment, we are setting the global standard for ambient intelligence. 

Together, we’re building a safer, more connected world.

Name: Axx Care
Description:
Com 15 anos de experiência, atendemos mais de 30 operadoras de saúde, entre RJ SP, MA, PE e MS, incluindo interior e comunidades. Cuidamos de nossos pacientes, não importa a localidade, e prezamos sempre pela evolução contínua, qualidade técnica, velocidade no atendimento 24h, humanizado e individualizado. A nossa equipe multidisciplinar é qualificada e treinada periodicamente, garantindo a certeza do melhor serviço. O nosso objetivo é provar que a excelência e a eficiência no atendimento de qualquer caso, não importando a sua complexidade, podem sim caminhar juntas.

Nossa equipe multidisciplinar é periodicamente treinada para oferecer o melhor suporte e segurança desde o momento da desospitalização até o final do plano de cuidado proposto, priorizando a eficiência e eficácia de toda a operação, o atendimento humanizado e a comunicação rápida e transparente.

Name: OXYPHARM
Description:
Oxypharm propose une offre originale et adaptée aux besoins d’aujourd’hui, basée sur la synergie des actions médicotechniques d’un prestataire et des compétences professionnelles et humaines du pharmacien choisi par le patient.

Oxypharm apporte une réponse globale et personnalisée pour :

- L’équipement médical du domicile : L’application de la loi HPST permet aux pharmaciens de s’impliquer davantage dans l’éducation thérapeutique et dans les actions d’accompagnement de leurs patients. L’officine confirme également son rôle clé dans le système de soin en prenant part à l’amélioration de la coordination des soins.
- Le respiratoire : Une équipe de spécialistes prend en charge vos patients sous assistance respiratoire à domicile.
- La perfusion/nutrition/diabète et le handicap : Infirmières et diététiciennes accompagnent le retour à domicile de vos patients.

Name: Well Care Health
Description:
For more than 37 years, Well Care Health has built its five-star reputation across the Carolina’s as being one of the most trusted providers of high quality, specialized in-home health care. Our services guide patients through their recoveries in the comfort of their own homes, and the needs of our patients and their families are our top priority.

Our solutions-based recovery plans are customized to fit each patient's needs and our outstanding quality of care has earned us the reputation of providing the best in-home care services available. Our well-trained and experienced health care professionals provide the highest level of quality care and specialized rehabilitation programs. You can count on our experience, professionalism, and reputation to ensure that your needs will be met with the utmost care giving you the comfort and peace of mind you deserve.

Name: Lilli
Description:
Lilli Is the Future of Independent Living - We believe that regardless of a person's medical condition, ability or age, everyone has the right to maintain their independence. Using unobtrusive technology, we give people the confidence they need to remain happy, secure and self-sufficient within their homes. Unconfined by abilities, conditions, or age, we empower people to live independently, and our technology-enabled care provides security and peace of mind for their loved ones. 

Central and local governments alone will not solve the issues surrounding the resource deficit facing health and social care systems around the world. Only through the use of technology-enabled care (TEC) can we relieve the pressures faced by healthcare services/providers and support the lives of those most vulnerable.

Our system provides real-time data and insights to those responsible for their care to give them surety in their behaviours and status and highlight any causes for concern.

We are scaling at pace and are constantly looking for forward-thinking, creative and smart self-starters to join our rapidly growing health tech business across our development, sales and marketing teams. Visit our LinkedIn page and get in touch with our team to find out more.

Name: ADAPTIA
Description:
Adaptia est une Entreprise Sociale et Solidaire, co-fondée en 2018 par Constance Le Blan, ergothérapeute depuis 2004, et Charlotte Le Blan, 19 ans d’expérience dans la finance.
Nous avons obtenu l’agrément ESUS, renouvelé en 2022 - Entreprise Solidaire d’Utilité Sociale, et sommes membres de l’AFPAPH. En 2021, Adaptia a été lauréat du prix Croissance réussie du concours Made in 92.

Aujourd'hui l’équipe est constituée de 7 ergothérapeutes, 1 cheffe de projets et 1 office manager + 300 ergothérapeutes conventionnés dans toute la France.

Ce qui nous anime c’est d’aider les personnes à retrouver de l’autonomie et du confort dans leur vie quotidienne.

Notre cœur de métier, c’est de proposer des conseils en aides techniques et/ou en travaux afin d’aménager le domicile dans son ensemble et faciliter les actes de la vie quotidienne. Nous nous adressons aux aidants et aux aidés.
Concrètement, les ergothérapeutes interviennent sur le lieu de vie :
- Tout commence par une évaluation globale au domicile : un ergothérapeute fait une évaluation et un bilan des capacités de la personne et de ses habitudes dans son environnement. Puis, un compte rendu avec l’ensemble des préconisations lui est transmis. 
- Dans un second temps, l'ergothérapeute organise au domicile avec un revendeur de matériel médical des essais des aides techniques préconisées afin d'en faciliter l'appropriation et la mise en place. Il/elle peut également aider à la réalisation des devis pour les travaux. 

Nos clients et partenaires sont des bailleurs sociaux, des Départements, des collectivités, des compagnies d’assistance et des clients particuliers.

Et aussi, nos ergothérapeutes animent des conférences et des ateliers sur des thématiques autour du Bien vieillir chez soi
- « Adaptation du logement et promotion des aides techniques » 
- « Prévention des chutes »
- « Santé visuelle et auditive »

Depuis nos débuts, nous avons réalisé plus de 12 000 évaluations au domicile.

Name: Wit-Gele Kruis van Vlaanderen
Description:

Onze medewerkers zijn o.a. gespecialiseerd in wondzorg, diabetes, palliatieve zorg, stoma- en incontinentiezorg, psychiatrische zorg, geriatrie, ergonomie en ethisch zorg verlenen. Als expert in thuisverpleging verlenen we zorg op maat volgens de meest recente verpleegkundige technieken. Daarnaast biedt het Wit-Gele Kruis ook ondersteunende en aanvullende diensten aan, zoals voedingsadvies, gezinszorg en personenalarmering. Warme zorg is hierbij de drijfveer van onze meer dan 6900 medewerkers, die in nauw contact staan met lokale huisartsen, ziekenhuizen, mantelzorgers en andere zorgpartners.

Do you want an English or French summary? Have a look at these pages on our website: www.witgelekruis.be/white-and-yellow-cross and www.witgelekruis.be/croix-jaune-et-blanche

Name: Leora Healthcare
Description:
Leora Healthcare is a trusted provider of disability, aged care and mental health services.  

As a value-driven workplace that focuses on client-centricity, inclusivity and innovation, our amazing work culture has been recognised many times over. We’ve been included in the AFR Best Places to Work List for five consecutive years from 2021-2025 and were named the 2023 Employer of Choice at the Australian HR Awards. 

DISABILITY & AGED CARE 

Founded in 2008 (as Afea Care Services), Leora is a registered service provider of the NDIS, My Aged Care Home Care Packages and icare (Lifetime Care, Workers Care and Dust Diseases Care). 

Through our expansive network of support workers, Care Managers and Registered Nurses, we provide exceptional care to thousands of families every week. Our diverse team speaks over 50 languages, which mirrors the culturally rich communities we serve. 

For NDIS participants, we provide in-home and community support as well as safe housing in our Supported Independent Living (SIL) homes. We have forged partnerships with specialist disability accommodation (SDA) providers to combine fully accessible housing with reliable 24/7 onsite shared support. 

MENTAL HEALTH 

Our mental health division offers the modern alternative to outdated Employee Assistance Programs through an innovative wellbeing platform and mobile app. 

Leora enables businesses to provide their employees with a full suite of mental health resources and tools.  

Employees can browse a network of qualified therapists and conveniently book an appointment. They can receive instant support via Text a Therapist. Other benefits include access to a 24/7 AI chatbot trained in Cognitive Behaviour Therapy and an impressive library of self-care and personal development resources. 

Human-led. Digitally-powered. Clinically-backed. 

By breaking down barriers to accessibility, stigma and privacy concerns, Leora is revolutionising workplaces and redefining mental healthcare.

Name: Season Two
Description:
Ageing in India is exponentially increasing due to the impressive gains that society has made in terms of increased life expectancy. However, the care ecosystem for ‘silvers’ has not kept pace with their increased life expectancy and the quality of life they want to lead post retirement.

Lack of physical and social infrastructure are major deterrents to providing comfort to the aged. Isolation and restricted social security have made the elderly more vulnerable. 

The vision of SP Life care (through the brand Season Two) is to provide “care and support to senior citizens and transform their lives,” through lifestyle, health and social support. We will do this through an ecosystem that enables personalized care through pioneering digital interventions.

Our portfolio companies include technology and healthcare startups. In healthcare, currently we operate senior living homes , home care services, our future vision includes investments in specialised senior care services. Our prototype facility in Trivandrum, Kerala provides independent and assisted living services. It also includes a full-fledged Ayurveda center, family health centre, Yoga, physiotherapy and dining facilities. With a committed investment of over US $ 50 Million, we are launching our services in Bangalore and Kochi under the Season Two Brand.

Name: Pediatric Home Service
Description:
At Pediatric Home Service (PHS), we are leaders in home healthcare, dedicated to providing comprehensive services that enable children with medical complexities to thrive at home with their families. Our offerings include Respiratory and Equipment, Infusion and Pharmacy, Home Care Nursing, Feeding Support, and more, all aligned with our vision: "To make a difference in the life of every family we serve by taking care of the child."

PHS is known for its clinical excellence, superior customer service, and a relentless commitment to achieving the best outcomes. We hire top-tier clinicians who not only provide expert care but also embody our belief that customer service is everyone's responsibility, regardless of the department.

We’re pioneers in home care innovation, constantly asking, "How can we do it better?" From electronic charting to online ordering and full IT support, we lead the industry in technological advancements, making processes more efficient for our entire healthcare team.

At PHS, every role makes a meaningful impact. Whether directly involved in patient care or supporting from behind the scenes, each contribution plays a crucial part in improving lives. Our culture supports and encourages employees to thrive, with generous benefits and a focus on work-life balance.

Guided by our mission, Taking Care of the Child, we are committed to enhancing the quality of life for children and their families, creating an environment where both patients and employees excel.

Name: Specialty Medical Equipment, Inc.
Description:
Specialty Medical Equipment (SME) is a nationwide distributor of medical equipment and supplies, primarily focused on diabetes management and sleep disorder-related products. Our team has a combined 75 years of experience owning and operating durable medical equipment companies with a proven track record of delivering value to patients and provider partners. Our team consists of healthcare, equipment/supply, insurance, patient advocacy, operations, and technology experts who understand the unique needs of the patients and providers we serve.

SME is committed to developing home-based care solutions to support patients in their pursuit of a healthy lifestyle. Through a collaborative approach with patients, healthcare providers, insurance carriers, and other industry stakeholders, we believe diabetes management and sleep therapy will continue to achieve breakthroughs in value-based care initiatives. Contact us today to learn how SME is contributing to improved health outcomes, better patient satisfaction scores, and cost savings to the healthcare system. Together, we can make a difference in patient care.

Name: Home Instead Thuisservice (Nederland)
Description:
Home Instead Thuisservice is thuiszorg, maar dan anders. Bij ons ligt de nadruk op persoonlijke aandacht en betekenisvolle ondersteuning, zowel praktisch als emotioneel. Met aandacht én tijd voor senioren die zo lang mogelijk thuis willen blijven wonen. Zorg kan beter, dat bewijst Home Instead elke dag door ondersteuning af te stemmen op de behoeften van senioren en in te spelen op de ontwikkelingen in de langdurige zorg. Bij Home Instead gaat welzijn voor zorg en staat het verhogen van de kwaliteit van leven voorop. 
Home Instead biedt Metgezelschap/Individuele begeleiding, ondersteuning In en Om huis en Persoonlijke verzorging. U bepaalt zelf wanneer en welke diensten worden afgenomen en hoe lang deze ondersteuning nodig is. Wij zijn inzetbaar met een zorgindicatie in zorg in natura of PGB via een Wlz of Wmo indicatie. Daarnaast zijn we ook op particuliere basis inzetbaar.
De medewerkers van Home Instead, onze CAREGivers, bouwen met hun klanten een relatie op die net zo persoonlijk kan zijn als met familieleden of vrienden. Tegelijkertijd leveren CAREGivers ondersteuning die voldoen aan professionele eisen. Onze CAREGivers zijn namelijk geselecteerd en getraind om de dienstverlening ook in complexe situaties te bieden zoals specifieke zorg bij senioren met dementie. De CAREGivers van Home Instead worden tevens ondersteund door een professioneel supportteam en de kwaliteit in het geheel van de dienstverlening wordt doorlopend getoetst. We voeren jaarlijkse een klant- en medewerkerstevredenheidsonderzoek uit onder onze klanten, mantelzorgers en CAREGivers. Zo waarderen klanten en mantelzorgers ons met een 8.8 en beveelt 98% onze organisatie aan bij anderen.
De CAREGivers ondersteunen dagelijks vanuit onze kernwaarden: geef vertrouwen, maak het verschil, vanuit het hart. 
Thuiszorg, maar dan anders!

Landelijk netwerk
Home Instead Thuisservice is een landelijke organisatie en biedt met haar dienstverlening niet medische ondersteuning en persoonlijke zorg thuis.

Name: Nutrix AG
Description:
Nutrix is an award-winning Swiss health-tech innovator that combines the power of AI with wearables and human care to provide cost-effective prevention and healthcare programs that work.

Nutrix's flagship platform, gSense, combines advanced AI, remote monitoring, and data analytics to transform the prevention and management of chronic conditions and mental wellness.

gSense offers focused programs on Prevention, Overweight and Obesity, and Type 2 Diabetes. Coming soon: strategies for Chronic Stress and Burnout, Cardiovascular Diseases—a leap towards comprehensive healthcare solutions.

Nutrix has been recognized by TechCrunch, named one of the Startups to Watch in Switzerland, and listed among the Top Female-Founded Startups in Europe by Sifted. Additionally, Wired Japan celebrated Nutrix with a Top Innovations award. cortiSense technology won the CES Innovation Award 2025 in Digital Health.

Name: FoodMarble
Description:
FoodMarble is the world’s first personal digestive tracker, designed to help people who experience digestive discomfort better understand how food affects them. Our hand-held, affordable breath analysis device and companion app are based on the most advanced techniques used in gastroenterology departments worldwide, with precision clinical-grade sensors for hydrogen and methane. Together, they give people clarity around their diet, reveal what works for their unique digestive system, and help them take control.

Beyond personal wellness, we also work with healthcare providers and researchers. Through the FoodMarble Healthcare platform, gastroenterologists, clinics and healthcare professionals use our technology to support the diagnosis and management of conditions such as IBS and SIBO. By making advanced breath testing portable, accessible, and patient-friendly, we’re helping clinicians deliver more personalized care.

At FoodMarble, our mission is to make the invisible visible—with the ambition to help millions of people worldwide live better by understanding their gut.

Learn more at https://foodmarble.com/

Pour mener à bien nos projets, nous nous appuyons sur :

 Une communauté de plus de 20 000 professionnels de santé libéraux (infirmiers, IPA, kinésithérapeutes, sages-femmes)

 Des outils digitaux sécurisés

 Une équipe de coordinateurs paramédicaux experts

Nos services s’adressent à plusieurs publics :

 Les particuliers, qui trouvent facilement et rapidement un professionnel de santé pour leurs soins à domicile. Chaque mois, des centaines de milliers d’usagers nous font confiance.

 Les établissements de santé, que nous accompagnons dans l’organisation fluide des retours à domicile de leurs patients.

 Les industriels de santé (laboratoires pharmaceutiques, biotech, medtech), qui s’appuient sur notre réseau national pour :

- Accélérer l’inclusion et la mise en place d'essais cliniques décentralisés (#homenursing)

- Mettre en œuvre des parcours patients sur mesure (accompagnement, observance, bon usage)

- Déployer des campagnes d’information et de sensibilisation auprès des professionnels de santé

 Les entreprises, pour lesquelles nous organisons des campagnes de prévention et de soins sur site :
 bilans de santé,
 dépistages,
 vaccinations (Grippe, Covid-19),
 prévention des risques cardiovasculaires,
 cancer du sein, etc.

 Note de satisfaction de nos clients et patients : 9,6/10

Notre mission : faciliter l’accès aux soins et à la santé, partout, pour tous.

Name: Baluchon France
Description:
Le Baluchonnage est un dispositif de répit et d’accompagnement aidant-aidé à domicile, créé en 1999 au Québec dans lequel un intervenant unique, spécialement formé et accompagné, le Baluchonneur, vient remplacer l’aidant auprès de son proche dépendant plusieurs jours d’affilée, 24h/24. Au terme de sa mission, le professionnel (Baluchonneur) rédige un Journal d’Accompagnement pour soutenir l’aidant et lui proposer des stratégies d’intervention adaptées à sa situation.

Baluchon France, association loi 1901 créée en 2013, favorise le répit de longue durée pour les aidants partout en France. Sa mission est d’accompagner les porteurs de projet de répit de longue durée vers le Baluchonnage et de faire connaître cette solution de répit aux aidants.

Name: CareLineLive
Description:
CareLineLive is a cloud-based home care management software provider.

We help home care agencies and domiciliary care providers streamline operations, improve compliance and deliver better, more person-centred care through a single, all-in-one platform.

CareLineLive provides electronic medication records (eMAR), care rostering, scheduling, billing tools and a carer mobile app, enabling care teams to work more efficiently and safely.

Description:
AARP AgeTech Collaborative Portfolio Company | Microsoft Partner Company

MiiCare is a social enterprise set up by a group of professionals with diverse industry backgrounds, ranging from healthcare to technology and product development. The team came together with one objective in mind - To give vulnerable people (both young and not so young) a Healthy, Safe, and Happy life by building on emerging IoT (Internet of Things) technologies and advancement in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.

Our team spent over a year working alongside a group of elderly people, clinicians and carers to understand the issues faced by vulnerable people in their day-to-day life. At the end of this lengthy consultative process, the team developed our first prototype - MiiCube.

MiiCube has since been through a very long and thorough development and user-testing journey as the team wanted a solution which is reliable, adaptable and user-friendly. The result is a technological marvel which is suitable for a wide range of chronic conditions and builds on non-intrusive sensing technologies to preserve the privacy and dignity of the users, meaning no cameras and no video recording.

Our differentiating value proposition is our solution's ability to cater for the 'Physical' as well as 'Emotional' well-being of our users. We do this by combining the advancement in Technology Enabled Care solutions and Social Media. This allows us to detect and notify an imminent risk to a vulnerable adult as well as link individuals of similar interest to keep them entertained and happy, and help them overcome loneliness.

The solution provided by MiiCare also falls under the category of ‘disruptive technologies’ with unprecedented potential of transforming the current care provision model, by empowering individuals to take more control of their own health and well-being.

Name: Givers
Description:
Givers enrolls, supports, and pays family caregivers through state programs.

Family caregivers have lived in the shadows for decades. 

The care ecosystem is undergoing a massive structural shift that is breaking this shadow workforce. The population over 65 is doubling, long term care costs are skyrocketing, there will 9M direct care job openings by 2030, and the number of caregivers in the US has grown from 43M in 2015 to 63M in 2026. 

We believe solving this pressure point is not only right for family caregivers, but is also a key piece of the puzzle to fixing the broken care ecosystem at large. When we empower and enlist family caregivers into the system, we create a sustainable path forward for caregivers and fill the broadening care gap in the care ecosystem.

Our core values:
- Impact Over Flash: We chase outcomes, not shiny objects. We focus on what truly moves the needle for caregivers and families, not what looks impressive from the outside. Substance beats spectacle, every time.
- Family-Grade Pride: We treat everyone–teammates, partners, and families–with empathy, integrity, and respect. We take pride in our work as if our own loved ones were the ones counting on it.
- Play the Long Game: We build and operate for the future. We invest in strong fundamentals, make decisions that compound, and think in decades, not quarters. Sustainability beats shortcuts.
- Entrepreneurship, Every Day: We act like owners. We move fast, experiment boldly, and think from first principles. We thrive in ambiguity, stay scrappy, and spend wisely–always balancing speed with stewardship.
- Win Together: We are always looking for win-wins. We collaborate selflessly, communicate transparently, and put the mission above ego. The sum must always be greater than its parts.

At Wellxa, we are reimagining healthcare through cutting-edge technology and science-driven innovation. Based in Dubai, we operate as a fully digital telehealth and home care platform, delivering a seamless, real-time healthcare experience across the UAE.

Our services are completely managed through the Wellxa App — a user-friendly mobile platform powered by a robust back-end infrastructure and smart dashboards that connect patients, doctors, and care teams in real time. From virtual consultations and mental health sessions to lab diagnostics, home nursing, physiotherapy, and IV drips, every interaction is integrated and accessible at your fingertips.

We go beyond traditional care by integrating with medical wearables and using data-driven insights to power our personalized health programs, supplements, and longevity plans. This science- and technology-based approach allows us to design truly individualized care journeys — from chronic disease management to preventive and performance-driven health.

Our mission is simple yet bold: “Unlock a Healthier You.”
By combining advanced technology, clinical expertise, and human compassion, Wellxa is building a smarter, healthier future for individuals and communities across the UAE.

Name: TruDoc KSA
Description:
An on-demand one-stop-care destination for healthy, acute, and chronic members - anytime, anywhere.

With 6700 corporate and government clients, 24.2 million eligible members, 0 malpractice claims, and multiple country operations, TruDoc aims to provide accessible, reliable, and quality healthcare to everyone, everywhere. Our spectrum of services includes 24x7 access to doctor consultations, unlimited follow-up care, teleconsultation services, and 24x7 telemonitoring, ensuring that we are always with you.

Our Purpose: We are re-designing the healthcare delivery system in a way that impacts people’s lives positively. 

Our Vision: Making health and wellness accessible and affordable to all, only one call away. 

Our Mission: To implement ethical and unbiased care, aligning people and payers under one platform.

Name: Komplex Group
Description:
