Operating across the UK, we provide tailored, clinically-led, and operationally robust support to individuals, families, commissioners, and organisations. Each of our brands brings its own identity and expertise, but we’re united by shared values, a commitment to quality, and a drive to lead by doing things differently.

Name: BasqueCare Group

Basque Care es una empresa sanitaria líder en el País Vasco, dedicada a ofrecer soluciones integrales de salud. Nos especializamos en asistencia sanitaria integral en el domicilio, gestión de equipo sanitario y formación brindando atención personalizada y de alta calidad a empresas y particulares.

Nuestro equipo de profesionales altamente cualificados trabaja con compromiso para mejorar el bienestar de nuestros clientes. Conectando salud y comunidad en el País Vasco.

Name: GROUPE AGIR à dom
Description:
TOUJOURS PLUS PROCHE DE VOUS

AGIR à dom. est un Prestataire de Santé à Domicile expert dans l'accompagnement des patients atteints de maladie chronique, et qui est implanté dans 14 départements français.

Créée en 1974 et destinée à faciliter le retour et le maintien à domicile, aujourd’hui nous gardons la dénomination d’ENTREPRISE ASSOCIATIVE. 
Nous proposons des services qui sont liés à l’assistance respiratoire, la perfusion, la nutrition et le diabète, ainsi que des matériels de maintien à domicile.

Grâce à notre filiale IC@dom, chargée de réaliser des études cliniques à domicile, nous investissons chaque année l’excédent financier dans diverses actions améliorant la qualité de vie des patients. 

L’entreprise est membre de la Fédération ANTADIR (Association Nationale pour les Traitements À Domicile, les Innovations et la Recherche) et signataire de la « Charte de la personne soignée à domicile » de la FFAAIR (Fédération Française des Associations et Amicales de malades, Insuffisants ou handicapés Respiratoires).

Pour en savoir plus, rendez-vous sur www.agiradom.com et suivez-nous sur notre page Facebook (@GroupeAGIRadom) et sur notre canal YouTube.

Name: Best DOC Home Healthcare
Description: Best DOC Home Healthcare is revolutionizing Dubai's approach to medical care by delivering expert healthcare services directly to your doorstep in under 30 minutes. We specialize in a wide range of home-based medical solutions, including physician and nursing services, lab tests, physiotherapy, pregnancy care, pediatric and elderly support, and IV therapy. Our mission is to provide immediate, top-quality medical attention with the convenience and comfort of home care. Our dedicated team of DHA approved professionals are committed to delivering personalized, compassionate care tailored to meet the unique needs of each patient. With Best DOC Home Healthcare, you gain a trusted health partner committed to ensuring your well-being and peace of mind, making healthcare accessible, efficient, and stress-free. Choose us for reliable, fast, and compassionate care anytime you need it.

Name: NurtureHeal
Description:
If it’s not back pain, it’s knees. If it’s not digestive issues, it’s auto-immune. If it’s not physical illness, it’s mental.
NurtureHeal brings you a wide scope of natural therapies that work in tandem with your body and help alleviate all kinds of chronic issues. Taking a holistic approach to health and well-being, our experts help you tackle these issues from all sides - physical, mental, nutrition and overall well-being.
With therapies such as physiotherapy, acupuncture, counselling, nutrition and many more on a single platform, we hope to make the journey of healing easier for our customers through a tailor made treatment plan.

Name: Herewith
Description:
Herewith Inc. puts everyday help in the hands of families across the US with our platform dedicated to making in-home senior care accessible to everyone. Combining a user-friendly digital platform with a custom booking experience, Herewith simplifies the process of finding in-home help, reducing stress, closing gaps in care, and ensuring families only pay for the services they need. 

A fresh alternative to traditional care agencies with their strict minimums and little control, Herewith connects older adults and their families with flexible, affordable, high quality support while creating meaningful job opportunities for local caregivers as Helpers. Founded in San Francisco in 2018, Herewith has expanded its offerings to partner with employers, senior living communities, and healthcare providers, to reshape the way families and communities approach in-home care.

Description:
'Anvayaa' means Family, and our mission is to provide 360 degree care services, like a caring family member.  Anvayaa is a Technology enabled platform that caters to the Medical, Non medical and Social care needs of your kin and elders, across 35 cities in India. 

We enable you to provide seamless hi-touch, personalized care for your family in the comfort and convenience of your home, without feeling helpless or anxious, especially if you live in another city / country. Our professionally trained team, both medical and non-medical, ensure peace of mind and better quality of life for those who need that extra care. We recommend our emergency cover as essential for everybody 60 years and above. 

Think Anvayaa, be it for Elderly kin or an adult kin with a temporary / chronic / post surgery rehab, or any disabling condition that needs round the clock care.

Anvayaa is a part of India's prominent Social Impact Accelerator program, AISEA. The program is promoted by DsT through the NIDHI Accelerator program and is jointly set up by i-TIC Foundation, IIT Hyderabad and Action for India.

Anvayaa NISHCHINT home care services provide solutions for on demand home care and long term wellness needs of employees. Nishchint isn't just a product; it's a way of fostering a culture of care. Your workplace transforms into a united family where the well-being of each member is cherished, leading to increased loyalty, job satisfaction, and ultimately, longevity within your organization.

Description:
REFD "Redefining Healthcare, Bringing Wellness Home"

REFD is a Saudi innovative healthcare company that’s transforming the way people access medical and psychological support. We believe that health should be personal, accessible, and delivered with care wherever you are.
Through our online mental health consultations, we connect individuals with trusted mental health professionals who provide guidance, therapy, and emotional support all through a secure and convenient digital platform.
At the same time, our in home medical services allow clients to receive professional medical care right in the comfort of their homes. From general checkups and nursing services to specialized medical visits, REFD ensures high quality healthcare without the need to visit a clinic or hospital.
By merging technology, compassion, and qualified Saudi healthcare professionals, REFD offers a holistic approach that supports both mind and body. Our goal is to make wellness a seamless part of everyday life not a challenge.
At REFD, we don’t just provide services we bring healthcare closer, easier, and more human.

Name: Citizen Care Health Solutions
Description:
Citizen Care Health Solutions (CCHS) is on a mission to personalize and simplify access to quality healthcare, enabling citizens to achieve better health outcomes where they are.

Our journey began in 2020 when we developed flexible COVID-19 screening and testing pods. These pods were used throughout North America at a wide variety of locations including airports, long-term care facilities, healthcare clinics, universities, sports venues and construction sites.

Since then, we have expanded our offering to broadly meet the unique needs of the point-of-care testing environment with innovative IT solutions. As diagnostic testing shifts toward decentralization, the Citizen Care Health team seeks to revolutionize healthcare by offering novel connectivity solutions, advanced data analytics, and software solutions that streamline clinical workflows.

By bringing together innovators and leaders in the healthcare space, we’re transforming the way citizens receive quality care.

At Chamberlin Care, we understand that you or a loved one may have pressing needs due to illness or injury; the situation may be urgent or emotionally charged. You are doing the best you can, but you may be unable to support because of proximity, lack the experience needed, or just be confused about costs and coverage. You are not alone. With the right guide, you can smoothly navigate the nuances of healthcare and your post acute care experience.

Name: Prestige Inhome Care
Description:
Prestige Inhome Care began in 2005 to provide people with in-home healthcare and personal services so they could stay living in the comfort of their own home, with pride and dignity.  Since then we've grown substantially, a testament to the high quality of, and satisfaction with our services.  We are not restricted by geography and are here to help our clients wherever they may live and with whatever care they need.

Prestige Inhome Care specialise in providing dedicated Registered Nurses and professional carers committed to helping people stay in their own home and live as happily and normally as they can. We strive to provide the highest possible standard of care: professional, reliable and all with a friendly smile.

We're proud of employing the most skilled, professional and friendly nurses and carers in the industry.  Our staff are highly trained and qualified and we specifically look for people who enjoy what they do, are passionate about our Vision and Values, and who love helping people.  What's more, we believe that happy staff make for happy clients, so we respect and value our nurses and carers, and aim to provide them with a fulfilling, rewarding career, not just a job.  Our clients can expect our staff to be highly professional , helpful and understanding.

When we talk about delivering the highest possible standard of care, we really mean it. Which is why we’re proud to have maintain accreditation to the NDIS Practice standards. We also comply with the Aged Care Quality Standards. 

Each year Prestige undertakes external audits across both the aged care and disability support sectors. These audits validate the hard work we do to deliver exceptional care to all individuals we support in a manner that is caring, safe and compliant with all of our obligations and responsibilities.

Name: Me Escuta
Description:
Dar ouvidos a todos que não conseguem escutar, esse é o propósito da Me Escuta!
Somos uma startup de impacto que usa transparência e tecnologia para fornecer tratamentos auditivos acessíveis às mais de 10 milhões de pessoas com deficiência auditiva no Brasil.
A Me Escuta foi criada pela Genesis Startups (startup studio) em sociedade com a HGC Saúde (maior revenda de aparelhos auditivos de Minas Gerais) e a TOT (centro de tratamento de deficiência auditiva infantil).

Name: HumanCare LLC
Description:
When you can't be there, count on us!

We provide a variety of in home care options for seniors, adolescents and children, keeping care affordable and comfortable.
Since 2011, HumanCare has been helping families choose the right care option for their loved one.

We are fully licensed, and our skilled staff is well trained to provide care that is customized to your loved one’s needs.

Name: Envision Hospice
Description:
Envision Hospice is proud to provide quality Hospice services to serve our patients and families in Washington.

At Envision, we place a high value on quality patient care and exceptional customer service. The rigorous standards of our ACHC accreditation exemplifies Envision’s commitment to excellence, integrity, and unparalleled service.

We pride ourselves on supporting the highest quality of life for our patients and working closely with their families through every step of the plan of care. Input from patient and family are integral to us providing the custom care that each patient deserves.

Name: The Physio Co
Description:
The Physio Co exists for one reason: To help seniors stay mobile, safe & happy.

Every day we improve the quality of life for Aussie seniors and help put a little bit of extraordinary in their everyday life. In order to do this, we need great physios who love to learn and grow, and who are ready to take on a new challenge each day.

Our team helps senior clients identify and achieve memorable results through individualised goal plans.

We don’t take the ‘one size fits all’ approach. Each client is given the opportunity to dream big so they can start to do more, be more and take on each day with more energy.

We help seniors in their own homes, retirement villages, and in aged care facilities, either one-to-one or one-to-many, online or offline.

Name: Sugarman Health and Wellbeing
Description:
With our experienced and skilled team, we take a holistic approach to developing a care service for our service users and their families.

Sugarman Health and Wellbeing is a multi-divisional organisation supporting a wide range of individuals from children to adults and has an extensive support team with adolescents. We are a clinically led organisation with our divisions of Complex Care, Specialist Services and Children Services, working together to deliver the highest service possible.

We recognise that when it comes to someone’s care or educational needs, no two service users are the same and as such we treat them as individuals and this is reflected in everything that we do from the point of introduction, service planning, recruitment, selection, training and ongoing supervisions.

Our model includes working with commissioners, service users and their support network from the start to understand needs and expectations. This way we can work collaboratively to ensure that we create a service plan that will meet person-centered outcomes and ensure their safety. This model gives us a platform to build on and we will also respond to any changes to needs and conditions.

We maintain our high standards and pride ourselves on taking a values-based and safe recruitment approach to help us attract and recruit the very best talent across the market whose personal values align with ours. Our staff are highly trained and upskilled to fully understand the vital importance of person-centred support and how to enhance our service user’s independence and ultimately support them in meeting their goals and aspirations.

Name: Medfam
Description:
At MedFam, we believe that geriatric care should be more than just medical treatment - it should be a holistic approach that focuses on improving the overall well-being of our elders. We provide a range of services that aim to enhance the comfort, dignity, and quality of life of our clients.
Our team of experienced geriatric care specialists work closely with families and healthcare providers to develop personalized care plans that cater to the unique needs of each individual. We offer a comprehensive range of services, including in-home care, medication management, physical therapy, and more.

At MedFam, we are committed to redefining geriatric care and setting a new standard for excellence in the industry. Join us on our mission to provide compassionate care and support to elders in our community.

With 50 years of combined experience, Home Care Placement’s leadership brings invaluable resources and expertise to families across San Diego, Orange, and Los Angeles counties, as well as surrounding areas. This depth of experience equips our compassionate team to support and guide clients and referral sources through even the most challenging situations.

De Portugal,

Acail Gás!

First Choice Home Care’s prime objective is to enhance the quality of life for our Service Users. Therefore, our recruitment process is robust and is tailored to recruiting candidates who have the same values as us.

Our Carers spend 4 days on mandatory training which is carried out in-house by our Company Trainer, and then our carers initially shadow with a team of Quality Assurance Officers.  Once signed off as competent in all areas, only then is the carer able to carry out care tasks. The carer is assigned a mentor until they complete their Continuous Development Plan (CDP) and, thereafter, are supported on a regular basis throughout their career.

This means that we are able to provide an excellent service to our Service Users who need care due to illness, disability or frailty, in a person-centred way. Our care is of a high quality, professional and is tailored to suit our Service Users’ needs living in their own home.

What makes us different:
•	In-home visits by trained physicians and nurse practitioners
•	Advanced tools like MolecuLight for early infection detection
•	Non-contact ultrasound therapy to accelerate healing
•	Biologic skin grafts that promote tissue regeneration and reduce pain
•	Nutrition support and patient advocacy to address root causes

Each of our treatments is FDA-approved, virtually pain-free, and personalized to each patient’s condition and setting. Our approach improves outcomes, reduces hospitalizations, and supports your commitment to quality care.

We're not just treating wounds—we're restoring dignity, independence, and quality of life.

Name: Harmony Care Management
Description:
Harmony Care Management professional life care managers are a concierge guide to support you through the complex maze of health care services and needs.  Our holistic approach to care can support with health care coordination, monitoring, transitions, management and more.  Through proactive planning, we help our clients make the best decisions possible coordinating many different healthcare components to create a harmonious plan.

* Full-Service Coordination
Our Life Care Managers coordinate all third party resources including medical providers, personal care, community resources, financial, legal and other respective entities and communicating effectively with family.  

* Medical Appointment Liaison
We can facilitate, coordinate and attend appointments with healthcare providers being an advocate and an educator along the way. 

* Medication Management
Harmony Care Management maintains a comprehensive medication list and coordinates with primary care physicians and specialists to ensure medications are reviewed and utilized properly.  

* Oncology Management 
Harmony Care Management Consultants understand the complexity of oncology care management and can help our clients walk through the journey together.

* Assessing and Monitoring
Our nurse navigators can conduct well-being checks and act as a liaison to families, alerting families to obstacles and advising potential solutions.

* Palliative Coordination
With deep roots in palliative and hospice care, Harmony Care Managers will coordinate options to allow peace and comfort at the end of life.  

* Benefits Utilization
Harmony Care Managers can review benefits and act as a liaison with insurance carriers to maximize coverage.  Health Care invoices are also reviewed to support reducing overall healthcare costs.  

* Community Support Coordination
From support groups to meals on wheels, Harmony Care Managers can connect our clients and families to relevant community resources. 

* Discharge Planning

Name: Neurobit
Description:
Every year over 26 million suffer heart failure, 15 million suffer a stroke and 10 million develop dementia. Most of these incidents can be predicted years before they happen. Neurobit uses physiological signals collected during sleep to uncover these patterns. Using sleep as a biomarker, Neurobit is building a Universal health analytics platform with their state-of-the-art AI models, trained on over a trillion data points of multi-channel physiological data to operate across devices, signals and disease conditions.

Neurobit's technologies are trusted by 120+ universities, hospitals and R&D centers from across the world. 

Contact us to find out how our technologies can help you improve care and deliver better outcomes.

Description:
Freedom Home Care is a private duty home care agency serving Chicago, the North Shore and Northwest Suburbs. We offers caregiver, companions and certified nursing assistants to help senior citizens with all aspects of personal care, companionship, safety awareness and basic medical care.

We conduct a thorough background check and intensive screening of all of our employees. Each is also covered by our liability and workers' compensation coverage. We are licensed, bonded and insured, as well as a charter member of the National Private Duty Association.

We recognize that every individual is unique. From simple home services to full time nursing care, our staff provides a diverse array of lifestyle assistance and professional care services developed to maximize each client's daily independence, comfort and vitality. We offer a complimentary in-home assessment to develop a custom, individualized care plan to provide only the services that best suit each individual's needs and goals.

We are on call 24/7 for emergency situations and have no hourly minimum. Our staff is available day or night, hourly, or full-time to provide services in one's own own. In addition to providing care and services in private residences, Freedom Home Care also provides private care for individuals in independent and assisted living communities, as well as nursing homes, wherever our clients call home.

Freedom Home Care is excited to announce our new Client Wellness Tracking System, FreedomCWTS. This system incorporates computer tablet technology and customized software which is placed in the home of each client, allowing caregivers to check in, make notes, and send important updates in real time on their health and wellbeing.

The FreedomCWTS system is set to send alerts for falls, weight-loss, change in appetite, change in insulin/oxygen levels and blood pressure readings. Our team is notified immediately if there is a change, and can follow up to prevent hospitalizations.

Name: Home Concierge
Description:
Home Concierge is not just another home care company. In an industry plagued by undertrained caregivers, poor service and inconsistent caregivers as a result of high turnover, we’ve created an offering that 1) puts the needs of our members first, 2) treats our employees like team members and 3) provides peace of mind to seniors and their families. 
 
We do that by matching seniors and their families with a dedicated, personal concierge who builds a personalized team of caregivers to support all their needs. From support with eating, bathing and toileting to performing everyday tasks like grocery shopping, meal preparation and cleaning the house – with our team the answer is always YES. 
 
Dedicated, Personal Concierge: Our professionally trained, hardworking team of concierges are always available to listen to your needs,  coordinate services and provide thoughtful advice. They also have access to a variety of tools to help make your life easier.

In-Home Support Team: We know that in order to provide a professional, personalized service we need a highly trained, consistent team of caregivers. That’s why we’ve done away with the idea of part-time and full-time employees and created a team environment based around a tiered reward system where all of our team members are able to work towards and earn rewards that are typically restricted for full-time, salaried employees. Not surprisingly this has resulted in high employee retention – which makes our whole offering possible. 

Safety: The safety of the members we serve is our top priority. Pre-visit screenings, universal masking & goggles and dedicated staffing are just a some of the measures we’ve taken to increase safety. Click here to learn more about our response to COVID-19.

Name: Ardant
Description:
Ardant: Making far reaching changes for Occupational Therapists in Australia.
In the evolving landscape of healthcare, Occupational Therapists (OTs) face increasing challenges, from administrative burdens to securing referrals in their specialised areas. Ardant is shaking up the industry by providing a cutting-edge digital platform that empowers independent OTs. It streamlines their operations and enhances client access to high-quality therapy services. 
What we do!
1. Empowering Independent Occupational Therapists
Ardant is committed to supporting solo OTs in establishing and growing their practice without the constraints of traditional employment models. Unlike franchises or rigid agency contracts, Ardant offers flexibility with no sign-up fees, KPIs, or lock-in agreements. Therapists using the platform can work part-time or full-time while maintaining full control over their schedules, caseloads, and service areas.
Moreover, Ardant ensures that OTs are fairly compensated, with practitioners earning $174 or more per hour—significantly above the industry average—ensuring financial sustainability and career satisfaction. By removing financial and operational barriers, Ardant enables OTs to focus on delivering quality care while enjoying the benefits of independent practice.
2. Automating Administrative Tasks for Greater Efficiency
One of the most significant challenges for independent OTs is managing time-consuming administrative duties. Ardant harnesses automation and artificial intelligence to streamline essential processes, such as referrals, contracts, and invoicing. Through its Practice Management System (PMS), Ardant minimises the paperwork burden, allowing OTs to dedicate more time to client care.
By taking on the administrative workload, Ardant eliminates inefficiencies that often consume up to 40% of an OT’s time. 

We invite you to join our rapidly growing network.

Description:

Name: PRN Hospice
Description:
Our team’s mission is to ensure a comfortable end-of-life experience by providing compassionate care for those individuals living with a life-limiting illness and their families, through quality medical, emotional, spiritual, and social support.
 
In medical terminology, PRN means “as needed.” We provide hospice care adapted to what you need. Comfort and symptom management are the primary focus of our care. Our goal is to help you enjoy the highest quality of life possible.
 
Our experienced staff deliver compassionate support during some of life’s most difficult moments. PRN Hospice offers a specially trained and highly skilled team of professionals who will put you and your family at the center of the care team.
 
PRN Hospice is here for you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. We serve the Los Angeles County, Ventura County, Orange County, Riverside County, and San Bernardino County areas of Southern California.
 
If you or a loved one are interested in receiving hospice services but are unsure if you qualify, please give us a call at (818) 946-8242. We are more than happy to speak with you or your loved one about your specific scenario/condition and our nurses can meet with you in person for a full evaluation. This evaluation is available free of charge and with no obligation.

Name: Pittsburgh Mobile Footcare LLC
Description: Pittsburgh Mobile Footcare is a nurse practitioner owned company that focuses on providing high quality, routine foot care for seniors and home bound clients in the Pittsburgh area. We cater to clients who have a difficult time managing their own foot health.  This may be as a result of chronic illness, immobility, vision loss, injury, or simply preferring care in the comfort of their own home. We can serve clients in their own home or at other locations such as care facilities, senior complexes, senior centers or other off-site facilities. Visits focus on general assessment of foot health, screening for neuropathy, ulcerations and other potential risk factors. A gentle approach will be used to provide nail care and reduction of corns, calluses and general skin conditions. Our focus is to provide compassionate nursing foot care to our clients, maintain function, and prevent lower extremity complications such as wounds, ulcers, pain and even amputation. We do not accept insurance and services are private pay only.

Name: Performed.pt
Description:
A Performed é uma empresa de Medicina do Desporto possuindo na sua estrutura médicos com experiência clínica e com pós-graduação na área da Medicina Desportiva.
Os exames médicos constituem um instrumento imprescindível para aferir a aptidão ou inaptidão dos praticantes de desporto para o desempenho da sua actividade desportiva,representando um importante meio de triagem de determinadas patologias ou situações clínicas,principalmente na população jovem.
Neste quadro,o exame médico-desportivo tornou-se obrigatório nas seguintes situações:
a) Praticantes desportivos inscritos no regime de alto rendimento;
b) Praticantes desportivos filiados,ou que se pretendam filiar,em federações dotadas de utilidade pública desportiva;
c) Árbitros, juízes e cronometristas filiados,ou que se pretendam filiar,em federações dotadas de utilidade pública desportiva.
O nosso modelo de exame medico-desportivo e de aptidão para a prática de atividade física preenche as exigências reguladas pela legislação vigente sobre a matéria,observando também as recomendações constantes de consensos internacionais emitidos por instituições idóneas.
Para além de preencher as exigências básicas,o nosso exame pode incluir diferentes procedimentos de avaliação adaptados a cada caso.
O exame médico-desportivo consiste numa avaliação médica que deve ser realizada cumprindo os pontos constantes no modelo de ficha publicada em Diário da República (D.R. n.º238 de 13.12.2006 – 2.ª Série).
Este modelo é constituído por 13 pontos que incluem para além da observação clínica,eletrocardiograma.
A periodicidade do exame é anual,conforme determina o Despacho nº 9613/2020.  
Caso não haja necessidade de recorrer a outros exames complementares de diagnóstico ou pareceres de consulta de especialidade,o resultado é entregue na hora.
A prática de desporto de forma segura e certificada não é somente uma obrigação,mas sim uma mais valia para qualquer clube. Não hesite,fale connosco.
Deslocamo-nos aos clubes ou colectividades.

Name: AC Health App
Description:
AC Health is the most highly rated patient engagement app with an NPS of 91!

AC Health is changing the way that medical and wellness professionals engage with their clients, patients and users. Our SaaS platform instantly creates "playlists" hosted on our IOS/Android App. No more paper printouts or time-consuming emails.

In one click, all of your patient/client uniquely personalized care content is pushed to their app. Patients want to watch and to listen to their trusted provider -- and now they can!

If you are a rehabilitation therapist, coach, nutritionist, trainer, teacher, health care instructor or any professional helping people recover and stay healthy, we want to help you stay connected to your clients and patients through what they use the most - their phone! AC Health is designed to make it affordable for you to essentially have your own app, without compromising on the customization that you require to serve your audience personally based on their unique needs.

Physical therapists can create personalized home exercise videos for their patients during their session in just 3 steps -- open the app, click the patient's name and take a private video of the exercise uploaded instantly. Each exercise can be moved and edited (reps, sets, frequency, intensity) dynamically inside the app. Adding and deleting exercises at subsequent sessions takes minutes allowing the PT to prescribe a unique exercise regimen for every patient, speeding up recovery. No more emailing or printing and re-printing sheets of paper. Patient compliance accelerates due the simple "one click" access to their HEP. 

We are as committed to working within a provider's current workflow as we are to giving patients what they need to remember what to do when they are home alone.

Name: AlbaSanté
Description:
AlbaSanté est bien plus qu’une plateforme de prise de RDV en ligne ou de téléconsultation classique, AlbaSanté arrive sur le marché en offrant une solution optimisée et optimale pour le patient : la télé-consultation assistée par un personnel de santé à domicile.

Face à une demande exponentielle de consultations médicales laissée sans RDV & aux déserts médicaux qui ne cessent de se multiplier sur le territoire, AlbaSanté a souhaité mettre en relation tout son réseau de médecins conventionnés, infirmier(e)s, aide(s) soignant(e)s et personnel de soin au profit du patient. 

Le principe est simple :

— Choisissez un créneau de visite : « au + tôt », « demain » ou « un autre jour »
— Une fois le créneau validé par AlbaSanté, nous vous avertissons par texto ou par mail.
— Un personnel de santé se présentera chez vous au jour et à l’heure convenus.Il vous assistera pour votre téléconsultation en vous mettant en relation avec le médecin qui vous sera attribué.
— Votre diagnostic sera établi dans la demi heure & votre ordonnance vous sera envoyée immédiatement par mail.

Avec AlbaSanté : votre santé n’a plus le temps d’attendre !

Name: Accessible Pharmacy Services
Description:
Accessible Pharmacy Services is a comprehensive, home delivery pharmacy service specializing in the needs of the blind, DeafBlind, low vision and disability communities. We were founded by blind and sighted experts in the areas of accessibility, technology and medicine and we are the only provider of its kind.

What makes us unique is our ability to educate patients and family members, healthcare providers and caregivers to implement the best medication plan. Our goal is to achieve the best medical outcomes as well as help patients become more independent.

Our pharmacy professionals are trained to understand the unique needs of those who are blind and low vision. We can offer both high-tech and no-tech solutions to assist with reminders, refills and error reduction and overall medication management. There are no additional fees for this support.

We do everything for you: we will coordinate all of the details with your doctor and insurance provider including helping to keep costs as low as possible. Simply call us for a free consultation to see if we are a good fit for you.

We employ blind, as well as sighted, customer service and sales representatives because we believe that the blind should create solutions for the blind. We encourage our patients to be part of the ongoing process to maximize the solutions.

We also supply: vitamins & supplements, over-the-counter drugs, health and beauty aides and small medical equipment.

Name: Well-Being Health Care Limited
Description: Well-Being Health Care a digital hub to find home health care solutions. We not only offer Home health solutions but also help you to plan a Person-centered care approach for your beloved one. Our Support starts with finding the best Caregivers, Nurses, Physicians to take care of your loved one with the utmost care and medical precision at home, we also ensure remote health monitoring of patients and necessary steps to ensure a standard is maintained at home. We also ready to long term custodial for  critical patients on behalf of nonresident clients.  we also do medical consultancy through expert professionals abroad to take right decision.

Name: 3CMalta
Description:
Our Aim is to make sure that home care lives up to its name. We care about your care. 

We create care plans that keep you, your specific needs, cultures and routines at the very centre of care.

Following a holistic assessment, fully qualified staff will encourage, enable, and provide assistance in carrying out the ‘activities of daily living’ such as personal hygiene, grooming, toileting, continence management, feeding and mobility.

Through a selection of caregiving services, advice on home improvement alternatives, as well as technological devices, we are committed to support you and your loved ones to maintain health and well being in the comfort of your home.

Name: South Charlotte Magic Maids
Description:
Welcome to South Charlotte Magic Maids, your trusted partner in professional cleaning services. We are dedicated to providing exceptional cleaning solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of businesses, institutions, and residences.

At South Charlotte Magic Maids, we understand that a clean and sanitized environment is essential for productivity, well-being, and peace of mind. Our team of experienced and trained cleaning professionals is committed to delivering top-quality services that exceed expectations.

We offer a comprehensive range of cleaning services, including office cleaning, commercial janitorial services, residential cleaning, carpet and upholstery cleaning, window cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and more. Whether you require daily, weekly, or monthly cleaning, we have flexible packages to accommodate your schedule and budget.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to excellence. We utilize the latest cleaning techniques, eco-friendly products, and state-of-the-art equipment to ensure thorough and efficient cleaning while minimizing our environmental footprint. Our team is fully bonded and insured, providing you with peace of mind and protection.

Customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. We take pride in our responsive and personalized approach, listening to our clients' specific requirements and tailoring our services accordingly. Join us in creating cleaner, healthier, and more inviting spaces. Connect with us to learn more about our services or to schedule a consultation. Let's work together to make your surroundings shine!

Name: Advanced Staffing Solutions Limited
Description: Advanced Staffing Solutions provides in-home domiciliary care as well as healthcare recruitment services, assisting older adults to continue to live well and independently at home and helping staff and social clients meet their hiring needs. All our staff receive professional and specialised training before we match them to our clients' specific needs. We offer real care solutions and care plans, specifically designed to support their families' needs. No matter what work requirements our staff have, we can find them both part-time and full-time positions in a convenient location.

Name: ELMIK HOMECARE
Description:
At Elmik Homecare, we believe the best healing happens at home—surrounded by familiar faces, comforts, and care. Founded in Addis Ababa, our goal is simple: to bring professional, compassionate medical and personal support straight to your doorstep, so you and your loved ones can recover with dignity and peace of mind.

Our Mission
To deliver senior-supervised, doctor-led homecare services tailored to each individual’s needs, improving health outcomes and enriching quality of life.

Our Vision
A country where every family has seamless access to specialized, in-home care—from the first fragile days of neonatal life through the golden years and beyond.

Who We Serve
Stroke Survivors: Comprehensive recovery plans including nursing, physiotherapy, and cognitive support.

Neonates & Infants: Skilled neonatal monitoring and feeding support in the safety of home.

Elderly & Alzheimer’s Patients: Gentle personal care, memory-support activities, and companionship under expert supervision.

Post-Operative Clients: Pain management, wound care, and rehabilitation therapies to speed healing and prevent complications.

Psychiatry & Mental Health: At-home psychiatric follow-ups, counseling support, and medication monitoring.

What Sets Us Apart

1. Senior-Supervised Care Teams: Every client’s care plan is overseen by a senior nurse or physician, with regular home visits from our senior specialists.


2. On-Call Doctors & Specialists: Beyond nursing support, our roster includes doctors, physiotherapists, occupational therapists, and psychiatric consultants—available for in-home assessments and treatment.

3. Quality & Safety Assurance: All caregivers undergo rigorous background checks, certification verification, and ongoing in-service training.

4.Medical Staffing Solutions: We also partner with hospitals and clinics to supply qualified nurses and allied health professionals on demand, ensuring continuity of care across settings.

Name: LEVEL Motion
Description:
Welcome to LEVEL Motion!

At LEVEL, we believe movement is more than just exercise—it’s the foundation of a healthier, more independent life. Our journey began with a simple yet powerful idea: to bridge the gap between healthcare providers and patients through technology that makes rehabilitation more accessible, engaging, and insightful.

With deep roots in the medical device and rehabilitation industries, we’ve combined years of experience in biomechanics, wearable sensors, and movement analysis to create innovative tools that support both clinicians and patients. Our technology is designed to empower healthcare providers with real-time data and actionable insights while giving patients the confidence to take charge of their recovery, no matter where they are.

We specialize in using cutting-edge motion capture, AI-driven analysis, and intuitive mobile solutions to enhance physical therapy, fall prevention, and overall mobility. Our focus isn’t just on measuring movement—it’s about understanding it, improving it, and making a real difference in people’s lives.

We’re not just developing technology—we’re shaping the future of rehabilitation. Whether you’re a clinician looking for better ways to track patient progress or someone on the path to recovery, we’re here to support every step of the journey.

Let’s move forward together.

Name: Murray Mallee Aged Care Group Inc.
Description:
Murray Mallee Aged Care Group Inc. (MMACG) was formed in 1994 after a group of community members recognised that there was a desperate need for specialized in-home services for ageing people in the rural and remote regions of the Murray Mallee area. At the time nine local councils came together to address the districts’ needs and with the agreement of each council, an autonomous, not for profit organisation began.

Until 2005 offices were located at the Murray Lands Retirement Village. Today our Administration office is located at 2a Myall Avenue, Murray Bridge, providing a modern, accessible 'open door' environment. There is also a fully equipped separate Meeting/Training Centre that is available for community use. In October 2017 we opened our Adelaide office situated at 10 Newton Road Campbelltown.

Our vision is towards a bright future expanding our quality services to include increased Home Care Packages, Social Day Activity Programs and Seniors Educational Programs for older people in metropolitan Adelaide, rural and remote areas of the Murray Mallee and Riverland districts.

Why Choose Us?

Name: b2care
Description:
b2care is an e-commerce buying platform designed to support the Aged Care and NDIS sectors. 
Our partnership with Coles offers clients the world of choice when it comes to ordering from a range of ready meals available in Coles Supermarkets, under Home Care Packages & NDIS Plans, all via b2care.
This partnership means clients can now enjoy the convenient b2care shopping experience when it comes to ordering ready meals from Coles under HCP and NDIS plans. 
We understand Aged Care & NDIS participants want variety in meal options, price and delivery. So b2care worked with Coles to provide a selection of fresh, chilled, frozen, chef made, or portion-controlled meals from their wide instore range.
If eligible under an HCP or an NDIS plan, clients only pay the 30% co-payment towards the total order value, b2care have automated the process a care provider goes through to cover the 70% balance. 
Brands currently available include Coles Kitchen, Youfoodz, PerForm, Coles Organic, Weight Watchers, Herbert Adams, My Muscle Chef, On the Menu, CORE Powerfoods, Foxes Den, Dari’s, McCain, Nature’s Kitchen, Coles Made Easy range and the range goes on, over 190 meal and growing! 
We make delivery easy too, with the choice of Coles home delivery or Click and Collect, nationally. Clients choose their preferred delivery window and delivery day, directly from the b2care shopping cart.
When clients order via b2care, care providers get our order to pay process automation inherent in the b2care platform – a win for clients and providers! 
And it is this process automation, we are brining to the Support at Home program. https://b2care.com.au

Accreditation by Home Care Alliance of Massachusetts
Potential clients and their families are looking for the best home care providers for themselves or loved-one. Until the Massachusetts legislature passes a licensure bill, accreditation by HCA ensures quality home care. All 15 of the standards of HCA must be met in order to achieve accreditation. Visiting Angels Newton/Canton was one of the first agencies in the state of Massachusetts to earn HCA accreditation.

Name: SICURA CARE
Description:
L'obiettivo di Sicura Care è ideare, progettare e realizzare soluzioni innovative e tecnologicamente avanzate in grado di aiutare le persone a vivere serenamente nei propri spazi abitativi, in modo discreto e, soprattutto, rispettando la loro privacy.

Il primo progetto riguarda la realizzazione di un sistema di Ambient Assisted Living (AAL) per monitorare le attività e le azioni svolte in casa al fine di prendersi cura delle persone che vi abitano. Il sistema è stato pensato per tutte quelle situazioni in cui sono presenti una o più persone anziane che vivono in abitazioni indipendenti da quelle dei propri cari e/o caregiver. Tali anziani, ancora autosufficienti, sono spesso un elemento di preoccupazione per i figli, i quali vorrebbero poter fornire maggior assistenza ai loro genitori, ma per esigenze lavorative o familiari non possono dedicarvi sufficiente tempo. Il sistema permette sia a figli che genitori di vivere in tranquillità̀, da un lato i figli vengono avvisati in tempo reale di possibili anomalie rispetto alle abitudini giornaliere, e dall’altro le persone anziane sanno di poter ricevere assistenza in qualsiasi momento senza dover alterare la loro quotidianità̀.

Proprio per i suoi servizi, il sistema può essere definito a tutti gli effetti un “assistente” per anziani o persone che vivono da sole con il plus che non si tratta di un dispositivo da indossare, non invade gli spazi e non viola la privacy dell’assistito. È altresì un sistema che viene in soccorso qualora l’assistito dovesse trovarsi di fronte a situazioni improvvise di pericolo, trasmettendo il segnale SOS grazie a semplici gesti.

Inoltre, grazie ai dati raccolti e all’Intelligenza artificiale presente, il sistema svolge il suo lavoro in modo del tutto autonomo, notificando eventuali situazioni anomale al caregiver (dovute ad esempio a seguito di scostamenti dalla routine quotidiana) senza che quest’ultimo debba controllare e monitorare costantemente il sistema in maniera attiva.

Name: Somnology
Description:
Somnology: Technology-Enabled Sleep Care for Clinics, Health Plans & Employers

Somnology is a digital healthcare company making high-quality sleep care accessible and scalable. We partner with clinics, health plans, employers, and public-sector organizations that need to expand access to sleep services, shorten wait times, and manage the impact of poor sleep on chronic disease, safety, and performance.

What We Do

We provide an end-to-end, device-agnostic sleep care solution that includes:

- Home sleep testing & monitoring
- Telehealth sleep medicine from board-certified specialists
- Remote therapeutic monitoring and clinical decision support
- Population and individual insights for large patient groups

We support organizations with no existing sleep program and those with established sleep teams that need extra capacity and remote monitoring workflows.

Why Partners Choose Somnology

- Programs scaled across all 50 U.S. states and multiple territories
- Deep clinical leadership in pulmonary, critical care, and sleep medicine
- Integration with existing technologies and workflows
- Focus on actionable insights - not just more data - for clinicians and patients

Our purpose is simple: improve health, safety, and performance by delivering better sleep care at scale.

Our mission is simple: to provide care that supports aging with dignity, comfort, and connection — all in the place our clients call home.

We believe exceptional care goes beyond a checklist. That’s why our services are built around four essential pillars that guide every interaction, visit, and relationship:

 Personalized Care
Every individual is unique — and so is our care. We tailor every plan to the needs, routines, and preferences of our clients, whether they need a few hours a week or full-time support.

 Companionship
Isolation is one of the most overlooked challenges for seniors. Our caregivers provide not just hands-on help, but also genuine connection — conversation, encouragement, and emotional support.

 Safety & Support at Home
Falls, medication errors, and household hazards are real risks. We provide mobility assistance, reminders, and home safety awareness to help clients remain safe and confident in their own space.

 Peace of Mind for Families
Caring for a loved one can be overwhelming. We become part of your extended care team — keeping families informed, involved, and reassured every step of the way.

Our caregivers are carefully selected, trained, and matched with your loved one to ensure not only skill but also compatibility. We're also proud to be an Optum-approved provider, helping eligible veterans and surviving spouses access the care benefits they’ve earned through VA Community Care and Aid & Attendance.

Whether your loved one needs help with personal care, meal preparation, transportation, or simply a friendly face — we’re here to help.

 Let’s talk about how we can support your family: 470-863-5885

Name: Kilele Bracelets
Description:
We are  a health-tech company dedicated to transforming access to healthcare for underserved communities, particularly individuals living with conditions such as diabetes and hypertension. We leverage technology to bridge the gap between patients, caregivers, and healthcare providers, ensuring that essential medical support is accessible, affordable, and convenient—no matter where you are.

Our flagship innovation is a biometric monitoring bracelet that tracks vital signs, including blood pressure and glucose levels, in real-time. The data is securely transmitted to caregivers and medical professionals via our telehealth platform, enabling timely interventions and reducing the need for emergency hospital visits. By integrating remote monitoring with digital healthcare services, we empower patients to take control of their health while alleviating the strain on healthcare systems.

At Ozma Digital Health, our mission aligns with several United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs):

SDG 3: Good Health and Well-being – We enhance access to quality healthcare, promoting early detection, continuous monitoring, and better health outcomes.
SDG 9: Industry, Innovation, and Infrastructure – We drive innovation in digital health solutions, creating smart healthcare infrastructure for the future.
SDG 10: Reduced Inequalities – By prioritizing rural and low-income populations, we address healthcare disparities and promote equitable access to medical services.
SDG 17: Partnerships for the Goals – We collaborate with medical professionals, government agencies, and health organizations to scale our impact and ensure sustainable healthcare solutions.
Our goal is to reduce emergency hospital visits by 70% and improve the health outcomes of 750,000 patients. With a dedicated team passionate about healthcare innovation, we are redefining the future of remote patient care in Kenya and beyond.

Name: Seniornest Homecare
Description:
Seniornest’s founder and CEO Laurie Rittgers BSN, RN, CHC, knows homecare. As a Registered Nurse, Laurie has been a leader in the healthcare industry for over 35 years, caring for thousands of patients throughout her career. seniornest is a locally grown and family owned company with expanded framework and capabilities to provide the best care to our clients and their families, with an experience that is second to none.
Statistically, very few home care companies are owned and operated by a Registered Nurse, which provides us with a deeper understanding and ability to meet our client’s needs. We are more than just a company providing a service, we become part of your family.

With our exclusive and innovative program, “Branches of Care,” we customize and tailor an inclusive, comprehensive plan of care, created between the client, family, and nurse. Together, we build a nest.

Each “Branch of Care” encompasses an approach that focuses on Safety, Mobility, Proper Nutrition and Engaging in Activities. Intertwining over time, the branches of our program support one another, creating a strong foundation of care at home.

Families put their trust in seniornest because of our outstanding commitment to the services we provide, including the ability to access us 24 hrs/day.
Our licensed and experienced caregivers provide everything from companionship to a senior who may live alone, to full hands-on care to those who need assistance with all activities of daily living. Maintaining daily routines, bathing, grooming, meal prep, getting dressed, light housekeeping, and going for walks or socializing are just a few of our services. Our goal is to empower our clients to remain independent while thriving at home.

Name: Metadoc
Description:
The Future of Healthcare: Designed for Modern Lifestyles

At Metadoc, we are revolutionizing healthcare delivery by building a model that fits seamlessly into today’s fast-paced world. Our platform combines tele-consultations, at-home services, and mobile app technology to bring healthcare directly to your doorstep. We believe that healthcare should be convenient, accessible, and proactive, empowering you to prioritize wellness without disrupting your busy schedule.

Our Vision

To create a healthcare delivery model that integrates wellness into daily life, enabling individuals to manage their health proactively while fitting into their fast-paced lives.

Our Mission

1. Empower Proactive Health: Shift the focus from reactive to proactive healthcare, making wellness services easily accessible.
2. Simplify Care for Providers: Designed by doctors, our model streamlines homecare operations, making service delivery effortless.
3. Leverage Technology: Use mobile technology, tele-consultations, and at-home services to create a convenient healthcare experience.

The Mismatch: Traditional Healthcare vs. Modern Lifestyles

Today’s healthcare system forces people into a reactive, inconvenient cycle of clinic visits and long wait times. This system doesn’t suit modern lifestyles. At Metadoc, we bridge that gap by offering healthcare on your terms, delivering care and wellness services when and where you need them.

Name: HIPSBC (Hearing Instrument Practitioners Society of BC)
Description:
The Hearing Instrument Practitioners Society of BC (HIPSBC) is the voluntary, nonprofit professional association representing the interests of Hearing Instrument Practitioners of British Columbia, Canada. Founded in 1988, the Society continues to recognize the need for promoting and maintaining the highest standards for its members in the best interest of the hard of hearing consumer.

Education
To promote and encourage public education about hearing loss, the use of hearing devices and hearing protection.

To support educational programs and standards that ensure growth of the profession with well-trained and qualified Practitioners.

Advocacy and Cooperation
To coordinate the activities of, and act as the official voice of Hearing Instrument Practitioners in British Columbia in cooperation with other professions involved in the hearing health care field, with regulatory authorities, and with governmental and consumer groups, both at the provincial and national level.

To promote and encourage membership in the society and work with hearing instrument manufacturers to foster a cooperative atmosphere.

We advocate your professional interests with other members of the hearing healthcare community, audiology associations, medical associations, health authorities, provincial governments, the manufacturing community, the hard of hearing community; and, federal and provincial third party payers.

WorkSafe BC Liaison committee representation
Veterans Affairs Canada

Code of Ethics
HIPSBC members subscribe to a code of ethical conduct which is compatible with government regulations and with ethical standards of related professional groups.

Name: Companionship Services Ltd.
Description:
Passionate about fostering meaningful connections, I am dedicated to providing high-quality companionship services. With a strong background in interpersonal communication and a natural ability to empathize, We strive to create comfortable, engaging, and enriching experiences for our clients.

Engagement within the Community: Companionship services often involve helping individuals participate in local events and activities, thereby promoting social engagement.

-Help with Everyday Tasks: This can include shopping for food or clothes, running errand, and other daily tasks.

Name: Healthiby
Description:
Healthiby empowered and incentivized both patients and consumers to take control of their health journey and outcomes.

A highly engaging digital health solution, Healthiby delivered a bilingual, clinician-led coaching program that helped diverse cohorts of (65+ seniors, Spanish-speakers or low-income) patients prevent, better manage and reverse type 2 diabetes, hypertension and high cholesterol. 

Delivered in flexible length programs (minimum 4 months), patients set personalized goals and accrued HealthiBucks by engaging in 20+ HealthiActions, including user-centric learning content and solo and group competitions, to improve behaviors and outcomes. 

Patient-centric and evidence-based, Healthiby's innovative intervention incorporated both social and financial incentives and demonstrated measurable improvement across key biometrics, healthy behaviors and quality of life.  The HIPAA-compliant provider product managed data-driven patient on-boarding, omnichannel patient engagement, longitudinal behavioral and biometric data collection and analysis, patient learning, incentives, competitions, and data reporting. 

Demo of patient learning content:  https://bit.ly/healthiby-video-content

Due to a variety of challenges, including healthcare payments friction and systemic delays related to long-term cost saving solutions, in 2023 (Q3), Healthiby's operations were paused. In conversations with acquirers, Healthiby is also considering re-launching an updated version of our patient-centric intervention, once the operating context evolves.

Name: Flipper Academy
Description:
Aquatic therapy is shown to be one of the most beneficial forms of therapeutic intervention for children as the hydrostatic pressure, buoyancy and viscosity of the water enables strong development of motor skills as well as social interaction and sensory fulfilment. Statistics have shown that children with a physical or intellectual disability are twice as likely to drown compared to children within the general population. This is can often be due to a lack of safety awareness in the water. 

Here at Flipper Academy, we provide a unique aquatic therapy program that combines water safety and learn to swim skills to help children that are unaware of these base level skills to be water safe and self-reliant whilst building on their gross motor skills. We believe that every child should be given an opportunity to be provided with water-based therapy in conjunction with being taught swimming strokes at their own pace. Not only does this provide them with the tools and skills to be independent in the pool but it also gives them opportunity to partake in everyday swimming activities. 

Our services involve group sessions of 2 or 3 children run by a qualified and experienced physiotherapist with a passion for paediatrics and are claimable by NDIS. 

To find out more please email: Chelsea.Marchetti@flipperacademy.com.au
or visit our website: www.flipperacademy.com.au

Aging can be a difficult, but obviously integral part of our life. Having people to count on and care for your loved ones brings not only great quality of life to the patient, but also incredible peace of mind to those who love them.

You Are Not Alone Elder Care Companions are specifically trained to provide holistic (physical, emotional, and spiritual) care for the elderly. We will care for your aging senior by simply being a companion through the aging process, as well as by providing ongoing support to both the patient and  family.

Due to the reality of the modern family structure and our increasingly challenged medical system, we provide support and care for the precious, aging population. 

We give the elderly the reverence and care they deserve. 

The dying have specific fears and needs that need to be addressed at the end of life.  Most of us haven’t been raised in a society that openly discusses death as a natural part of life, so when we’re faced with mortality, we are unsure how to communicate our needs and desires.  This can lead to many challenges.  

You Are Not Alone End of Life Doulas have been trained to understand and meet the needs of the dying person and their loved ones.  We understand how to actively listen and hold space for the dying and their families to do the work needed to have a good death.

Name: Mediquick
Description:
MediQuick is a patient-centric healthtech platform transforming healthcare access in India’s Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities. We offer a one-stop solution for diagnostics, 30-minute medicine delivery, teleconsultation, ambulance booking, and medical financing—bridging the vast gap in India’s fragmented healthcare ecosystem. Our platform empowers users to make informed choices by comparing diagnostic labs based on location, pricing, NABL accreditation, and user reviews. With rapid doorstep sample collection in 30–60 minutes and digital reports delivered within 4–10 hours, we ensure faster and more reliable diagnoses.
MediQuick also integrates telemedicine, allowing patients to consult top doctors across India with multilingual support and AI-powered doctor matching based on specialization, experience, pricing, and ratings. Our 30-minute pharmacy delivery system leverages local and regional pharmacy partners with real-time inventory sync and live tracking. We further enhance affordability through partnerships with NBFCs and fintechs to offer instant credit scoring, EMI-based test payments, and cashless medical insurance—empowering users to access expensive healthcare services with ease.

Our Uber-like ambulance aggregation platform enables one-tap SOS booking of Basic, Advanced, ICU, or Neonatal ambulances with GPS tracking and transparent pricing. With a unique revenue model combining commissions, subscriptions, platform fees, and delivery charges, MediQuick is building an affordable, inclusive, and tech-driven digital health ecosystem—designed for Bharat.

Who We Help

• Individuals managing daily or chronic medications

• Clinics, pharmacies, and digital health platforms
• Healthcare providers and insurers focused on medication adherence programs

We are also open to early conversations with investors and partners in digital health, medication support, and adherence innovation.

SmartDose is building the future of medication management a smarter, AI-enabled support system for confident medication routines.

OFFRE DE SERVICES HOLISTIQUE DE PROXIMITÉ AUX POPULATIONS VULNÉRABLES

Name: Live With Joy
Description:
This concept of addressing the Loneliness in Elders stems from own experience of our aged Parents and our children living abroad. We are living our life away from our children, who are busy building their own nest in a city of their destiny, far away from us. Our parents are 70+ and our children have settled abroad and busy with their own life.

We noticed that Elders require a constant dose of positive affirmation in person. One needs to respect their experience, show empathy, and hear them speak. All this in the comfort of their four walls. Elders also need to get their inner child – like emotion out, by being able to talk to someone who bring their creativity out in the open. We have observed that most of the Elders live a lonely life despite all the comforts either because they are widowed or have children, who stay abroad or in another city. Ironically, there are over 15 million Elders living in India, and often lead a lonely life.

Hence we have set up a dedicated team who understand empathy and how to bring the Joy-of-Living in Elders by building a child-like bond and relationship with them. Live With Joy is on a mission to ensure that lonely Elders find purpose and enthusiasm to live a life that is enriching and gives them happiness.

Their Children living abroad or in another city also can trust that their parents are safe and happy in the company of Live With Joy team of educated youngsters.

Description:
LiveBetter at Home is an aging solutions agency that provides personal care services to aging, disabled or convalescing adults. Our professional solutions include assistance in the areas of grooming, bathing, toileting, dressing, stand by safety and assist and companion services.  Additional solutions include, light housekeeping, meal preparation, activity involvement and transportation and/or attendance of various appointments or outings.  Additionally, we provide telehealth and remote patient monitoring solutions that are non-intrusive and yet provide peace of mind at any budget. 
 
LiveBetter at Home will provide our in home care solutions utilizing our unique structured scheduling model.  We understand that consistency in staffing clients is our industry’s greatest challenge.  Structured scheduling involves offering blocks of time that fit caregiver availability and offer care providers the most efficient method to consistently reach regular part time or full time hours each week.  Structured scheduling also includes short shift weekly memberships which can be combined with our tech solutions as well as 24/7 care.  
  
Providing exceptional service is only possible with exceptionally trained care providers.  We will hire only certified nurse aides or certified home health aides.  We will require a minimum of 1 year of experience.  We also will enroll all new hires into our LiveBetter Caregiver University Program which will provide a minimum of 16 additional hours of training before being released to the field.  We will utilize a video, self paced and instructor led training as well as provide hands on, on the job training with each client as needed.  A well trained, qualified care provider stays with the company longer and provides better service.

As a joint research project with major construction company "Ando Hazama Co., Ltd.", we have succeeded in reducing viruses by 99.9% by spraying pure water without the need for any formulation. The results of this research presented in a paper at the Air Purification Society in September 2023. Because it uses pure water, it is safe to ingest into the body and can reduce viruses while humidifying the air. This is the world's first groundbreaking technology, and a patent application was filed in July 2023. And we named this amazing product Angstrom. The Angstrom series is a humidifier that can reduce viruses, born in 2024. The operation is very easy because tap water can be turned into pure water inside the angstrom. Of course, the performance as a humidifier is very high, and the angstrom A-1800 can spray 1200ml of mist per hour. The ultra-micro mist (0.05μm to 0.5μm) creates Brownian motion. This allows it to be diffused quickly and evenly and remain suspended for a long time.

We help people need less care.

Abney & Baker's Preventative Home Care is rewriting the playbook - from firefighting to foresight. We fuse compassionate teams, elegant technology and evidence-informed practice to spot risk early, build simple daily habits and coordinate support that keeps people independent, safer and thriving at home.

We design for dignity. Every touchpoint is precise, human and useful for the person, their family and the frontline professional. No jargon. No clutter. Just outcomes that matter and stories you’d be proud to share.

What we deliver:
– Personalised home care with prevention plans and proactive check-ins
– Early-signal detection through smart, privacy-respecting data
– Falls, frailty and wellbeing coaching that fits real life
– Joined-up working with primary care, local authorities and community partners

Why it’s different:
Prevention isn’t a bolt-on - it’s our business model. We align incentives to reduce avoidable crises, extend independence and improve quality of life, while making every pound work harder across the system.

How we work:
Start small, prove value, scale what works. We measure relentlessly, learn fast and keep the experience beautifully simple. That’s how we turn good intentions into better days for thousands of people.

Follow us for bold ideas, practical wins and partnerships that move the needle.
Ready to shift from reactive costs to proactive outcomes? Let’s build a future where care empowers—and people flourish.

Name: eSaha
Description:
_________︎ eSaha _________
 
eSaha𛰙eHealth𛰚 was formed—in 2017—as a global-scale effort to launch a disaster relief and recovery telemedical program that geared towards readily responding to the ongoing Syrian conflict that had left over 13 million civilians direly needing affordable and qualified medical care.

The program prompts a virtual rendition of « Doctors without Borders ». It leverages a perpetually high social network penetration to bridge the disconnect between marginalized groups—internally displaced individuals, forced migrants, asylum seekers, and undocumented immigrants—and health practitioners worldwide. With a decentralized digital medical hub, the infrastructure is far more adaptable to the unique telecommunication･network capacity and circumstantial needs of the aforementioned targeted demographic, thereby facilitating equitable healthcare access to even the hardest-to-reach of patients.

Patients can reach out—using their language of choice—to inquire about wide-ranging health concerns. Their medical histories will be collected in real-time and promptly thereafter securely relayed to authorized within-network providers for an asynchronous continuation of correspondence. Patients should then expect to receive a follow-up—within 24 hours—either requesting additional contextual details or contributing a definitive diagnosis, with a corresponding care management plan, to finalize the case.


_________︎ صحة للطب الفوري _________⠀ 

منصة مجانية للتطبيب عن بعد لدعم أفراد العالم الذين يفتقرون إلى خدمات الرعاية الصحية صحة توفر خط اشتراك مجاني لمساعدة اللاجئين الذين يفتقرون إلى إمكانية الحصول على خدمات الرعاية الصحية الأساسية والموارد الكافية. هذا يتم عبر منصة خاصة بالتطبيب الفوري والتي تمكن المرضى من طرح مجموعة متنوعة من الأسئلة الصحية وبالتالي تلقي استشارات ونصائح موثوقة من قبل أخصائيين مرخصين، معتمدين، و ناطقين باللغة العربية، و الذين يمثلون مختلف الأقطار والتخصصات الطبية

Name: Santel Health
Description:
Santel is not a company yet. It’s a work in progress. A movement.
We aim to fundamentally rethink healthcare systems in Africa — starting from the realities on the ground.

For too long, solutions have been designed top-down, often copied from foreign models, disconnected from local dynamics. We believe it’s time to change that.

Santel is a systemic and grounded vision.
We start with technology — but we go beyond.
We work on health savings, community solidarity, public awareness, reform, regulatory experimentation (sandboxes), and policy advocacy.

Our goal by 2035: to build alternative, inclusive, and sustainable models that make healthcare truly accessible — using the tools and strengths we already have.

Santel is moving forward step by step. And at each stage, we’ll need allies, funding, field experiments, ideas, failures, hope, and shared purpose.

——————————————————————————————————————-

Santel n’est pas une entreprise. C’est un mouvement en construction.
Un projet ambitieux pour refonder les systèmes de santé en Afrique – à partir de la réalité des populations, des innovations locales, et d’une volonté de rupture.

La digitalisation sera la base mais elle ne suffira pas.
Il faut aussi mobiliser les communautés, créer des modèles alternatifs de financement comme l’épargne santé, repenser la régulation avec des sandbox, et bâtir une vision partagée.

Santel, c’est une plateforme vivante, évolutive, collective.
C’est aussi un appel : aux développeurs, designers, agents de santé, penseurs, citoyens, pour inventer ensemble ce que la santé peut devenir d’ici 2035.

Clementia Care is committed to providing compassionate and empathetic care to those in need.

Name: Healthy Aging Ltd
Description:
Healthy Aging Clinic was established in 2012 by Ronmed Ltd. who for the last 15 years have been preforming medical evaluations for insurance companies .
Ronmed's CEO, Amira Paz, along with its Medical Director, Dr. Ron Ben-Yitzhak, decided to harness the company's vast experience and to address the needs identified in elderly, as the need for comprehensive medical response in elderly rose again and again.
Healthy Aging company offers an array of medical and paramedical services in order to improve quality of life of elderly patients. Multidisciplinary team addresses the needs of the clinic patients and their families with emphasis on:
•	Maintaining contact with patients, their families and the various medical factors
•	Continuous consulting implementing medical recommendations for further treatment.
•	Having open and continuous communication between the various therapists..
•	In each area there is a professional case manager who is responsible of the professional team, updating the healthcare team and support patients and their families.

The vision of a Healthy Aging Clinic is to provid a complete response, high standard and Professional in order to improve the quality of life of the elderly in Israel and their families.

Name: Happee Hearts Movement
Description:
We are a community-based, integrated healthcare team dedicated to serving adults with intellectual disability and their caregivers. 

Services:
1. Clinic Services - We provide comprehensive health services in a welcoming environment, with subsidized consultations to ensure professional care for patients and caregivers. 

2. Home Visits - After an initial in-clinic assessment, the IDHealth team can make home visits when necessary, providing island-wide service to ensure everyone is reachable.

3. Dr. Connect - We have an established network of primary care partners to refer patients with intellectual disabilities for less complex health needs, such as health screenings and management of acute and chronic conditions.

4. Professional Support - We collaborate with other health and social service providers to address the diverse needs of people with intellectual disabilities in Singapore, offering resources, training, and support to strengthen our community together.

Name: Mera Mate
Description:
Finding reliable care for your parents shouldn't feel like a gamble.
After years of experience in Australia's care sector, we returned to India to find a massive "Trust Deficit." Families in Delhi NCR were struggling with unverified caregivers, complex apps, and inconsistent service.
I founded MeraMate to bridge this gap. We're India's first "Invisible App" for healthcare—a marketplace that lives where you already are: on WhatsApp.
What sets us apart:
 Australian Rigor: We implement the high safety and operational standards I managed in Australia
 Triple-Verified: Every caregiver undergoes 3-step verification (Police + Court + NSDL Identity) before their first shift
 WhatsApp-First: No new apps to download. Book a verified Nurse, Attendant, or Physiotherapist in 30 seconds
 Gig-Economy Respect: We empower caregivers with tiered growth and weekly payouts, ensuring better patient outcomes through a motivated workforce
Currently serving Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. Whether you're a family seeking trustworthy care, a healthcare professional looking for a respectful platform, or an investor interested in India's Silver Economy, let's connect.

Name: Sanigo Healthcare
Description: Somos médicos y enfermeros que realizamos servicios a domicilio, en centros médicos o empresas.

Name: Solution Santé

Solution Santé est un prestataire de santé à domicile quia vu le jour début janvier 2025. Sa mission principale est de recentrer le patient au cœur de sa prise en charge, en proposant un parcours de soin personnalisé en retour à domicile et qui soit axé sur des valeurs humaines.
Chez Solution Santé nous avons à coeur le "prendre soin", nous avons donc fait le choix de miser sur la qualité.

Name: Brisca Healthcare Ltd
Description:
Brisca Healthcare Ltd is a leading provider of homecare and live-in care services across Essex, Durham, and Hertfordshire. We are committed to delivering personalized care solutions that allow individuals to thrive in the comfort of their own homes, whether for yourself or your loved ones.

In addition, Brisca offers specialized supported living accommodations for children with Autism and learning disabilities. Our mission is to create nurturing environments that foster independence, personal growth, and a sense of belonging.

Guided by our motto, “Setting Standards Above the Rest,” we strive to make a meaningful impact on the lives of those we serve. At Brisca Healthcare Ltd, we are dedicated to building a strong sense of community and well-being for all.
