Name: QA PROFESSIONALS LLC
Description:
EXPEREIENCE + QUALITY = SUCCESS

Full-service Home Health & Hospice medical records / chart audit company.  We can provide guidance and education, due diligence, coding, and billing, OASIS review.  
Interim leadership is available when you have staffing challenges -on site or remote.
HCHB and Axxess EHR new hire onboarding programs to free up your staff.

Name: AIMSwasthya
Description:
AIMSwasthya is India’s first intelligent care-matching platform—helping patients get to the right specialist at the right time using structured triage, real-time doctor availability, and AI-backed risk profiling.

In a system where symptom confusion, poor awareness, and appointment misdirection lead to missed diagnoses and rising health costs, AIMSwasthya fixes the very first step of care: whom do I go to, and when?

What We Solve:
Patients self-diagnose or consult the wrong specialist
Hospitals face no-shows, dropouts, and wrong-department congestion
Doctors lose time handling low-relevance consults
Healthcare is reactive, not preventive

What We’ve Built:
AI-backed care routing: Symptoms → Specialist mapping
Smart OPD routing with live consult availability
Patient retention engine with post-consult nudges and re-booking triggers

Early Traction:
Signed MoUs with leading NCR hospitals to pilot DigiSwasthya care routing
Live across 1000+ monthly care journeys in closed-loop pilot

Who We Work With:
Hospitals & diagnostic chains
Health insurers
Corporate wellness programs
Government & public health missions

Vision:
To become India’s primary digital entry point for healthcare, guiding citizens from first symptoms to full recovery—intelligently, affordably, and in real-time.

Partner with us if you're:
A healthcare investor seeking scalable, tech-led health infra
A hospital network looking to reduce OPD friction and improve routing
An insurer seeking intelligent early triage and better claims outcomes

www.aimswasthya.com

Name: Triage Care Services
Description:
Triage Care Services prides itself on providing high quality care services to people in the local community of Hounslow and the surrounding boroughs (Hillingdon, Harrow, Ealing, Richmond, Kingston, Hammersmith & Fulham, Brent). 

We offer person-centred care and support with the aim for our service users to maintain their independence and remain at home for as long as possible, improving their quality of life and wellbeing. Our diverse workforce is a reflection of the unique communities of West London, catering to a wide range of language and cultural needs.  

Our homecare services includes support for those living with Alzheimer's/Dementia, Parkinsons, Osteoarthritis, Diabetes, Stroke, Neuromuscular & Motor Neurone disorders, Physical & Sensory impairments, Stoma and Complex care needs.    

Connect with us today to see how we can support in your home healthcare journey.

Name: Primary Care Group
Description: PCG integrates inpatient and outpatient care through five entry points for healthy, acute, and high-risk patients connected to our 24x7 telemedicine and telemonitoring control center. Entry points include integrated mobile application when traveling, on site virtual clinics when at the office, hospitalist program when at the hospital, 24x7 primary care at home including telemonitoring when at home as well as hospital tertiary care.

Name: AmeriStaff Nursing Services
Description:
We provide compassionate, professional care to patients seeking recuperation in the warmth and familiarity of their own homes. Our dedicated team of licensed, registered, and certified healthcare professionals delivers personalized services that promote independence and elevate the quality of life for our patients.

Our team consists of thoroughly screened healthcare experts who are not only licensed, registered, and certified but also insured and bonded, ensuring your peace of mind.

With our unique "Personality Matching" process, we optimize patient comfort and establish excellent patient-caregiver rapport, fostering a more personal and effective approach to home health care.

Count on us for reliable support and dedicated services, enabling you and your family to focus on life while knowing your loved one is receiving professional care at home.


Home Care Provided by:
• Registered Nurses (RNs)
• Licensed Practical Nurses (LPNs)
• Certified Nursing Assistants (CNAs)
• Home Health Aides (HHAs)

Our Comprehensive Services:
•Home Nursing Care:
Recover with confidence after an illness, injury, or surgery under the attentive care of our skilled nurses.
• Occupational Therapy:
Tailored therapy programs designed to exercise essential muscles for daily living activities, in consultation with physicians.
• Physical Therapy:
Improve functional abilities through exercise, balance training, and education, with specialized therapy programs endorsed by physicians.
• Speech Therapy:
Expert evaluation and treatment for communication disorders, assisting patients through targeted therapy methods.
• Alzheimer’s and Dementia Care:
Supportive programs addressing the complex medical and behavioral needs of Alzheimer’s Disease and Dementia patients and their families.

Name: Freedom Caregivers, Inc.
Description:
Freedom Caregivers opened its doors in 2013, responding to a critical need for local in-home care services for the elderly population. Its founders were one physical therapist and one nurse who envisioned an organization that could offer the quality of care they would expect for their own elderly family members. With that vision as their goal, Freedom Caregivers began with only two clients and one caregiver.

Today, our mission has grown to include multiple office locations throughout Ohio with hundreds of clients and caregivers. Even with this expansion, each local office remains individually focused on providing excellent personal care to elders in its own community.

In our experience, in-home care is the best choice for many older adults who wish to remain in their homes with freedom, dignity, and independence. Freedom will always seek to offer a wide range of customizable services aimed at helping our esteemed elders remain safe in their homes and engaged in their daily life choices.

Our mission is to honor God by serving others. We believe the people who have always cared for us now deserve to be cared for by us. It’s our turn to serve them.

In walking this mission, Freedom Caregivers strives to be the benchmark in-home care provider. In-home care services may define whether older adults remain in their homes or transition to an alternate setting. 

Freedom Caregivers is equally committed to employee advancement and success in forwarding its mission. Recognizing the link between empowered, valued employees and service excellence, Freedom Caregivers provides top-tier staff benefits, opportunities, and resources. This organization strives to be the employer of choice for professional caregivers by providing an excellent work environment that supports both on-the-job and life experiences.

Name: AIRLIFEMEDICAL
Description:
Le credo d’AIRLIFEMEDICAL est l’HUMAIN AU COEUR DES SOINS.

Nous avons la conviction que la réussite d’un retour à domicile se base sur l’humanité et le respect.
Grâce aux valeurs humaines de notre équipe pluridisciplinaire, l’intérêt du patient est notre priorité.

Dans cet esprit, le groupe AIRLIFEMEDICAL est un coordinateur de soins attentif à son savoir-faire et porteur d’engagements éthiques.

Ces qualités mises au service de nos prestations permettent une organisation logistique et humaine rigoureuse mais surtout contribuent à placer le patient au cœur du soin.

Prestataire de soin à domicile depuis 10 ans. 

L'objectif d'AIRLIFEMEDICAL est d’offrir aux patients la possibilité de suivre un traitement à leur domicile et assurer la coordination des soins avec l’ensemble des acteurs de santé.
Pour cela, nous fournissons tout le matériel médical nécessaire aux perfusions intraveineuses à domicile, partout en France.

Name: santadom

Santadom, acteur de la santé à domicile en Île-de-France, accompagne chaque année de nombreux patients sur prescription médicale, en installant le matériel nécessaire à leur traitement directement chez eux.
En tant que garants du parcours de soins à domicile, nous simplifions et sécurisons la prise en charge de nos patients, en collaboration avec leur entourage et les professionnels de santé.
Nos interventions, disponibles 24h/24 et 7j/7, couvrent divers domaines tels que la perfusion, la nutrition, l'insulinothérapie, ainsi que le traitement des plaies et leur cicatrisation.

LES SERVICES OFFERT SONT CATÉGORISÉS

• Service médical sur site

Name: OMZORG
Description:
𝗛𝗲𝘁 𝗹𝗶𝗲𝗳𝘀𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝘂𝗶𝘀 𝗯𝗹𝗶𝗷𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝘄𝗼𝗻𝗲𝗻, 𝗼𝗼𝗸 𝗮𝗹𝘀 𝘇𝗼𝗿𝗴 𝗻𝗼𝗱𝗶𝗴 𝗶𝘀? 

Wilt u dat uw vader, moeder of partner zo lang mogelijk thuis kan blijven wonen, ook wanneer er zorg nodig is? 𝗢𝗺𝘇𝗼𝗿𝗴 𝗯𝗶𝗲𝗱𝘁 𝗵𝗶𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗼𝗼𝗿 𝗴𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗱𝗲 𝗲𝗻 𝘃𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗴 𝗼𝗽 𝗺𝗮𝗮𝘁 𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗮𝗮𝗸𝘁𝗲 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘂𝗹𝗶𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘇𝗼𝗿𝗴 𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗵𝘂𝗶𝘀. Afhankelijk van uw situatie en wensen kan dit variëren van vervangende mantelzorg—zoals begeleiding bij maaltijden, structuur in de dag en gezelschap—tot persoonlijke verzorging en professionele verpleegkundige zorg aan huis of een combinatie hiervan.

De zorgverleners die Omzorg bemiddelt, bieden zowel langere dagdiensten als nachtzorg tot zelfs 24-uurs zorg. Zo kunt u als mantelzorger de zorg volledig of gedeeltelijk aan ons overlaten, zodat u weer volop de rol van kind of partner kunt vervullen.

Onze diensten
24-uurs zorg: continue persoonlijke aandacht en ondersteuning, een volwaardig alternatief voor verpleeghuis, zorgvilla of hospice.
Nachtzorg: betrouwbare verzorging/verpleging ’s nachts, waak- of
slaapdiensten.
Gespecialiseerde zorg: ervaren zorgverleners voor mensen met Dementie en
Parkinson.
Terminale zorg: professionele ondersteuning door ervaren zorgverleners zodat u de laatste levensfase comfortabel èn met de juiste zorg thuis kunt doorbrengen.

𝗪𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝗸𝗶𝗲𝘇𝗲𝗻 𝘃𝗼𝗼𝗿 𝗢𝗺𝘇𝗼𝗿𝗴?
U hoeft niet van organisatie te wisselen als uw zorgbehoefte groeit: Omzorg biedt zowel mantelzorgondersteuning als professionele verpleging
Groot netwerk van ervaren zelfstandige zorgverleners in groot deel van
Nederland
Zorg op maat, afgestemd op uw persoonlijke wensen – overdag en nachts -vertrouwd zorgteam
Klanttevredenheid (>9,5) + ISO-gecertificeerd
Zorgverleners met de juiste diploma’s + VOG, zorgvuldig door ons gescreend

𝗕𝗶𝗷 𝗢𝗺𝘇𝗼𝗿𝗴 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗮𝘁 𝗸𝘄𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗶𝘁, 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗿𝗼𝘂𝘄𝗲𝗻 𝗲𝗻 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗼𝗼𝗻𝗹𝗶𝗷𝗸𝗲 𝗮𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗰𝗵𝘁 𝗰𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗮𝗹!

Name: SOMNIPLANET
Description:
SomniPlanet est une société innovante de prestation de santé à domicile solidement ancrée dans le monde de la santé d’aujourd’hui mais résolument tournée vers l’avenir.

Notre approche innovante est orientée vers l‘excellence d’une prise en charge totalement centrée sur le patient facilitée par l’innovation, la technologie et une collaboration interdisciplinaire favorisant la personnalisation du suivi et l’autonomie des patients.

Depuis de nombreuses années, nous mettons en œuvre au quotidien et avec succès notre accompagnement VRAIMENT différent alliant expertise humaine et technologie. 

Les parcours de soins améliorés de SomniPlanet produisent des résultats : 98% de satisfaction patients et +29% de réussite du traitement à 3 ans en comparaison à la moyenne nationale (1).

(1) Source : Données SNDS (Système National des Données de Santé) – Pépin et al., J. Clin. Med, 2021, 10, 936.

Name: Aphasix
Description:
Aphasix développe une plateforme numérique d'entraînement à la parole pensée par un patient aphasique et co-créée pour celles et ceux qui vivent une perte de langage. 

La solution propose un parcours d’entraînement personnalisé, adapté au rythme de l'utilisateur.

Notre approche : le cerveau se reconstruit par la répétition intensive et régulière.

Notre solution : des exercices personnalisés avec reconnaissance vocale, accessibles à tout moment avec un suivi de progression en temps réel.

Notre engagement : une solution efficace, validée scientifiquement, en collaboration étroite avec notre Comité Scientifique composé de neurologues et d'orthophonistes.

Quand la technologie sert vraiment les personnes qui en ont besoin.

www.aphasix.com

Name: Baywood Home Care
Description:
Baywood Home Care | Compassionate, Customized In-Home Care for Seniors Across Minnesota

At Baywood Home Care, we believe aging shouldn’t mean giving up the life you love—or the place you call home. Since 2000, we’ve helped Minnesota seniors maintain their independence by delivering exceptional, private in-home care that supports how and where they want to live.

Founded by Dorothy Muffett, who left a corporate executive role to pursue a more meaningful, people-centered mission, Baywood was built on a simple promise: to ensure Happy Clients, Happy Clients’ Families, and Happy Employees. That mission continues to guide every decision we make, every day.

We provide flexible care options tailored to each client’s unique needs, including:

Hourly Care
24-Hour Live-In Care
Overnight Care

Our team is especially experienced in memory care, including Alzheimer’s and dementia support. Every client’s care is overseen by a dedicated R.N. Care Manager, ensuring consistency, quality, and peace of mind. In emergencies, we always have backup caregivers ready to step in—so families never have to worry.

What makes Baywood different? We don’t just provide care—we provide freedom, dignity, and comfort. Our caregivers become trusted companions who support daily life with compassion, while empowering seniors to stay safely and joyfully in their own homes.

We believe your loved one deserves more than just checklists and schedules—they deserve to flourish.

Learn more about how we’re redefining aging at www.baywoodhomecare.com.

Name: Clearercare Mobile Health & Training
Description:
Empowering Pharmacies with Expert Ear Care Solutions

At Clearercare, we provide pharmacies and healthcare professionals with the knowledge, tools, and confidence to deliver high-quality ear wax removal services. Our specialised training programmes help pharmacies expand their offerings, improve patient care, and increase revenue—all while aligning with the Pharmacy First scheme.

What Makes Us Different?
Our training goes beyond the basics. We provide:  

- In-depth Education: Comprehensive, hands-on training led by audiologists and ENT experts, covering ear anatomy, common pathologies, infections, and abnormalities.  

- Advanced Equipment Training: Practical sessions using specialist endoscopes and tools designed to ensure safe, effective, and precise treatments.  

- Ongoing Support: We’re here long after the training ends, offering aftercare, troubleshooting, and guidance whenever needed.  

Why Choose Ear Wax Removal?
Ear wax removal is a high-demand service that improves patient access to care while providing pharmacies with an additional revenue stream. By offering this service, pharmacies can enhance their value to the community and diversify their business.

Clearercare’s Mission 
We aim to build a community of forward-thinking pharmacies and healthcare professionals, raising the standard of ear care across the UK. With Clearercare, you’re not just learning a skill—you’re investing in the future of your business and the well-being of your patients.  

If you’re ready to elevate your pharmacy’s services, grow your team’s expertise, and make a lasting impact on patient care, we’d love to work with you.  

Join the growing network of pharmacies revolutionising ear care with Clearercare.

Name: FisioFor_you
Description: Desde nuestra fundación hemos estado comprometidos en mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas. Hemos evolucionado y crecido a lo largo de los años para abordar diversas áreas de la salud y el bienestar.

Name: BitCare
Description:
A Bitcare não é apenas uma plataforma de telemedicina B2B que gerencia a saúde dos colaboradores de forma integral. Ela é uma healthtech inovadora que estrutura um ecossistema de cuidado, transformando a experiência da saúde digital com um modelo de Atenção Primária Digital Integrada (APDI), centrado no paciente e garantindo que exista um acompanhamento contínuo e coordenado. Com o uso de IA, temos um acompanhamento da evolução de cada paciente após todas as consultas médicas em nossa plataforma, tudo isso integrado com o WhatsApp. 

Fundada em outubro de 2024, já conta com mais de 15 mil atendimentos e tem hoje uma carteira com 42 mil vidas, uma resolutividade de 97,3% e um NPS>90. 

A cultura da Bitcare se sustenta em quatro pilares fundamentais:

 Acolhimento: Atendimento humanizado e próximo ao paciente.
 Linhas de Cuidado: Cada paciente tem um eixo personalizado de cuidado.
 Resolutividade: Foco em soluções rápidas e eficientes.
 Abordagem Multidisciplinar: Integração entre diferentes especialidades para um cuidado completo.

 A Bitcare está transformando o acesso à saúde com tecnologia e acolhimento.

 O que nos diferencia?
 Equipe médica formada por médicos de família, em uma rede de cuidado integrado e especializado.
 Uso estratégico da tecnologia para otimizar o cuidado
 Redução de barreiras no acesso à saúde
 Plataforma digital intuitiva e segura

Nosso compromisso vai além da consulta. Acompanhamos a jornada de cada paciente, oferecendo suporte contínuo e garantindo a melhor experiência em saúde digital.

 Missão, Visão e Valores

 Missão: Democratizar o acesso à saúde, reduzindo idas desnecessárias aos pronto atendimentos, cuidado da saúde física e mental dos pacientes.

 Visão: Ser referência em Atenção Primária Digital, transformando a jornada do paciente e fortalecendo o vínculo entre médicos e paciente.

 Valores: Acolhimento, inovação, resolutividade, ética, excelência e transparência.

 Bem-vindo ao futuro da telemedicina!

Name: Fond Health Care
Description:
Fond Health Care is a Liverpool-based provider of home care services, specialising in personalised support, including personal care and companionship. 


Our mission is to enhance the quality of life for individuals by delivering compassionate, tailored care in the comfort of their homes. We focus on creating individualized care plans to meet the unique needs of our clients and their families.

Name: GuardianCare Solutions
Description:
GuardianCare Solutions is a dedicated home-care and healthcare staffing agency serving seniors, families, and organizations across Ontario. Our focus is to provide high-quality, person-centred care that supports independence, dignity, and safety for individuals who wish to remain in the comfort of their own homes.

We offer a full range of services, including Personal Support Workers (PSWs), Registered Nurses (RNs), Registered Practical Nurses (RPNs), caregivers, companions, respite services, overnight care, 24-hour support, and hospital-to-home transition assistance. Our team is committed to delivering compassionate, reliable, and consistent care tailored to each client’s specific needs.

As Ontario’s aging population continues to grow, GuardianCare Solutions plays a key role in filling staffing gaps, reducing caregiver burnout, and supporting families who require dependable home-care assistance. We partner with families, community organizations, retirement homes, and healthcare facilities to ensure clients receive seamless, timely, and professional support.

What sets GuardianCare Solutions apart is our commitment to integrity, respect, and the belief that every person deserves compassionate care. We take the time to understand each client, match them with qualified and caring professionals, and remain available to provide ongoing support.

Our agency operates with the guiding principle: “Serving with Hearts, led by grace.”
This reflects our dedication to excellence, empathy, and meaningful service. Whether providing daily support, specialized nursing care, companionship, or emergency staffing solutions, GuardianCare Solutions is focused on making a positive difference in the lives of those we serve.

With a growing team and a strong commitment to community care, we continue to expand our services across Ontario to ensure seniors and vulnerable individuals receive the support they need to live safely and comfortably at home.

Name: LiefsThuis
Description: In 2010 zijn wij gestart met het bieden van ondersteuning aan één kwetsbaar persoon. Onze aanpak was gebaseerd op respect, gelijkwaardigheid en een liefdevolle benadering. Kortom, de zorg die wij onszelf ook zouden toewensen. Door de kwaliteit van onze dienstverlening en door onze unieke aanpak zijn we gestaag blijven groeien. Inmiddels zijn we LiefsThuis: een organisatie die verpleging, verzorging, intensieve zorg en huishoudelijke ondersteuning biedt. Al die tijd zijn we trouw gebleven aan onze principes. Onze missie, visie en kernwaarden reflecteren dat.

Name: Premier Kids Home Care
Description:
At Premier Kids Home Care (PKHC), we’re on a mission to solve one of pediatric home care’s biggest challenges: access to care. We believe that every medically fragile child deserves consistent, high-quality nursing—and that families and nurses deserve real support, not just promises.

The pediatric private duty nursing (PDN) industry is vital yet often overlooked. Families are frequently approved for care they can’t access, and nurses are too often left without the support they need to thrive. We exist to change that.

Premier Kids Home Care was created to bridge the widening gap between authorized and actual staffed nursing hours. Through innovation, efficiency, and heart, we’re committed to moving the needle and reimagining what pediatric home care can look like.

Our approach is simple:

1. Empower nurses with the respect, communication, and flexibility they deserve.
2. Support families by listening, advocating, and being a trusted partner.
3. Innovate by using modern tools and streamlined systems to reduce inefficiencies.
4. Build culture that feels like home—combining the resources of a larger agency with the heart of a small, family-run team.

We’re not here to dwell on what’s broken—we’re here to build something better. With a leadership team that brings decades of combined experience in PDN, we’re focused on real solutions, long-term relationships, and a deep commitment to the people behind the care.

If you’re a nurse who wants to feel truly valued, or a family looking for a reliable, compassionate partner—you’ve found your place.

This is just the beginning. Join us.

Name: Walker Home Health & Hospice
Description: We are a small business of home health, hospice, and private duty services that is family owned and operated in central Oklahoma.

Name: Zuster Jansen,  Het particuliere thuiszorgbureau
Description:
Zuster Jansen is gespecialiseerd in particuliere thuiszorg aan huis. Afhankelijk van de vraag en behoeften van onze cliënten, kan dit zowel verzorging als verpleging betekenen. Wij hebben een groot bestand van zorgverleners, die wij breed kunnen inzetten. 

Zuster Jansen werkt met zelfstandige zorgverleners in kleine en vaste teams. Dit zorgt ervoor dat zij vertrouwen en een goede band met de cliënt kunnen opbouwen. Daarnaast zijn de zorgverleners ook het vaste aanspreekpunt voor cliënt, familie, de huisarts en apotheek.

Binnen Zuster Jansen is kwaliteit van zorg een vanzelfsprekendheid. Om u als cliënt een zo hoog mogelijke betrouwbare en optimale kwaliteit van zorg te kunnen bieden, wordt Zuster Jansen jaarlijks door een onafhankelijk certificeringsinstituut, getoetst op haar kwaliteit van zorg. Alleen particuliere thuiszorgbedrijven met een HKZ-certificering voldoen aan de strengste kwaliteitsnormen en staan garant voor hoogwaardige service en zorg. Middels het HKZ keurmerk blijft de kwaliteit van zorg, geleverd door Zuster Jansen, op een hoog niveau.

Name: 365 In-Home Care Solutions
Description:
We’re obsessively passionate about referring Better Care, and our mission is to help seniors achieve a Better You.

365 In-Home Care Solutions LLC (365 In-Home Care) was founded with the goal of sourcing qualified, skilled, and committed care providers capable of improving patients’ lives. We believe that your access to better care will result in a better you.

To achieve the goal of improving the lives of patients in need of care, 365 In-Home Care set out to deliver efficient and result driven health care services built on the core values of passion, integrity, and purpose.

It is this spirit of caring that fuels our desire to address the health care needs of seniors.

Name: WeeCare Pediatric Home Health Care
Description:
WeeCare Pediatric Home Health Care is a leading provider of specialized pediatric home health care services in Ontario. Our highly trained pediatric care team is committed to delivering personalized, compassionate care, tailored to each child's unique needs. We believe in a holistic approach, combining medical expertise with emotional support to improve the quality of life for children and their families facing health challenges.

Name: Open Sky Disability Services
Description: Open Sky is dedicated to providing comprehensive services, programs and general support for persons with disabilities. We strive to collaborate closely with our participants in order to enable them to lead a fulfilling and enjoyable life despite their impairments. With more than a decade of experience in the disability industry, our goal is to empower individuals with disabilities to become independent and lead the life they desire. Description:
Onze missie bij thuiszorg goudsbloem is om altijd warme, kundige en kwalitatief goede zorg te verlenen met een persoonlijke touch. Bij ons staat de patiënt centraal en streven wij er elke dag naar om de best mogelijke zorg te bieden die past bij de persoonlijke wensen en behoeften van onze patiënten.

Wij geloven dat goede zorg begint bij tevreden en betrokken medewerkers. Daarom zorgen wij ervoor dat ons personeel met een goed gevoel dagelijks aan het werk gaat en zich gehoord voelt. We hechten veel waarde aan teamspirit en vinden het belangrijk dat onze medewerkers samenwerken en van elkaar leren om de zorg te verbeteren en te optimaliseren.

Name: New Concept Care and Nursing Ltd
Description:
Established in 1992, New Concept Care & Nursing Ltd (NCCN) is a family run business with three offices based in the town of Market Weighton in the East Riding of Yorkshire, in the town of Selby in North Yorkshire and more recently acquired Meadow Lodge Home Care Services based in Sherburn-in-Elmet. Covering a wide geographical area stretching across the whole of the East Riding of Yorkshire, North Yorkshire (including the Selby District), West Yorkshire and Northern Lincolnshire. NCCN have built up services based on being flexible, at the same time as incorporating a wide range of expertise and keeping up with care sector developments. 

The team at New Concept Care & Nursing are experienced and professional, with a wealth of knowledge about the best care practices.  And are able to provide care and support for older people, those living with learning disabilities, physical disabilities, brain and spinal injuries, independent supported living.

NCCN offer both long and short-term care packages tailored to the individual needs of older people, those with physical disabilities, learning disabilities and mental health problems. Additionally also providing services for children and their families, domestic work or to provide relieve to a care worker or relative who needs a break.

Specialising in the provision of large care packages specifically designed for those who need a high level of care supervised by qualified nurses, including brain and spinal injury, life limiting conditions and enduring neuromuscular conditions. 

The learning disabilities team provides all levels of care in this specialist area including the provision of independent supported living services.

Services are completely person centred and designed around the individual needs of each person, ensuring they receive the care and support they need to continue living safely in their own homes.

Name: Interim HealthCare St Louis
Description:
At Interim HealthCare of St. Louis and Ellisville, we know how important it is to be in a comfortable, familiar environment. We all value our independence, however, sometimes the best way to maintain our autonomy, or preserve that of a loved one, is to ask for help. 

From care following a hospital medical emergency to assistance through the natural process of aging (and everything in between), we are dedicated to meeting your healthcare needs by delivering the full continuum of care right to your door. When you choose Interim HealthCare, you and your whole family can rest easy knowing our competent and compassionate staff will provide the highest level of personalized care. We know how reassuring it is to have someone you can trust, which is why our professional caregivers are thoroughly vetted with background checks and drug screenings.

We have established a reputation for treating our clients like family. The kind-hearted staff we employ love what they do and make it their mission to improve people’s lives in the community they love. And that is what they do every day. 

If your loved one is located in St. Louis South and Ellisville, or the surrounding communities, we are your local source for reliable in-home care. As leaders in the homecare industry, we can give families peace of mind by knowing that their loved ones feel valued and safe. Just get in touch with us and ask any question you have — we're always happy to help!

Name: Home Instead Cleveland
Description:
As we age, home becomes the place where we feel most secure and at peace. It’s often said that "home is where the heart is"—it’s the place we know best, where we feel comfortable and at ease. Unfortunately, you or a loved one may face the difficult decision of leaving home to receive the care needed. However, with the dedicated support of Home Instead Cleveland, that doesn't have to be the case.

At Home Instead Cleveland, we provide compassionate, professional home care services throughout the North East of England. Our experienced Care Professionals are committed to helping individuals stay comfortably in their homes, ensuring they receive the personalized care they need.

Caring for others is at the core of what we do, and we extend that same care to our team members. The Home Instead Cleveland network offers comprehensive training, ongoing education, and opportunities for career growth. Our family-oriented culture continues to grow, and we are proud to support both our clients and our caregivers in every step of their journey.
We are Home Instead Senior Care Cleveland. Our caring and professional CAREGivers from North East England support people at home with dedicated senior home care services. Our distinctive approach means that no matter where you are based in Cleveland, we can ensure you or your loved one remain living comfortably at home.

Caring for others is part of our DNA, and that includes caring for our team. The Home Instead Senior Care network provides thorough training, education, and opportunities for career advancement. It also offers the opportunity to be part of a supportive family-like culture which is ever-growing as we expand.

Name: Choices Homecare
Description:
At Choices Homecare, we are dedicated to providing compassionate, person-centred home care services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. In June 2024, we unified all our services under one inclusive identity, ensuring consistency and excellence across all our offerings. We continue to deliver the same skilled care you know and trust, with a renewed focus on our PRIDE vision and values.


For Potential Service Users:
We understand the importance of receiving care that feels like home. Our team is committed to helping you maintain independence and improve quality of life through personalised support plans, whether it’s personal care, medical assistance, or home support services.


For Prospective Employees:
Join a team where your work truly makes a difference. At Choices Homecare, we value our staff and provide extensive training, career growth opportunities, and a supportive work environment. We believe in fostering a culture of respect, innovation, and pride in the work we do.


For Industry Peers:

Our rebranding in 2024 reflects our continuous dedication to excellence and our mission to provide care that is responsive, innovative, and engaging. We invite collaboration and knowledge-sharing to advance the quality of home care services across the industry.


We are proud to uphold our PRIDE vision and values and pledge to deliver a service you can always trust and be proud of.

For more information visit: https://choiceshomecare.co.uk/

Name: MamaLoh
Description:
MamaLoh by OraFaith Group SARL est une plateforme de mise en relation santé féminine en Afrique, pensée comme un “Tinder médical éthique”.

Nous connectons les femmes à des prestataires de santé qualifiés (sages-femmes, gynécos, psychologues, nutritionnistes…) selon la spécialité, la localisation et la disponibilité, pour une prise en charge simple, humaine et sécurisée.

Notre ambition : digitaliser la santé féminine africaine tout en créant un écosystème durable où chaque femme trouve la bonne experte, au bon moment.

Impact social : 10 % de notre CA annuel soutient les mamans et structures de santé rurales.

Name: Magnolia Assisted Living
Description: Magnolia Assisted Living is a family owned and operated company, based in Plano, TX. We are founded on the principal of enhancing the quality of life for our residents through exemplary care and engagement in a compassionate home environment. Magnolia owns residential care homes in Texas, Pennsylvania, and Maine. We pride ourselves on taking great care of our team and caregivers so they can give our residents the best care possible.

Name: White Orchid Hospice, LLC
Description:
White Orchid Hospice provides in-home patient hospice services that allow seriously ill people to transition into a comfortable environment with access to around-the-clock medical support.  The Company employs several on-staff nurses and contracted health professionals to ensure that the patients are tended to properly.  Outsourced healthcare professionals include pain management physicians, pharmacists, and mental healthcare professionals.  

Our VISION is to create an environment where individuals and families facing serious illness, death, and grief will experience the best that humankind can offer. White Orchid Hospice will be a leader in hospice palliative care, education, and research.  

Our MISSION is to provide quality specialized palliative and end-of-life care to all adults in Harris, Fort Bend, and other surrounding counties, as well as their family and friends.

Our NAMESAKE is the White Orchid, a flower of magnificence that brings a universal message of love, beauty, wisdom, and thoughtfulness. In ancient China, Confucius compared virtuous people to the orchid because both shared the characteristics of a perfectly cultured being, including refinement, reverence, purity, and humility.

As our loved ones prepare to make the ultimate transition from this physical world to a spiritual one, they have evolved into the human form of a WHITE ORCHID. Our desire is to treat our patients in the same regard, with reverence and humility.

For more information, please call us at 866-966-2215, visit us online at www.whiteorchidhospice.com, or email us at info@whiteorchidhospice.com.

Name: Rhythmic Rehab Inc.
Description: At Rhythmic Rehab we are dedicated to helping individuals feel empowered, understood and inspired through our unwavering commitment to personalized care. We recognize that every individual has a unique story and set of challenges to overcome, and we tailor our services to meet their specific needs. At Rhythmic Rehab Inc. we strive to be a leading provider of Neurologic Music Therapy, continually seeking innovation, education and collaboration with allied health professionals. We are committed to staying at the forefront of scientific advancements and best practices, ensuring that all our clients, no matter their background, receive the highest quality of care. At our core, we are driven by the transformative power of music as a catalyst for rehabilitation, and we are dedicated to helping individuals reclaim their lives, find hope and rediscover their inner rhythm.

Name: Liberty HomeCare

Liberty HomeCare is a family run business providing personalised care services. We are a HSE approved care provider offering professional care in homes all over Ireland.

We are a Family run business and we make it our business to get to know each and every one of our families we work with. Our company began with a Mother, Sister, and a daughter. After many years of continued successful growth, we pride ourselves in the knowledge that we all still work hands on and are actively involved overseeing the dream we had of delivering exceptional care to clients in the community.

Name: Angela Care
Description:
En Angela ayudamos a las personas con enfermedades crónicas a que se tomen la medicación correctamente. 

Preparamos la medicación del paciente por tomas individuales para cada momento del día, de manera que la persona solo tenga que abrir el sobre correspondiente, y tomar la medicación. Además, tenemos un sistema de alertas en el celular para recordar a la persona o al cuidador cuando toque la siguiente toma.

Olvídate de los pastilleros y de preparar a mano la medicación, no te preocupes más por acordarte si te tomaste o no las pastillas que te tocaban, o de estar pendiente de alarma configuradas sin ningún control.

Nuestro equipo de personal sanitario (enfermeros, médicos y farmacéuticos), utilizando la tecnología más moderna del mercado, se encarga de hacer todo por ti.

Libérate de las preocupaciones de gestionar la medicación.

Agenda una llamada con nuestro personal sanitario y resolvemos las dudas que tengas: https://angela.care/

Name: The Mobile Drs
Description:
Our mission is to provide high quality healthcare professionals to quickly assess and address the needs of the patients of our home health care and healthcare facility clients. We understand the importance of being readily available to see patients and being efficient in getting paperwork turned around, so we make every effort to see patients immediately and return paperwork as soon as possible.

Our services extend to board & care, assisted living facilities, home health care facilities and the like. We go where our clients and patients need us! With our expedited scheduling and our readily available providers, TMD is able to quickly visit the patient, assess their condition, refer a service or prescribe the appropriate medication. In most cases we are able to submit claims on the same day to ensure our patients get the medical attention they deserve.

Name: Care Heroes
Description:
"At CareHeroes, we are more than just a registered NDIS service provider; we are a passionate community dedicated to realising the potential in every individual. Inspired by the profound words of Robert M. Hensel, 'There is no greater disability in society than the inability to see a person as more than their disability,' we've made it our mission to redefine what's possible.

Located in the vibrant South Brisbane area, we extend our compassionate care to clients throughout Brisbane, Gold Coast, and Sunshine Coast. Our unwavering commitment to enhancing the lives of those with disabilities drives us to deliver the highest quality care and support services. Our goal is simple: to enable our clients to live independently, with dignity, and in control of their own lives.

We believe in empowerment through informed choices. At CareHeroes, we empower our clients to take charge of their lives, offering them the freedom to make decisions that shape their care and lifestyle. Our team of highly experienced professionals is dedicated to bringing smiles to your faces by constantly exploring innovative solutions to provide you with the best possible care experience.

Join us at CareHeroes, where we don't just provide care; we nurture dreams, champion abilities, and celebrate each unique journey. Together, we're redefining possibilities, one caring gesture at a time."

Name: Bridget Home Healthcare
Description: We are offering you the best in the business class Home Care Service at very affordable price. We covers are the area of expectation and try to provide our service by one-on-one evaluation. Your satisfaction is our main goal.

Name: Fortix Support

Al Iqra Nursing Services is dedicated to providing high-quality, compassionate home care nursing tailored to the unique needs of each patient. Our team of skilled nurses ensures professional medical support, personal care, and recovery assistance—all within the comfort of home.

Description:
Home Service Solutions is a care service provider for quality person centered care. We are unique in our provisions in the sense that we pride ourselves on tailored and focused support, enabling you to find a solution for all your needs. We warmly support those in receipt of our services and provide a bespoke service to you. 

We work in accordance to the Care and Social Service Inspectorate for Wales, and follow the Domiciliary Code of Practice supplied by Social Care Wales. We are committed and unique, that we provide a specific service to individuals who are in receipt of direct payments, as we see more Local Authorities are promoting this aspect of service we would work with you as an individual and enable you to plan and control your care as though you was managing your care package yourself, except we would take on the role of becoming the statutory employer and provide the staff with all necessary training, leadership and governance. 

In the sense of unique provisions, we provide a bespoke service which takes into account your needs and requirements. Whether it's because you need a little help and assistance because of a health condition/physical need, or whether its because you have complex care requirements. We cater for your needs and ensure that your individual requirements are addressed. We ensure that your bespoke care plan is drawn up and put in place to determine the best outcomes for yourself and those who matter most to you, in order to move forward. We pride ourselves on the rapport we build with customers and the long-term relationship that we have built with long and short-term clients.

Each element of support is supported through knowledge that the management team either directly or indirectly live with some form of disability, have care requirements themselves, but most of all from one trusted mind to the other, we feel strongly that we can empathise with how non-person centred care can make life feel, and we aim to help avoid such exposure.

Name: Luxe Home Health
Description:
Luxe Home Health is a premier home health services provider in the greater Chicagoland area. We were founded by two therapists with a simple promise of providing exceptional skilled care, always with an emphasis on measurable outcomes for each patient.

With so many home health providers to choose from, we stand out because of our ability to identify each patients' unique needs. We seek to understand each individuals' strengths and limitations so we can develop a comprehensive individualized care plan. We do this in coordination with your healthcare provider(s) and family members. We will work with you on your treatment goals until your highest level of functioning is achieved.

Name: Care and Support Services
Description: Care and Support Services is an ambitious provider intent on developing a number of children’s homes across the West Midlands. We focus on child-centred approaches that facilitate well-being and the development of self-coping, social and practical skills. Services are run by a highly experienced leadership team committed to building an involved and committed workforce. We apply principles of therapeutic practice strengthened through input from specialist clinicians.

Name: Młodszy Brat
Description:
Profesjonalne zarządzanie zdrowiem i dobrostanem Twoich rodziców.

Oferujemy specjalistyczną usługę skoordynowanej, długoterminowej opieki nad powierzoną naszej trosce osobą starszą. Analizujemy potrzeby naszych podopiecznych i tworzymy plan opieki, który następnie realizujemy i raportujemy rodzinie nasze działania. Udzielamy także indywidualnych konsultacji dla opiekunów rodzinnych.
Opieka nad niesamodzielnym seniorem to zadanie, do którego nikt nie jest przygotowany. To wiedza dotycząca systemu ochrony zdrowia, znajomość rynku usług medycznych, terapeutycznych i opiekuńczych, gąszcz przepisów, a przede wszystkim – wiedza o szczególnych potrzebach osób starszych, nie tylko zdrowotnych, ale i związanych z ich ogólnym dobrostanem.

Name: Farmhouse care agency ltd
Description:
Based in Hampshire, Farmhouse Home Care started in 2018 and provides domiciliary, home care services to clients in and around Christchurch, New Milton, Fordingbridge, Ringwood and the surrounding areas.   Our aim is to provide the best possible care and support to the elderly and vulnerable, in the comfort of their own home.  Not only does this enable them to live independently, but they also have respect, dignity, and the privacy that comes with being cared for in their own homes.

There is nothing more important to us than the health and wellbeing of our clients and we pride ourselves on achieving positive outcomes.  We work closely with every client, their health professionals, and their families, and shape our care plans to suit their individual needs.  This bespoke, client-centred approach means you can have the peace of mind that your loved ones are being cared for by a team of individuals who want the best for everyone involved.

Our range of services can be tailored to suit specific needs and if you have any specific questions about what we do, or you require more information, please don’t hesitate to contact us and we will be happy to have a chat about your specific needs.

Name: Appy Medical
Description:
At Appy Medical, we believe that your needs and well-being should always come first. That's why we have built our entire business around serving you in the most exceptional way possible. Here's how we're raising the bar:

Transparency: We believe in complete transparency when it comes to your diabetes management. We provide clear and concise information about our products, pricing, and insurance coverage. No hidden fees, no surprises.

Personalized Care: Your diabetes management journey is unique, and we are here to support you every step of the way. Our team of dedicated experts takes the time to understand your specific needs and preferences.

Empowering Education: We believe that knowledge is power. That's why we go beyond just selling products. Our goal is to empower you with the knowledge and skills needed to take control of your health.

Exceptional Service: From the moment you reach out to us, you will experience our commitment to exceptional service. Our friendly and knowledgeable customer support team is always available to answer your questions, address your concerns, and provide ongoing support. We are dedicated to making your experience with us seamless, stress-free, and truly exceptional.

Advocacy and Support: We are your advocate in the complex world of insurance. Our team works tirelessly to navigate the insurance landscape on your behalf, ensuring you receive the coverage you deserve. We take the burden off your shoulders, handling the paperwork so you can focus on what matters most: your health.

Convenience Redefined: We understand that managing diabetes requires time and effort. That's why we have streamlined our ordering process to make it as convenient as possible.

Name: The goodway care group Limited
Description: The goodway care group is a medical practice company based out of Hyde, United Kingdom.

Name: A&A Thuiszorg
Description:
Voor ouderen die thuis willen blijven wonen laten A&A Thuiszorg en haar medewerkers zien hoe goed ouderenhulp kan zijn. Wij helpen mensen gelukkiger ouder worden met aandacht en begrip van een vertrouwd gezicht, juist wanneer het thuis niet meer vanzelf gaat.

We leveren deze diensten ook aan andere volwassenen die hulp bij de huishouding en/of begeleiding kunnen gebruiken. Bijvoorbeeld mensen met een fysieke of psychische beperking, met een Wmo- of Wlz-indicatie.

Wij werken waar mogelijk nauw samen met mantelzorgers en steunen en ontlasten hen.

Bij A&A Thuiszorg staat eigen regie centraal en we stimuleren mensen om zelf zo veel mogelijk actief te blijven in het doen van het huishouden en in de sociale omgeving.

Hierbij werken wij samen met zorg- en welzijns- en andere organisaties rondom de cliënt en natuurlijk met de mantelzorgers.

A&A Thuiszorg is gecontracteerd voor de Wlz (Wet langdurige zorg) met Zilveren Kruis Zorgkantoor, VGZ Zorgkantoor en CZ Zorgkantoor. Onder andere in de regio’s Utrecht, Midden-Holland, Rotterdam, Capelle aan den IJssel, Krimpen aan den IJssel, Kennemerland, Noord-Holland Noord, Zeeland en Zuid-Hollandse-Eilanden: Hoeksche Waard, Nissewaard en Voorne aan Zee.
A&A Thuiszorg is gecontracteerd voor de Wmo (Wet maatschappelijke ondersteuning) met de gemeenten Krimpen aan den IJssel, Hoeksche Waard, Nissewaard en Voorne aan Zee (Brielle, Hellevoetsluis en Westvoorne). En sinds januari 2025 ook met de Wmo Gemeente Rotterdam.

Name: SOS OXYGENE MARTINIQUE
Description:
Nos équipes sont spécialement formées à la prise en charge des pathologies respiratoires.
Lors de l'installation du traitement médical à domicile, des conseils de sécurité et d'entretien du matériel sont prodigués. Le suivi thérapeutique à domicile fait partie intégrante de nos priorités, en relation étroite avec le médecin prescripteur.
Les services d'astreintes 24H assurent les interventions sur l'oxygénothérapie en dehors des horaires d'ouvertures des agences.
Nous sommes présents pour accompagner les patients durant leurs traitements, et répondre ainsi aux besoins spécifiques des pathologies respiratoires.
La prise en charge des traitements est assurée en conformité avec la prescription médicale du médecin.

Name: Transitions At Home
Description:
Transitions At Home has nurses, therapists, home health aides and caregivers available across Wisconsin. Visit our website site for a list of counties we serve - and a full list of services.

In-home personal care services help seniors with activities of daily living including meal prep, light housekeeping, laundry, bathing and hygiene, conversation & companionship, transport to appointments and more.

Our in-home healthcare division helps seniors and others continue their medical care in the comfort of home following surgery, illness, discharge from a hospital or skilled nursing facility or other situation. 

You can feel secure and confident with Transitions At Home with on-call nurses available 24 hours a day to answer questions, address concerns, or visit you at home when you need it. 

Medicare, VA or private insurance may help cover home health care costs. Call us for more information on either home health care or non-medical home care.

Name: DrOnline Healthcare
Description: DrOnline is to make quality healthcare accessible to everyone, regardless of geographical constraints. We aim to empower individuals to take control of their health by providing a reliable and convenient online healthcare experience.

Name: Zensor Care
Description:
Do you have a loved one living alone?
Zensor Care is a discreet and non-intrusive monitoring system designed to protect their independence, and your peace of mind.

Our smart sensors detect changes in daily routines and send reassuring updates or alerts via a simple mobile app. No cameras, no microphones, no wearables, just silent, respectful care.

We empower families to care from a distance, without intruding.
Our mission: help people age safely in place, while reducing stress for family and caregivers.

Name: Primefocus Health
Description: Primefocus Health, is a spinout venture from LG Electronics which is building a digital health platform that enables healthcare providers to deliver a better, complete-care experience to patients as they transition from hospital to home.

Name: Gina Health
Description:
Gina Health is a platform that aims to gamify mental health for a healthier you. The platform is designed to be immersive and fun, providing a unique self-care journey for each individual. 

The platform has been validated and its official release is currently in production. Gina Health's mission is to gamify stress management, and it has already garnered support from over 700 peers and 300+ mental health providers across more than 10 countries.

One of the co-founders of Gina Health is Kat Usop, who has a background in biomedical engineering and a Master of Science in Health Informatics. She has been recognized for her contributions to the field with several awards and recognitions.

Gina Health is an example of how technology can be used to create personalized mental health platforms for peer-to-peer anxiety support, with a particular focus on COVID-19.

Robinson Specialist Care delivers fully managed, bespoke, and flexible complex care, designed to support individuals in the comfort of their own homes. Our experienced professionals are dedicated to enhancing the quality of life, dignity, and independence of individuals, while building trusted partnerships with commissioners, families, and case managers.

We provide CQC-compliant services that are responsive, efficient, and outcome-focused, ensuring care that is both person-centred and sustainable. Every care journey is unique, and our tailored approach provides the highest standards of specialist support to meet the individual needs of those we serve.

With a strong emphasis on candidate support and retention, we prioritise continuity of care, offering peace of mind for clients and their families. As a regulated provider under the Care Quality Commission (CQC) and accredited with Cyber Essentials Plus and the NHS Digital Toolkit, we guarantee a professional, secure, and high-quality service you can trust.

Name: O2CM
Description:
O2CM est une entreprise réunionnaise et indépendante, spécialisée dans la Prestation de Santé à Domicile sur l'ensemble de l'île.

Depuis 2005, O2CM coordonne la prise en charge globale du patient en tenant compte de son environnement, sa volonté et bien sûr en adéquation avec la prescription médicale.

Nous portons une attention personnalisée à chaque prise en charge dans le respect de l'éthique et de la qualité.
 
Pour nos équipes engagées et dynamiques, la réussite d'un retour à domicile du patient est une priorité. 

Nos types de prise en charge : 
- Perfusion : PCA, ATB, Chimio, Hydrat, Immuno. 
- Nutrition : CNO, Entérale, Parentérale.
- Assistance respiratoire : Oxygénothérapie, Pression Positive Continue, Ventilation Non Invasive, Trachéo(s)tomie.
- Stomie : Digestives et Urostomies.
- Maintien A Domicile : Lit médicalisé, prévention des escarres, déambulateur, fauteuil roulant/coquille, lève personne, verticalisateur...
- Thérapie par Pression Négative : Distributeur exclusif de la marque GENADYNE, O2CM propose une toute nouvelle solution de TPN : La plus compacte et silencieuse du marché via ses dispositifs XLR8+ & DUO.

Name: Ember Healthcare Ltd
Description: Personalized Home care with care plans designed with you to meet your goals of care. Servicing clients of all ages and abilities, from companionship, FSCD care, overnight care, respite, to personal care. Our reliable caregivers and high staff retention rate mean you receive care from trusted people whom you have a relationship with. As part of the Client Directed Home Care Invoicing Program, your home care may be covered under the provincial health care plan and provided at no cost to you.

Name: Today's Homecare, Inc.
Description:
Today’s Homecare, Inc. is a Licensed Home Care Agency offering home health aides services in all five boroughs of the New York Metropolitan area. Our dedicated caregivers are always eager to provide personalized, high quality services to our clients regardless of race, creed, religion, disability or national origin.  
Who we are:
•	Experienced and supportive caregivers you can trust to help you feel better in the comfort of your own home.
•	We maintain a diverse multilingual administrative and home health care staff 
•	We adhere to the strictest regulatory compliance requirements to build trust with our clients.
•	Today’s Homecare staff are certified by New York City HRA and therefore qualified to help its clients to apply for Medicaid  

What we do for our clients:

•	Medicaid Application Guidance: Our professionals work with Expert Medicaid Consultants to guide our clients through the Medicaid application and enrollment process 

•	Medicaid Eligibility:  Today’s Homecare, in collaboration with Expert Medicaid Consultants, will help our clients become eligible for Medicaid by setting up a Pooled Income Trust to protect excess income that could otherwise disqualify patients from Medicaid or Long-Term Service.  

•	Adult Daycare services: In addition to the homecare services we provide, our clients also have access to Adult Daycare Center, where they can enjoy delicious food and various entertainment, recreational and fitness activities.

Name: Legacy Home Healthcare
Description: Get the care you need in the comfort of your own home with Legacy Home Healthcare! We offer skilled nursing, physical therapy, occupational therapy, speech therapy, and medical social worker services. Call our 24/7 Referral Hotline at (269) 888-2333 to learn more.

Name: Rose's Agency Home Care
Description:
For many seniors, moving them out of their home is the surest way to shorten their life expectancy. Seniors, as well as people of any age, develop a routine which gives stability to their life. When facing change, especially such an important change as moving, a senior can be put into a very stressful situation. This stress can decrease their longevity. 
Our mission at Rose’s Agency Home Care is to keep seniors living comfortable and safely in their own home so that move isn’t necessary.

Name: Home Instead Cleveland
Description:
As we age, home becomes the place where we feel most secure and at peace. It’s often said that "home is where the heart is"—it’s the place we know best, where we feel comfortable and at ease. Unfortunately, you or a loved one may face the difficult decision of leaving home to receive the care needed. However, with the dedicated support of Home Instead Cleveland, that doesn't have to be the case.

At Home Instead Cleveland, we provide compassionate, professional home care services throughout the North East of England. Our experienced Care Professionals are committed to helping individuals stay comfortably in their homes, ensuring they receive the personalized care they need.

Caring for others is at the core of what we do, and we extend that same care to our team members. The Home Instead Cleveland network offers comprehensive training, ongoing education, and opportunities for career growth. Our family-oriented culture continues to grow, and we are proud to support both our clients and our caregivers in every step of their journey.
We are Home Instead Senior Care Cleveland. Our caring and professional CAREGivers from North East England support people at home with dedicated senior home care services. Our distinctive approach means that no matter where you are based in Cleveland, we can ensure you or your loved one remain living comfortably at home.

Caring for others is part of our DNA, and that includes caring for our team. The Home Instead Senior Care network provides thorough training, education, and opportunities for career advancement. It also offers the opportunity to be part of a supportive family-like culture which is ever-growing as we expand.

Transforming Lives with Comprehensive Home Health Services: Skilled Nursing, Therapy, and Support for a Healthier Tomorrow.

Welcome to Healthroos—Empowering NDIS Participants Through Exceptional Physiotherapy and Occupational Therapy!

Description: Compassionate Care Hospice started in 2013 with a mission to render care with compassion. We are one of the top hospices in Orange County and are looking to expand. Our goal is to assist our patients in achieving physical, emotional, and spiritual comfort, while allowing them as much autonomy and dignity as possible.

Name: Zorgconcept Geïntegreerde Revalidatie (ZGR)
Description:
Herontwerpen van de revalidatiezorg!
In Friesland bundelen ouderenzorg, revalidatie, thuiszorg en ziekenhuis hun expertise op het gebied van revalidatie. Samen herontwerpen ze de revalidatiezorg in het Zorgconcept Geïntegreerde Revalidatie. 

Dit concept integreert de geriatrische revalidatie, medisch specialistische revalidatie en de thuiszorg. We organiseren de revalidatiezorg zoveel mogelijk bij de patiënt thuis. Ondersteund door de slimme inzet van zorgtechnologie. Lukt dat niet, dan is begeleiding vanuit de polikliniek of een klinische opname nog steeds mogelijk. Op deze manier werken we samen aan toegankelijke, betaalbare en kwalitatief goede zorg.

De partijen Noorderbreedte, Thuiszorg Het Friese Land, Revalidatie Friesland en ziekenhuis Frisius MC herontwerpen in dit concept samen de revalidatiezorg. In Leeuwarden krijgt het gezamenlijk herontwerp ook daadwerkelijk een fysieke vorm. In 2029 opent daar een gloednieuw centrum voor revalidatie.

Name: Eclipse Care Group
Description:
At Eclipse Care Group, we are dedicated to delivering compassionate, person-centered care that empowers individuals to maintain their independence and dignity in the comfort of their own homes. Our mission is to provide high-quality home care services tailored to meet the unique needs of each person we support, ensuring they feel safe, valued, and respected.

We specialize in a wide range of care solutions, including complex care, live-in care, companionship care, and respite services, offering flexible support to suit every lifestyle. With a team of trained, compassionate professionals, we go beyond traditional care by building genuine relationships and fostering a sense of belonging and trust with those we serve.

At Eclipse Care Group, we believe that every moment of care matters. We are committed to upholding the highest standards of integrity, empathy, and professionalism, making a meaningful difference in the lives of individuals across Manchester and the UK.

Our Services Include:  Live-In Care
 Complex Care
 Personal & Companionship Care
 Respite Care

Whether it’s providing assistance with daily tasks, offering emotional support, or delivering round-the-clock complex care, we’re here to ensure your loved ones receive the best possible care with compassion and respect.

Eclipse Care Group – Empowering Lives, One Caring Moment at a Time.

Name: Mile High Home Care
Description:
Welcome to Mile High Home Care. We are a local non-medical home care agency serving Colorado residents with the highest level of care.

Our Agency Goals

1. To provide all levels of home care services in collaboration with physicians, thus allowing clients to remain in their own homes
2. To provide a broad base of services with client demand governing the scope, allowing clients to be involved in establishing, implementing and evaluating services
3. To maintain clients in their homes as long as possible and provide services in the least restrictive setting
4. To assist clients in using all restorative methods, tools, and procedures to return clients to their optimal level of function
5. To provide cost-competitive quality services
6. To develop a relationship with referral sources to effectively meet our clients home care needs
7. To function as a liaison between our clients and available community resources and assist our clients in coping with their needs and problems.

Our Vision:

Mile High Home Care started in January of 2017 with the creative mind of Emily Neuhold, a registered nurse with years of experience in home care. She set out to maintain one mission: Providing care to your loved ones at the highest level. With a personal story and past of her own loved ones in need, this has set a path to success and a passion to give back to the community and residents of Colorado to live safely and independently in the comfort of their own home.

Name: Attending Home Care
Description:
A fully licensed and bonded home health care agency serving Brooklyn, Bronx, Queens, Manhattan, Staten Island as well as Nassau, Suffolk, Orange, Westchester, and Rockland Counties. Attending is the home care agency of choice for thousands of families.

Description:
Absolute Care is a homecare provider operating in the Charnwood / Loughborough area of Leicestershire and the Rushcliffe area of Nottinghamshire. We employ around 80 staff and provide outstanding-quality, personalised care to allow our clients to stay living independently at home for as long as possible.

If you would like to discuss care for a loved one, or you are interested in a very rewarding job that really makes a difference to people, please get in touch.

Name: Hormone.ia
Description:
Today, 25% of couples worldwide are affected by fertility disorders due to the increasing age of couples having their first child, the growing emergence of certain hormonal pathologies and the major exposure to endocrine disruptors.

Hormone.ia is developing a new generation of fertility assistant allowing to measure daily from home some biomarkers to optimize the fertility and pregnancy of these couples and empower them from their desire of pregnancy to childbirth.

We are a team composed of a pharmacist with a double competence in biotechnology from the University of Nantes and a biomedical engineer from the EPFL. Following our respective scientific backgrounds, we met within the X-HEC Entrepreneurs master, joint between HEC Paris and Ecole Polytechnique. Following validation of the product-market fit, the development of the proof of concept is in progress at Genopole and Ecole Polytechnique

Somos Enfermería en tu Hogar.

Name: Texas QA Center and Consultancy
Description:
Helping Home Health Agencies Ensure Compliance & Maximize Reimbursement

At Texas QA Center and Consultancy, we provide medical coding and quality assurance (QA) services to home health agencies, ensuring accurate, compliant, and optimized documentation for Medicare and insurance reimbursement.

Who We Serve
 Home Health Agencies – Organizations providing skilled nursing, therapy, and caregiving services.

Our Services
 Home Health Coding – Assigning ICD-10 codes and OASIS reviews to ensure accuracy and compliance.
 OASIS Review – Verifying assessments to impact Medicare Star Ratings and reimbursement levels.
 485/POC (Plan of Care) Review – Ensuring doctor’s orders and care plans meet CMS compliance.
 Clinician Notes Review – Reviewing nursing and therapist notes to prevent claim denials.
 Medical Records Review – Ensuring audit-proof documentation to avoid compliance issues.

Why It Matters
 Avoid Costly Mistakes – Inaccurate coding leads to denied claims and audits.
 Maximize Reimbursement – Proper documentation secures the highest Medicare/insurance payments.
 Ensure Compliance – Agencies stay CMS-compliant and financially stable.

How We Operate
 Remote Team – Experienced coders in the U.S. and the Philippines.
 Client-Focused – Trusted by agencies through referrals and partnerships.
 Scalable & Efficient – Delivering high-accuracy results with industry expertise.

 Let’s Connect – Helping home health agencies improve compliance, efficiency, and financial stability.

Name: KidsCur
Description:
KidsCur is the one-stop spot to store, handle and retrieve all the medical documents your kids need to have easy and secure health appointments every time. Even after the global boom of technology, medical certificates and vaccination records have been filed away in cupboards and are often lost as the years pass. Tracking medical history is an important part of maintaining proper health and having your records in order and ready to go when your health-care provider requests for it alleviates a lot of the frustration and hassle associated with getting treated. Instead of stacking away such precious documents in perishable form, the founders of KidsCur aim to keep up with the times and digitize the process of protecting and filing away your kids medical records.
KidsCur is solely aimed at consolidating the entire process of kids’ healthcare. From scanning and storing records to booking appointments and even looking up the best doctors in your area, KidsCur offers an all-in-one solution for new parents. As soon as you create an account, you will be asked to record:
● Baby’s name and birthday
● Baby’s Birth certificate
● Baby’s picture
● Baby’s birthmark pictures and details
● Parent details
● Pediatrician’s details
You can see all the vaccination details your baby is supposed to receive according to their age, as per the rules of the Indian Academy of Pediatrics. In addition, you can also learn more about these vaccines with just a click, from verified sources.
KidsCur is an easy to use, simple app with pleasant designs and straightforward features. You can find instructions for every operation and it does not require you to spend a lot of time on it for maintaining the records you wish to. KidsCur is designed to fit easily into your busy life, while never missing another doctor’s appointment and keeping track of your baby’s health has never been easier. The founders of KidsCur aim to revolutionize the process of maintaining medical records with this app

Description:
YVETTE & Co brengt mensen & organisaties in de wijkverpleging/community care in ontwikkeling (empowerment). 

Ik verbind de strategie met de praktijk en sla bruggen zowel binnen en tussen organisaties. Als oud-wijkverpleegkundige, socioloog en burger voel ik me extra verbonden met deze sector en de samenlevingsvraagstukken die hiermee samenhangen. 
Speciale aandacht heb ik voor de jonge generatie.

Rollen waarin ik een ontwikkeling op gang kan brengen zijn; 
- transitiemanager, kwartiermaker of procesbegeleider.
- trainer & coach persoonlijk & professioneel leiderschap voor (jonge) zorgprofessionals binnen het veranderende zorglandschap.
- ontwerper van een ontwikkelprogramma voor jonge (wijk)verpleegkundigen.

Daarnaast begeleid ik als senior consultant werving & selectie opdrachten voor hoger management- en directieposities in de zorg.

Door de inzet van creativiteit doe ik het graag ‘anders’ en maak ik vraagstukken graag lichter en luchtiger door mensen nieuwe perspectieven te laten zien.

Name: Home Instead | Kendallville IN
Description:
At Home Instead Kendallville, we believe aging is not just about living longer — it’s about living better.

We provide personalized, relationship-based home care that helps older adults remain safe, comfortable, and connected in the place they call home. From companionship and personal care to specialized support for Alzheimer’s and other dementias, our Care Professionals deliver the kind of compassionate care we’d want for our own families.

What makes us different?

2. Care Pros you can trust: Trained, screened, and supported team members who bring skill and heart to every home.

3. Community commitment: Actively partnering with families, healthcare providers, and organizations to make aging in Northern Indiana safer and more supported.

Together, we’re helping to create a world where every older adult has the opportunity to age with dignity, purpose, and joy.

 Serving families across North Eastern Indiana.

Name: Healthy Homes Solutions
Description:
For over the past 10+ years, Healthy Homes Solutions has been developing a full end-to-end and modular profiling, targeting and householder engagement platform to support vulnerable and in-fuel poverty homes. 

The platform provides a tailored service for PSR providers, utility companies, Housing Associations, Local Authorities, CSR, Managing Agents and Partners to identify and target the homes relevant to their specific programme needs. 

Whether this be supporting vulnerable homes, homes in poverty, low income and on benefits, vulnerable households, in fuel poverty all the way through to broadband deprivation areas and installation of EV chargers, the wealth of household data within the platform is unique and one of our key differentiations. Our current vulnerability and in-fuel poverty programmes are resulting in a guaranteed and independently ratified SROI of 1:30.

Another is in our occupier engagement programme, utilising our award-winning Marketing and Communications team we are able to advise on the messaging and engagement mechanisms to greatly improve Householder engagement and to bring them along the journey to improvement. 

Our data is sourced direct from a number of available sources including BEIS, ONS, DWP, EPC, Post Office and Electoral roll, but it is merged with data that we have been collecting since 1984 to provide trends, insight and focus for the targeting of specific campaigns. 

Our aim is to support the retrofit and improvement of homes throughout the UK, through profiling, insight, intelligence and motivational communications.

Name: Good Comfort Care

Name: Med58
Description:
Noi di Med58 offriamo soluzioni digitali a supporto del paziente, del medico, delle aziende farmaceutiche, delle assicurazioni e di tutti gli attori che operano in Sanità, grazie ad un’unica piattaforma personalizzabile, white label e cloud based.
Il nostro è un modello a doppio core dove i servizi più innovativi, dalla raccolta dati alla telemedicina, e le statistiche più avanzate, grazie ad algoritmi di AI e machine learning, coesistono in un unico ecosistema, migliorando l’efficacia dei trattamenti nuovi e presenti e soddisfacendo le esigenze della ricerca.
Ciò che ci rende unici è il risultato dell’incontro tra un forte know-how medico e le brillanti competenze digitali, guidati dallo spirito etico di un progetto che pone come obiettivo quello di migliorare le prestazioni sanitarie, i percorsi di prevenzione e la salute del cittadino.

Here at Med58 we provide digital solutions supporting patients, doctors, pharmaceutical companies, healthcare insurances and everyone involved in Healthcare, in a customizable, white label and cloud based platform.
Ours is a double core model, where the most innovative services from healthcare data collection to Telemedicine, and advanced statistics, thanks to AI algorithms and Machine learning, coexist in the same ecosystem, improving the effectiveness of existing and latest medical treatments and meeting Research needs.
Being the result of a strong medical know-how and brilliant digital skills is what makes us unique, led by the ethical spirit of a project that aims to improve medical performance, prevention paths and people health.

Name: Shlama Home Health Care
Description:
Our mission is to provide patient-centered care, enhance the quality of life, deliver clinical excellence and provide multidisciplinary compassionate care to individuals and their families.

We are a family owned agency and we treat everyone like family. Our vision is to become the trusted leader in advancing the highest quality of health care delivery at home.

We do whatever it takes to bring you peace of mind. Our clinicians conduct a comprehensive assessment and/or evaluation that meets each patient medical needs and communicate with their physicians and develop a plan of care individualized to our clients needs by managing their disease, provide education, safety, infection prevention, falls and hospitalization prevention.

We are proud of our compassionate home health program designed to help people stay at home and healthier longer. We do whatever it takes to bring you peace of mind

MISSION STATEMENT

To provide patient-centered care, enhance the quality of life, deliver clinical excellence and provide multidisciplinary compassionate care to individuals and their families.

VISION

To become the trusted leader in advancing the highest quality of health care delivery at home.

VALUES

Advocacy – We champion the needs, concerns and rights of our patients to provide a comfortable home environment.

Compassion – We show kindness and empathy as well as offer encouragement to create a warm and compassionate environment.

Education – We cultivate an educational environment for our patients and our employees.

Excellence – We strive to exceed the expectations standard in the home health care industry.

Integrity – We communicate openly and honestly, build trust, hold ourselves accountable and adhere to the highest ethical standards to act in the best interest of our patients.

Quality – We implement continuous quality improvement measures throughout our agency.

Respect – We treat our employees and the patients we serve with fairness and high-level respect.

Name: ActivMed
Description:
ActivMed s’engage dans une mission, rendre accessible à tous l’Activité Physique Adaptée. 

Dans l’objectif d’aider à apporter une réponse aux enjeux de santé publique actuels et à venir, ActivMed a créé une solution numérique permettant aux patients de bénéficier d’Activités Physiques Adaptées conçues par des professionnels, à distance, depuis chez eux ou dans un environnement de confiance. 

Bien plus qu’une plateforme de mise en relation entre patients et enseignants en Activité Physique Adaptée, ActivMed est un réel outil métier numérique pour aider les professionnels dans le développement, le déploiement et la gestion de leur activité. Conscients que chaque professionnel à sa propre méthode, ActivMed a été imaginée dans l’objectif de s’adapter pleinement aux attentes de chaque enseignant. 

Pour pallier les problématiques d’accessibilité à de l’Activité Physique Adaptée, ActivMed a été pensée pour permettre un accompagnement personnalisé depuis n’importe où, quel que soit le profil du bénéficiaire.
 
Prescripteurs, enseignants, patients, nous visons à accompagner un environnement complet. 

L’Activité Physique Adaptée : L’ordonnance d’une vie meilleure.

Name: Cultural Care Services
Description:

We provide a wide range of tailored supports, including in home care and community participation, with a strong focus on cultural understanding, compassion, and personalised service. From day one, we prioritise finding the right support match to build lasting, trust based relationships.

Our team is built on values of transparency, open communication, and collaboration. We work closely with participants, families, and support networks to ensure each person can achieve their NDIS goals and lead a fulfilling life.

Our vision is to create an inclusive, connected community where people with disabilities are seen, heard, and supported to thrive.

We promise, whether it’s helping with daily living or participating in community life, you can count on CCS for respectful, culturally responsive support that puts your needs first.
