Name: CareWorks Health Services
Description:
Our mission is to provide the best professional caregivers for people in need and to make a difference in the lives of those who need us most.

We provide home care for all ages, although home health care is typically associated with the need for assistance with daily living among our aging population. It is often assumed that the natural progression of aging leads to the need for an assisted living facility or nursing home if the family is not able to assist their loved ones as they begin to struggle with daily living.  Our In-Home Senior Care in Laguna Hills and Huntington Beach (Orange County) , CA  provides caregivers exist to bridge the gap between living at home and moving to an assisted living facility.  We train and hire only certified caregiver to take care of your loved ones, keeping them at home. You might even be surprised to know that hiring a caregiver is often cheaper than the costs associated with moving to an assisted living facility or nursing home.

CareWorks Health Services is the leading provider of medical and non-medical trusted and reliable in home care. Based out of Laguna Hills and Huntington Beach, CA.  CareWorks understands how difficult it can be to care for loved ones during their time of need. Our dependable caregivers offer in-home care to everyone in Orange County, CA  whether it's young or seniors needing home care and help with daily activities.

Our caregivers are specially trained and experienced in assisting clients with Dementia, Alzheimers, Parkinsons, Diabetes, CHF, COPD and other chronic conditions.   Our goal is to help your loved one live a more fulfilling life, safely and independently at home. To us it personal and a calling.

License number is HCO# 304700005

Name: ADI Paxme
Description:
Paxme è un punto di riferimento nelle cure sanitarie domiciliari con oltre 20 anni di esperienza specifica. Specializzata nelle cure domiciliari, si impegna a stabilire un solido rapporto tra l'assistito, la sua famiglia e gli operatori.
Opera nell'area metropolitana di Milano, nelle province di Como e di Monza e Brianza, dove offre assistenza, cure mediche, prestazioni fisioterapiche e infermieristiche nel comfort dell’ambiente domestico, promuovendo l'autonomia e migliorando la qualità della vita della persona fragile.   
L'équipe multidisciplinare include medici specialisti, infermieri, fisioterapisti, operatori socio-sanitari e psicologi, tutti dedicati a garantire un'assistenza di alta qualità direttamente a domicilio. 
Paxme intende stabilire un dialogo con chi è interessato nella sanità territoriale, in particolare con i medici e promuovere l’integrazione e la comunicazione per meglio servire gli assistiti.

Name: Home Wound Care
Description: Leaders in product evaluations and clinical trials site in wound care. We are a team with a passion for bringing forward improvements in wound healing. Our  Clinical Research nurses will work with our clients, to get the study design and protocol correct from the beginning. Our Clinical Research Associates set up and monitor the trial, with a passion for detail, and an obsession for our clinical trial site SOPs. Our friendly team of ambassadors and leading UK GPs , find patients both within communities and from surgeries. When we run the trials, we only use our own team of specialist community nurses, trained by one of the UK's leading wound care nurses Sylvie Hampton. If needed for product evaluations we will present our findings at conference, and publish to industry journals.

Name: Nutreau
Description:
In early 2024, while supporting my wife through chemo, I discovered  something.

Six months later, my perspective  about what’s required for long-term health and vitality had COMPLETELY changed.

And all I did ... 

was change the WATER  that we drink.

Now, I realise that what happened to my family isn't such a surprise, because what I did was radically improve something that makes up 72% of us.

If you think about everything else we do to improve our health today:

➜ diet 
➜ exercise 
➜ sleep 
➜ spas, beauty products
➜ supplements 
➜ health practitioners 
➜ medication

all that adds up to 28%

And it PALES in comparison to the potential health benefits associated with greatly improving the quality of what constitutes 72% of us.

VALUE ADD:

many of the videos on my YouTube channel:

https://www.youtube.com/@Nutreau

are based on questions, and feedback, from others.

Since I've done my best to de-clutter, and simplify important topics, they are guaranteed to save you time.

Getting clear, reliable information about drinking water, largely an unregulated industry, is very difficult today.

Name: Premier Pediatric Therapy Home Health
Description: At Premier Pediatric Therapy, children's care is our top priority. Every child is unique and deserves individualized treatment options that enable them to have the best quality of life. That's why we create custom therapy evaluations and plans for every patient we see. We treat children with mild to severe cognitive and developmental delays from birth to age 21.

Name: Maya HealthCare Inc.
Description:
At Maya HealthCare, we're more than just a startup; we're a dedicated team with a mission to redefine how healthcare professionals interact with technology. Our desktop and mobile solutions are crafted to offer an efficient, accessible, and user-friendly experience for home healthcare agencies.

Our innovative approach ensures a seamless home-to-office information exchange, saving time for clinicians, eliminating confusion, enhancing revenue for healthcare agencies, and fostering a dynamic treatment environment. The focus? Quality care for patients.

We recognize the global need to rejuvenate healthcare software systems. Many existing solutions struggle with adapting to mobile devices, leading to poor user experiences, steep learning curves, and rigidity. This doesn't just affect healthcare providers; it impacts patients by hindering effective tracking of health conditions and scheduling.

Maya is all about putting people first - whether it's patients, staff, or family members. We aim to simplify the home health treatment process through an intuitive, adaptable, and multifaceted platform that provides:

- Easy scheduling of appointments and visits.
- Hassle-free communication with healthcare professionals within the organization.
- Comprehensive record-keeping of billing information.
- Quick request and receipt of physician orders.
- Immediate updates to essential forms like start-of-care forms, patient consents, nurses' notes, and care plans.
- A personalized user experience tailored to individual organizational needs.

Join us at Maya, where we're not just building software, but shaping a healthier future. Welcome to a new era of healthcare technology. We'll take it from here.

Name: OutMed Healthcare Services
Description: Business of providing outsourced healthcare support services including but not limited to quality analysis (QA) and audit of clinical and medical documentation, with a specific focus on home healthcare documentation such as physical therapy and nursing records for clients based in the United States and other countries; to provide review, standardization, compliance checking, and reporting services related to clinical documentation; and to engage in all such lawful activities that are incidental or conducive to the attainment of the above objects.

Name: Allergomedica
Description:
Allergomedica is a digital first allergy clinic. Our aim is to help people fully understand their allergies and find an efficient ways to improve their life quality by leveraging modern technology.

Allergomedica offers allergy diagnostic programs based on molecular allergy blood test. It provides a detailed explanation of yours allergy profile and set of recommendation and treatment options.

Name: Caire
Description:
Caire är en AI-driven SaaS-plattform som är skapad för att förändra hemtjänsten genom att intelligent automatisera schemaläggning, resursfördelning och kontinuitet i omsorgen.
Vårt uppdrag är att göra hemtjänsten mer mänsklig – genom att minska den administrativa bördan och ge omsorgsteam möjlighet att fokusera på det som betyder mest: att leverera trygg, empatisk och konsekvent omsorg till dem som behöver det.

Det som skiljer Caire från andra lösningar är vår unika kombination av djup verksamhetsförståelse och teknisk spetskompetens.
Vi förenar erfarenhet från hemtjänstpersonal, chefer och omsorgstagare med expertis från ledande AI- och SaaS-utvecklare. Resultatet är teknologi som inte bara är kraftfull – utan också anpassad till verklighetens behov inom omsorg.

Plattformen integreras sömlöst med befintliga system och använder avancerad AI för att:
- optimera personalresurser,
- minska restid och dubbelarbete,
- stärka kontinuiteten för både brukare och personal.

Caire är utvecklad för hemtjänstutförare som vill ligga i framkant när det gäller effektivitet och medarbetarnöjdhet – utan att behöva stora IT-resurser.

Idag används Caire av hemtjänstverksamheter i Sverige och vi pilottestar exklusiva API-integrationer med aktörer som Carefox.
Vår vision är att bli det självklara operativsystemet för modern, högpresterande hemtjänst.

Vi välkomnar samarbeten med nytänkande utförare, partners och investerare som delar vår vision om en mer effektiv och mänsklig hemtjänst

Name: Crossroads Homecare
Description: When seniors or others need long or short-term assistance with their daily living needs, home is the most comfortable and convenient place to receive care. Crossroads Homecare provides non-medical companion homemaker services to seniors, those recovering from surgery and others

With a team of dedicated caregivers who are committed to the well-being of our clients, we strive to make a positive impact on the lives of those we serve. We believe that everyone deserves the highest standard of care, and we are here to make that a reality. Welcome to My Companionship, where care is not just a service; it's a commitment to a better life.

Description: Victoria Lifeline has been helping people lead safe and independent lives for over thirty years. Name: HomeCare Therapeutics
Description:
Welcome to HomeCare Therapeutics, a trusted provider of occupational, physical, and speech therapy services.

Our mission is to enhance the lives of individuals with intellectual & developmental disabilities, geriatric adults and children by equipping them with the necessary tools to learn, develop, and maintain the skills required for maximum independence & safety in their home, school, and community settings.

As an approved NJ-DDD Medicaid provider, we offer Occupational Therapy, Physical Therapy, & Speech Therapy, Individual Support, and Community Based Supports for adults aged 21 and above, diagnosed with developmental and intellectual disabilities. Our goal is to help these individuals to engage and integrate within their communities, group homes, and residential settings. We provide personalized therapy plans tailored to the unique needs of each client, focusing on motor skill enhancement, communication improvement, sensory integration support, and many more.

Additionally, we are a licensed Medicare Part B provider & work with various insurance companies, secondary insurances, and private pay in the state of NJ. This allows us to deliver Occupational and Physical Therapy services to geriatric patients recovering from orthopedic or neurological procedures in the comfort of their homes. Our targeted interventions aim to improve mobility, balance, strength, and cognitive abilities, empowering seniors to regain functional independence and embrace a fulfilling lifestyle.

To support the younger generation, we have expanded our Occupational, Physical, & Speech Therapy services to public schools, charter schools, and non-public school settings. Our therapists collaborate closely with educators, child support teams, & parents to address functional limitations that hinders child’s performance in school setting. By doing so, we ensure that students aged 3 to 21 with learning, communication, & developmental disabilities can fully participate in their academic journeys.

Name: SIM zorg op maat
Description:
Bij SIM aan tafel 'uw zorgen uit handen'.

Zodra u bij SIM aan tafel zit, nemen wij uw zorgen uit handen en regelen wij ‘passende zorg’ voor u. Dat doen wij door goed naar u te luisteren en samen te bespreken welke zorg u nodig heeft.

U ontvangt van ons een vrijblijvend advies over de zorgmogelijkheden in Nederland, zowel vanuit het Persoonsgebonden budget alsook in combinatie met Zorg in Natura. Zodat u zo lang mogelijk zelfstandig thuis kunt blijven wonen en u er nooit alleen voor staat.Wij reiken u de hand én ontzorgen u op een manier die ook uw mantelzorgers ontlast. Samen zorgen wij ervoor dat u uw leven kunt leiden zoals u dat wenst én waarin veilig ouder worden centraal staat.

Waarmee kunnen wij u helpen?
Bij SIM kunt u terecht voor:
• Individuele begeleiding.
• Zorgondersteuning Plus (huishoudelijke zorgondersteuning en helpende basis).

Wij bieden specialistische ondersteuning op alle leefdomeinen. Eenvoudig of complex!

Onze zorg is altijd gericht op kwaliteit van leven, leefplezier, gezondheid, vitaliteit én veilig ouder worden. Dit vormt de rode draad in alles wat wij doen.

Heeft u nog géén indicatie? Geen probleem.
Samen met u kijken wij, op basis van uw gezondheidssituatie, op welke zorgondersteuning u mogelijk recht heeft. Dit kan vanuit de Wet langdurige zorg (Wlz) of vanuit de Wet maatschappelijke ondersteuning (Wmo).

'zó sim kan het zijn'

Name: Consumer Behavior Insights
Description:
A LinkedIn page focused on consumer behavior provides valuable insights into how individuals make decisions and interact with brands in various industries. By analyzing purchasing patterns, emotional responses, and social influences, it helps businesses understand their target audience on a deeper level. This type of page often shares articles, case studies, and expert opinions on how consumers are shaped by factors such as culture, psychology, and technology.

Additionally, the page might highlight trends like personalization, the impact of social media, and the growing importance of sustainability in consumer choices. It provides tips on improving customer experience and aligning products or services with consumer needs. Engaging with followers through polls, discussions, and posts that challenge conventional thinking helps create a space for learning and collaboration.

With a focus on data and research-driven insights, the page can be an excellent resource for professionals in marketing, sales, and customer experience to stay informed about evolving behaviors. Whether you're looking to improve brand loyalty or optimize decision-making, this type of content offers practical advice on connecting with today's informed and conscious consumers.

Name: Alive Health
Description:
ALIVE is your personalized chronic care companion, built to help anyone living with a chronic condition stay healthy, connected, and supported every day.

We use AI-powered symptom tracking, real-time remote monitoring, and verified nurse support to help patients and families manage conditions like sickle cell, diabetes, hypertension, cancer recovery and more.

Our mission is simple: no one should fight alone. Millions of people in Africa and beyond suffer preventable crises because they lack daily tools, clear guidance, and trusted local care. ALIVE bridges the gap between hospital and home, turning scattered visits into connected, personalized daily care plans.

Through our mobile app, users can log vital signs, get instant alerts, monitor wounds, book virtual consults, connect with a supportive community, and receive care reminders tailored to their needs. Families and caregivers also get real-time updates and peace of mind.

Founded by Michelle Omeke - a kidney cancer survivor and sickle cell warrior, ALIVE stands for resilience, local solutions and human-first technology.

Together, we help you stay alive - every day.

Join us: alivehealth.app

What sets us apart is our holistic, human-centered approach. We go beyond traditional caregiving to provide integrated care plans that support physical, emotional, and social well-being.  Nationwide Coverage – Browse a growing directory of CQC-registered providers across the UK.

Name: Promised Care Ltd
Description:

Offering both permanent and temporary staff options.

At Promised Care, we are committed to:
Delivering dependable, well-trained, and caring professionals for home health care.
Providing flexible staffing solutions for short-term and long-term needs.
Offering a robust and reliable service, available 24/7, 365 days a year.

Coverage Area:
Our services primarily focus on London, the M4 corridor, and the M25 ring road.

Whether you require consistent care at home or staff to fill short shifts in facilities, Promised Care Ltd is here to support you.

*Employees receive competitive pay and referral bonuses for referring new clients. As a Promised Care agency worker, you’ll benefit from free mandatory training and 24hrs support from our team.

Name: Mila Zorg Zorgindicaties en Zorgadvies BV
Description:
Mila Zorg is opgericht met een duidelijke missie: het bieden van hoogwaardige zorgondersteuning, waarbij de mens centraal staat. Onze organisatie is ontstaan vanuit de wens om zorgorganisaties en cliënten te helpen met indicatiestellingen, zorgadvies en kwaliteitsmanagement. We geloven in een persoonlijke aanpak, waarbij we altijd maatwerk leveren om te voldoen aan de unieke behoeften van iedere cliënt en organisatie.

Met een toegewijd team van zorgprofessionals combineren we uitgebreide ervaring in de zorgsector met een ondernemende mindset. Ons vaste team aan wijkverpleegkundigen heeft jarenlange ervaring in het opstellen van indicaties, begeleiden van zorgprocessen en het verbeteren van de kwaliteit binnen zorgorganisaties. Bij Mila Zorg staat betrouwbaarheid, snelheid, toegankelijkheid en professionaliteit voorop. Wij luisteren naar de behoeften van onze cliënten en gaan altijd een stap verder om de juiste oplossingen te vinden, zelfs in de meest complexe situaties.

Wat ons onderscheidt, is onze focus op onafhankelijkheid, kwaliteit en efficiënte dienstverlening. Of het nu gaat om het ondersteunen van cliënten bij een persoonsgebonden budget (PGB) of het begeleiden van zorgorganisaties bij het voldoen aan wettelijke normen, wij zijn een partner die zich inzet om het proces zorgeloos en succesvol te maken.

Bij Mila Zorg geloven we in een duurzame aanpak. Ons doel is niet alleen om ondersteuning te bieden, maar ook om organisaties sterker en zelfstandiger te maken, zodat ze onafhankelijk verder kunnen groeien. Wij zijn pas tevreden wanneer onze cliënten en samenwerkingspartners volledig ontzorgd en tevreden zijn.

Name: Indicatiezorg Nederland
Description:
Welkom bij Indicatiezorg Nederland!

Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het stellen van zorgindicaties voor de wijkverpleging voor o.a. pgb wijkverpleging, ongecontracteerde zorg en ZIN zorg. Onafhankelijkheid, laagdrempeligheid en deskundigheid zijn onze kernwaarden voor het toewijzen van een juiste indicatie die afgestemd is op de zorgbehoeften van de zorgvrager. 

Indicatiezorg Nederland maakt gebruik van verschillende meetinstrumenten om de gehele zorgsituatie in kaart te brengen, en stelt de indicatie volgens het V&VN normenkader. Wij stellen hierbij de cliënt centraal, en proberen de zelfredzaamheid te bevorderen op alle mogelijke manieren zodat de zorg doelmatig is. 

Indicatiezorg Nederland kan ook ingezet worden op het aspect zorgmonitoring. Verschillende verzekeringen stellen dit als vereiste om bijvoorbeeld ongecontracteerde zorg te mogen blijven leveren. Hierbij houden wij de kwaliteit van zorg in de gaten, en zijn wij continue betrokken bij het zorgproces waarbij het zorgplan continue getoetst wordt.

Benieuwd wat wij voor jou kunnen betekenen? Neem dan een kijke op www.indicatiezorgnederland.nl, mail ons naar info@indicatiezorgnederland of stuur ons gewoon een berichtje via Linkedin ;)

Name: CareSquared Ltd.
Description:
The World Health Organisation has designated Dementia a global priority and tasked every country in the world to produce an action plan to assist carers and their loved ones with dementia care. In particular, they have called on technology companies to do more to help with dementia.

Dementia, as a degenerative disease doesn’t just impact the carer. It also affects close family and friends, especially those forced into becoming a full-time carer for their loved ones to help them maintain their independence and delay placing them in care homes at a cost to the family of £500-£1000 per week, plus an average £1300 per carer per year additional costs.

Recently, the institute of public policy research found with the correct support 80,000 people are now in care homes that could have remained independent, saving local authorities £ 1 billion each. Further, it was discovered the family would prefer it and the alternative would see the remaining life expectancy halved.
We believe we can help to extend the independence and dignity of people diagnosed with dementia and provide an improved work-life balance for carers.

At CareSquared Ltd., we created a mobile app, to give carers time back and the ability to provide remote care even during future lockdowns, while also providing peace of mind that their loved one is safe.

In our experience, Dementia sufferers care about just 3 things. The company, Familiarity, and Routine. That is why we designed an app to provide a solution to those 3 key pain points including safety as the fourth point.
 
Dementia claims more UK lives than breast and prostate cancer combined (the number 2 and 3 biggest killers in the US, while Dementia is currently the 3rd largest killer). 

The numbers of those diagnosed with Dementia double every 10 years and show no signs of slowing.

Name: CarerNest.com
Description:
CarerNest.com is a revolutionary digital healthcare platform that connects families with verified care professionals through intelligent matching technology. Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Flutter, the platform delivers seamless experiences across web and mobile devices.

The platform addresses critical care industry challenges by providing instant matching algorithms that pair care seekers with qualified carers based on location, availability, specialized skills, and preferences. Our comprehensive verification system includes DBS checks, insurance validation, professional references, and in-person interviews, ensuring trust and safety.

Key features include real-time availability management with dynamic scheduling, digital care logs for visit documentation and medication tracking, and secure payment processing through Stripe integration supporting both subscription and pay-as-you-go models. The platform offers 24/7 emergency support and maintains GDPR and HIPAA compliance.

CarerNest's technology stack features MySQL with Drizzle ORM, NextAuth.js authentication, Socket.io real-time communication, and MapLibre GL JS location services. The user experience prioritizes both families and carers with intuitive dashboards, earnings tracking, and professional development resources.

Our sustainable business model includes commission-based revenue from bookings, subscription plans, premium verification services, and enterprise solutions for healthcare organizations. Future development focuses on AI-powered predictive analytics, wearable device integration, and geographic expansion.

CarerNest.com transforms care services by combining advanced technology with human-centered design, creating a trusted ecosystem where families confidently find qualified carers while empowering care professionals to build meaningful careers with fair compensation and flexible arrangements.

Name: Sweet Duck Cleaner
Description:
Yes, we’re a cleaning company. 
But not the boring kind...

Sweet Duck Cleaner was born from a spark of inspiration, a desire to shake up the cleaning industry, and the help of some very special teammates that I will talk to you later.

It all started with Cris. 
After 3 years running a successful cleaning business (4,000+ spotless properties cleaned, thank you very much), he hit a wall. 
The business was growing, but the routine? Too dull. Cleaning didn’t feel exciting anymore—he needed a change.

Enter Nicole.
A startup pro with a knack for managing people and a serious entrepreneurial itch, she saw Cris’s drive and knew they could create something unique together.

But the real magic began when I stepped in...
Hi, I’m The Ducker. 
CEO, creative genius, and mascot extraordinaire. 
With over 10,000 Duckleans (our trusty rubber duck crew). 
I had a mission: to keep my team busy and bring some fun to a typically dull industry.

Together, we turned “just another cleaning company” into Sweet Duck Cleaner: a professional cleaning service with a twist. 
Our Duckleans leave behind spotless spaces—and a little something extra. 
After every cleaning, one of our Duckleans stays behind as a reminder of the care we put into every job.

Since 2020, we’ve partnered with property managers, contractors, and businesses to clean properties across Florida. 
We deliver high-speed, high-quality service with a touch of humor and heart.

Ready to see what Sweet Duck Cleaner is all about?
 Shoot us a message (321) 204-8102 or visit https://sweetduckcleaner.com/ to book your first cleaning. 

We promise you’ll never look at cleaning the same way again.

Name: Will-Call
Description:
Every second matters in patient care, but traditional nurse call systems often fall short.
Patients with limited mobility or spinal cord injuries may struggle to press a button or reach for assistance when they need it most, leaving them vulnerable and anxious. Caregivers, on the other hand, face increasing pressure to manage patient safety while balancing workloads in fast-paced environments.

 Will-Call solves this with simplicity.
Will-Call is a voice-activated nurse call button that empowers patients to call for help using only their voice—no setup, no internet, and no training required. 
Plug-and-play, it works instantly to improve patient care and reduce caregiver stress.

Why choose Will-Call?
 Enhances patient autonomy by enabling voice-activated calls
 Simplifies caregiver workload with an easy-to-use device
 Requires no training, internet connection, or technical setup
 Ensures compliance with healthcare safety standards

 Designed for healthcare providers looking to:
Improve patient safety
Meet compliance standards
Streamline caregiver response

If you’re looking to improve patient care and streamline caregiver responsiveness, Will-Call is the practical, effective solution your facility needs.

 Contact us for more information: admin@gopi.com

Medical device, nurse call button, patient safety, voice-activated care, healthcare innovation, care quality improvement.

-	Transitional Care Management

-	Dual Discharge

In addition to our core care service programs, we have certified caregivers for additional services such as: Pulmonary, cardiological, cancer, stroke, diabetes, renal disease, suicide prevention, as well as, memory care services as long as it is felt to be safe in the home. 

Our core services consist of: 
-	100-point home safety assessment (available in The Family Room)
-	Regular communication w/ family and support staff (via The Family Room)
-	Basic Personal Care (bathing, toileting, dressing, laundry, personal hygiene)

Durable Assistance & Consulting, LLC (DA&C) is a company that provides a path for consumers to age-in-place as an alternative to long-term care in a facility. The owner of DA&C brings to the market 25 years in the social work profession, providing case management and other services to clients in all age groups.  With a specialization in geriatrics, she is well-positioned to understand the challenges faced by adults as they age.  The business model will incorporate the Home for Life Design assessment, dietary and nutritional services, advance directives, advocacy, resource, and referrals, along with products designed to assist adults to age in place with dignity, independence, and improved quality of life.

Name: ElyTEAM
Description:
ElyTEAM, votre partenaire E-SANTÉ pour un suivi à distance de vos patients. 
Notre équipe de professionnels de santé composée d’IDE et d’un pharmacien biologiste médical accompagne vos équipes médicales, établissements et associations de santé pour déployer une télésurveillance simple, sûre et utile au quotidien. 
Notre solution numérique est complète et intégrée : 
- télésurveillance médicale, 
- parcours de soins numériques sur mesure, 
- coordination ville-hôpital 
- diffusion de tous contenus d’éducation thérapeutique 
à partir d’un outil sécurisé, adaptable et interopérable (DMN classe 1, HDS)
𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐞 : valoriser votre temps médical et fluidifier la coordination autour du patient.
𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 : 
Vous faire gagner du temps médical : 
Nous paramétrons vos protocoles sur mesure, assurons l’installation, la formation des équipes, la gestion administrative (déclarations, inclusions) et le suivi de l’observance de vos patients, le pré-filtrage des alertes pour que vous interveniez seulement en cas de nécessité. 

Développez la prévention et l’autonomie des patients : 
Nos IDE dédiées assistent chaque patient pour simplifier l’adhésion et renforcer leur autonomie et assurent un suivi continu et rassurant à distance pour détecter plus tôt les signaux d’alerte. 
Une interface claire qui aide à mieux comprendre leur maladie.  Des échanges via canaux simples et sécurisés avec l’équipe médicale, soignante et d’éducation thérapeutique.

Vous êtes accompagné dans toutes les étapes 
Un cadre sécurisé et remboursé : la télésurveillance est entrée dans le droit commun (prescription de 6 mois renouvelable). 
Nous vous guidons de A à Z pour une mise en œuvre conforme et efficace. 
Adaptée à toutes les pathologies, notre plateforme s’adapte aux prises en charge complexes (cardiologie, néphrologie, insuffisance respiratoire, oncologie, santé mentale, SSR, etc.).

𝐍𝐨𝐬 𝐯𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐮𝐫𝐬 : Authenticité, Sens du service, Simplicité, Efficacité.

Global Cloud Cayr: A Global Team of Doctors bring you Empathy-based, AI driven, Holistic Wellbeing & Medical Services

Vision: Individualized family-centric evolving care- a proactive fusion of empathy, cutting-edge technology, and holistic care.

Mission: Empowering individuals, especially the elderly or those with chronic illnesses, to live confidently at their preferred location with dignity and safety. Utilizing a participant-first approach, we create a virtual family setting through Tele, AI, and advanced technologies for enhanced prevention.

Objective:
> Respond to Emergency
> Promote Holistic Wellbeing
> Help you navigate the unpredictable waters of health crises, reducing their impact and ensuring a seamless continuum of care.

*Emergency Response*: Your Emergency is Priority for Us
Our Emergency Service provides urgent pre-hospital treatment and stabilization for serious illness and injuries ranging from stroke and cardiac events to snake bites and others.

We strive to be an extension of your primary care doctor and partner with them to ensure open communication regarding your treatment.

*Prevention*: Preventive health is the key to helping you stay healthy and detecting health problems  before they become difficult to treat. Getting preventive care reduces the risk for diseases, disabilities, and even death.

Preventive health encompasses a set of health services meant to screen and possibly identify health issues before symptoms develop. Preventive healthcare can help you live a longer, healthier life.

*Tele Services*: We stay connected with you at all times through internet access on your computer, tablet, or smartphone. You can reach our Doctors and healthcare professionals without an in-office visit/consultation.

*Continuous Monitoring*: Continuous health monitoring of patients, enabled by rapid advances in digital health technologies, has the potential to tailor patient care to individuals to achieve better health outcomes.

Name: Yellow Door Care Pty Ltd
Description:
Yellow Door is a private home health care service in Adelaide. Our goal is to help you to stay independent at home regardless of age or disability. We do this by providing in home supports so that you can  live your life independently. 
Yellow Door is accredited with the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission and the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS). 

Palliative Care
People approaching the end of life phase, whether through old age, chronic or terminal illness, deserve the option to be cared for at home, in familiar surroundings, supported with high quality and specialised care.

Yellow Door seeks to approach end of life care or palliative care with an emphasis on living life as fully as possible in the most normal of environments – a person’s home, and conducting care with as little or as much specialised medical and nursing input as needed to achieve the very best quality of life for the individual.

Aged Care Services
Continue to live at home with as much or as little support you need. 

Registered Disability Services in your own home:

As a Registered NDIS Provider, Yellow Door has tailored disability support services to suit every age and ability – from children and young people to adults. We provide initial advice about your options and what might best suit your needs, without charge and after listening carefully to your requirements.

Respite Support for Parents and Carers

Yellow Door can arrange as little or as much care as you need, so that you can have a break. We do this in a way that is least intrusive, so that you and your loved one can feel safe and supported and most importantly – listened to!
Examples of Services provided but not limited to:

    Respite and babysitting for Parents and Carers
    Transportation and escorting to appointments, school, fun outings etc
    Domestic Assistance
    Cleaning

Make the most of your budget!

Name: ASADE (Asociación Estatal de Entidades de Servicios de Atención a Domicilio)
Description: La Asociación Estatal de Entidades de Servicios de Atención a Domicilio (ASADE) es la principal organización patronal en España que agrupa a las entidades líderes del sector de la atención domiciliaria. Desde su fundación, ASADE trabaja por la profesionalización, calidad y sostenibilidad de los servicios de atención a las personas mayores y dependientes, promoviendo modelos de colaboración público-privada y defendiendo los derechos de los trabajadores del sector. Con más de 60,000 profesionales representados, un 60% del sector, ASADE desempeña un papel clave en la negociación colectiva, el diseño de normativas y la mejora continua de los servicios de cuidado en el hogar. Fundada en 2014, ASADE forma parte de foros e instituciones como la CEOE, el IMSERSO y la Mesa de Diálogo Social de Dependencia, y colabora activamente con administraciones públicas y privadas para garantizar un modelo de atención accesible, justo y profesional. Su compromiso se centra en garantizar que la atención domiciliaria sea reconocida como un derecho esencial, respaldado por una financiación adecuada y criterios de calidad en la prestación de servicios.

Description:
Jivika Healthcare - one of India’s foremost mobile medical services aimed at taking healthcare from hospitals to homes and communities now imprints its footsteps in serving cancer patients by taking Chemotherapy at their doorstep. 

The service, ChemoAtHome, will provide patients with high-quality cancer care alongside the highest convenience and lower costs at their doorstep.  ChemoAtHome aims to provide much-needed relief to patients and family caregivers during their difficult times with its home service and be the change-maker in the way cancer care is delivered in India. 

Chemo Day Care facilities are concentrated within Tier I and Tier II cities, it increases overall suffering for patients in Tier III, IV, and beyond cities. Over the period, with our asset-light model, we aim to provide ChemoAtHome services to smaller towns where Chemo Day Care facilities are currently a dream. 

Besides Doorstep Chemotherapy, pre and post-chemotherapy services like video consultations with oncologists, supportive cancer care treatments, lab investigations, and home delivery of medicines can be availed.

Description:
We are the complex care professionals. We deliver high-quality, nurse-led care to children and adults with complex healthcare needs, all within the comfort and familiarity of their own homes.

Our care team is led by experienced and specialist community paediatric and adult nurses. We have an evidence-based approach which adheres to all national guidelines for the care and safeguarding of children and adults.

The complex care provided is based upon clinical competencies and is overseen by Nurse Managers to ensure the care delivered is both safe and of high quality through a robust clinical governance structure. 

Our Nurse Specialists are highly skilled and experienced in complex care. They carry out a full nursing assessment and develop evidence based care plans that are person centred to ensure that care is safe, effective and delivered at the highest standards and in line with our client's preferences. 

Yorhealth is committed to providing the highest quality care with our clients put right at the heart of everything we do. We have an outstanding rating for care with the CQC. To achieve this we work in partnership with our clients right from the start. Description:
In-Home Assisted Living Inc.
Better Care in the Safety and Comfort of Your Home

That's not an empty statement, it's what we strive for every day.

Home Care
Our caregivers and nurses help seniors and people with medical challenges to remain living in their own home with safety and comfort.  Whatever the nature or level of service required, we take a highly individualized approach to home care, with professional excellence, empathy, and respect.

We offer a full range of care from safety supervision, companionship, assistance with daily living and homemaker tasks, to include complex medical conditions like dementia, and palliative care.   Explore our services and see why In-Home Assisted Living certified caregivers, Personal Support Workers and Registered Nurses  really offer better care. 

Better Hospital Bedside Care
We are also a highly respected provider of nursing and PSW staffing services to many of Ontario’s hospitals, long-term care facilities, assisted living residences and retirement homes.  When your loved one needs more attention than your care facility can provide, we are authorized and qualified to provide private bedside patient support.  Our one-on-one caregivers work with facility staff to ensure your loved one receives the level of personal attention and care that they need and deserve.

Personalized Care Plans
We offer a personalized care plan for each individual to meet each family’s needs, schedule and budget.

Agency services are provided on an hourly, daily or live-in basis and TRIMED staff members are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Services may include assistance with trips to the doctor, reminders to take the right medication at the right time, meal preparation, light housekeeping, errands, shopping, and even Alzheimer’s and dementia care. The result is total care, including companionship, allowing seniors to feel safe and independent while they age in the home they’ve lived in for years.

Our aides assist with personal care, housekeeping and the activities of daily living. TRIMED’s companions provide lighter assistance and emotional support to assist individuals in managing their home environment. Both services are overseen by our nursing staff who monitor the health and well-being of the individual.

Description:
To Us, It’s about trust, care, and confidence

Founded in 2021

KallyKare's founder, Jemima Kalala a wife and mother of three boys has worked in the field of caregiving for about 8 years, she met many seniors who had all sorts of needs, and every home she entered was blessed to have her around. She's a kind soul who has compassion for others and she loves her job she is very passionate about it. She hopes to make a positive impact in people's lives by giving seniors amazing memories to last them a lifetime. Mrs. Kalala had one focus and it was to give seniors and their families the comfort, trust, and care that they needed when leaving their loved ones in the arms of another person. Working under certain agencies wasn't giving her the environment she needed to stimulate her focus. She always enjoyed helping people and wanted to make a difference in her life and others. However, she has decided to launch her agency so that way she can continue with her career in caregiving also by leaving a positive impact on people's lives, this truly put her all into providing the correct care for clients and their families. At KallyKare we can help clients stay comfortable and safe in their own homes as long as they need us with our customized Care Plans, trained and professional caregivers our commitment to preserving dignity and building trust, we want what's best for you, here we care about both: our clients and caregivers. That’s why our agency is for everyone regardless of your background, culture, or ethnicity we are here for you. We’re committed and passionate about Enhancing the lives of seniors and their Families. 

We look forward to the opportunity to serve your family!

Name: Luminary Clinical Trials Ltd
Description:
Luminary Clinical Trials Limited provides mobile health care services for patients that are participating in clinical trials. We provide the necessary procedures to the patient regardless of their location, state of disease, study duration or frequency of visits.

We are one of the UK partners for Labcorp Drug Development, whose expansive, global network of clinicians bring the clinical trial to the patient's/subject's home (or alternative location). Study visits are completed by qualified Mobile Clinicians according to study procedures as contracted by the pharmaceutical company (the Sponsor).

Mobile clinical services will:

* Reduce the patient/subject burden and increase engagement.
* Extend patient/subject reach and improve diversity.
* Enhance the NHS research site experience.
* Accelerate study timelines through improved efficiencies.
* Increase trial resiliency and ensure study continuity.
* Study visits can be completed on the weekend, after hours and/or on holidays.  

There are no additional costs to the NHS research sites or patients/subjects for utilising mobile clinical services, which will have been approved by the Sponsor for use during the study. Site visits will occur in conjunction with mobile visits throughout the study, supporting site revenue.

Mobile clinical services make it easier and more convenient for a patient/subject to participate and remain engaged with a clinical trial. This can result in positive outcomes for NHS clinical research sites such as higher enrolment, ability to recruit from a larger geographical area, and reduced travel for the patient/subject, which can lead to an increase in retention, compliance and revenue. In short they enhance the ability of NHS research sites to be successful in supporting clinical trials.

Name: enpy
Description:
Here at Enpy, we are on a mission to accelerate the world’s access to preventive healthcare.

As human beings, our health and the health of our loved ones is our most precious and essential asset. We strongly believe the right to health is a fundamental part of our human rights to live our lives in dignity without distinction of our age, gender, education, status or ethnic background.

This is why doctors and engineers have gathered at Enpy to help people take care of themselves in a way that is accessible, safe and accurate by providing them with the most advanced all-in-one preventive healthcare solution in the palm of their hand.

As such, we are helping people take care of their health day by day through regular measurements of their vital signs and assessing their potential symptoms with internally developed AI algorithms. This allows us to reveal any deviation or invisible warning signs early on and provide appropriate healthcare guidance to improve the likelihood of successfully treating an illness or a disease, or to prevent it altogether.

Name: Visiting Angels Essex South
Description:
Visiting Angels Home Care - A Personalised Home Care Service For You

Visiting Angels is already one of the world's largest home care providers with franchised operations in 5 countries and in excess of 600 franchised offices. We are providers of non-medical senior home care services (in-home care, respite care, elderly care, companionship care). Our approach delivers unrushed, consistent high-quality home care from caregivers who want to care and who work within an organisation which allows them to care.

With our senior home care services, elderly adults can continue to live independently in their own homes. We are proud to have a slightly different approach to care, which we believe allows us to deliver a higher quality, more consistent service. This is down to three key factors:

1. Care Giver Recruitment: We are very rigorous in our Care Giver recruitment. In fact, we have a 6-stage selection process to ensure that we have an exceptional Care Giver team.

2. Matching Care Givers with Clients. We go through an elaborate process each time to match a caregiver who would best suit our clients’ needs: Their voice truly matters in all discussions and decisions taken about their care. Together, we will create an individualised care plan focused on their personal preferences and priorities.


3. Carer centric: We look after our Care Givers, paying them well above the market rate and providing a solid benefits package. We believe that a happy Care Giver equals a happy client.

We have robust infection control measures in place that ensure our caregivers always adhere to meticulous standards of hygiene and cleanliness when delivering care and support. Additionally, all carers are trained in handling complex cases, including Dementia and Alzheimer’s.

Name: Aileen.ai
Description:
Our own biological end-of-life will increasingly challenge us and the people and entities who care for us. The unfavorable economics of labor-based elder-care are projected to make Caregiving unaffordable and unavailable. Aging will be growingly undignified, painful and draining to all involved.

Technology is destined to play a significant role in alleviating this societal burden and bring perceived intelligence, camaraderie and empathy to where otherwise loneliness prevails. This technological presence will accompany us to places where people can’t or won’t go, and as such will become personably and economically indispensable.
 
Our aim is to realize this inevitability in a timely manner that delivers profound value to all involved – the people it serves, their care givers, and Aileen’s shareholders, who made it possible.

Il gruppo di professionisti formati ed in continuo aggiornamento teorico pratico garantisce un approccio scientifico ed umanistico al paziente, con attenzione e sensibilità verso il rispetto della persona e le componenti che la circondano.
Grazie ad un’attenta coordinazione e comunicazione delle figure professionali, garantiamo una mirata comprensione dei bisogni, tenendo in considerazione i cambiamenti potenziali della vita quotidiana.

La continuità delle cure rappresenta per noi un fondamento sul quale organizzare un’attenta pianificazione, che permette il coinvolgimento delle figure professionali adeguate a favorire il soddisfacimento dei bisogni della persona al proprio domicilio. Ci impegniamo con empatia e professionalità a recuperare, conservare e sviluppare le risorse della persona attraverso la partecipazione attiva delle figure di riferimento. 

Garantiamo cure specialistiche nei settori delle cure urgenti, analisi casi complessi, cure palliative e valutazione/gestione cure ferite semplici e complesse.

Name: Sara Companion HomeCare Services
Description:
Experience the SARA Difference: Where Quality, Care and Commitment are our way of life.

ABOUT US

Imagine a home care agency that takes the time to sit down with you to understand your needs. A company dedicated to giving personal attention at every level. At SARA Companion HomeCare Services that is our goal. We meet with each client to understand their needs and make sure our caregivers deliver the best services.

SARA is an acronym for Skilled Attentive Reliable Assistants who provide quality continuity of care.

We specialize in one-on-one companion care and healthcare services for the elderly, the disabled or clients just needing assistance while recovering from surgery or unexpected illness in the comfort and safety of their home. 

OUR TEAM

At SARA Companion HomeCare Services, we take pride in the high level of training and experience that caregivers who are part of the SARA team have achieved.

Our large fabulous care staff is comprised of Registered Nurses, Certified Home Health Aides (HHAs) and Homemakers, as well as Geriatric Care Managers who are committed to providing compassionate and responsible care for you or your loved ones.

We are always looking  to expand our team with great employees. If you are looking for a great position, visit the career section on our website.

OUR SERVICES

Our live-in and hourly caregivers are available to assist in private homes, Independent Living and Assisted Living facilities.

We service the five Boroughs of New York City and Nassau County.

We will work together with you and your family to develop an individualized care plan based on your loved one's individual needs. Additionally, we are always willing to modify or amend the plan as deemed necessary.

Services can be provided on a hourly (a minimum of 4 consecutive hours is required), daily or 24 hour live-in basis.

SARA Companion Services, Inc. is a New York State Licensed, Bonded and Insured Home Care Service.

Name: Comfort Scan
Description:
Comfort Scan UK 

Comfort Scan UK is a CQC-registered mobile ultrasound service dedicated to making high-quality diagnostic imaging more accessible, compassionate, and convenient . Based in Milton Keynes, we serve patients across a 30-mile radius, providing professional scans in the comfort of their own home or chosen setting.

We were founded on the belief that nobody should be left waiting in pain or anxiety for essential imaging. Long NHS waits often delay diagnosis and treatment; Comfort Scan was created to bridge that gap. By combining clinical expertise with an empathetic approach, we deliver same-day or next-day appointments, fast reporting, and clear communication patients can trust.

Our services include abdominal, pelvic, breast, testicular, neck, thyroid, vascular (including urgent DVT), groin and hernia, and paediatric scans. Each examination is performed by highly trained sonographers with a focus on accuracy, dignity, and patient reassurance. Coming soon, we will also be offering musculoskeletal (MSK) ultrasound and echocardiography, further expanding our range of specialist services.

What sets us apart is our unique model:

Mobile service: We come to you, reducing stress and improving access.

Fast results: Reports are usually delivered the same day.

CQC-registered: Regulated, safe, and professional.

Empathetic care: Patients feel listened to, supported, and respected.


Comfort Scan UK is more than just a scanning service—we are a trusted healthcare partner. Our vision is to expand this patient-centred model across the UK, reducing delays, supporting GPs, and empowering patients with timely, accurate answers.

 comfortscan.co.uk |  07407 618 444 |  contact@comfortscan.co.uk

Name: YourNidra
Description:
Sleep is the foundation of good health, yet millions in India suffer from undiagnosed sleep disorders, particularly sleep apnea. Poor sleep doesn’t just lead to fatigue—it affects heart health, mental well-being, productivity, and overall quality of life.

We are on a mission to transform sleep health by increasing awareness, improving access to diagnosis, and making treatment solutions more acceptable. Through education, screening, and cutting-edge sleep solutions, we empower individuals to take control of their sleep and breathe better for a healthier life.

Our approach is twofold:
 For Individuals: Helping people recognize the signs of sleep disorders, access convenient diagnosis, and find effective treatment options.
 For Families: Supporting spouses and caregivers who notice sleep-related issues in their loved ones but struggle to encourage action.

By bridging the gap between those suffering from poor sleep and the solutions they need, we aim to create a well-rested, healthier India—one night at a time.

Sleep Better. Live Better.

Name: Blize Healthcare
Description:
Our Mission
Our commitment is to provide quality care and dedicated service to each of our patients and clients. Our intention and goal is to help the patient achieve their optimum level of health and to enjoy a life of purpose and fulfillment.

We achieve our mission by delivering personal, one-on-one care to each patient or client. We understand the role compassion, expertise, and professionalism play in quality care. Our areas of service include:

Home Health Care
Home health care is for those who are recovering from surgery or illness, or those living with a chronic condition, such as diabetes, Parkinson’s or Alzheimer’s. Our team of nurses, therapists, social workers and other skilled caregivers work with your private physician to help ensure you fully recover from illness or surgery or are able to manage and continue to live well with a chronic illness. Your home health team will work with you to help you reach your individual goals, while helping to maximize your health, function and independence.

Hospice Care
When a loved one is nearing the end of life, Blize’s hospice care helps both the patient and their family recognize the beauty of life and helps them make the most of every moment. Hospice care is all about celebrating life and making the end-of-life transition one of comfort, peace and closure.

Private Duty Homecare
According the AARP, nearly 90 percent of seniors want to stay in their homes as they age. Private duty homecare allows seniors to age in place by providing a variety of nonmedical services that allows them to continue living as independently as possible, while enjoying the things that make life worthwhile.

Name: ENAVI LLC
Description:
ENAVI LLC Homecare Agency is founded by Dr. Enowntai Nkongho Ayukotang. Growing up as a young boy, he was deeply inspired by his landlord, a respected community leader who provided healthcare services, particularly eye care, to those in need. Enowntai vividly remembers witnessing individuals arriving at his landlord’s home in pain, only to leave with smiles and relief after receiving his care. Those moments planted a seed in him, a passion to pursue a career where he could also make a vital impact on people’s lives. This led him to become an eye doctor, dedicated to serving his community.

Alongside his professional aspirations, Enowntai always cherished the company of elderly people. Their stories of achievements, regrets, and reflections on life left a lasting impression on him. Through their wisdom, he developed a deep empathy for their needs and challenges. Many spoke of the desire to live with dignity and independence despite the physical and emotional difficulties that come with aging.

This empathy fueled Enowntai’s decision to create ENAVI LLC Homecare Agency. At ENAVI, we are dedicated to providing personalized, compassionate care that allows seniors to age in place wherever they call home. We focus on reducing hospital readmissions, improving quality of life, and offering comfort not only to our clients but also to their families.

Enowntai has over 10 years of experience as a health practitioner and in the care industry. He has a significant background, training, and experience in healthcare and research. His mission is to provide personalized caregiving for senior living with honor and dignity.

Name: FirstLight Home Care of Greater Denver
Description:
You know your parent or elderly loved one better than anyone, so when you decide to let us help provide senior care for them, we listen to what you have to say. Our goal is the same as yours: to help them enjoy the best quality of life and enjoy independence for as long as possible. We take the time to talk to your loved one, so they feel comfortable with us and our caregiving role in their life We keep you informed and involved in order to offer peace-of-mind that he or she is being cared for in the loving way you would care for them yourself.

Here are some of the ways that we can help:

Companion Care
Company and conversation, help with meal preparation, errands, laundry, and light housekeeping

Personal Care
Assistance with mobility, bathing, eating, and personal hygiene

Dementia Care
Memory care support for those with Alzheimer's, Lewy body dementia, and other memory care disorders

Respite Care
Quality care for a loved one while family caregivers take a much-needed break

Travel Companion Program
Professional transportation assistance for your loved one's travels

What Are the Advantages of Home Care Versus Senior Care in a Facility?
In a word: freedom. According to AARP, 92 percent of people over the age of 65 want to stay in their homes as long as possible. Why? Because they enjoy their independence. Physically, in-home care can be better because it allows seniors to remain active longer. They can maintain their own schedules and a certain level of mobility. Emotionally it can be better too because some seniors who are put in nursing homes develop depression that can negatively impact their health and quality of life.

In some cases, families ask a FirstLight caregiver to come to a nursing home, assisted living facility, or retirement community to provide added companion care and assistance with tasks that may not be met in these institutions. This includes things such as errands, going to doctor’s appointments, or taking a trip to a favorite restaurant.

Name: Senior Helpers Orlando
Description:
Senior Helpers of Orlando provided care for its first client in 2008, following years of unsatisfactory service from three home-care companies Dale and Marian Gardner had hired to care for Marian’s mother. Experiences with those companies shaped their priorities as they set about creating a company committed to providing a level of service they’d never received. Some key commitments we make include:

1. We never send a stranger. In our experience, one of the most difficult aspects of being the client of a home care agency was having caregivers show up at our door without being properly introduced or prepared. Or in the case of having a substitute, not getting any advance notification of a change — then dealing with substitutes who were poorly prepared to provide appropriate care for Marian's mother's needs. With Senior Helpers, this will not happen. A proper introduction will be made. 

2. Caregivers are supervised employees, not independent contractors. We are not a referral service or “nurse registry,” where workers are assigned to cases, leaving families to sort through the fine points themselves — whether taxes get paid, whether background checks have been performed, whether they’re bonded and insured. We do all these things in advance, along with testing skills, verifying credentials, speaking with families they’ve worked with before. 

3. Nurse support is available 24/7. Few things are as traumatic as being rushed to a hospital on a stretcher, but when a caregiver cannot call a nurse for advice about how to deal with medical situations, the only option may be calling 911. Barring a life-threatening emergency, this should not be the first phone call a caregiver makes. Most private-duty home care companies offer little or no nurse support.

Name: Granny NANNIES Licensing Group, LLC
Description:
Granny NANNIES is an American franchise Brand system specializing in assisting families with home care services for seniors. Headquartered in Longwood, Florida, the company through its network of independently owned and operated franchises help nearly 5,000 families across 10 states. Granny NANNIES is an alternative to nursing homes, referring private duty home care aides for a wide range of conditions that may affect daily life. 

Granny NANNIES only refers Certified Nursing Assistants (CNAs) and Home Health Aides (HHAs) to provide care for loved ones whose family is located in distant states, those who desire special personal care for their loved ones and those who are no longer able to care for themselves. Granny NANNIES matches clients with private duty caregivers to provide care services in the home, hospital, assisted living facility or nursing home. 

Professional caregivers are available 24 hours a day, seven days a week, or as needed. Granny NANNIES works in conjunction with Medicare and does not compete with Hospice services. Most private insurance and workers compensation are accepted.

Granny NANNIES was founded in 1990 when Rob and Kirsten Hodgson needed senior home care for Rob’s aging grandmother, Esther Dowding, 87 at the time. Rob initially planned to hire a caregiver for Esther, but due to a lack of service, it fell through.

They could not find competent, caring and affordable assistance that would allow Rob’s grandmother to stay in her Winter Park, Florida home. To avoid placing Esther in an assisted living facility, Rob and Kirsten moved from New Hampshire to take care of her. 

Based on their own personal experience and to fill the void of senior home healthcare services in Central Florida, Rob and Kirsten started Granny NANNIES of North America. In doing so, they discovered that their focus should be on more than just home nursing care, as there was a lack of services available for others struggling with daily tasks.

Name: StellarCare NW LTD
Description:
StellarCare NW is a nurse led home care company looking to bridge the gap between health and social care by implementing a more clinical approach to its home care services.

Traditionally home care, also known as domiciliary care, provides care and support to people who live in their own home but require additional support with household tasks, personal care and other activities that enables people to maintain their independence and quality of life. Home care is largely seen as independent with an unskilled workforce. Providers of home care services are bound by regulators to uphold national minimum standards for home care however, the industry is often criticised for poor pay and lack of progression leading to large gaps in recruitment to fulfil the required provision of care.

Health Care on the other hand is the improvement of health via the prevention, diagnosis, treatment, and other physical and mental impairments in people. Health care consists of professional staff working across primary and secondary care is viewed very differently than home care despite the overlap in care provision when caring for someone at home.

From a home care perspective, it is the care workers that regularly see the clients and so, are best placed to report changes and spot signs of deterioration in their clients. StellarCare NW has adopted a nurse led approach and implemented a clinical team leader within its services to meet the changing clinical needs of clients at home. Using live reporting systems to ensure all concerns are raised and reviewed in real time, communications to health care professionals can be made and treatment implemented in short time frames which can prevent disease, reduced hospital admissions and associated costs. The nurse led approach within home care is an integrated model of working that has proved effective in improving client outcomes.

Artizane të Natyrës është një sipërmarrje që ka objektiv kryesor tju ofroj klientëve të saj vazhdimisht produkte të freskëta, natyrale dhe organike të prodhuara në vendin tonë nëmënyre artizanale. 
Është  një sipërmarrje e natyrës sociale, dhe synojmë:
*Të ndihmojmë biznesin e vogël familjar, vecanërisht zonjat nga krahina të ndryshme të Shqipërise, duke ju siguruar një mundësi pune individuale, mbeshtetje në menaxhimin e punës në zonat ku ato jetojnë dhe mbeshtetje në nxitjen e prodhimit tradicional karakteristik të zonës. 
Duke fuqizuar gratë ne fuqizojmë një familje
*Të krijojmë një traditë në fushën e produkteve kozmetike të vendit tonë dhe të promovohemi kudo në botë në këtë drejtim 
*Të nxisim evidentimin, njohjen dhe zhvillimin e produkteve tradicionale të vendit tonë. Të kontribojmë në nxitjen e një jetë të shëndetshme me produktet e vendit tonë

Name: Mobile Memory Enrichment, LLC.
Description:
Are you taking care of someone with memory loss and need respite?

We can help!

          Mobile Memory Enrichment is an in-home person-tailored life enrichment program. Our goal is to provide activities that create purpose and lessen behaviors, and depression with the aim of reducing memory loss progression.



How does it work? 

          We come to the home to best serve individuals. This is to allow the individual to feel more comfortable in their “safe space”. This avoids the overstimulation that may occur when an individual is taken from their home for an outing that requires socialization causing anxiety, nervousness, or agitation. Our goal is to provide activities where individuals can positively engage in activities more freely in a safe environment, free of excessive stimulus.


 
What are the benefits? 

Individual Activity Enjoyment
Caregiver and Family Respite
Individual Activity Evaluations
Giving Purpose and Self-worth
Apprising doctors, caregivers, and family of progress

We are a Medicaid-certified home care agency that provides skilled and non-skilled home health care services including In-Home Support Services (IHSS), private duty nursing, intermittent nurse visits, home health aides, and companionship services across the Denver Metro area. We accept Medicaid, private pay, and most private insurances. 

At Noor, our mission is to improve the lives of Coloradans and make an impact in the communities we serve. Below are some of the ways we have been achieving this:

- We pay the highest IHSS rates. This means if you designate a family member as your personal caregiver, we will pay them the highest rate than any other home care agency.

- We provide free application assistance.  If you need help applying for Medicaid or other medical benefits, our team is able and willing to assist you.

- 24/7 expert help. Registered Nurses provide on-call support 24 hours/day, 7 days/week.

- 5% of all our proceeds are used to provide emergency relief assistance to families locally and abroad. So when you choose Noor Home Care as your service agency, you automatically make a difference in someone's life!

L’AVAD intervient dans les domaines de l’assistance respiratoire, du traitement des apnées du sommeil, de l’insulinothérapie et de tout traitement par perfusion ou nutrition.

Dans ces domaines, l’AVAD exerce 2 métiers :

1.	La Prestation de Santé A Domicile (PSAD), faisant intervenir un personnel pluridisciplinaire : pharmacien, infirmier(e), diététicien(ne), technicien respiratoire… Nos équipes ayant notamment pour missions la coordination des soins, l’installation de dispositifs médicaux, la prévention, la formation, la surveillance…

Name: Somoc Healthtech Private Limited
Description:
About Us:
SOMOC, Specialist On Multiparamedics Operations and Care, is a pioneering organization founded by a dynamic team of healthcare professionals dedicated to revolutionizing the field. Our Co-Founders bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the forefront of multiparamedic care.

Somoc name history
SOMOC has an interesting origin, initially inspired by the name Pavman SOMO God from Vedas and later evolving into Specialist On Multiparamedics Operations with the addition of "C" for care due to name reservation constraints.
care was incorporated, resulting in the current name SOMOC.

Co-Founders:
1. Mr. Hrishikesh Brahmarudra:
An enthusiastic entrepreneur with a decade of experience, Mr. Brahmarudra is a visionary leader driving innovation in healthcare operations. His commitment to excellence shapes SOMOC's strategic direction.

2. Mr. Nikhil Barve:
With eight years of experience in the pathology lab sector, Mr. Barve brings a wealth of knowledge to SOMOC. His insight into diagnostics ensures a holistic approach to multiparamedic operations, enhancing precision in patient care.

3. Miss Ankita Sitafe:
A specialist in OT Management and Nursing care, Miss Sitafe plays a pivotal role in ensuring the highest standards of patient-centric care. Her expertise contributes to the seamless coordination of multiparamedic operations.

Vision:
Our vision at SOMOC is to lead the way in advancing the quality and efficiency of multiparamedic operations. Through innovation, excellence, and compassionate care, we envision a future where healthcare responses are seamlessly integrated, setting new standards for multiparamedic care.

Mission:
SOMOC's mission is to excel in orchestrating and optimizing multiparamedic operations with precision and compassion. We are committed to staying at the forefront of medical advancements, refining protocols, and fostering collaboration among healthcare professionals, by prioritizing training, innovation, and a patient-centered approach.

Name: A Homemade Plan Home Care
Description:
"We believe in improving the quality of life for seniors in our community. We believe that the preferred place for a senior to age is in their own home. We believe in caring and hard-working individuals with a passion for changing lives for the better."

A Homemade Plan, your locally owned and operated home care agency based in Maryland. Our mission is to provide personalized one-on-one care to seniors in the comfort of their own homes. Our team of qualified Caregivers offers a wide range of services including personal care, companionship, meal preparation, light housekeeping, transportation, medication management, and more. We understand that each patient has unique needs, which is why we offer free assessments and personalized care plans developed by Registered Nurses.

Our assessments and care plans are provided at the initial start of service and periodically to ensure that our patients receive the best possible care. We offer both hourly and live-in care services to accommodate different needs. Live-in care is ideal for patients who need 24/7 care and the presence of a caregiver in the home. If you’re interested in our live-in service, please visit our “Live-In Care” page on our website for more information.

At A Homemade Plan, we provide long-term ongoing care as well as short-term respite care to give family caregivers a much-needed break. We’re committed to being flexible and accommodating to meet the needs of the families we serve.

If you have any questions or would like to start in-home senior care services, please call us at (888) 610-2643 to speak with one of our friendly and knowledgeable office staff members. You can also visit our website to learn more about our services and fill out our online form to set up a face-to-face meeting. Rest assured that A Homemade Plan is licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

Thank you for considering A Homemade Plan for your Maryland home care needs.

Name: ResetSmile
Description:
Our mission is to expand access to the basic dignity of a confident smile for life
for the millions today’s dental market has left behind to suffer the consequences of missing teeth. Through proprietary technology, ResetSmile is the affordable way to replace missing teeth without going to the dentist. The standard industry approach to replace missing teeth is dental implants. Dental implants can cost up to $10K per tooth, requires invasive surgery and many visits to a dentists' office. It can take up to a year to replace teeth with implants.  

Our advanced custom manufacturing technology and at-home experience now makes it possible for you to get a dentist-approved partial denture customized for you and shipped directly to you at home for a fraction of the cost.

ResetSmile is a flexible, removable, tooth replacement device that lets you smile more and eat normally that no one can tell you're wearing.

Start smiling more and chewing food better with our truly dentist-grade, flexible, removable device - without metal dentures or implant surgery. Reset your smile.

At Home Instead Altrincham, Sale & Wythenshawe, we support people to live well at home, in ways that feel personal, respectful, and right for them.

Alongside our core services, we provide tailored support for younger people living with lifelong illness and adults with learning difficulties, with care built around individual needs, routines, and aspirations.
We believe good care is never rushed and never a one-size-fits-all. Our focus is always on quality, continuity, and building strong relationships – whether that’s with the people we support, their families, or the professionals we work alongside.
We work best with people who value trust, compassion, and doing things properly, and who see care as part of a wider community network that helps people remain independent, confident, and connected.
Our care is companionship-based, so Care Professionals can build trusted relationships with their clients. The service is highly personalised around the needs and wishes of each client (including the timing of visits) and can range from a simple chat over a cup of tea to support involving personal care, dementia care, and live-in care.
Our Care Professionals don’t wear uniforms, and each care visit lasts a minimum of one hour, giving plenty of time for care and support without feeling rushed.
We cover Altrincham, Hale, Bowden, Sale, Wythenshawe, and Northenden areas.

Every caregiver on our team is rigorously vetted, holding an enhanced DBS certificate and completing more than 40 hours of annual CQC-approved training. We maintain certifications in Emergency First Aid at Work, Safeguarding Adults, Medication Administration & Management, and Manual Handling & Safe Transfer Techniques. Our commitment to excellence means regular spot-checks, performance reviews, and continuous professional development, so you can trust that your loved one is supported by highly skilled, compassionate professionals.

At Everyday Care, we believe that true well-being encompasses physical health, emotional connection, and social engagement. That’s why our services extend beyond practical tasks to include meaningful companionship, light exercise, hobby facilitation, and transportation to appointments or social outings.
