A&K Blissful Homecare is a compassionate, client-centered home care agency based in Beverly Hills, California. We are dedicated to supporting seniors and adults with non-medical in-home services that promote comfort, independence, and peace of mind.

Our team is trained, background-checked, and committed to delivering personalized care tailored to each individual’s unique needs. Whether it’s personal care, companionship, or post-hospital support, we are here to serve with dignity, respect, and heart.

We accept long-term care insurance, VA benefits, and private pay, and we offer free in-home consultations to assess your needs.

Name: JointSync
Description:
JointSync: Empowering Your Joints, Enhancing Your Potential

JointSync is a comprehensive rehabilitation solution designed to overcome post-surgery recovery challenges. Our easy-to-use interface provides guided exercises, real-time progress tracking, and timely reminders—ensuring a seamless and effective rehabilitation journey.

We harness cutting-edge technology to transform rehabilitation through precise motion guidance and real-time muscle activity tracking, making recovery smarter, more personalized, and results-driven.

Why JointSync?
 Tailored Workout Routines – Designed to seamlessly fit into daily activities, ensuring natural and achievable rehabilitation.
 Real-Time Tracking & Feedback – Users can monitor their progress, set reminders, and stay motivated throughout their journey.
 Personalized Recovery Plans – Programs adapt to different recovery levels, from early-stage healing to advanced mobility training.
 Expert-Designed Exercises – Focused on key recovery aspects:

Improved Stability & Support – Strengthening muscles to reduce re-injury risk.
Increased Range of Motion – Enhancing flexibility for smoother movements.
Pain Reduction – Targeted exercises to ease discomfort and promote healing.
Preventing Muscle Atrophy – Keeping muscles active and preventing weakness.
Better Overall Functionality – Making daily activities easier and improving quality of life.
At JointSync, we are committed to empowering individuals with the right tools and support to take charge of their recovery. Join us in revolutionizing rehabilitation!

Name: Brightwood Health
Description:
Brightwood Health is redefining the future of in-home care by combining compassionate human connection with virtual support, helping individuals age at home with dignity, confidence, and grace.

Based in Arizona, we provide highly personalized in-home care services ranging from essential daily support to elevated concierge-level experiences. Whether a few hours a week or 24/7 assistance, every Brightwood care plan is custom-built around the client’s goals, lifestyle, and preferences.

What makes us different?
We combine expertly vetted Care Professionals, hospitality-inspired service, and our proprietary BrightAssist technology—a discreet, always-on virtual companion delivering real-time insights and proactive wellness alerts. Our personalized CarePro matching goes beyond clinical needs to align with each client’s energy, personality, and values—for support that truly feels like home.

For families seeking more, Brightwood Premier offers curated lifestyle support with a dedicated Care Concierge, chef-prepared meals, wellness programming, and coordination with private physicians, nutritionists, and trusted household staff.

We proudly support both private-pay and Medicaid clients, with deep expertise navigating Long-Term Care insurance, VA benefits, and community funding programs. Serving Greater Phoenix, Scottsdale, Tucson, and surrounding areas.

Brightwood is led by healthcare entrepreneurs who previously founded and led Veyo, one of the nation’s largest non-emergency medical transportation companies, culminating in a successful exit in 2022.

Name: AJR MEDICAL OCCITANIE
Description:
AJR médical est une entreprise régionale de prestations de santé à domicile qui a développé depuis une dizaine d’années son savoir-faire dans la prise en charge des patients au domicile dans les domaines de l'assistance respiratoire, la perfusion, la nutrition, l'insulinothérapie et du maintien à domicile.

Recruté sur la base d’une expérience avérée dans chacun des domaines précités, les employés ont la particularité de se connaître depuis plusieurs années et sont donc solidairement porteurs du projet de l’entreprise.

Visant la qualité plutôt que la quantité, l’efficacité plutôt que le rendement ou la cotation boursière, AJR Médical s’applique à mettre en œuvre, à son échelle, tous les moyens pour satisfaire en priorité les malades mais aussi tous les intervenants.

Cela se traduit concrètement par une approche humaine et chaleureuse du patient, une collaboration étroite avec les médecins prescripteurs et autres personnels de santé et la mise à disposition des matériels les plus modernes.
Convaincu de la nécessité d’informer en temps réel les prescripteurs de l’évolution et du suivi du traitement prescrit, AJR Médical dispose d’un accès prescripteurs sécurisé.

Nos valeurs et nos engagements se fondent sur le professionnalisme, l’éthique, l'expertise, la proximité qui encadrent notre action au quotidien dans nos rapports avec les patients et les professionnels de santé.

Soucieux d’asseoir notre réputation sur ces valeurs, nous ambitionnons à terme de capitaliser la confiance de ceux qui auront bien voulu croire au potentiel de notre équipe.

Name: Perfect Care Nursing
Description:
Perfect Care Nursing is a family-owned, private care provider offering 24-hour in-home services in and around South Fulton, Fayetteville, Newnan, Cobb, and Douglas Counties. We provide quality care for your loved ones and communicate with you throughout the process to ensure your peace of mind.

Our companions are certified nursing assistants, licensed practical nurses and registered nurses. We conduct in-house training and complete a thorough background check on all of our care givers, including drug screenings and reference checks. In short, we ensure that you can trust our team to provide best-in-class service to your loved one. We are active in the industry and we stay up-to-date on best practices and advances in care. We’re members of American Nurses Association, Georgia Association of Community Care Providers (GACCP) and American Veterans Care Connection.

Perfect Care Nursing is a family-owned and -operated company, founded in 2019 by Joanna Fuller-Crawford and inspired by her grandmother, Anna Waters. Anna was a self-made home healthcare nurse who went on to become a licensed practical nurse. Joanna learned the value of education and the value of providing care to those in need from her grandmother. Today, Perfect Care Nursing’s mission reflects those values.

Perfect Care Nursing provides a wide range of services that can be tailored to meet the unique needs of your family. Whether your loved one needs skilled nursing care or just assistance with light household chores, we can help. Whether you are looking for a long-term solution, or just someone to fill in for a fewdays, we can help.

We are taking new patients. 

We also are looking to grow our team – if you have the desire and skills to provide perfect care, please get in touch. 

Services Include: 
Skilled Nursing Care
Personal Care
Respite Care
Alzheimer’s & Dementia Care

Name: Direct Personal Care
Description:
Direct Personal Care is a licensed health care provider in the state of New York. We are a group of home care experts and one of New York's leading home care agencies. If you're seeking the greatest home care agency in your area, go no further than direct personal care.

The Consumer Directed Personal Assistant Program (CDPAP) is a self-directed home care program funded by New York Medicaid.




This program compensates trusted family and friends for providing you with care when and how you want it. Patients with CDPAP can hire and train their own personal assistants.

Name: Dignity Access Ltd
Description:
(Please also see https://www.linkedin.com/company/washpoddisabledbathroom/)
The WashPod range of modular temporary disabled wetrooms are designed, manufactured and installed by Dignity Access Ltd. There are 8 different sized models in the range that provide rapid bathing solutions that can be installed (and removed) in hours and are tailored to meet the needs of the individual. They are self-contained and don't require any adaptations and as they're modular, they are super speedy to install.

They can be bought or rented and qualify for disabled grant funding from Local Authorities.

* No need to wait for the house to be adapted or relocate to a new house
* Minimum disruption as negligible through-house traffic required – less stress
* Immediately start the road to recovery at home
* Cost effective alternative to care home/continued hospital stay
* Designed by care professionals
* 8 models and sizes (internal & external) to suit most spaces and needs
* ‘Plug and Play’ so require no adaptations as self-contained
* On-site in 2 – 6 weeks and installation in 1 – 3 days depending on model.

Name: Priority Care Alliance
Description:
Priority Care Alliance Group is a licensed provider of non-medical in-home care and home health services. Our mission is to deliver the highest standards of patient-centered care with an emphasis on safety, quality, and dignity for the individuals we serve.

We provide supportive non-medical care such as personal care assistance, companionship, meal preparation, and household support, as well as skilled home health services including nursing care, medication administration, chronic condition management, and specimen collection. By offering both levels of service, we create a seamless continuum of care that promotes independence while ensuring clinical needs are met.

Name: mSoluciona Burgos
Description:
mSoluciona Burgos es la empresa de referencia de ayuda a domicilio y cuidado de mayores en Burgos y alrededores. Formada por profesionales del sector, ofrece un servicio completo a sus clientes de ayuda a domicilio, cuidado de mayores y/o enfermos y asistencia en hospitales, además de servicios integrales para empresas.

Nuestro fin es poder cumplir con las exigencias de los usuarios que demandan los servicios de ayuda a domicilio en Burgos, satisfacer sus necesidades tanto en el cuidado de personas mayores, personas dependientes y enfermas a domicilio, incluso el cuidado de los más pequeños de la casa y la realización de aquellas tareas de limpieza del hogar.

Además, ofrecemos soluciones de limpieza y mantenimiento para empresas y comunidades de vecinos, abarcando un amplio abanico en este tipo de trabajos.

Tanto en los servicios de ayuda a domicilio como en los servicios a empresas, contamos con profesionales cualificados en el sector y con experiencia contrastada que se encargarán de cubrir las necesidades particulares de cada uno de nuestros clientes. Profesionales formados en el ámbito de la salud, enfermería, gerontología o auxiliares de clínica, trabajadores especializados en el cuidado de mayores y personas dependientes con titulación y amplia experiencia que se adaptan a sus necesidades y horarios.

Si hablamos de empresas, nuestros equipos los forman trabajadores de diferentes especialidades, ya sean carpinteros, personal de limpieza, jardineros, conserjes, electricistas… técnicos cualificados para realizar todo tipo de trabajos de especialización para su negocio.

En mSoluciona Burgos, tenemos las mejores soluciones de servicios para particulares y empresas.

Name: Visiting Angels Tampa, Tarpon Springs, Lutz, New Port Richey, Wesley Chapel & Westchase
Description: Visiting Angels is a Florida licensed Nurse Registry that provides a self-directed model of Senior Home Care. We refer experienced caregivers who can provide elderly residents in Tampa, Tarpon Springs, Lutz, New Port Richey, Westchase and surrounding areas the one-on-one essential personal care, love and assistance they need for a happier and healthier life, while still being able to remain in their own homes. You decide what services and level of care you desire and select your chosen referred caregivers from our Florida licensed Nurse Registry. You are totally in charge of what schedule and services you agree to with your caregiver. We take care of the administrative paperwork and leave you free to direct your loved one’s care. We pride ourselves on compassion and dignified service, to help make independent living a possibility despite the troubles that old-age brings. Clients repeatedly tell us that the professional, loving, independent caregivers we refer go above and beyond to make this a reality for your loved ones.

Name: MedicMe
Description:
A MedicMe é uma empresa brasileira comprometida com o cuidado, a proteção e o bem-estar das famílias, com foco especial em quem mais precisa: os idosos. Operamos 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana, oferecendo suporte imediato por meio de tecnologia avançada, atendimento humanizado e uma equipe dedicada.

Nosso principal diferencial está no modelo de atendimento contínuo e personalizado, inspirado no conceito do médico de família — aquele profissional que conhece o paciente profundamente, acompanha sua trajetória de saúde e entende suas necessidades de forma integral. Na MedicMe, buscamos oferecer esse mesmo olhar atento, com a segurança de um botão ao alcance das mãos.

Acreditamos que cuidar é mais do que socorrer em emergências: é estar presente, é prevenir, é orientar, é criar um ambiente onde idosos e suas famílias se sintam seguros, amparados e respeitados. Para isso, unimos tecnologia de ponta (como botões de emergência e smartwatches com sensores integrados) com uma central de atendimento preparada para lidar com situações delicadas com empatia e agilidade.

Nossa atuação também se estende ao acompanhamento de profissionais da saúde, clínicas e cuidadores, formando uma rede de apoio sólida e confiável, pronta para responder com eficiência e carinho sempre que necessário.

Name: Servaas Thuiszorg

Servaas Thuiszorg begrijpt hoe waardevol het voor cliënten is om zo lang mogelijk in hun vertrouwde woonomgeving te blijven, zonder daarbij in te binden op de kwaliteit van de benodigde zorg. De naam Servaas Thuiszorg is dan ook een ode aan de patroonheilige van Maastricht, Sint Servaas, die voor toewijding en dienstbaarheid staat.

Name: Islamic Home Care of America
Description:
What is Islamic Home Care?

Islamic home care is for seniors needing assistance living at home and prefer assistance with aspects of Muslim life that traditional home care agencies typically don’t offer, like daily prayers, wu'du, a halal diet, and more.

-Comprehensive Personal Home Care Assistance: Support with bathing, grooming, mobility, toileting, light housekeeping, and more to help clients continue to live comfortably at home.

-Prayer & Wudu Assistance: Assistance with daily prayers and ablution (wudu), helping clients maintain their religious lifestyle, regardless of their current mobility.

-Halal Meal Preparation and Dietary Support: Preparation and Dietary Support Halal Meal Preparation and Nutrition Support Preparing nutritious, halal-compliant meals based on each client’s dietary needs and health goals.

-Companionship and Emotional Support: Caregivers can reduce isolation and loneliness by spending additional time with clients after they assist clients with their daily needs.

-Safe Transportation Services: Transportation for Friday Jum'ah prayers, medical appointments, family visits, and community activities.

Name: سماعتي | Sammaty
Description:
في سماعتي نؤمن بأن الرعاية السمعية يجب أن تكون متاحة في أي وقت ومكان فلذلك صممنا منصة ذكية تسهّل الوصول للخدمة وتدعم الأخصائيين وترتقي بتجربة المستفيد وفق أعلى معايير الجودة والمهنية.

| سماعتي هو تطبيق سعودي يهدف إلى تمكين أخصائيي السمع من زيادة دخلهم وتقديم خدمات الرعاية السمعية بإحترافية خارج حدود العيادة من خلال ربطهم بالمستفيدين في مواقعهم بطريقة مرنة وموثوقة.


| الخدمات المقدمة :

- فحص سمع تشخيصي للحالات الجديدة والمراجعة باحدث الاجهزة. 
- الاستشارات والتوعية اللازمة حول ضرورة اقتناء السماعة الطبية المناسبة .
- برمجة السماعات الطبية الجديدة ، اعادة برمجة وضبط صوت لمن يملكون سماعات بالفعل.
- استلام وتسليم الاجهزة للصيانة واعادتها بعد الاصلاح والتاكد جودة الصوت.
- اخذ مقاسات طبعة الاذن لتجهيز القوالب وتصنيع السماعات الصغيرة .   

وذلك في المكان الذي يختاره العميل (في المنزل، العمل، المدرسة، إلخ)،  مما يوفر لهم الراحة والخصوصية . 

 فكرة التطبيق باختصار:
أخصائيون معتمدون يتم تسجيلهم في المنصة كمزودي خدمة بعد اجتياز برنامج  STP "الخاص بالتطبيق".
العملاء يقومون بطلب "خدمات سمعية متكاملة " بناءً على الموقع والوقت المناسب لهم .
التطبيق يُطابق الطلب مع الأخصائي الأنسب.
الخدمة تُقدَّم ميدانياً، بحقائب اسطول سماعتي المتنقلة "يوفرها التطبيق" .

لماذ الانضمام لاسطول “سماعتي”؟
1 حرية وطبيعة عمل جاذبة ومرنة :
	•	حدد جدول حالاتك بنفسك 
	•	اختر المناطق التي ترغب بالعمل فيها
	•	لا التزام ببصمة حضور او مقر ثابت

2 امكانية توفير ممرضة من الجنسية الفلبينية ترافق الاخصائية داخل منزل العميل ، وسائق بسيارة مجهرة بنظام تتبع ، وكاميرا مثبتة اضافة لشعار الشركة للانتظار بالخارج ، لزيادة الشعور بالامان والاريحية اثناء تقديم الخدمة ( اضافة للمساعدة بنقل الحقيبة ، استخراج الادوات اللازمة ، التعقيم ، الخلط وتجهيز اداة اخذ مقاس الطبعة وخلافه ( الرياض - جدة  ) 

3 دخلك بين يديك:
	•	احصل على دخل محفز  مقابل كل زيارة 
	•	امكانية فتح حالات يومية اكثر للاخصائي المتميز حسب تقييم العميل له. 

من هو عميل سماعتي ؟

هو كل فرد بحاجة لفحص سمع، أو برمجة سماعات، أو حتى الحصول على سماعة جديدة، 
لكن حالت ظروفه من وصوله إلى عيادة السمعيات.

Name: VITALI HEALTH
Description:
At Vitali Health, we are pioneering a new era in hypertension management by integrating technology, personalized lifestyle interventions, and artificial intelligence (AI) to provide effective, long-term solutions. With the growing burden of hypertension and its associated health risks, we recognize the need for a proactive, accessible, and cost-effective approach to care.

Hypertension is a leading risk factor for cardiovascular diseases, yet traditional management relies heavily on medication rather than addressing underlying lifestyle factors. At Vitali Health, we aim to bridge this gap by offering a digital-first, lifestyle-based approach that empowers individuals to take control of their health. Our platform leverages AI-driven recommendations, real-time health tracking, and expert consultations to provide personalized solutions tailored to each user’s unique needs.

Through our mobile application, users receive data-driven insights on nutrition, exercise, mental well-being, and medication adherence, helping them make informed decisions about their health. Our approach not only improves patient outcomes but also reduces long-term healthcare costs by promoting preventive care rather than reactive treatment.

Artificial intelligence is revolutionizing healthcare, and at Vitali Health, we are harnessing its power to create a smarter, more efficient approach to managing chronic conditions like hypertension. Our AI-driven system analyzes user data from wearable devices, lifestyle habits, and health records to provide personalized recommendations in real-time.

Our work aligns with the global push for digital health solutions, providing affordable, accessible, and scalable care for hypertension and other chronic conditions, benefiting individuals. As we continue to expand and innovate, we invite healthcare providers, insurers, and individuals to join us in redefining the future of hypertension management. 

Together, we can transform health—one heartbeat at a time.

Name: Le temps de vivre association
Description:
Basée à Saint-Loubès, Le Temps de Vivre est une association loi 1901 à but non lucratif, créée en mai 1996 elle est autorisée et habilitée à l'aide sociale par le Conseil Général de la Gironde (33).

Mandataire et prestataire de services à domicile elle a obtenu un agrément simple et qualité. 

Depuis 2001, le Service de Soins Infirmiers A Domicile prend en charge 60 patients de plus de 60 ans dans leurs actes d'hygiène quotidiens. En 2019, 6 places supplémentaires pour les personnes en situation de handicap sont autorisés  par l'ARS.

Depuis 2018, le Temps de Vivre s'inscrit dans l'expérimentation SPASAD et devient un Service Polyvalent d'Aide et de Soins A Domicile autorisé par le Conseil Départemental et l'Agence Régionale de Santé.

Nous sommes une association qui a pour objet de donner aux personnes actives, les moyens de mieux gérer leurs tâches au domicile ou la garde de leurs enfants.

Pour les personnes âgées et (ou) dépendantes et (ou) en situation de handicap, de les aider à réaliser leur choix de maintien à domicile dans la limite de leur sécurité.

Nous souhaitons " promouvoir la santé des personnes et les accompagner au mieux dans leurs parcours de vie à domicile, en leur apportant l'aide d'une équipe professionnelle pluridisciplinaire qui prendra en compte leur personnalité dans ses composantes psychologiques, sociales et culturelles".

Name: Melalogic
Description:
Picture this: You notice a weird bump on your skin, so you do a quick Google search to find out what’s going on.

You look through the images Google suggests, trying to figure out what the bump is. But there’s a problem – nobody in the pictures looks like you and nobody’s skin looks like yours.

And that’s precisely why I created Melalogic – so we can have viable skincare solutions for us (and by us).

Melalogic is a web app that harnesses the power of AI to give our community a source of skin health information from trusted professionals who look like us.

With this app, you gain instant access to key info about a host of skincare issues, including acne, eczema, razor bumps, keloids, sun damage, alopecia and various skin cancers.

As a Melalogic user, you’ll also help build the Black Skin Health AI Dataset while getting your skincare questions answered.

When you upload a photo of your skin issue, you’ll receive instant feedback about what your issue may be, as well as suggestions on how to treat it. 

PLUS, your photo will help build our AI dataset, which strengthens our AI and fuels our AI-powered dermatology research and pre-diagnoses, so you get an even better user experience.

Ready to better understand how to treat and maintain your wonderfully melanated skin?

We got you! Hit the link below to become a Melalogic user.

Name: Home Instead Thuisservice Kennemerland
Description:
Home Instead Thuisservice is thuiszorg, maar dan anders. Bij ons ligt de nadruk op persoonlijke aandacht en betekenisvolle ondersteuning, zowel praktisch als emotioneel. Met aandacht én tijd voor senioren die zo lang mogelijk thuis willen blijven wonen. Zorg kan beter, dat bewijst Home Instead elke dag door ondersteuning af te stemmen op de behoeften van senioren en in te spelen op de ontwikkelingen in de langdurige zorg. Bij Home Instead gaat welzijn voor zorg en staat het verhogen van de kwaliteit van leven voorop.
Home Instead biedt Metgezelschap/Individuele begeleiding, ondersteuning In en Om huis en Persoonlijke verzorging. U bepaalt zelf wanneer en welke diensten worden afgenomen en hoe lang deze ondersteuning nodig is. Wij zijn inzetbaar met een zorgindicatie in zorg in natura of PGB via een Wlz of Wmo indicatie. Daarnaast zijn we ook op particuliere basis inzetbaar.
De medewerkers van Home Instead, onze CAREGivers, bouwen met hun klanten een relatie op die net zo persoonlijk kan zijn als met familieleden of vrienden. Tegelijkertijd leveren CAREGivers ondersteuning die voldoen aan professionele eisen. Onze CAREGivers zijn namelijk geselecteerd en getraind om de dienstverlening ook in complexe situaties te bieden zoals specifieke zorg bij senioren met dementie. De CAREGivers van Home Instead worden tevens ondersteund door een professioneel supportteam en de kwaliteit in het geheel van de dienstverlening wordt doorlopend getoetst. We voeren jaarlijkse een klant- en medewerkerstevredenheidsonderzoek uit onder onze klanten, mantelzorgers en CAREGivers. Zo waarderen klanten en mantelzorgers ons met een 8.8 en beveelt 98% onze organisatie aan bij anderen.
De CAREGivers ondersteunen dagelijks vanuit onze kernwaarden: geef vertrouwen, maak het verschil, vanuit het hart.
Thuiszorg, maar dan anders!

Landelijk netwerk
Home Instead Thuisservice is een landelijke organisatie en biedt met haar dienstverlening niet medische ondersteuning en persoonlijke zorg thuis.

Somos a RDC Laserterapia, liderada pelas enfermeiras Rita Fiuza e Serlene Podlasinski.

Com mais de duas décadas de experiência consolidada na Enfermagem e especialização em Laserterapia (incluindo Oncologia), oferecemos um atendimento verdadeiramente diferenciado, pautado na ciência e no cuidado humanizado.

O Poder da Laserterapia: Utilizamos tecnologias avançadas, como o laser de baixa potência e a técnica ILIB, para:

- Acelerar a regeneração celular.

- Promover o alívio da dor.

Áreas de Atuação: Nossa expertise abrange o tratamento de diversas patologias, focando em:

- Dores Crônicas: Fibromialgia, artrites e dores articulares.

- Pós-operatório: Redução de inchaço e aceleração da cicatrização.

- Saúde da Mulher: Mastite, fissuras mamárias e pós-parto.

- Oncologia: Prevenção e tratamento de mucosite oral.

- Feridas Crônicas: Úlceras e lesões de difícil cicatrização.

- Neuro e Pediatria: Suporte em diversas condições.

Nosso Compromisso é Duplo: Garantir a excelência técnica da laserterapia com a sensibilidade e o olhar holístico que só a experiência na Enfermagem pode oferecer.
Location: São José dos Campos, SÃO PAULO

Name: CareBynd
Description:
CareBynd is a personal health record (PHR) and care management company that empowers you and your family with your health data and tools to manage health and wellness. 
CareBynd consolidates all your health and medical information in one place, you can access all your historical health events and reports anywhere. Organize and manage your healthcare and wellness data to make better health decisions.
CareBynd also offers health and wellness resources such as symptom checker, online triage, online doctor consults and other resources to care for health and wellness needs empowering you to be actively involved and proactively take charge of your family's healthcare care needs. 
CareBynd application (both web and mobile based) is a affordable subscription-based service for families to maintain your health history and easy access to health and wellness resources. We are set up only to serve the healthcare consumer with no intent to sell your health data with any other stakeholders such as insurance companies, pharmaceutical manufacturers, large pharmacy groups or health systems. Our affordable subscription costs for the consumers are primarily driven by this business structure, to protect your data and to empower you to take charge of the healthcare landscape.
Our vision is to improve population health outcomes for all through active consumer involvement in their health and wellness. We believe any population is made up of individuals and families, to affect a population we will need to enable each individual and family first. 
Our single mission is to empower healthcare consumers to be actively engaged in your health decisions.

Name: Balsam

At Balsam, we are more than just an organization - we are a beacon of hope and support for individuals with intellectual and physical disabilities, and mental illness. Just like the balsam tree, we provide a nurturing environment where individuals can thrive and flourish.

At the heart of Balsam lies a deep-rooted philosophy centered on holistic care and respect for each individual we serve. We’re here to change the way people think about physiotherapy - from something reactive to something essential.

Name: We Love To Care
Description:
We Love To Care’s mission is to provide the highest level of care services that are anchored in kindness, where every individual that crosses our path is treated with dignity and respect.

Offering a Friendly Face:
Providing peace of mind, knowing that your loved one is engaging in meaningful conversation and enjoying the benefits of healthy social interaction. That comforting hand and smiling face can help loved ones enjoy a better quality of life, stay mentally active and not feeling lonely or isolated. Looking forward to daily activities that bring them joy and happiness.

Providing a Healthy Home:
Housekeeping duties can be light our heavy depending on your family situation. The most important part is maintaining a healthy home. Yes, having clean clothes for loved ones is important and keeping the kitchen and bathroom clean and sanitary are also very important. In truth it is also all the little things that can make a big difference. You may think of it as home-making and what usually brings the most joy to a loved one in care.

We've Got you!
Just knowing that the little things are getting taken care of, brings peace of mind to families. Grocery shopping of course is a priority to ensure that our loved ones are eating appropriately. They may like to select some of their own favorite foods and enjoy the experience even more. Picking up prescriptions is very important to ensure continuity of their health regime and personal wellbeing.

Our Services:
 On-Demand Ambulance Booking – Access all types of ambulances, including ICU, ACLS, and basic life support, with real-time tracking.

 Medicine Delivery – Get essential medicines delivered at your doorstep, ensuring timely access to healthcare.

Our mission is to build a seamless emergency response ecosystem where healthcare is accessible to everyone, anytime, anywhere. With technology-driven solutions and a verified network of healthcare providers, we ensure rapid, reliable, and life-saving services for those in need.

Description:

Em um momento de tanta vulnerabilidade, nos propomos a entregar uma assistência domiciliar onde as famílias possam ser atendidas com atenção e cuidados necessários, com excelência técnico-científica, humanização, compaixão, empatia e dignidade.

Oferecemos serviços de administração de medicação (endovenosa ou intramuscular), curativos, monitoramento e atendimento médico e de enfermagem, fisioterapia, nutricionista, psicologia, terapia ocupacional, dentre outros serviços de saúde. Além disso, trabalhamos com internação domiciliar, que significa a presença de um técnico de enfermagem no domicílio por 12 ou 24 horas por dia, com um maior aparato médico hospitalar de maior complexidade (ex: ventilador mecânico), além de dispositivos médicos como traqueostomia, gastrostomia.

O nosso time é especialista em cuidar de quem você ama, e é por isso que seguimos acreditando que podemos revolucionar a área da saúde por meio do cuidado domiciliar!

Our integrated approach creates a compounding loop:

→ Upskill nurses with real-world training
→ Match them to verified care needs using tech
→ Deliver personalized, affordable homecare that families trust

We're solving India’s most urgent healthcare gaps:

A massive nursing shortage

Overburdened hospitals

Zero structure for post-discharge care

And a complete lack of trust in homecare providers

Vitality is not just a platform ; it’s infrastructure.
We're building the care layer that India has long needed but never had.

 We train it. We deliver it. We rebuild trust.

Aujourd’hui en pleine expansion, Hygie Médical étend son réseau et renforce sa présence à travers la France, témoignant d’un développement dynamique et prometteur.  

Travailler chez Hygie Médical, c’est rejoindre une entreprise à dimension humaine, où l’écoute et la collaboration sont au cœur des priorités. L’objectif commun est de fournir des services de santé de haute qualité, alliant innovation et personnalisation, pour répondre aux attentes des patients et des acteurs du monde médical.

Our mission is to assist individuals in maintaining their independence while ensuring their safety, comfort, and well-being.

Our Comprehensive Services

We understand that each person's needs are unique, which is why we offer a wide range of personalized home care services tailored to meet the specific requirements of our clients. Here are some of the services we provide:

1. Safety/Fall Protection: Our caregivers are trained to create a safe living environment to prevent accidents and ensure our clients' well-being.

2. Companionship: Loneliness and isolation can impact mental and emotional health. Our caregivers offer companionship and social interaction to brighten our clients' days.

3. Incontinence Care: Our trained caregivers handle incontinence care with respect and dignity.

4. Medication Reminders: We ensure medications are taken on time, helping to manage our clients' health effectively.

5. Respite/Relief for Families: We offer respite care to provide family caregivers with much-needed breaks, reducing burnout and stress.

6. Toileting: Our compassionate caregivers assist with toileting needs, maintaining hygiene and comfort.

At Assisting Hands South Jacksonville, we take pride in our commitment to excellence in home care. Our team of dedicated caregivers is not just skilled professionals but also compassionate individuals who genuinely care about the well-being of our clients. We work closely with families to create a care plan that suits their loved one's needs, providing peace of mind and support.

Choose Assisting Hands South Jacksonville for exceptional home care services that prioritize dignity, independence, and the highest quality of life for your loved ones. Contact us today to learn more about how we can assist you and your family.

Physiotherapy: We offer tailored physiotherapy sessions aimed at improving mobility, managing pain, and aiding recovery post-injury or surgery.

Pediatric Care: Our trained caregivers ensure the safety and well-being of children, providing parents with peace of mind.

Elderly Care: Our comprehensive services for seniors include assistance with daily activities, health monitoring, and emotional support to promote a dignified life.

Our Team

Our team comprises healthcare professionals licensed and certified by the Dubai Health Authority (DHA), ensuring adherence to the highest standards of care. We are committed to continuous training and development to stay abreast of the latest healthcare practices.

Our Commitment

At Care First Home Health Care Centre, we prioritize patient satisfaction and quality care. We work closely with patients and their families to develop individualized care plans that meet their unique needs.

We are Sponsors for both the IG Wealth Management Alzheimer's Walk and the ALS Society Walk to End ALS. Recently we teamed up with the Cancer Society of MB to be a sponsor the "Run for the Cure".  The Home Instead Network has also partnered with HFC (formerly known as Hilarity for Charity) to award home care grants to cover the cost of in-home care by a Home Instead Care Professional who has received specialized training in Alzheimer care.

Nuestros clientes valoran especialmente nuestra cercanía, confianza y dedicación, destacando la tranquilidad y seguridad que ofrecemos día a día. Adaptamos cada servicio a las necesidades específicas de cada familia, porque cada hogar es único. 

En Asistenzia, nuestros cuidadores son el corazón de la empresa. Seleccionamos y formamos a nuestros profesionales para ofrecer atención de calidad, promoviendo empleos estables y dignos, con formación continua y apoyo constante. 

Además, apostamos por la innovación con propósito, utilizando tecnología para optimizar procesos y mejorar la experiencia de cuidadores y familias, sin perder nunca el toque humano que nos caracteriza. 

En Asistenzia, nuestro objetivo es claro: cuidar con respeto, confianza y profesionalidad, liderando el sector de ayuda a domicilio en España.

Name: Chajinel Home Care Services
Description:
Chajinel Home Care Services is one of the very few Latino owned Home care organizations in California. 
Chajinel Home care services was founded in 2014, it is 100% female owned, latino owned, and inmigrant owned. This of course has represented a huge load of challenges for our founder, and despite that, Chajinel is now consolidated as a high quality Home care organization. 

Chajinel focuses not only on consistency, quality of care and companionship, but also into training individuals into a new more comprenhensive and integrative type of care for the aging adult. To fulfill this purpose, Chajinel home care services has created its own inovative training in profesional geriatric companionship. 

Chajinel currently serves our veterans, and the county of San Mateo directly. This is really important for Chajinel, because we believe we should honor a serve at every level of our community, specially to those who once served us. 

Chajinel's aims to create new generations of geriatric providers, who have the strength, the tools, and the training necesary to walk besides an aging adult in every aspect from their lives, from losses, physical challenges, and cognitive complications, to transition, and end of life. 

More than home care we proudly offer "conscious home care".

Currently serving San Francisco, San Mateo, Santa Clara and Marin County.

Name: City Care Southwest

Name: Ignis Care
Description:
Ignis Care is a care navigation and stabilisation service supporting people at the most critical point in their care journey.

We work with individuals leaving hospital or experiencing sudden decline to stabilise care, correct wrong pathways, and put the right live-in support in place from the outset.

IgnisCare specialises in:
- Re-enablement after discharge
- Preventing premature long-term care
- Correcting care decisions made under pressure

We provide live-in care only.

We do not offer visiting or time-and-task domiciliary care.

Our approach is clinically anchored and nurse-led, with decisions framed around safety, stability, prevention, and long-term outcomes.

IgnisCare does not sell care hours.

We help families understand what should happen next and guide them to the right care decision first time.

Name: Biotrax
Illawarra Shoalhaven Nursing Care
Description:
Illawarra Shoalhaven Nursing Care – is nurse owned and run, founded in 2023, our founder and director saw a massive need for great quality nursing care across the Illawarra and Shoalhaven regions.
Our Mission is to ensure the people we care for are provide with great a quality of care, holistically tailored to our clients, ensuring privacy and dignity is maintained and responding to the needs of our clients in a caring, sympathetic, and thoughtful way.
 
We provide in-home nursing services across the Illawarra and Shoalhaven regions, stretching as far north as Thirroul and as far south as Sanctuary Point.
Our Registered Nurses are highly experienced and have a combination of 80+ Years of experience within the flied.
We offer all types of nursing services, including but not limited to; All Nursing Assessments (including continence assessments), acute or chronic wound management, Catheter Care and Changes, PEG Care and Changes, Tracheostomy Care and Changes, In-home palliative or end of life care.
And this is just listing a few.
 
We also offer Support Workers services within the Illawarra Region.
We have highly trained Support workers on board, able to assist with personal care, domestic assistance, community access/participation and any activities of daily living that you may require.
Our support workers are again highly experienced and follow our missions to provide the best care possible to the clients we service.

All our in-home services are a minimum of 1-hour service (+/- travel), if it takes longer, they are only charged for the time spent with them – no hidden cost or fees.
 
Our Director is also a Nurse Educator, offering training and educator around all high intensity support for support worker and registered nurses to ensure they are up to date with the skills needed to be able to provide the best care for your company, services and clients.

Name: SW Domiciliary Care
Description:
Welcome to SW Domiciliary Care, a premier provider of domiciliary home care services in the UK, deeply committed to the ethos of Support & Wellbeing. 

Located in the heart of Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, we specialise in enhancing the lives of our community members through compassionate, bespoke care.

Our approach to domiciliary care stands out for its personalised attention to each client, ensuring we cater to their unique needs with the utmost professionalism. 

Our team comprises highly trained caregivers, nurses, and support staff, all dedicated to maintaining exceptional standards of care, promoting independence, and respecting the dignity of those we assist.

At SW Domiciliary Care, we foster a nurturing and supportive environment, not only for our clients but for our employees as well. 

We offer a myriad of career paths within the care sector, including caregiving roles, administrative, and managerial positions, all supported by thorough training and professional development opportunities. 

Our staff, the cornerstone of our service, are valued and empowered to grow in their roles.

We pride ourselves on being a key player in the community care landscape, constantly adapting to meet the changing needs of those we serve. 

Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay informed about our latest home care services, career opportunities, and our dedication to enhancing the quality of life for individuals and families across Cheltenham, Gloucester and the Gloucestershire region.

Follow SW Domiciliary Care for insights into the evolving world of domiciliary home care in the UK, where our actions are always aligned with our core values of support and wellbeing.

Name: TGH Home Care powered by VNA of Florida
Description:
TGH Home Care powered by VNA of Florida offers both in-home personal care and nursing services, including home health aides, skilled nursing, rehabilitation, chronic disease management, medical social services and more.

VNA of Florida has been providing home health services to Floridians since 1976, with care delivered to Tampa General patients and the surrounding communities for 26 years.  VNA of Florida has a deep understanding of the diverse and complex needs that patients of a Level I Trauma Center may have. VNA of Florida's long-standing expertise and mission to serve all patients with quality home health care align perfectly with Tampa General Hospital’s commitment to providing world-class care.  VNA of Florida promises to deliver the highest level of care and believe that our partnership will be the catalyst that creates a full circle of excellence for patients needing in-home support for their recovery.

A patient’s return to the comfort of their home begins at the hospital, where a TGH Home Care powered by VNA of Florida nurse meets with the patient and their family to learn about their home setting and needs for care.  The nurse will directly access important information to make the patient’s return home an easier process with all the services and equipment needed for recuperation.

With electronic medical record integration, patients will receive the benefit of continuous care coordination as they work towards regaining their independence, with caregiver and family support at home. This new TGH service also offers patients access to nurse navigators who can provide ongoing support as patients progress and return to the community. TGH Home Care powered by VNA of Florida services are available for patients in the community as well.

Name: pHera
Description:
At pHera, we are reimagining vaginal health care. 

We are replacing outdated vaginal pH tests that don't consider the diversity of women's bodies with the first ultra-precise, personalised vaginal pH test that delivers lab-grade pH measurements to women at home, doctors and medical researchers.

Our mission?

For Women:
To end the era of guesswork by putting lab-grade clarity and control in the palm of your hands.

For Doctors:
To bring precision diagnostics to the point of care for faster and better health outcomes for all patients.

For Researchers:
To build the world’s most representative vaginal pH dataset and provide good-quality data for women's health research.

Our vision?

To bring vaginal pH testing to the digital era with precision and personalized diagnostics. 
We envision a world where accessible, research-backed, digital tools empower the health journey of every woman*. Our vision fuels our commitment to rigorous science and inclusivity. We want to drive personalised and inclusive care, where no woman is overlooked, misdiagnosed, or left behind.

Stay tuned!

Description:
At Bluestar Care & Support, we are dedicated to providing compassionate and high-quality home care services to individuals in need. Our services cover a wide range of needs, including personal care, companionship, medication management, and assistance with activities of daily living. Whether our clients require short-term support during recovery or long-term care due to aging or chronic conditions, we tailor our services to meet their unique requirements.

What sets us apart is our commitment to building meaningful relationships with our clients and their families. We understand the importance of trust and open communication, and we work closely with individuals and their loved ones to develop personalized care plans that address their specific goals and preferences.

Our team consists of experienced caregivers who are not only skilled in their work but also genuinely caring and compassionate. We carefully select and train our staff to ensure they are equipped to handle a variety of care needs with professionalism, empathy, and respect.

As a home care company, we prioritize the safety and comfort of our clients. We adhere to strict quality standards and implement rigorous protocols to maintain a secure and nurturing environment in the homes we serve. We also foster a culture of continuous improvement, regularly evaluating our services and seeking feedback to enhance the care experience we provide.

We collaborate with healthcare professionals, care coordinators, and community organizations to offer comprehensive support to our clients. By working in partnership, we strive to deliver holistic care that addresses the physical, emotional, and social needs of those under our care.

Name: Carefully App
Description:
CareFully | Compassionate Home Healthcare for Tamil Families, Worldwide
 Trusted by NRIs |  Powered by Nurses |  Enabled by Technology

CareFully is a tech-enabled home healthcare platform that helps Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) provide professional, reliable, and culturally sensitive nursing care for their loved ones in Tamil Nadu, India.

Our services connect families abroad with certified home nurses (GDA, ANM, GNM, BSc) who are trained, verified, and experienced in clinical or home-based care. With real-time updates through our app, families can stay connected and informed—no matter the distance.

Our Core Offerings
 Certified part-time & full-time nurses
 App-based real-time vitals & care updates
 Transparent pricing – no hidden commissions
 Online training & certification by Tamil Nadu Apex Skill Development Centre
 Special support for elderly care, chronic conditions, and post-hospital recovery

Now Expanding to the Middle East and other geographies!

We Partner With

Let’s work together to bring care, clarity, and connection to eldercare.

انشأنا هوم ميد كواحدة من الشركات السعودية المختصة بالرعاية الطبية المنزلية ولتكون متميزة بخدماتها الرائدة والمميزة في هذا المجال ولتصحح جميع المفاهيم المعروفة عن الرعاية المنزلية الطبية التقليدية لتتعدى آفاق مخيلتنا وتصبح شاملة لجميع الفئات المجتمعية العمرية ، ولتكون فوق اطار منافسة المراكز الطبية الاخرى ، كل خدماتنا تقدم عن طريق فريق عمل اختصاصي ومجهز لتقديم ارقى الخدمات العلاجية وبأفضل المهارات و المعدات الطبية سواء كانت اجهزة او مواد .

Name: My Rehab Team
Description:
My Rehab Team is a multi-professional team dedicated to providing highest quality rehabilitation for neurological, complex injuries and other conditions. 

We have a passionate and positive group of health professionals to assist our clients to achieve their goals through physiotherapy, occupational therapy, speech pathology, dietetics, podiatry, exercise physiology, psychology, therapy assistant, and massage therapy. We also work in partnership with a local medical centre. Our service is designed to be delivered in a context that is most relevant to our clients. Therefore, we can come to the home, go to a local gym, sit in a neighbourhood cafe, at a clinic room, etc. Moreover, we are a multi-cultural and multi-lingual team that is able to respect and accommodate for cultural and language factors and optimise rehabilitation effectiveness.

Our service model is based upon three pillars: excellence, team, and community.  We aim to deliver an excellent quality of service.  Each team member is valued and we work collaboratively with each other.  We believe in the importance of giving back to the community.

With intuitive tools for diagnosis, prescription generation, and patient management, we make healthcare more accessible, efficient, and patient-focused.

Name: Bariss Salud
Description:
Enfrentamos el desafío de generar servicios de atención domiciliaria clínica, cuidados paliativos y de rehabilitación, de forma ágil, eficiente y organizada.

Contamos con un equipo de profesionales que conjugan excelencia formativa, calidez humana y conocimiento de los procesos adecuados para mejorar la calidad de vida del paciente y su entorno afectivo, como eje de la modalidad.

Nuestro objetivo es proveer cuidados de salud integral al paciente, ofreciendo la posibilidad de contar con la asistencia de un equipo multidisciplinario en domicilio, con un nivel de efectividad equivalente al que podría obtener en una institución de salud.

La propuesta de abordaje está basada en la reafirmación de los derechos del paciente y sus familiares, acompañando sus procesos clínicos, psico-sociales y asistenciales y adaptándonos a las necesidades personales de cada uno de ellos y sus familias. 

Ofrecemos planes integrados e integrales, encontrándonos en condiciones de ofrecer en forma personalizada servicios a pacientes jóvenes, adultos y mayores, con patologías que merezcan atención de baja, mediana y alta complejidad. Organizamos equipos de trabajo en todo el país.

Entendemos a la mejora continua desde el punto de vista de nuestros clientes como nuestra forma de lograr su satisfacción, y sólo es posible mediante servicios calificados, así como la presencia de la calidad total en la gestión y en la planificación.

Name: Ashmi Health
Description:
Every pregnancy journey is unique, and when you're managing gestational diabetes or hypertension, it can feel overwhelming. We understand the worry that comes with wanting to do everything right for your baby while taking care of yourself. That's why we created Ashmi Health—to walk alongside you during this precious time with personalized support that fits your life.

We believe you deserve more than generic advice. Our platform creates customized meal plans just for you, helping you understand exactly how different foods affect your glucose levels. No more guessing or feeling anxious about every meal. Instead, you'll have clear guidance tailored to your body's needs and your baby's health.

Our team of maternal health specialists understands that pregnancy with gestational diabetes or hypertension brings unique challenges. We're here to provide the education you need, when you need it, in a way that makes sense for your situation. Whether it's understanding your latest test results or planning meals that work for your family, we're here to support you every step of the way.

What makes us different is our commitment to you as an individual. Your care plan is tailored specifically to your health profile, lifestyle, and concerns. We use technology not to replace the human touch, but to make personalized care accessible whenever you need it—day or night.

Your pregnancy journey deserves thoughtful, personalized care. Follow us to discover how we can support you through this important time with guidance that's made just for you.

Name: Vivexa Health
Description:
At VIVEXA, we've created a smart and privacy-first solution that empowers organizations to see the health status of their workforce in real time—without accessing any personal or medical data.


VIVEXA offers an AI-powered remote health monitoring platform tailored for organizations. Employees use  smart devices (like BP monitors, smart scales, and oximeters) at home or in the workplace. 

Our system collects real-time health signals and applies proprietary AI algorithms to:

Predict early risks of cardiovascular disease, and hypertension


Generate personalized alerts for users to take preventive action


Provide anonymized dashboards to HR for organization-wide wellness insights

We don’t just collect data — we interpret it with AI to prevent costly health events before they occur.
 Our algorithms are trained on clinical datasets and refined to detect early signs of chronic cardiovascular & hypertension risks up to 10 years in advance

Name: Tucson Senior Services
Description:
Tucson Senior Services (TSS) offers unique, affordable services that deliver individual care and partnership support through concierge advocacy for you or your aging loved one. Our services combine personal engagement and skilled training to improve the mental, emotional, and physical well-being of our clients.

What sets TSS apart is that we provide peace of mind with individualized services to meet your specific care needs. We have intentionally designed our small-scale business to offer services to a limited number of customers so we can truly prioritize individual care for each client.

As a non-medical concierge service, Tucson Senior Services strives to help our clients maintain their independence and age in place as long as possible.
We also want to support seniors living in assisted care facilities to maintain their independence as well. Adults living with developmental disabilities and their caregivers may also benefit from our concierge services.

Staffing at appropriate levels has never been more difficult so attracting and retaining the best caregivers is imperative. Assisted living and senior care facilities require properly trained staff to meet healthcare regulations while providing quality care for residents. That’s where Tucson Senior Services consulting services come in! We provide consulting services for improving the care of residents in assisted living and senior care facilities.

The founders of Tucson Senior Care have more than 25 years of caregiver and training experience in Southern Arizona. With an Assisted Living Manager Certification through the Arizona Nursing Care Institution Administrators and Assisted Living Facility Managers (NCIA) board and a background leading some of the largest, most exclusive care facilities in Arizona, the leadership of TSS offers professional, real-world experience.

Contact Tucson Senior Services to learn how we can help you or your loved one remain independent whether at home or in assisted living.

We invite healthcare providers, leaders, influencers, and investors who are passionate about making a difference in women's health to join us on this journey. Your support will help us expand our reach and continue to innovate in contraception care.

Description:
At GreenLeaf Homes, we offer safe, nurturing supported accommodation for young women aged 16 to 21. Many of the young people we work with have experienced trauma, abuse, or systemic challenges like homelessness and barriers to healthcare.

Our support is trauma-informed, gender-responsive, and built around each young woman’s unique journey. We understand the impact of gender-based violence, exploitation, and inequality, and ensure our team is trained to respond with sensitivity, care, and respect.

We work in close partnership with local Violence Against Women and Girls (VAWG) services, mental health professionals, and women’s organisations to provide joined-up, holistic care. Whether a young woman needs counselling, advocacy, substance misuse support, or practical help, we create clear pathways to the right services at the right time.

Through personalised keywork, life skills development, and empowering activities, we help young women regain confidence, build independence, and move forward with strength and purpose.

Name: Autonomic Health
Description:
Autonomic Health is building the nervous-system layer of modern healthcare - unlocking real-time insight from the autonomic nervous system (ANS), the body's operating system that regulates stress, recovery, metabolism, and systemic health.

We're building CloudANS, the world’s first cloud-based autonomic intelligence platform that transforms the global wearable ecosystem into continuous autonomic monitors by combining:

1. A patent-pending ANS measurement engine that separates sympathetic and parasympathetic activity from wearable heartbeat data - far beyond the limits of HRV.

2. A cloud-based ANS diagnostic engine that follows the validated autonomic protocol used across 1M+ patients and 200+ studies over the last 20 years.

3. CAJAL - the first AI model for the nervous system, trained on the world’s largest FDA-grade autonomic dataset to interpret patterns, classify dysautonomia, and predict disease onset.

4. A Clinical Decision Support (CDS) system, which gives clinicians autonomic imbalance signatures, at-risk detection, and therapy-response tracking.

5. An SDK, which digital platforms use to embed autonomic intelligence directly into their apps, delivering continuous monitoring, personalization, and early detection with zero new hardware.

Digital health companies use CloudANS to help the 100M+ people with complex, hard-to-diagnose conditions - women’s health, autoimmune disorders, Long COVID, POTS, anxiety, gut issues, and chronic fatigue - while powering premium preventive and longevity experiences.

Autonomic Health enables digital platforms to move upstream - from tracking symptoms to predicting and preventing them through continuous autonomic intelligence.

Name: MB HomeCare
Description:
MB HomeCare combines family values with clinical oversight, delivering high-quality in-home care across Baltimore and Harford Counties. 

Let’s be honest- when mom and dad start to struggle, you feel it too. You’ve probably noticed the little things first—missed medications, a cluttered kitchen, trouble getting up the stairs. Maybe your parent brushes it off, but deep down, you know they’re not as steady or sharp as they used to be. And that’s scary.

You worry every time the phone rings. You wonder if they’re eating enough, if they’re lonely, or if they’re safe when you’re not around.

The guilt? It’s heavy. You want to help more, but between your job, your kids, and just keeping up with life, you can’t do it all. And honestly, you shouldn’t have to.

You don’t have to do this alone. At MB HomeCare, we help you keep your promise: to make sure your parent can stay at home, surrounded by comfort and dignity.

We’ll match you with experienced caregivers who treat your loved one like family. From help with bathing and meals to simply keeping them company, we’re here when you can’t be.

Our care is flexible, reliable, and guided by real nurses, so you can stop worrying about what might happen, and start feeling confident about what’s next.

Let’s talk about what your family needs. We’re ready when you are.


RSA License #R3764

Name: Istar
Description:
A Istar tem como princípio a solução das dores de nossos clientes. Tendo como base a busca das características fisiológicas das mesmas e sempre com a visão do todo. Visto que o ser humano é uma entidade única e complexa.
Temos como objetivo o melhor de nossos clientes, usando para este fim um grande facilitador que é a tele medicina. Que rompe barreiras físicas e nos coloca lado a lado com nossos clientes em qualquer lugar. Dessa maneira podemos levar nossos conhecimentos e possibilidades de tratamento a qualquer pessoa.
Como o mundo atual é altamente demandante do ser humano em toda sua essência e habitualmente as pessoas não têm acesso a cuidados e processos para melhor adaptação a esse cenário, as mesmas tendem a evoluir para graus variados de desequilíbrio físico e psicológico que irão desaguar nas "dores". Com essa visão do contexto atual associado a anos de prática e estudos, a equipe do doutor Humberto Gurgel (Santé) desenvolveu técnicas terapêuticas e diagnósticas voltadas para a correção destas e readaptação a esse novo mundo cheio de demandas e agressões. 
Chega então a Istar como ponte para que esses conhecimentos cheguem ao maior número de pessoas que necessitem de nosso auxílio. Somos uma empresa humana, tecnológica e resolutiva para este  novo e maravilhoso mundo atual. 

Falando de dores vamos dar alguns exemplos:

Gases , cólicas, refluxo, intestino preso/diarreia, dores abdominais (Intestino irritado) 
Queimação no estômago (pirose)
Dores articulares
Câimbras 
edemas (retenção hídrica / Inchaço)
Irritabilidade 
Insônia 
Cansaço falta de energia
Perda ou deterioração da memória / concentração 
Dores crônicas
Queda de cabelo / unhas fracas
Ganho de peso (obesidade) ou baixo peso (sarcopenia)
Distúrbios na sexualidade
Angústia / medos / tristeza / ansiedade / pensamentos negativos 
Dor de cabeça

Name: Momby Care
Description:
Momby Care là hệ thống chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện cho mẹ và bé tại nhà, mang đến sự an tâm và tiện lợi tối đa cho các gia đình Việt. Chúng tôi tự hào với đội ngũ bác sĩ và điều dưỡng chuyên môn cao, giàu kinh nghiệm, đảm bảo quy trình chăm sóc chuẩn y khoa, tận tình và chu đáo ngay tại không gian quen thuộc của gia đình.

Tại Momby Care, chúng tôi hiểu rằng giai đoạn trước và sau sinh là khoảng thời gian thiêng liêng nhưng cũng đầy thử thách. Vì vậy, chúng tôi cam kết cung cấp các giải pháp chăm sóc y tế chuyên nghiệp, cá nhân hóa, giúp mẹ phục hồi nhanh chóng và bé phát triển khỏe mạnh, tạo nên nền tảng vững chắc cho hành trình làm cha mẹ hạnh phúc.

TẦM NHÌN

Trở thành thương hiệu hàng đầu quốc gia trong lĩnh vực chăm sóc sức khỏe mẹ và bé tại nhà, được tin yêu bởi chất lượng dịch vụ chuẩn y khoa, sự tiện lợi và tinh thần tận tâm, góp phần nâng cao chất lượng cuộc sống cho hàng triệu gia đình Việt.

SỨ MỆNH

Nâng niu và bảo vệ sức khỏe của mẹ và bé bằng các dịch vụ chăm sóc tại nhà toàn diện, chuyên nghiệp và chuẩn y khoa, giúp các gia đình an tâm tận hưởng trọn vẹn hành trình chào đón và nuôi dưỡng những mầm non tương lai. Chúng tôi cam kết mang đến sự tiện lợi, an toàn và hiệu quả tối ưu cho mọi khách hàng.

Name: Robin
Description:

Name: Fabiana Riskalla Fisioterapeuta e Psicomotricista
Description: Fabiana Riskalla é Fisioterapeuta e Psicomotricista Relacional com mais de 27 anos de vivência profissional. Atua em diversas áreas da fisioterapia, sempre com o objetivo de tratar e prevenir dores, recuperar e adaptar movimentos, melhorar a saúde e a imunidade, proporcionar qualidade de vida e bem-estar para as pessoas no seu dia a dia, incentivando a priorização do autocuidado. Oferece tratamentos que aliam terapias manuais, cinesioterapia, eletroterapia, laserterapia e intervenções no movimento do corpo. Desenvolve um trabalho domiciliar diferenciado para pessoas de terceira idade, com foco principal  no redescobrimento de pequenos movimentos que geram gigantescas conquistas internas em autoestima, senso de utilidade e motivação para a vida. Além do cuidado com a saúde geral do corpo (tonificação muscular, prevenção de deformidades e dores osteoarticulares, manutenção da mobilidade, flexibilidade e coordenação motora, melhora da circulação e aumento da imunidade), mantém um Programa de Prevenção e Tratamento de Lesões para Esportistas e Bailarinas.  Desenvolve um Programa de Consciência Corporal e Autopercepção pelo Movimento (psicomotricidade e dança) para Mulheres, chamado Transforme-se no Movimento! que combate o estresse físico e mental e incentiva a redescoberta das próprias essências.

Description:

Nossa missão é simplificar a jornada de tratamento dos nossos clientes, eliminando as dificuldades comuns na compra de medicamentos. Acreditamos que o futuro da saúde já chegou, e estamos aqui para aproveitar o melhor da tecnologia a serviço do seu bem-estar. Queremos que cada interação com a Savia seja um passo em direção a uma vida mais saudável e feliz.

Na Savia, entendemos que cuidar de si mesmo é uma das coisas mais importantes da vida. Por isso, estamos comprometidos em tornar o processo de compra e uso de medicamentos o mais leve e prazeroso possível, porque sabemos que, quando se trata de saúde, o cuidado é a chave para o sucesso.

Savia: transformando sua relação com a saúde, um medicamento por vez.

Name: Santiago Cuidadores de Idosos
Description:
A Santiago Cuidadores, é uma Startup de Cuidadores de Idosos. Atendemos um novo segmento dentro do universo de cuidados com idosos, podendo ser com ou sem necessidades especiais.

 A premissa da Santiago Cuidadores é atender pessoas que por problemáticas, temporárias ou permanentes, exijam acompanhamento durante a realização de suas atividades cotidianas. Resume-se a nossa função gerar condições para que cliente e familiares retomem o desempenho satisfatório de suas ocupações, além de criar ou manter a estrutura para que o cliente assistido permaneça em sua residência, sendo esse o local de conhecimento e adaptação do mesmo.

 Para tanto, a Santiago Cuidadores responsabiliza-se de forma técnica, gerencial e legalmente pela equipe contratada. Todos os nossos profissionais são capacitados mediante comprovação técnica para desempenhar sua função na área de atuação. Todavia, apesar da qualificação profissional do nosso cuidador, ele não pode realizar qualquer procedimento invasivo.

 A escolha do cuidador ocorre após uma seleção inicial de profissionais que estejam capacitados para atender o grau de complexidade no atendimento  do assistido, que objetiva levantar aspectos relevantes da história pregressa e atual de saúde, bem como as necessidades reais do cliente. Respeitando a autonomia e limitações do cliente assistido, juntamente com o feedback da família, conseguimos personalizar atividades, adaptar e melhorar o atendimento no decorrer do contrato. Para isso, acreditamos na parceria entre familiares, cuidadores e empresa, para que o melhor seja oferecido ao cliente assistido. Portanto, preocupamo-nos em prestar um serviço de alta qualidade.

 A Santiago compreende que o serviço que oferecemos atende às necessidades das famílias contemporâneas, permitindo-lhes retomar suas rotinas diárias com tranquilidade, sabendo que seus entes queridos estão sendo cuidados por profissionais especializados e dedicados.

Name: E-MOBILE CARELINE Mw
Description:
Vision: To serve as a Medical Home to Old Men & Women including Low-Income people at large who face the greatest barriers to care access.

Substandard societal health Careline and availability of proper clinic or health facilities in Malawian remote areas among Older Men and Women continues to be a major challenge.

E-Mobile Careline Malawi serves as a Primary care medical home for Low-Income adults living in Malawian remote areas. Most of the Low-Income people face the greatest barriers to care access, such that:
1. There is shortage of skilled healthcare workers
2. Treatment adherence and compliance
3. Lack of timely and actionable disease surveillance
4. Poor drug inventory and supply chain management
5. Use of counterfeit drugs
6. Lack of medical diagnostic treatment
7. Slow rates of information flow and reporting delays

The project aims at delivering health services through mobile clinics and medical TEAM to Malawian Remote areas. E-Mobile Careline will offer flexible and Viable Options for treating Isolated and vulnerable groups as well as newly displaced population by: Foot, Bike, or Vehicle

The project aims at developing portable customized cost-effective E-Mobile devices with the aim of reducing the current burden of public health system and promote the popularity of routine health self-check.

In older Men and Women, diseases may require constant monitoring and care. It is easy to use our self customized portable devices which can be carried anywhere by the user and the relevant parameters will be integrated with internet of things (IOT)

This technique will promote faster and accurate pre diagnoses with ease of use categorized with painless test for pulse test, that measures a person’s oxygen saturation level. MED-TECH equipment is going to check how well the heart is pumping oxygen throughout the body. It will be applied to check the status of the patients with any type of condition for example:
 1. pulmonary diseases
 2. anaemia
 3. lung cancer

Name: Autonomic Health
Description:
Autonomic Health is building the missing nervous system layer of modern healthcare - unlocking the body’s real-time operating system, the autonomic nervous system (ANS), which regulates every organ and function.

Our FDA-approved, patented diagnostic - validated across 200+ studies, 1M+ patients, and 700+ U.S. clinics and Tier-1 research institutions like Harvard and Stanford - goes beyond heart rate variability (HRV), the current gold standard for ANS analysis, by measuring both sympathetic and parasympathetic branches independently and simultaneously. This provides true clinical-grade insight into nervous system balance, enabling root-cause diagnosis and therapy before symptoms appear or vitals change.

Through our SDK and the first AI model for the nervous system, trained on the world’s largest FDA-grade ANS dataset, digital health platforms can embed our branded testing and treatment protocol directly into their apps. This turns wearables into continuous ANS monitors, offering real-time visibility into stress, recovery, and systemic regulation - far beyond what blood panels or scans can detect.

We’re the only proven solution for over 100 million Americans with complex, hard-to-diagnose conditions - from women’s health and autoimmune disorders to Long COVID and POTS - while advancing preventive, personalized, and longevity-driven care for all.

Autonomic Health enables clinics and digital platforms to move upstream - from detection to prevention, from population averages to continuous 1:1 personalization - unlocking the next era of precision and longevity care.

Name: ZorgPunt.
Description:
ZorgPunt, aangenaam!
Wij zijn ZorgPunt, een platform voor de zorg en door de zorg. We helpen gepassioneerde zorgverleners zichzelf te ontwikkelen, als ondernemer én als zorgprofessional. Samen verbeteren en borgen we de kwaliteit van de zorg, terwijl we jou de ruimte geven om te doen wat jij graag wilt doen: zorg verlenen.

Waarom ZorgPunt?
De zorg verandert doorlopend. Inhoudelijk, maar ook op administratief gebied. Aangepaste wet- en regelgevingen spelen hierin een grote rol. We begrijpen dat dit verwarrend kan zijn, bijvoorbeeld voor ZZP’ers en kleinere organisaties die gewoon goede zorg willen verlenen. Sterker nog, we begrijpen dat je hierin wel wat hulp bij kunt gebruiken. Want alle administratieve processen, declaraties, communicatie- en veiligheidseisen stonden misschien niet op je radar toen je besloot ondernemer in de zorg te worden. Laat staan dat jij je er dag in, dag uit mee bezig wilt houden.

ZorgPunt is het antwoord op de vraag van veel ondernemers in de zorg. Enerzijds zien we er namens de overheid op toe dat de kwaliteit van de zorg wordt gewaarborgd, anderzijds helpen we je verder als ondernemer én als zorgverlener. Daarvoor ontwikkelden we verschillende pakketten die aansluiten op concrete vragen van zorgverleners uit de praktijk.

Description:
Fondée en 2020 par une infirmière clinicienne passionnée, Soins Santé CASA s’engage à accompagner les personnes en perte d’autonomie, les aînés et leurs familles avec compassion et professionnalisme.

Notre mission est d’offrir bien plus que des soins à domicile : nous proposons un véritable soutien humain, adapté aux besoins uniques de chacun. Qu’il s’agisse de soins infirmiers, d’aide à la vie quotidienne ou de l’accompagnement par des professionnels qualifiés, chaque service est conçu pour assurer sécurité, dignité et sérénité.

Nous complétons cette approche par la vente d’équipements d’aide à la mobilité : fauteuils roulants, déambulateurs, béquilles, cannes et autres dispositifs. En collaborant avec des fournisseurs certifiés, nous garantissons à nos clients des produits de qualité, durables et respectueux de l’environnement.

À l’origine de cette vision se trouve  une gestionnaire expérimenter. Forte de plus de dix ans en soins infirmiers, elle a su développer une expertise solide tant auprès des patients que dans la gestion d’équipes et de projets en hébergement public et privé. Soucieuse d’élargir ses compétences, elle a poursuivi des études supérieures à l’Université McGill, obtenant une maîtrise en management et un certificat de deuxième cycle en gestion de la santé.

Chez Soins Santé CASA, nous croyons que chaque personne mérite d’être accompagnée avec respect, chaleur et expertise, pour vivre à domicile en toute confiance.

Xét nghiệm là nòng cốt và dịch vụ Lấy mẫu xét nghiệm tận nơi là chủ lực, MEDLATEC Việt Nam tập trung nhiều nguồn lực phát triển lĩnh vực xét nghiệm với chất lượng số 1 tại Việt Nam và kỳ vọng vươn tầm quốc tế trong vòng 5 năm tới. Name: Samot Catania
Description:
SAMOT Catania has been providing home care and palliative care services to oncological and chronic patients since 2001, in agreement with the Provincial Health Boards of Catania and Enna.
Our mission is to provide patients with advanced diseases with continuous care, while remaining at home surrounded by their families, trying to achieve the best possible quality of life and above all respecting the choices of the sick person.
Care is provided through multidisciplinary teams, composed of highly specialized figures such as palliative physicians, nurses, physical therapists, psychotherapists, etc.
Since 2021, we have been engaged in a project funded by the Ministry of Labor and Social Policy called "Spazio Amico," to ensure the constant improvement of the health protection conditions of children residing in the Sicilian regional territory affected by oncological disease and the well-being of their families, offering continuous care, strengthening the institutional competencies of public and private facilities operating in the oncology-pediatric field and developing consistent care, treatment and long-term rehabilitation activities, in collaboration with facilities in the territory.

Name: DomusCare Punto Domina
Description:
Domus Care rappresenta la sintesi di 29 anni di esperienza al servizio delle famiglie impegnate nella cura di anziani e disabili. In un settore dove sono necessarie soluzioni rapide ed efficaci per garantire la massima attenzione nella cura di persone sofferenti, Domus Care ha scelto di adottare un metodo di tipo artigianale nello svolgere il proprio compito.

Quindi ha fatto propri i valori che hanno contraddistinto la storia e la cultura popolare dei nostri padri che si basano sulla cura del particolare, sul rispetto della persona e sulla costante ricerca della perfezione. In questo percorso l’esperienza ci ha insegnato che non bisogna mai dare nulla di scontato.

Quello che non deve mai mancare è la passione per il lavoro di cura, le competenze tecniche e relazionali, la pazienza a trovare la soluzione e l’attitudine al sacrificio per essere sempre presenti. Al fine di conseguire i propri impegni, Domus Care ha scelto di avvalersi della collaborazione, in partnership, di organizzazioni specializzate ed autorizzate nella gestione delle Badanti in somministrazione oppure con assunzioni dirette e nel disbrigo di tutte le pratiche burocratiche ed amministrative.

Home healthcare preserves independence. You maintain control of your schedule, your routine, and your activities. Home care is less costly than facility care, and plans are available to fit all budgets. Personalized, one-on-one, care allows you choose the services that fit your needs. Name: Confédération des Centres de Santé C3SI
Description:
Depuis 2005, la Confédération des Centres de Santé C3SI accompagne et représente les centres de santé infirmiers et polyvalents en France, en défendant l'accès équitable aux soins pour tous. Nous sommes une fédération représentative des centres de santé et défendons leur place auprès des pouvoirs publics. Nous proposons aussi des solutions, telles que des audits, des accompagnements sur mesure. Nous sommes également engagés dans la création de nouveaux centres de santé pour lutter contre la désertification médicale. L'importance de la formation professionnelle pour les professionnels de santé est au cœur de notre démarche, garantissant l'amélioration continue des compétences et des services.  


Nous accordons une grande importance aux partenariats pour unir nos forces et renforcer notre impact. Nous faisons partie du Collectif CSI (Centres de Santé Infirmiers), composé de l'ADEDOM, ADMR, UNA et C3SI, un réseau essentiel pour partager les bonnes pratiques, collaborer, et être ensemble plus forts face aux défis de la santé publique. En complément, nous collaborons également avec le Regroupement National des Organisations Gestionnaires de Centre de Santé (RNOGCS) pour étendre notre action et notre rayonnement.


Rejoignez-nous pour participer à cette mission et contribuer à un avenir où chaque individu, quel que soit son lieu de résidence, puisse bénéficier de soins de qualité.

From a bit of companionship and everyday assistance to complex care, we tailor our support to meet your unique needs, always with a smile and a cuppa at the ready.

But we don’t stop there. Our consultancy services bring our Yorkshire grit and know-how to support both CQC and Ofsted registered businesses. With "Your Vision, Our Expertise," we’re here to help care providers navigate the complexities of the industry. Whether it’s Regulation 44 visits, quality assurance audits, compliance support, or setting up a new service, we’re the team you can trust to get the job done right, with a bit of Yorkshire charm thrown in for good measure.

At EverKind Services, we’re proud of our roots and even prouder of the impact we’re making in the care sector, we’re setting the benchmark for excellence in care, with a fun, friendly, and straight-talking approach. Whether you’re looking for top-notch care for a loved one or expert consultancy for your business, we’re here to help. After all, we’re Yorkshire born and bred—there’s nowt we can’t handle! 

Join us on our mission to make a positive difference, one care plan (and one brew) at a time.
