Our focus is simple: find top-tier products from reliable, reputable sources so the teams we work with can focus on what they do best — providing exceptional care to their patients. From HCPCS-coded cellular and tissue-based products to next-generation regenerative solutions, we make access straightforward and documentation real. You’ll always have what you need — literature, IFUs, identifiers, and links to manufacturer and payer resources — so you can verify with confidence.

We make the process frictionless with fast account setup, smooth ordering and shipping, and dependable supply planning that keeps your shelves stocked when it matters most. We also provide staff education on product handling, storage, and use per labeling — no clinical advice, just clarity and compliance.

We believe trust is built through transparency. That’s why our pricing is clear, our operations are clean, and our role is focused: to support the providers who show up every day to help patients heal.

Coverage and payment vary by payer, indication, and medical necessity. Providers verify with payers and manufacturers. Some regenerative and cosmetic products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease and are used only as permitted by labeling and applicable law.

If you’d like product literature or identifiers, send us a message - we are here to help!

Name: PAKILIE
Description:
Aidante-AiMante depuis 13 ans, j'ai souvent été confronté à des choix entre mon rôle auprès de mon proche Aidé-AiMé et l'évolution de ma carrière. 
Je ne compte plus le nombre de fois où je suis tiraillée entre le besoin de « souffler » et ce sentiment de culpabilité qui m'envahie car j’ai l’impression d’abandonné mon proche.
Pourquoi est-ce difficile de passer le relais ne serait-ce que temporairement ? 
J’ai pourtant 2 frères qui me propose régulièrement de me remplacer, ou de leur confier des tâches…
Le problème est que le rôle d’Aidant est évolutif, on commence par faire quelques tâches administratives, puis on gère quelques rendez-vous, on devient l’interlocuteur référent et sans s’en rendre compte, petit à petit, l’intégralité du maintien à domicile de la personne en perte d’autonomie repose sur les épaules d’un être unique.
Car les Aidants savent beaucoup de choses nécessaires au bien-être, au suivi médical et au maintien à domicile de leur proche Aidé, mais ne consigne pas tout au fur et à mesure !
De plus ils vont utiliser leurs agendas, mails, téléphones, ordinateurs, cahiers…. Ce qui est difficilement partageable à un tiers rapidement 
Résultat quand on propose aux Aidants de les soulager dans leurs tâches administratives, ou de les remplacer quelques temps, la préparation est tellement longue et fastidieuse qu’ils préfèrent y renoncer.
Il y a un an j’ai rêvé que mon rôle d’Aidante soit en un clic délégable à un proche sans que cela n’est d’incidence sur l’être aimé.
PAKILIE est un programme d’assistance qui fait le lien pour que tout se passe bien !
Composé de plusieurs modules :
-Agenda
-Documents 
-Pathologies
-Préférences alimentaires
-Activités favorites
Tout est consigné au même endroit, en temps réel. 
Grâce à PAKILIE le maintien à domicile d’une personne en perte d’autonomie ne repose plus sur un proche unique et en cas d’indisponibilité de celui-ci, subie ou choisie en 1 clic on trouve un remplaçant.
Le proche aidé est protégé, son aidant rassuré

Name: Բարի Խնամք - Kind Care
Description:
Տարեցների և առողջական խնդիրներ ունեցեղ անձանց համար խնամքի ծառայություն և օգնության տրամադրում` ինչպես տնային, այնպես էլ հիվանդանոց

«Բարի խնամք» կազմակերպության հիմնական նպատակն է՝ հոգատար և որակյալ խնամք ու օգնություն տրամադրել տարեց և առողջական խնդիրներ ունեցող անձանց ինչպես տանը, այնպես էլ` տնային պայմաններից դուրս: Մենք պատրաստ ենք օգնել Ձեզ օրվա ցանկացած պահի: Երաշխավորում ենք, որ մեր ծառայությունները Ձեր ընտանիքին կբերեն հոգեբանական անդորր և մտքի խաղաղություն:

«Բարի խնամք» կազմակերպության առաքելությունն է հոգատար խնամք տրամադրել վիրահատված, կոտրվածքներ ու վնասվածքներ ստացած հիվանդներին, քրոնիկ հիվանդություններով տառապող և հաշմանդամություն ունեցող անձանց ու տարեցներին: Մենք ձգտում ենք օգնել տարեցներին ու հիվանդներին հեշտացնելու իրենց կյանքը՝ կիսելով նրանց հետ մեր ջերմությունն ու հոգատարությունը:

Մեր աշխատակիցների գերակշռող մեծամասնությունն ունի մասնագիտական կրթություն և հիվանդների հետ աշխատելու մեծ փորձ: Նրանցից շատերն անցել են մասնագիտացված դասընթացներ և տիրապետում են տարբեր հիվանդություններով տառապող հիվանդների խնամքի առանձնահատկություններին՝ պայմանավորված նրանց ֆիզիկական և հոգեսոմատիկ վիճակով: Հետևաբար, մենք փորձում ենք հիվանդների համար ընտրել մասնագետ՝ հաշվի առնելով ախտորոշման առանձնահատկությունները՝ բժշկի առաջարկած խնամքի և վերականգնման ծրագրին համապատասխան:

Մենք անչափ կարևորում ենք խնամողի վերաբերմունքը պացիենտի նկատմամբ: Տրված դրական էմոցիաներն ու արտաքին աջակցությունն արագացնում են վերականգնումը լուրջ հիվանդություններից հետո՝ նույնիսկ սոցիալապես ակտիվ մարդկանց մոտ: Հարմարվելը կյանքի նոր իրողություններին և սեփական կարողություններին առանց խնամքի և արտաքին աջակցության՝ պարզապես անհնար է: Ֆիզիկական թուլություն, ինքնասպասարկման դժվարություններ, թուլացած տեսողության և լսողության հետևանքով շփման դժվարություններ. կարևոր է ոչ միայն հասկանալ և ընդունել այդ խնդիրները, այլև՝ կարողանալ հիվանդին ոգևորել, աջակցել ֆիզիկական գործողություններին՝ առանց անձի արժանապատվությունը նսեմացնելու:

Մեր մասնագետները հաջողությամբ կատարում են իրենց առաջադրված խնդիրները:

Description:
FINEASE HEALTH is dedicated to transforming wound care delivery through our expert mobile wound care services. We partner with healthcare facilities, home health agencies, and individual patients in the States of Delaware and New Jersey, to provide unparalleled, evidence-based wound assessment and treatment directly at the point of need. Our team of experienced wound care Physicians and Nurse Practitioners utilizes cutting-edge techniques and technologies to manage complex wounds, leading to faster healing rates and a significant reduction in hospital readmissions. We seamlessly integrate with existing care teams, offering a valuable extension of services and specialized expertise.

We work from a place of compassion and support to understand your goals and establish a plan to help your thrive. Our integrative health team considers your life challenges from all angles; your relationship to food, your relationship to yourself, and your relationship with your body. Our team of specialized professionals takes a client-centered approach to provide individualized care. Name: Medical Checkup 960
Description:
Welcome to Longevity960, a groundbreaking program designed to extend your health span, empowering you to thrive vibrantly until 96 and beyond. At Longevity960, we believe aging is not about slowing down it’s about living with vitality, resilience, and purpose. Our mission is to redefine healthy aging by integrating cutting-edge science, personalized wellness strategies, and innovative technologies to optimize your physical, mental, and emotional well-being.

Through our comprehensive approach, we focus on prevention, longevity, and holistic health. Longevity960 combines advanced diagnostics, tailored nutrition plans, fitness regimens, and evidence-based therapies to help you achieve peak performance at every stage of life. Whether you’re looking to enhance cognitive function, boost energy, or prevent age-related conditions, our expert team is here to guide you toward a longer, healthier, and more fulfilling life.

MedicalCheckup960.com Benefits

As part of the Longevity960 ecosystem, MedicalCheckup960.com offers a suite of advanced health assessments to support your longevity journey. These benefits include:

Comprehensive Health Screenings: State-of-the-art diagnostics, including genetic testing, biomarker analysis, and full-body imaging, to detect potential risks early and create a baseline for your personalized health plan.
Telomere Length Testing: Measure your cellular age to understand your biological aging process and receive tailored interventions to slow it down.
Metabolic Optimization: Detailed blood panels and metabolic assessments to fine-tune your nutrition and energy levels, reducing the risk of chronic diseases like diabetes and cardiovascular conditions.
Cognitive Health Evaluations: Advanced neuroimaging and cognitive testing to monitor brain health, enhance mental clarity, and prevent decline, ensuring you stay sharp and focused.
Personalized Longevity Roadmap: A custom plan based on your unique biology, lifestyle, and goals, incorporating nutrition

Name: Homewatch CareGivers of Naperville
Description:
Homewatch CareGivers of Naperville provides home care services for people of all ages and abilities.  We help families care for their families.  Adult children are often in the role of caregiver for their parents and we are here to help.   

We provide as many or as few hours of care that your loved one needs to live their best life in their home.  We provide companionship and help with errands, meal preparation, light housekeeping, dressing, bathing, tolieting and  other assistance needed to keep your loved on safe and healthy.  We work with Veterans VA programs, all Long Term Care Insurance plans, Medicare Advantage Plans and private pay.

Name: Professional Home Health Services
Description:
Professional Healthcare Staffing (PHS) is a state-licensed provider of skilled and other home health care services. We are dedicated to providing quality, compassionate care to all of our patients, as confirmed by our annual compliance reviews and patient satisfaction surveys. Our commitment to caring and professionalism is achieved through continuous staff education and quality review and improvement (CQI).



We are available 24/7 through telephone and email to meet the needs of our clients and potential clients. PHS is a locally-owned and operated organization that is fully licensed by the Nevada Division of Health. We have established relationships with various government agencies, workers' compensation and long-term care insurance companies, as well as many provider networks.



We offer competitively priced services and every new or potential client is evaluated by our professional staff, including input from the patient, family and physician. A comprehensive care plan is created and discussed with the patient and family representatives. Our approach to patient care planning promotes a strong relationship between our agency, the patient, and all parties involved. This approach has proven to be the most effective "roadmap" for success.



PHS takes pride in our patient satisfaction and recognizes that our staff, well-educated, trained, and experienced individuals with long-term tenure at our agency, is one of our greatest assets. We will promptly address all requests for our services. Please don't hesitate to contact us with any questions, concerns, or requests.

Name: Acure Home Care, LLC
Description: At Acure Home Care, we provide compassionate, professional home health care, prioritizing the well-being and comfort of our clients. Our mission is to enhance the quality of life for those we serve by offering reliable, high-quality care tailored to each individual's unique needs. Whether it's skilled nursing, therapy, or personal care, our dedicated team ensures the support needed to maintain independence and dignity. Acure Home Care is the partner you can trust in every step of your health care journey.

Name: CB Care s.r.l. S.T.P.
Description:
Benvenuti nella pagina ufficiale di CB Care, una società dedicata a fornire servizi infermieristici di alta qualità con un approccio centrato sul paziente.

In CB Care Infermieri, ci impegniamo a offrire cure compassionate e competenti a coloro che ne hanno bisogno, sia a domicilio che presso il nostro ambulatorio. Con un team di infermieri altamente qualificati e dedicati, ci assicuriamo che ogni paziente riceva l'attenzione personalizzata di cui ha bisogno.

Oltre alla nostra assistenza domiciliare e all'ambulatorio infermieristico, offriamo anche servizi specialistici in welfare aziendale, garantendo la salute e la sicurezza dei dipendenti nelle aziende.

La formazione è un elemento fondamentale della nostra missione. Offriamo programmi formativi e corsi professionali per infermieri, aziende e individui interessati a migliorare le proprie competenze nel settore sanitario.

La nostra missione è quella di essere un faro di supporto e conforto per coloro che affrontano momenti difficili della vita, offrendo servizi che superano le aspettative e promuovendo una cultura di cura centrata sul paziente.

Seguiteci per rimanere aggiornati sulle nostre attività, i servizi offerti e le ultime novità nel campo dell'assistenza infermieristica. Unisciti a noi nel nostro impegno per fornire cure eccellenti e compassionevoli a chiunque ne abbia bisogno.

Contattaci per ulteriori informazioni o per scoprire come CB Care può essere il partner ideale per le tue esigenze di assistenza infermieristica, medicina del lavoro o formazione professionale.

Name: NSH HERBALS

Name: Amparos Cuidadores
Description:
A Amparos nasceu em 2015, no Rio de Janeiro com o propósito de aproximar as pessoas com necessidades de cuidados e os melhores profissionais cuidadores do mercado, atuando como fio condutor dessa relação, utilizando como ferramentas a comunicação eficaz com todos os envolvidos nesse processo, a escuta interessada, o acolhimento e as intervenções necessárias para promover o vínculo entre cuidadores parceiros, pacientes e familiares.

Assistência domiciliar continuada
Seleção criteriosa dos cuidadores mais adequados conforme a avaliação das necessidades individuais do idoso e sua rotina familiar. Aqui na Amparos, possuímos três planos: 8 horas, 12 horas e 24 horas. E você escolhe o que melhor se encaixa para o seu momento.

Mora longe? -cuidamos de tudo para você

Name: LinkMed
Description:
What We Do and How
Our female, fertility experienced, certified technicians will perform ultrasounds at a patient’s home, office, or wherever is convenient (and private), anywhere in California.  We use handheld, blue tooth probes for transvaginal and abdominal imaging- about the size of a phone.  We also work with phlebotomy teams to have blood drawn at the patient’s location, providing same-day lab results for applicable panels like estrogen, progesterone, fsh, lh, beta, etc.  I have attached a brochure for you to review and you will find our costs at the bottom and on the brochure too.  
 
Results
Exam results are wirelessly transmitted through our secure portal and emailed and faxed to whomever you designate.  We also have the capabilities to stream live for your clinical team to view, say in case of an emergency appointment, or IP’s who want to see a heartbeat, after it’s been confirmed healthy.  Our techs use iPads as the monitor bring with them a mobile exam table (although most patients prefer the bed or a recliner), and sanitary packs with drapes, gloves, masks, and everything else needed for the appointments.  Our portal also let’s you download the high-res images, watch the cine clips, and even redo measurements.
 
Typically, we see patients for the following types of Scans:  
     >Pre-Fertility assessments and prescreening
     >In-Cycle monitoring
     >Post-Op (fluid build up, bleeding, observation)
     >Early OB up to 16-weeks (and sometimes in-between center and ob care)

Name: Ending Tremor Project
Description:
Three years ago, our founder, Nisso Larden, noticed his hands shaking during simple things—typing an email, using his phone, or pouring a glass of wine. Like many, he feared it was Parkinson’s.

A diagnosis from Dr. Jai Grewal confirmed it was Essential Tremor (ET). But as a serial entrepreneur with over 25 years of experience building consumer brands like Hey Honey Skincare, Nisso didn’t just accept the advice to "live with it." He saw a gap. He realized that while medicine treats the condition, nothing was helping patients manage the daily chaos of it.

That realization birthed the Ending Tremor Project.

We are on a mission to turn real-world data and AI into practical tools that help people regain control of their daily moments. We are building the architecture of a new movement, starting with our flagship app, TremorZen.

Our Leadership:

Nisso Larden (Founder): The architect of the movement. A 25-year veteran entrepreneur and product innovator with deep expertise in marketing strategy and consumer engagement.

Dr. Jai Grewal (Co-Founder): Board-certified Neurologist specializing in movement disorders and neuro-oncology.

Dr. Gennady Gekht (Chief Medical Officer): Neurologist & Healthcare Executive with advanced AI training from MIT and an MBA from Emory.

We are combining consumer brand expertise with clinical rigor to end the era of "just living with it."

Join us.

#TheEndETProject #EndTremor #PoweredByCommunity

That's why we offer comprehensive services tailored to meet the unique needs of both our clients and their family caregivers.

In addition to our professional care services provided by our experienced Home Health Aides (HHAs) and Personal Care Service Providers (PCSPs), we also support family caregivers through the CFI program's Consumer-Directed Option. Through this option, eligible family members can become paid caregivers for their loved ones, allowing them to provide essential care and support while receiving compensation for their valuable contributions.

With Guardian Home Care of NH, LLC, family caregivers can have peace of mind knowing that their loved one is receiving the highest quality of care while also having the opportunity to be compensated for their time and dedication.

Name: Holistic Social Care Training Programme - Hosocat
Description: The primary objective of the HOSOCAT training program is to train and motivate individuals to become model carers and support workers, thereby elevating the standard of care provided to those in need. In conjunction with offering the Care Certificate training, HOSOCAT goes a step further by integrating essential sociocultural elements, including addressing prejudice, bias, discrimination, and both direct and indirect racism. The comprehensive approach taken by the HOSOCAT training program plays a crucial role in facilitating the integration of overseas workers into the UK social care sector. By addressing important sociocultural aspects such as prejudice, bias, discrimination, and direct & indirect racism, HOSOCAT empowers these workers with the necessary knowledge and understanding to navigate cultural differences and deliver high-quality Support and Care services effectively. This, in turn, enables them to provide compassionate and culturally sensitive care to users from diverse backgrounds and belief systems, fostering a more inclusive and supportive care environment for all.

Name: Dementia Directions
Description:
Dementia Directions supports individuals experiencing memory loss and post-dementia diagnosis for people living with dementia, carers, family members, and guardians. Services offered are tailored to the unique needs of each individual and their carer and are provided by an experienced team in dementia care, advocacy, and aged care.  
Our advocacy approach aims to ensure that the rights and choices of individuals with dementia are upheld and respected throughout the care journey.

Services:
Diagnosis Support: Case management, starting from the identification of symptoms to the diagnosis of dementia and addressing objections or barriers to seeking medical help.
Advisory: Post-diagnosis in-home dementia advisory services, providing guidance and support for the person living with dementia and their carer.
Aged Care Navigation: Aged care navigation to access available support privately or through My Aged Care, assisting with the complex process of accessing appropriate aged care services.
Help At Home: Placement with a matched home care provider to support individuals to stay at home for as long as possible.
Future Planning: An advisory service including assistance with Enduring Power of Attorney or Advanced Care Directive to ensure that the individual's wishes and preferences are documented and respected.
Advocacy:  Supporting individuals with dementia in having their voices heard concerning their health and well-being, rights, and choices.

Dementia Directions aims to provide comprehensive and person-centred support to individuals with dementia and their carers, encompassing various aspects of care, navigation, planning, and advocacy to improve their overall well-being and quality of life.

Using placental tissue allografts (also known as advanced biologics or skin substitutes), we offer cutting-edge, Medicare-covered therapies designed to accelerate healing, reduce complications, and improve patient quality of life.

Why Choose Us?
 Onsite Advanced Wound Care – No need for hospital visits; we bring expert treatment to the patient.
 Medicare-Covered Services – Our treatments are covered for qualifying patients, ensuring accessible care.
 Collaboration with Facilities & Home Health Agencies – We work alongside your existing team to enhance patient outcomes, not replace their services.
 Reducing Hospital Transfers – Our proactive approach keeps patients in their homes and prevents unnecessary hospital and skilled nursing admissions.
 Expert Application of Placental Tissue Allografts – A proven, regenerative solution for chronic wounds.

Our Services Include:
 Comprehensive wound assessments and personalized treatment plans
 Application of advanced biologic therapies to promote rapid healing
 Documentation & Medicare compliance support for facilities
 Ongoing wound monitoring to ensure optimal outcomes

At Advanced Wound Care, we are dedicated to Healing Wounds. Restoring Lives. Mobile Advanced Wound Care.

 Interested in partnering with us? Contact us to learn how we can enhance your facility’s wound care program and keep your patients safe, comfortable, and healing at home.

Name: Senior Choice at Home
Description:
Senior Choice at Home is a proactive choice for vibrant and healthy senior adults, designed to protect seniors and their families from the uncertainties of future health care needs. Our membership-based program provides comprehensive long-term care and personal care coordination services for older adults enabling them to live independently at home while protecting their financial assets. Similar to a Continuing Care Retirement Community (CCRC), applicants join with a one-time membership fee and an associated monthly service fee that will ensure future care in their home.

Senior Choice at Home initiated the legislation enabling CCRCs to provide a comprehensive program of coordinated long-term care services for seniors who prefer to stay in their homes as they age. It is the only program of its kind in Southwest Florida. As a member, seniors receive care in their own home with the support of a Personal Care Coordinator.

With a reputation you can trust, Senior Choice at Home is regulated through Gulf Coast Village, a premier Continuing Care Retirement Community (CCRC) serving Southwest Florida for more than 30 years. What truly sets us apart is our affiliation to Volunteers of America National Services (VOANS), a faith-based organization dedicated to helping those in need rebuild their lives and reach their full potential. Founded in 1896, Volunteers of America National Services is one of the nation’s largest nonprofit providers of housing for seniors and a major provider of long-term care.

Name: Hospice By The Sea, Ltd.
Description:
Hospice By The Sea provides end-of-life care for patients with life-limiting illnesses.  We work with the patients and families concurrently to provide comfort and relief from symptoms experienced during a chronic long term illness.

Hospice is about living during the last months, weeks and days of life in comfort, security and dignity.  Hospice services are provided at home, assisted living homes, skilled nursing facilities, board and care facility,  acute care hospital, or wherever the patient calls home, surrounded by family, culture and tradition.

Hospice is focused on palliative care, a specialized clinical approach to actively managing pain and other symptoms that allow the patient/family unit to face this journey with security and dignity.  Hospice By The Sea also addresses the important aspects of spirituality and psycho-social/emotional needs that we are often faced with during end of life.

Hospice and palliative care practice an interdisciplinary approach to healthcare.  Each patient has a personalized care plan based on their specific needs and wishes.  This plan is carried out by a team of professionals directed by the patient’s personal physician and the Hospice physician using sophisticated methods of pain and symptom control.

Hospice by The Sea focuses on the quality of life.  Hospice neither hastens nor postpones death, but affirms life and regards dying as a normal process.  The hospice movement stresses human values that go beyond the physical needs of the patient.

Hospice By The Sea considers the entire family, including the patient to be the “unit of care”.  Patients and their families are included in the decision-making process regarding the goals of care and methods to achieve these goals.

Hospice By The Sea was founded in 1994 by Kathie Jackson, an R.N. who had a mission to provide patients and their loved ones with comprehensive end-of-life care and influence better care for all in our community.

CareHQ includes software (apps and dashboard), monitoring devices, a local CarePod for data collection and aggregation in addition to a collection of healthcare service integrations. CareHQ provides a Central, Real-time Continuous Monitoring of patients at home. It is targeted at the elderly who want to age at home, chronically and critically ill patients, post-hospitalization patients, and loved ones who want to be kept in the loop all the time.

Name: CamCare Support Services Ltd
Description:
CamCare Support Services is a nurse-led, family-run home care provider based in South Lanarkshire and East Renfrewshire. We are registered with the Care Inspectorate and committed to delivering safe, premium, person-centred care that supports people to live with dignity, independence, and comfort in their own homes.

Our services are designed around each individual, recognising that no two people are the same. We provide:

Personal care – support with washing, dressing, grooming, and daily routines

Medication assistance – safe administration and reminders

Companionship & social support – reducing loneliness and encouraging engagement

Meal preparation – tailored to dietary needs and preferences

Light housekeeping – helping maintain a clean, safe home environment

Mobility support – assistance with moving safely around the home

At CamCare, we believe care should be as individual as the people we support. Our nurse-led approach ensures clinical oversight, while our family values bring compassion, consistency, and trust. Whether it’s an hour a day or round-the-clock support, our goal is always the same: to enhance quality of life and give families peace of mind.

We work closely with service users, families, and professionals to ensure care is reliable, responsive, and respectful. By choosing CamCare, you’re choosing a team that understands the importance of both professionalism and personal connection.

 Areas we serve: South Lanarkshire & East Renfrewshire
 Website: www.camcaresupportservices.uk

It’s for anyone rebuilding from a health event, recovering from a tough injury, or just dealing with a body that isn't as resilient as it used to be.

Hearts for Healing LLC is a NON-Medical Home Care Company. Our Company was founded in the honor of my grandmother, who is currently battling Dementia. We offer a holistic approach to our daily services. Giving our clients the options to have vegan/vegetarian meal preparation, massage therapy, herbal healing sessions, and an array of all natural hand made herbal products. We give all of our caregivers personality test to match to our clients best needs. At Hearts for Healing, we have our clients best interest at heart. We are not only there physically but mentally and spiritually as well. We stand by our motto "Using Our Hearts to Heal Yours". Our company works to assist with clients care in the privacy of their homes. We assist in Dementia Proofing your home, feeding, bathing, medication reminders, transportation to doctors appointments, walks through the park or coloring with a conversation etc. We even do Love Calls which are check- in calls once a week. We also offer massage therapy to our clients as well as the family members of our clients. At Hearts For Healing, we are not just caring for your family, We Are Your Family!

At Hearts For Healing LLC we feel that the family members are just as important as our clients this is why we provide classes and informational workshops to teach our families how to care for there loved ones and different approaches to care.

Hearts for Healing LLC strives to make it easier for families like ours to maintain their regular life duties as we provide exceptional care to your loved ones.
We are a family owned business and our goal is to make your family ours!

Lamara Home Services is dedicated to serving the elderly over 60 years old in Uganda who wish to maintain their independence and dignity at home. We focus on individuals who are frail, managing chronic illnesses, or coping with physical or mental health

We envision a world where aging and illness are met with holistic wellbeing – supported by families, communities, and systems that value every life stage.

Our mission is to deliver compassionate, personalised home-based care that empowers the elderly to live comfortably, independently, and meaningfully at their own homes among loved ones.

Core values

❖ Ubuntu: We are because our elders are. We embody the spirit of shared humanity, treating every client as extended family, with inherent dignity, profound respect, and unconditional compassion.
❖ Trust: We are the steadfast presence families rely on. Through unwavering reliability, absolute transparency, and the highest professional standards, we build a foundation of trust that brings peace of mind.
❖ Heart-forward Service: Our care goes beyond tasks; it’s about connection. We listen deeply, anticipate needs with empathy, and dedicate ourselves to the holistic wellbeing of every individual we serve.
❖ Excellence: We are committed guardians of our clients' health and safety. We pursue continuous learning, uphold the strictest quality in our care, and take personal responsibility for the outcomes and comfort of those entrusted to us.

Name: Domácí péče Marie Jarošová
Description:
Domácí péče Marie Jarošová s.r.o. je naší rodinnou firmou a srdcovou záležitostí. Poskytujeme domácí péči v odbornosti Všeobecná sestra „Homecare“ . V oboru se pohybujeme již od roku 1994, avšak jako Domácí péče Marie Jarošová s.r.o. fungujeme od roku 2021. 

  NAŠE SLUŽBY

Poskytujeme komplexní zdravotní péči hrazenou pojišťovnou pro seniory, dospělé i děti s nejrůznějšími zdravotními komplikacemi. Ať už se jedná o rekonvalescenci po nehodě či operaci, chronické onemocnění nebo zdravotní postižení, našim klientům zajišťujeme každodenní plnohodnout či paliativní péči. Součástí našich služeb je i půjčovna, prodej a servis zdravotnických a kompenzačních pomůcek. 


 LIDSKÝ PŘÍSTUP A ZACHOVÁNÍ DŮSTOJNOSTI

Náš zdravotnický personál čítá více než 80 pracovníků, kteří k našim klientům přistupují k jejich maximální spokojenosti a zlepšení kvality života. 

Náš personál pravidelně školíme a dbáme na to, aby neustále prohluboval nejen své teoretické, ale také praktické dovednosti. Je pro nás velmi důležité, aby byl z naší práce cítit lidský přístup a klientům byl během péče zachován pocit důstojnosti. 


AKREDITOVANÉ ZDRAVOTNICKÉ ZAŘÍZENÍ

V roce 2024 jsme získali akreditaci zdravotnického zařízení a vzniklo i naše akreditované školící centrum. 

 SPOLUPRACUJEME 

Spolupracujeme s lůžkovými zařízeními, odbornými ambulancemi a ošetřujícími lékaři po celé Praze a v okrese Cheb. Smlouvu máme se všemi zdravotními pojišťovnami.

 NAŠE HODNOTY

Odbornost a nejvyšší kvalita odborné péče.
 Lidský přístup k zaměstnancům a klientům.
 Inovace a snaha neustále zlepšovat naše služby.
 Týmová práce a rodinný přístup.

Description:
HomeWell’s mission is to ensure our clients and loved ones have opportunities to maintain dignity and independence in the comfort of their own homes by offering trusted and compassionate in-home care.

When clients require immediate help, HomeWell can have a Registered Nurse evaluate their needs, and we can staff the case with a Certified Home Health Aide on the same day as the initial call. Our availability 24/7 provides peace of mind, knowing help is just a phone call away.

HomeWell is an Employer of Choice because our core philosophy is to treat all employees with respect and honor. Our business model focuses on delivering quality, reliable, and compassionate care — which we can only achieve through employees who feel valued and appreciated. We support our caregivers by offering competitive pay, benefits, an employee recognition program, and additional skills training.

Our value extends beyond in-home care services. We are a trusted resource for our clients and their loved ones, maintaining reliable relationships with community providers. By staying connected, we can better help our clients navigate the complexities of their overall care needs.

Name: Thuiszorg Groot Brabant
Description:
Bij Thuiszorg Groot Brabant geloven we in zorg in zijn puurste vorm. 
Dat betekent er zijn voor iedereen die ondersteuning nodig heeft. 
Menselijk, empatisch en toegankelijk. U ergens thuis voelen en tegelijk zo zelfstandig mogelijk leven. Daarom zoeken we steeds de juiste balans tussen professionele zorgverlening en menselijk contact. 
Van mens tot mens van zorgverlener tot zorgvrager.

Vanuit deze overtuiging streven we ernaar om een compleet pakket aan zorg te bieden voor alle inwoners in ons werkgebied, waarbij de vraag van de cliënt altijd leidend is. 
Onze missie is het ondersteunen, behouden en/of bevorderen van de kwaliteit van leven, met respect voor eigen leefstijl.
Wij leveren zorg en ondersteuning op het gebied van verzorging, verpleging, dementiezorg, nachtzorg en 24 uurs zorg, palliatieve zorg, begeleiding individueel en dagbesteding. Daarnaast zijn wij gespecialiseerd in de zorg voor cliënten met specifieke aandoeningen als MS en ALS Spierziekten.

Preventing Asthma Before It Starts
 
Respiradigm, a bold new innovator in respiratory health, is building new global partnerships with the asthma centres of excellence in Australia, USA and Europe, on a mission to transform asthma management and intervention.
 
Our Innovations
 
The team of scientists at Respiradigm, and at our partner institutes, have developed the world’s first scalable Digital Health App to identify at risk children before their first birthday, and the world’s first Newborn Blood Test to screen for asthma risk at birth. The team has also developed the first Intervention Products to transform asthma management for millions of adults with asthma and to prevent asthma in at risk children.

Name: Assurance Care & Support Services Inc
Description:
We all know that home is where the heart is, but have you ever stopped to consider that home is where health is. We often think of health as something pursued at the doctor's office or hospital. The goal, however, is to be healthy at home. Sometimes, translating the care received at offices and facilities to home life requires some extra help. If you or someone you know is managing an illness or injury at home, consider home health services to ensure optimal medical outcomes.

We send nurses and therapists to the homes of our patients. In the comfort of your home, we extend the care of your doctors and provide many of the services you might otherwise receive at a hospital, nursing home, or rehab facility. This can include post-surgical care, disease management, rehab, and much more.

Name: Quality Care at Home
Description:
Quality Care at Home – About Us

A Commitment to Excellence in Home Care

At Quality Care at Home, we believe every individual deserves compassionate, concierge-level care tailored to their unique needs. Since our founding in 2020, we have been dedicated to providing exceptional companion care that enhances well-being and fosters independence in the comfort of home. With a focus on dignity, respect, and trust, we strive to be a partner families can rely on to enrich their loved ones’ lives.

Our Story

Quality Care at Home began with a simple yet powerful vision: to provide seniors and
individuals with disabilities the exceptional care they need to live safely and comfortably at home. 

Founder Xenia Gomez, a Certified Nursing Assistant since 2009, combined her extensive experience in hospitals, rehabilitation centers, and nursing homes with her passion for making a meaningful difference to create a home care agency like no other. Her journey, rooted in compassion and a deep understanding of caregivers' challenges, has led to the creation of a trusted home care agency that tailors care to each person’s preferences and
lifestyle.

Description:
We strive to provide effective and efficient quality physiotherapy in order to facilitate healing by establishing physical well-being. 

We believe that a happy, functioning body forms the corner stone in improving and maintaining an individual’s health. 

Our goals are to incorporate prevention, treatment, education, health promotion and rehabilitation to all patients. 

We aim to identify and treat the cause of your condition. 

Some of the scopes of practice we are passionate about treating includes sporting injuries, women's health conditions and those that are orthopaedic in nature.

We believe in team work, valuing a holistic multidisciplinary approach to facilitate healing of our patients.

Description: Créée par et à l’initiative de Santélys Association et du Centre Hospitalier Jura Sud, l’association Santexcel HAD Jura est un établissement de santé assurant l’activité d’Hospitalisation A Domicile (HAD) sur la zone de planification sanitaire du territoire jurassien. Le projet associatif de Santexcel HAD Jura s’appuie sur des valeurs fortes partagées d’intérêt général et d’innovation et bénéficie des expertises des deux institutions, et de leur capacité  à développer des parcours et des filières de qualité répondant aux besoins de la population. L’ambition de Santexcel HAD Jura est de permettre au plus grand nombre de patients de bénéficier d’une prise en charge à domicile, en évitant ou en raccourcissant une hospitalisation « classique » tout en proposant une qualité et une sécurité des soins optimales.

De indicatiestellingen worden opgesteld met oog op zelfmanagement, zelfredzaamheid en eigen regie. Wij zijn verder onafhankelijk wat in feite betekent dat wij niet verbonden zijn aan een zorginstelling, zorgverzekeraar of gemeente.

Kwaliteit voor jouw gezondheid!

Heeft u vragen? Neem vrijblijvend contact op!

Description:
Veera Care is a comprehensive home care service provider based in Surat, Gujarat, India, dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for the elderly and individuals with disabilities. We are committed to providing personalized care and support tailored to meet individual needs.

Our Home Care Services include:

Domestic Assistance: Helping with housework, laundry, and shopping.

Social Support: Offering companionship at home or during outings and connecting clients with local interest groups.

Nursing: Providing clinical support for managing medication and health conditions.

Respite Care: Giving caregivers a well-deserved break for a few hours or days.

Transport: Arranging social outings, shopping trips, or appointments.

Personal Care: Assisting with showering, dressing, and toileting.

Allied Health Services: Offering professional advice, support, and equipment to improve mobility and well-being.

Healthy Living for Seniors: Weekly programs designed to keep seniors active and connected within the community.

Disability Support Services focus on:

Employment Preparation: Assisting clients in developing skills and obtaining employment.

Transportation Services: Utilizing our fleet of cars and buses to help clients attend capacity-building activities, social events, appointments, educational courses, and more.

Our Angel Buddy Program encourages volunteers and financial supporters to contribute to the well-being of the elderly and individuals with disabilities. Volunteers provide companionship and support, while financial contributions help fulfill clients' wishes and needs.

Career Opportunities at Veera Care emphasize a collaborative environment, work-life balance, ongoing training, and recognition for our team members. We are always looking for passionate individuals who want to make a positive impact.

For more information, visit our website or contact us at veeracare@gmail.com | +91 63592 18133

Name: Nabij Zorg Groep
Description:
Nieuw Eendracht is sinds oktober 2021 een locatie van Nabij Zorg Groep B.V. en is gelegen op een centrale plaats in het dorp Zwartebroek. In het gebouw Dwarsakker zijn 44 appartementen (huur en koop) gesitueerd waarvan 10 appartementen op de 1e etage Nieuw Eendracht vormen.

Bij Nieuw Eendracht wordt wonen in combinatie met zorg aangeboden. De aangeboden zorg kenmerkt zich door een persoonlijke, liefdevolle en warme benadering naar de bewoners. Om te kunnen wonen op Nieuw Eendracht is het nodig dat er een beschikking is over een indicatie met een ZZP 5 of 6.

Binnen Nabij Zorg Groep B.V. locatie Nieuw Eendracht staat het leveren van hoogwaardige zorg iedere dag centraal. Met iedereen die betrokken is bij onze organisatie doen we ons best kwaliteit te leveren ten behoeve van de bewoners die zorg van ons ontvangen.

Name: Total Health and Research Center
Description:
Total Health and Research Center, LLC (THRC) is a premier clinical research facility located in Homestead, Florida.
We are dedicated to advancing medical science and improving patient outcomes through innovative research studies, specialized diagnostics, and personalized health solutions.

Our multidisciplinary team includes experienced Principal Investigators, Sub-Investigators, Licensed Mental Health Counselors, and dedicated research coordinators. We collaborate with leading pharmaceutical companies, Contract Research Organizations (CROs), and healthcare partners to conduct Phase I–IV clinical trials across a wide range of therapeutic areas, including:

Neurology

Oncology

Psychiatry

Nephrology

Pulmonology

Pediatrics

Gynecology & Women’s Health

Dermatology

Metabolic & Endocrine Disorders

Alzheimer’s & Cognitive Decline

Autism Spectrum Disorders

At THRC, we combine rigorous scientific methodology with a compassionate, patient-focused approach. Our facility is equipped with state-of-the-art diagnostic tools, private exam rooms, and dedicated monitoring spaces for sponsors and CROs.

Our Services Include:

Clinical trial participation for qualified patients

Cognitive baseline assessments (MoCA, MMSE, CDR)

Advanced laboratory testing panels

Comprehensive physical and mental health evaluations

Telehealth consultations

Our mission is to bridge the gap between research and real-world care, offering patients access to cutting-edge treatments while contributing to medical advancements.

 Location: 175 NE 8 Street #4, Homestead, FL 33033
 Phone: (305) 247-4678
 Website: www.totalresearchcenter.com

Name: Klinikatech
Description:
تجمع كلينيكا الافتراضي منصة صحية متكاملة تربطك بجميع احتياجاتك الطبية من مكان واحد وبخطوات بسيطة يوفر حلاً رقمياً متطوراً للرعاية من المنزل مع تجربة سلسة وسريعة للمرضى.
ما هو التجمع؟
تجمع كلينيكا الافتراضي يقدّم شبكة شاملة من الأطباء في مختلف التخصصات مع إمكانية حجز المواعيد على مدار الساعة عبر التطبيق أو الجوال.
يهدف التجمع إلى تقريب الرعاية الصحية للمستخدم أينما كان، بأقل جهد وأعلى كفاءة رقمية.
الخدمات الطبية المتكاملة
يتيح التجمع الوصول إلى خدمات المختبرات الطبية المتقدمة، وخدمات الأشعة، إضافة إلى التمريض المنزلي الاحترافي من خلال منصة واحدة.
يساعد هذا التكامل في تقديم رحلة رعاية صحية متواصلة من التشخيص إلى المتابعة داخل بيئة افتراضية آمنة.
مميزات التجربة الرقمية
يوفر النظام حجزاً فورياً للمواعيد، وإدارة كاملة للملف الصحي والمواعيد والمدفوعات بشكل رقمي داخل التطبيق.
تدعم المنصة استشارات طبية حضورية وافتراضية، مما يمنح المستخدم مرونة اختيار الطريقة الأنسب لحالته ووقته.
الرعاية عن بعد
يمكن للمرضى الانضمام إلى الاستشارات الافتراضية مع الأطباء مباشرة من داخل التطبيق دون الحاجة لروابط خارجية أو تعقيدات تقنية.
هذه الميزة تعزز استمرارية الرعاية وتختصر وقت الانتظار وتقلل الحاجة للتنقل، خصوصاً للحالات المزمنة وكبار السن.
سهولة الوصول والراحة
يركز تجمع كلينيكا الافتراضي على جعل الرعاية الصحية أقرب وأسهل وأكثر شفافية من خلال إظهار التكاليف المقدّرة قبل تلقي الخدمة.
تُصمم رحلة المستخدم لتكون مختصرة وواضحة، من البحث عن مقدم الخدمة إلى إنهاء الدفع الرقمي بكل أمان.

Higiene e Conforto Pessoal

Entendemos o cuidado de higiene como um encontro que proporciona bem-estar e partilha de afetos. Para além de melhorar a autoestima, ajuda a prevenir infeções e permite identificar problemas na pele (exemplo: úlceras de pressão), dentre outros.

Constitui um momento único de promover a funcionalidade ou manutenção das capacidades da pessoa, quer físicas, quer mentais. Com esta base, prestamos cuidados de higienes para todos os níveis de necessidades de apoio.

Apoio a Acamados

As pessoas acamadas podem apresentar elevados níveis de dependência funcional e/ou cognitiva, sendo um grupo particularmente vulnerável a complicações decorrentes de imobilidade, declínio funcional, síndrome de imobilidade.

Para além disso, o cuidado a estas pessoas pode representar uma sobrecarga física e emocional significativa para os familiares e cuidadores diretos. Portanto, nossos colaboradores estão assentes no apoio a família à gestão de fatores predisponentes e prevenção das complicações decorrentes desta condição clínica.

Description:
Carealth Services LTD is a non-medical care and wellness agency that seeks to assist with the challenges of looking after an elderly or sick family member. We aim to relieve some of the pressures and stresses many families feel when faced with having to care for an elderly Mum or Dad or sick family as well as coping with their own family pressures such as work.

In July 2009, an inspiring narrative emerged as the genesis of this remarkable enterprise. Propelled by personal experiences and an earnest desire to effect change, the founder embarked on a transformative journey that would forever revolutionize the approach to eldercare.

The impetus for this venture was ignited by a series of deeply personal encounters. In the wake of the founder's cherished father succumbing to a protracted illness, a profound void was left behind. It was during the arduous process of caring for his ailing father while pursuing an education in the United Kingdom that the seeds of this groundbreaking idea were sown.

Nevertheless, it was an event of tremendous consequence in April 2021 that truly galvanized the family into action. At the age of 82, the founder's resilient mother underwent a critical surgical procedure to implant a pacemaker. This operation thrust the family into a whirlwind of uncertainty, underscoring the indispensable need for compassionate and dependable care during the postoperative period.

Endowed with unwavering determination, the family embarked upon a quest to secure a caregiver who could provide unwavering support in their mother's recovery journey. Through fortuitous word-of-mouth, an exceptional caregiver was discovered, whose unwavering dedication played a pivotal role in the swift convalescence and overall well-being of their mother.

This singular experience ignited a spark of possibility within the founder's mind. Initiating a profound collaboration with the caregiver, imbued with utmost respect for their insights and wisdom, they ventured to conceptualize

Description:
Who we are:
At Companio, we partner with investors who are passionate about making a positive difference—activist and social impact investors committed to building stronger, more inclusive communities. Together, we are creating thoughtfully designed Specialist Disability Accommodation (SDA) homes across Australia.

What we do: 
Proudly based in South Australia, Companio is expanding our footprint into Western Australia and Queensland. Our current projects focus on working with investors to design spacious, high-quality homes for NDIS participants, ensuring everyone has their own personal space and separate living areas—typically with just two participants per home for maximum comfort, privacy, and peace of mind.

But we want to go further. Our vision is to work directly with NDIS participants to help them design their dream homes. Why let investors decide what your home should look like? We believe the choice should be in your hands. Tell us where you want to live—we’ll help secure the land. Tell us how you want to live—whether that means living with family, friends, or independently, we want to make it happen.

At Companio, we believe your home is your sanctuary, and everyone deserves the opportunity to decide how they would like to live.

Connect with us to start your journey.

My journey into Home Healthcare began in 1999, driven by firsthand experience managing complex medical needs of my Father who met with an accident and my Mother too care of him as primary Caregiver with love affection and single minded focus, including prolonged hospitalization, post-surgical care, cardiac and neurological conditions. These experiences highlighted critical gaps in on-demand nursing, trained caregivers, home IV/injection services, diagnostics at home, and OPD coordination.
A  stitch in time can save nine.
Motivated by this insight, I established a Home Healthcare Company which is Hari Om Mother Father Healthcare in 2025. Focused on delivering reliable, patient-centric, and scalable care solutions at home. My work emphasizes quality standards, trained clinical staff, and operational excellence to reduce hospital dependency and support families with dependable healthcare services.
Committed to strengthening India’s home healthcare ecosystem through ethical practices and structured service delivery.
 CARE WITH INTEGRITY is our Mission !

Há quem diga que começou em 2011 quando os dois realizavam atendimentos domiciliares ou em 2012 quando se conheceram e se apaixonaram atendendo o senhor Amaro.

A verdade é que o amor em cuidar do outro sempre esteve ali, os fazia levantar todos os dias, e pulsava cada vez mais forte.

Em 2015, já casados e depois de uma sociedade findada, Hugo e Liliane inauguram, a tão sonhada ágape assistência domiciliar em saúde.

Unsere Mission ist es, pflegende Angehörige durch Anstellungen finanziell zu sichern und ihnen durch ein solidarisches Netzwerk die notwendige Unterstützung und Anerkennung zukommen zu lassen.

Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen:

Anstellung von pflegenden Angehörigen: Wir bieten eine berufliche Anerkennung und finanzielle Entschädigung für geleistete Pflegearbeit.
Umfassende Beratung und Unterstützung: Von pflegerischen Beratung bis hin zu rechtlichen Fragen und der Geltendmachung von Versicherungsleistungen.
Qualitätsmanagement und Weiterbildung: Wir stellen sicher, dass unsere pflegenden Angehörigen durch fortlaufende Schulungen und Unterstützung die beste Pflege bieten können.
Vernetzung und Krisenmanagement: In Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Gesundheitsdienstleistern sichern wir eine nahtlose Versorgung und schnelle Hilfe in Notfällen.

Bei Unipflege GmbH glauben wir daran, dass eine hochwertige häusliche Pflege den Pflegebedürftigen ermöglicht, länger selbstbestimmt zu leben. Unsere Fachkräfte und die von uns unterstützten pflegenden Angehörigen arbeiten täglich daran, dieses Ziel zu verwirklichen.

Entdecken Sie mehr über uns und wie wir gemeinsam die Pflege zu Hause revolutionieren können!

Life Changes. Be in Control.

Life is filled with changes; some of the most profound happen as we age. In an uncertain world, taking control and preparing for these changes is more important than ever. That's where Kore Life comes in. We know how crucial it is to have someone by your side, supporting and guiding you through each stage of aging.

Are you a senior seeking answers? Or perhaps a loved one or caretaker searching for ways to support older adults in your life? Kore Life is here to meet your needs. We provide a wealth of answers, resources, and products. We know how crucial it is to have someone by your side, supporting and guiding you through each stage of aging.

Our mission at Kore Life is a simple, powerful promise: "To add more life to your years." 

We empower you, your loved ones, and your caretakers by equipping you with essential resources and support. We're here to shed light on the complexities of aging, helping you understand and proactively tackle potential challenges before they even arise. 

We're committed to empowering you to age gracefully and embrace life, regardless of age. Growing older is a beautiful, enriching stage of life. It's a time for joy, wisdom, and fulfillment. You don't have to navigate this journey alone - together, we'll face the process of aging with confidence, dignity, and grace.

So, join us. Embrace your age. Embrace life. Together, let's make these years full of energy and filled with memories. Visit www.mykorelife.com to learn more.

Name: LEVEL Motion
Description:
Welcome to LEVEL Motion!

At LEVEL, we believe movement is more than just exercise—it’s the foundation of a healthier, more independent life. Our journey began with a simple yet powerful idea: to bridge the gap between healthcare providers and patients through technology that makes rehabilitation more accessible, engaging, and insightful.

With deep roots in the medical device and rehabilitation industries, we’ve combined years of experience in biomechanics, wearable sensors, and movement analysis to create innovative tools that support both clinicians and patients. Our technology is designed to empower healthcare providers with real-time data and actionable insights while giving patients the confidence to take charge of their recovery, no matter where they are.

We specialize in using cutting-edge motion capture, AI-driven analysis, and intuitive mobile solutions to enhance physical therapy, fall prevention, and overall mobility. Our focus isn’t just on measuring movement—it’s about understanding it, improving it, and making a real difference in people’s lives.

We’re not just developing technology—we’re shaping the future of rehabilitation. Whether you’re a clinician looking for better ways to track patient progress or someone on the path to recovery, we’re here to support every step of the journey.

Let’s move forward together.

Name: VitaFlow Nursing, PLLC
Description:
My name is Beth Jackson, and I am a registered nurse with over 25 years of nursing experience. I started VitaFlow Nursing because there is an unmet nursing need for our loved ones when they are home. 
The aging population is of a great interest to me because they need more personalized, one-on-one care while at home.  The aging population faces many challenges with health and safety. As children of aging parents, we strive to ensure their safety and well-being are met so they can stay in their homes as long as possible. However, in today's world, families are often dispersed across states or even the country, making it a challenge to be physically present as much as we would like. That is where private duty nursing can be beneficial. 

VitaFlow Nursing can be of service to you and your loved ones with private in-home nursing services that include, but not limited to: 
wellness check-ins including vital sign monitoring, medication medication monitoring (pill reminders and education about medications, as needed), injection administrations (i.e., B-12, osteoarthritis, etc.), skin assessments to aid in preventing skin breakdown or infection, home safety review for fall or other accident prevention, collecting blood work and delivering to the lab,  communications with primary physician or specialist if needed, and communicating (with consent) with family keeping everyone informed. 

If you have a need related to nursing, please contact me to discuss how I can work with you and your loved ones.

Name: CareHerd
Description:
One of CareHerd’s founders and team members is a cancer survivor. During his treatment, one of the things he and his family struggled with was coordinating care and communicating their needs. Like many of you, they had no shortage of friends and family willing to help and lend a hand. However, enlisting them just felt like more work. Work neither he nor his wife had the energy or bandwidth for. So they did what so many do. Rolled up their sleeves and took a bulk of it on themselves.

When our teammate went into remission and we better understood his struggles, we thought: there has to be a better way to build and collaborate with a care team. We also thought: most of us have gone through or are going through the same thing. Whether you’re an individual struggling with a health issue, a primary caregiver for a loved one, or a friend or family member who wants to contribute more to the care of a loved one, asking for and giving help should be easy and effective.

We sought to answer the question our teammate posed: how can we remove the overwhelming hurdles in communication, scheduling, organization, and research that limit the quality of care those in need of it actually receive? How can we better organize health data, learn about health issues, and share information across a dedicated, compassionate caregiving team?

The CareHerd app was born from this question and was our answer to helping other individuals and families connect through care to create a better, more impactful experience. It has since expanded into the foundational platform we use to power other apps (our own and for clients) for the same purpose.

Since its development, CareHerd has made a difference in the lives of those who use it. And we’re committed to continually improving it, because the road to health and quality care is a journey that does not need to be traveled alone.

Non-medical homecare encompasses a range of personalized services designed to support individuals with daily activities and tasks, enabling them to remain independent and comfortable in their own homes. Name: Trinity OB Homecare Solutions
Description:
Maternal health equity requires more than awareness. It requires action, consistency, and care delivered where outcomes are shaped. Trinity OB Homecare Solutions was built to put maternal care into practice and produce real, measurable results for mothers and families.

At Trinity OB Homecare Solutions, we provide specialized, home-based maternal health services for expectant and postpartum mothers managing high-risk conditions including Gestational Hypertension, Preeclampsia including postpartum management, Hyperemesis Gravidarum (severe nausea and vomiting in pregnancy, NVP), and Gestational Diabetes.

Our experienced clinical team develops individualized, evidence-based care plans to manage severe nausea and vomiting associated with Hyperemesis, closely monitor blood pressure for Hypertension and Preeclampsia, particularly during the critical postpartum period when risks remain elevated, and support glucose stabilization for mothers with Gestational Diabetes. Care is delivered by Labor and Delivery nurses through structured monitoring, education, and ongoing clinical oversight.

In addition to clinical monitoring, Trinity is committed to expanding access to maternal care for women who may experience barriers to consistent support. By delivering care directly in the home, Trinity helps address social determinants of health that often interfere with consistent maternal care, including transportation barriers, limited access to resources, and gaps in follow-up. This approach strengthens continuity, improves maternal outcomes, reduces preventable hospital utilization, and addresses maternal disparities. Our approach prioritizes patient education, safety, and compassionate support, ensuring mothers feel informed, supported, and cared for throughout pregnancy and postpartum recovery.

Name: Tedcare
Description:
Parents oriented, children inspired. Tedcare provides security and confidence in the most difficult job: parenting through an intelligent vital sign monitoring system for babies 0-2 years old.

In Mexico 2.5 million babies are born each year and inevitably become ill at some point in a common cold but there are also serious conditions such as Sudden Infant Death Syndrome, which takes the lives of 3,718 babies each year. This is the leading cause of death in newborns in Europe and the United States.
Our solution is a baby anklet that monitors vital signs and sends data via Bluetooth or Wi-Fi to a mobile application and a central base. If there is abnormal variation of vital signs, an alarm will be activated to alert parents to prevent sleep apnea.

Our mission is to create technologies that help families improve their life quality with health care devices.

Description:
True Freedom Home Care Plans are designed to complement—not replace—traditional insurance and long-term care solutions.

Insurance plays a critical role in managing financial risk and clinical care. What it does not always address well are the non-medical, day-to-day support needs that often arise gradually, long before a claim, facility placement, or medical event.

True Freedom fills that gap.

We offer a membership-based approach focused on future, non-medical, at-home support for individuals who are still independent and eligible to plan ahead. This may include help with everyday activities such as errands, meal preparation, light household tasks, or companionship—delivered in a way that preserves choice, dignity, and flexibility.

For insurance professionals, financial planners, and healthcare leaders, True Freedom provides an additional planning layer that can be introduced responsibly and early—without competing with existing products or recommendations.

Our role is not to replace insurance, but to support more complete conversations about how care actually unfolds in real life, before decisions become rushed or limited.

We believe clients benefit most when professionals acknowledge both financial protection and lifestyle realities—and help families prepare across the full continuum.

Name: Marcel OMR Therapy
Description:
Greetings, LinkedIn community!

 Transforming Lives Through MARCEL OMR Therapy: A Breakthrough in Oral Health
 I am thrilled to introduce you to a revolutionary solution that is changing the game in oral health – MARCEL OMR (Oral Mucosa Restoration) Therapy. This groundbreaking protocol is designed to both prevent and treat OSMF, offering new hope to those affected by this condition.

What sets MARCEL OMR Therapy apart is its foundation in rigorous research and extensive clinical trials. This patented therapy has been meticulously developed over years of dedicated work, with numerous successful outcomes.

MARCEL OMR Therapy is a holistic approach, incorporating MARCEL Poly-herbal Rinse, alongside maintaining excellent oral hygiene through regular brushing with MARCEL Poly-herbal Toothpaste. It also includes the use of antioxidant capsules, JS-63, containing Curcumin & Piperine. To complement these steps, physical jaw exercises are integrated into the treatment plan. And let's not forget the importance of adopting a healthy dietary and lifestyle regimen.
Contrary to common beliefs about OSMF, MARCEL OMR Therapy is not just about opening up the mouth; it's about reversing the process of jaw locking and restoring the mouth's natural elasticity. Importantly, it plays a crucial role in reducing the risk of oral cancer.

At MARCEL, we are passionate about improving the lives of individuals affected by OSMF and Locked Jaws. We believe that everyone deserves the chance to smile freely and live a life free from the constraints of these conditions.
Join us on this journey of transformation, where MARCEL OMR Therapy isn't just about treating a condition – it's about restoring hope, health, and happiness.
Stay tuned for more updates and insights on oral health, and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or wish to learn more about this innovative therapy.
Together, let's open doors to healthier, brighter smiles and close the chapter on the risks of OSMF

Name: Thryve Labs
Description:
When caregivers struggle, everyone feels it. Thryve Labs helps them keep going with privacy-preserving, passive, personalized and predictive products that give caregivers peace of mind. Powered by AI.

Over 70 million Americans—due to age, disability, or chronic illness—depend on others for daily support. Most receive help not from professionals, but from 55 million unpaid caregivers: family members, friends, and neighbors who step in to fill the gap. Many of them don’t live nearby. Many are holding down jobs. Many are raising families of their own. They are stretched thin—physically, financially, and emotionally.

At the same time, professional care is strained to the breaking point. Today, 7 million people rely on paid long-term care and though that number will increase over 25% by 2030, 72% of long-term care facilities already report critical staffing shortages, and 40% have had to reduce their number of beds. 

Thryve Labs believes that those who care for others need care and support too. Our solutions help lighten the load on unpaid and professional caregivers alike, because the people who care the most shouldn’t have to go it alone.

Thryve Labs offers the first predictive, privacy-preserving and personalized AI with contextual intelligence about individuals and their environments to guide best in class in-home and in-facility wellness and safety - in a cost effective, evidence-based manner

Using small interconnected sensors and devices that unobtrusively gather relevant signals, many not observable, communicable or known, Thryve's proprietary AI models work 24/7 to make inferences and predictions that track condition, care services, treatments, acute episodes and early risk indicators. 

On most days, Thryve won’t generate a prompt or alert - but with real-time dashboards and notifications (for facilities) as well as alerts and an always-on Interactive Virtual Advocate (for in-home), Thryve is ready to respond in real time to any atypical or acute event.

Name: The Health Equip
Description:
At some point in life, many of us find ourselves on the other side of a phone call. A loved one is unwell. A parent recovering alone. A grandparent needing a walker. And you're miles away, maybe in another city, maybe in another country - feeling helpless. We know that feeling. We’ve been there.


TheHealthEquip.com is born not just out of business, but out of need, empathy, and a desire to make healthcare at home simple, compassionate, and accessible.
We exist for families navigating life’s unexpected turns. For those caring from afar. For those recovering, aging, or just needing a little extra support - whether it’s a hospital bed or wheelchair for home, a trained nurse for the night, a functional medicine expert, a nutritionist, a wellness coach to your doorstep or even a physiotherapy sessions delivered at the comfort of home.


At TheHealthEquip.com, we believe that care should come home, easily and with heart. We’re your single, trusted point of contact ,  whether it’s:
-Renting or buying medical equipment
-Coordinating caregiver and physiotherapy support
-Ensuring tech help for elderly parents
Or simply making sure someone is checking in

We do it all - with reliability, warmth, and dignity.
And as we grow, we’re building something even bigger: a nationwide (and someday, global) network of care, where families can rely on seamless, on-demand health services, no matter the distance.
Because healing doesn’t happen in isolation. It happens in safe spaces. In familiar rooms. Surrounded by love and supported by us- TheHealthEquip.com 
When you can’t be there, we are.
And when you are there, we’re right beside you.

At Dash Health, we believe healthcare should meet you where you are—at home, work, or wherever life takes you. We make diagnostic testing effortless by bringing certified mobile phlebotomists and diagnostic technicians directly to patients, eliminating the hassle of traveling to a lab or clinic.

No more long wait times. No more unnecessary delays. Just fast, reliable results.

Why Dash Health?
 On-Demand Service – We come to you. No waiting rooms, no stress.

 Nationwide Coverage – Our network of trained mobile professionals is always nearby.

Whether you’re a patient, healthcare provider, or payer, we’re here to simplify diagnostics—because better healthcare starts with better access.

Let’s redefine mobile diagnostics together. Learn more at dash-health.com.

Name: Embark Care
Description:
Embark Care is a non-medical in-home care provider service and senior care resource.  Launched in 2021, Embark Care is a collaboration of administrators who have over 40 years of proven combined management and ownership experience in this field. Our goal is to provide excellent compassionate care to seniors so that they can live with confidently, and safely in the familiarity of their home where, they want to be.  We also provide in-facility sitters to support the dignity and privacy of clients who reside in nursing homes or assisted living facilities.  We communicate and coordinate closely with our clients' other home health or hospice agencies to ensure outstanding care.

Top 10 Things that Set Embark Care Apart:
-Our caregivers have verifiable experience, are drug tested, and background checked.
-We use a state of the art scheduling system to ensure that our caregivers are on assignment, on time.
-Embark Care will only assign caregivers who are familiar with the care needs of the client (i.e. Alzheimers/dementia/Parkinsons)
-We offer easy to understand direct billing so you'll always know exactly what services you're paying for vs "projected" billing.
-No minimum schedules.  We can provide as little as 1 hour per week or round the clock live in care.  We have no set contract periods.
-Embark Care contracts with the VA to provide HBCP services and with Veterans Home Care for Aid and Attendance pension benefits for veterans and surviving spouses of veterans
-We coordinate with Area Agencies on Aging to provide short term transitional care for qualified seniors such as those overcoming extended illness or on nursing home wait lists
-Embark Care offers reasonable rates!
-You can usually expect to always have the same caregiver.  We don't plug just anyone into a client's home.
-We are locally owned and operated.  We are reachable to answer questions or concerns 24/7.

Name: Your Path Guide Pty Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Your Path Guide, a dedicated Adelaide-based practice specialising in end-of-life planning, support and sound healing therapies.

At Your Path Guide, we understand that the end-of-life journey is deeply personal and unique. Our founder and director, an experienced End of Life Doula, offers compassionate support to individuals with terminal or life-limiting illnesses and those nearing the end of their lives. We work closely with you and your loved ones to create a personalised end-of-life plan that honours your wishes and provides peace of mind.

In addition to our end-of-life support services, we offer Sound Therapy, facilitated by a skilled practitioner. Using Tibetan Sound Bowls, we deliver personalised sound therapy sessions designed to promote wellness, relaxation and emotional healing.

We are proud to be involved in shaping the future of holistic end-of-life care in Australia. Our Director serves as a Board member and Chair of HELD (Holistic End of Life and Death Care Australia Ltd.), an emerging peak body in this field. Additionally, as a founding member of the COTA SA Rainbow Horizons Project group, we are committed to supporting end-of-life planning and care within LGBTQ+ communities.

Our mission at Your Path Guide is to ease life’s journey. Whether through regular sound healing sessions or navigating the end-of-life journey for yourself or a loved one, we are here to ensure you understand the choices available to you and support those choices with care and respect.

Located in Adelaide, South Australia, we look forward to connecting with you and providing the support you need during these important times.

Warm regards,
Your Path Guide Pty Ltd

Name: byL(바이엘)
Description:
"오늘보다 나은 내일의 시니어케어를 만듭니다."

byL은 급격히 변화하는 인구 구조 속에서 시니어케어의 지속 가능성을 고민하며, 기술을 기반으로 혁신적인 서비스를 제공해요. 시니어들의 삶의 질을 향상시키고, 그들이 존엄성을 지하며 행복한 삶을 살아갈 수 있도록 돕는 것을 사명으로 삼고 있어요.

브라보 시니어케어
- 국내에서 가장 빠르게 성장하고 있는 방문요양 서비스 플랫폼으로, 시니어 맞춤형 케어를 제공하며, 언제 어디서나 효율적이고 전문적인 돌봄 서비스를 누릴 수 있도록 지원합니다.

브라보 데이케어
- 자립형 시니어 데이케어(주간보호) 센터로, 시니어들의 자립적인 생활을 도와주며, 일상에서의 활력과 사회적 연결을 제공합니다.

byL은 기술 혁신과 인간 중심의 케어를 결합하여, 시니어들이 보다 건강하고 활기찬 삶을 누릴 수 있도록 지속적으로 노력하고 있어요. 우리는 시니어케어의 미래를 열어가는 기업으로, 더 나은 내일을 위한 변화의 중심에 설게요.

Ondanks dat we samen voor de zorgvrager zorgen, zien we de mantelzorger ook als cliënt en iemand waar we rekening mee houden. De mantelzorger is vaak het anker voor de zorgvrager. En naar gelang de wens halen we dat anker op, zodat de mantelzorger even lucht krijgt. 

Ten opzichte van andere organisaties onderscheiden wij ons in het feit dat een gezicht komt voor alle werkzaamheden. Wij ondersteunen bijvoorbeeld bij het hele ochtendritueel inclusief douchen/wassen, medicatie, ontbijt en het bakje koffie met het goede gesprek. Deze begeleiding kan overgaan in het aanbieden van de lunch, een (buiten)activiteit, een boodschap doen of een hobby uitvoeren. En ook in de avond bieden wij weer een combinatie van werkzaamheden.

Name: A-Tens
Description:
Je suis Nicolas DUPROUILH, j’ai 46 ans, je suis père d’un fils de 14 ans.

Après une carrière dans le conseil financier et le domaine bancaire, j’ai eu l’opportunité de m’orienter vers la prestation de santé à domicile plus particulièrement dans le domaine des apnées du sommeil et du respiratoire en général.

A cette occasion, suite à une formation interne, j’ai été bouleversé et ému par les souffrances et le chemin de croix que les femmes atteintes d'endométriose subissent au quotidien.
J’ai pu découvrir que la neurostimulation était la réponse pour lutter contre les douleurs sans traitement invasif ni contraintes supplémentaires.

Devant le soulagement et la reprise de la maîtrise de sa vie que constitue ce traitement pour les patientes, j’ai voulu créer A-TENS afin de pouvoir apporter une alternative efficace qui permet aux patientes de reprendre le contrôle sur leur vie aussi bien personnellement que professionnellement en toute discrétion grâce au dispositif sans fils.

Chaque éducation thérapeutique est l’occasion pour moi de pouvoir apporter du bien-être, c’est un privilège d’allier ses convictions et ses valeurs d’altruisme et d’empathie à son activité professionnelle et je suis heureux de l’accomplir quotidiennement.

A-TENS met toute son énergie et sa compétence au service des patients atteints de troubles urinaires ou de douleurs gynécologiques (Endométriose) grâce à la neurostimulation.

Ce dispositif non intrusif, non invasif, non chirurgical, non médicamenteux et sans effets secondaires permet de soulager les douleurs en gynécologie et de retrouver une vie sereine en réduisant voire en éradiquant les troubles urinaires.

Sur ordonnance, A-TENS assure l’éducation thérapeutique à domicile des patients, transmet les comptes rendus de suivi au médecin prescripteur (Urologue, gynécologue, sage-femme...) et veille à la réussite du traitement.

Notre établissement est agréé par la sécurité sociale pour les prises en charge.

Avec A-TENS reprenez le contrôle.

Name: HIAcare
Description:
Naviguer Ensemble dans le Défi du Maintien à Domicile : Une Solution Collaborative par HIAcare"

Dans les moments où la perte d'autonomie d'un proche bouleverse notre quotidien, il est crucial de trouver un soutien fiable et humain. HIAcare se consacre à devenir cette source de soutien. Nous sommes plus qu'une organisation ; nous sommes un partenaire attentif qui écoute, évalue et accompagne, simplifiant les démarches et connectant efficacement tous les acteurs impliqués.

Le maintien à domicile est un effort collectif impliquant l'aidé, sa famille, et divers professionnels. Clarté, coordination et communication adaptée sont essentielles pour savoir qui fait quoi et quand. Les professionnels, eux aussi, recherchent une collaboration fluide et simplifiée avec leurs collègues et les familles.

Malheureusement, malgré la bonne volonté et le dévouement, une organisation cohérente et une collaboration effective font souvent défaut. Chez HIAcare, nous visons à changer cela. Notre objectif est de co-créer et de maintenir une approche respectueuse pour tous : aidés, aidants, professionnels.

Nous aspirons à rassembler tous les intervenants pour transformer l'organisation, les ressources et les routines quotidiennes, préservant ainsi la vitalité et la qualité de vie à domicile.

Notre mission est de simplifier la vie des personnes aidées, en collaborant étroitement avec elles et ceux qui les soutiennent. En facilitant la coordination, l'organisation et le suivi, nous améliorons la vie de tous, tout en rendant le quotidien des professionnels plus agréable et efficace.

Nous sommes en pleine élaboration d'une plateforme collaborative dédiée à l'aidance, à la coordination des soins et à l'accompagnement pour un maintien à domicile réussi. Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure vers un mieux-être collectif à domicile.

#MaintienÀDomicile #Collaboration #HIAcare #SoutienCommunautaire
